cvars.description: If > 0 performance baselines for Niagara will be regenerated on every level change.

cvars.name: fx.NiagaraReleaseBuffersOnReset
cvars.description: Will release all memory associated with data buffers when the dataset is reset.

cvars.name: fx.NiagaraRuntimeCycleHistorySize
cvars.description: How many frames history to use in Niagara's runtime performance trackers.

cvars.name: fx.NiagaraScalabilityUpdateTime_High
cvars.description: Time in seconds between updates to scalability states for Niagara systems set to update at High frequency.

cvars.name: fx.NiagaraScalabilityUpdateTime_Low
cvars.description: Time in seconds between updates to scalability states for Niagara systems set to update at Low frequency.

cvars.name: fx.NiagaraScalabilityUpdateTime_Medium
cvars.description: Time in seconds between updates to scalability states for Niagara systems set to update at Medium frequency.

cvars.name: fx.NiagaraScriptStatTracking
cvars.description: If > 0 stats tracking operations will be compiled into Niagara Scripts.

cvars.name: fx.NiagaraStateless.ComputeManager.UseCache
cvars.description: When enabled we will attempt to reuse allocated buffers between frames.

cvars.name: fx.NiagaraStateless.Distribution.OptimizeLUTs
cvars.description: When enabled we optimize the LUT generation.

cvars.name: fx.NiagaraVectorFieldUseIspc
cvars.description: When enabled VectorField will use ISPC for sampling if appropriate.

cvars.name: fx.NumFramesBetweenRuntimePerfSamples
cvars.description: How many frames between each sample of Niagara runtime perf.

cvars.name: fx.ParticleCollisionIgnoreInvisibleTime
cvars.description: The time a particle system component has to be invisible for to have all collision ignored.

cvars.name: fx.ParticleDefaultLightInverseExposureBlend
cvars.description: Blend Factor used to blend between Intensity and Intensity / Exposure.

cvars.name: fx.ParticleManagerAsyncBatchSize
cvars.description: How many PSCs the ParticleWorldManager should tick per async task.

cvars.name: fx.ParticlePerfStats.Enabled
cvars.description: Used to control if stat gathering is enabled or not.

cvars.name: FX.ParticleSlackGPU
cvars.description: Amount of slack to allocate for GPU particles to prevent tile churn as percentage of total particles.

cvars.name: FX.ParticleSystemPool.CleanTime
cvars.description: How often should the pool be cleaned (in seconds).

cvars.name: FX.ParticleSystemPool.Enable
cvars.description: How many Particle System Components to preallocate when creating new ones for the pool.

cvars.name: FX.ParticleSystemPool.KillUnusedTime
cvars.description: How long a pooled particle component needs to be unused for before it is destroyed.

cvars.name: fx.PerfBaselineThreshold_Bad
cvars.description: Ratio to the baseline perf that we consider a system to have bad perf and warn strongly about it.

cvars.name: fx.PerfBaselineThreshold_Poor
cvars.description: Ratio to the baseline perf that we consider a system to have poor perf and warn about it.

cvars.name: fx.PruneEmittersOnCookByDetailMode
cvars.description: Whether to eliminate all emitters that don't match the detail mode. This will only work if scalability settings affecting detail mode can not be changed at runtime (depends on platform).

cvars.name: fx.PSCMan.Enable
cvars.description: If PSC world manager is enabled.

cvars.name: fx.QualityLevelSpawnRateScaleReferenceLevel
cvars.description: Controls the reference level for quality level based spawn rate scaling. This is the FX quality level at which spawn rate is not scaled down; Spawn rate scaling will happen by each emitter's QualityLevelSpawnRateScale value for each reduction in level below the reference level. Default = 2. Value should range from 0 to the maximum FX quality level.

cvars.name: fx.ScalabilityManParallelThreshold
cvars.description: Number of instances required for a niagara significance manger to go parallel for it's update.

cvars.name: fx.ScalabilityMaxUpdatesPerFrame
cvars.description: Number of instances that can be processed per frame when updating scalability state. -1 for all of them.

cvars.name: fx.ShowNiagaraDeveloperWindows
cvars.description: If > 0 the niagara system, emitter, and script editors will show additional developer windows. These windows are for niagara tool development and debugging and editing the data directly in these windows can cause instability.

cvars.name: fx.SkipVectorVMBackendOptimizations
cvars.description: If 1, skip HLSLCC's backend optimization passes during VectorVM compilation.

cvars.name: fx.SuppressNiagaraSystems
cvars.description: If > 0 Niagara particle systems will not be activated.

cvars.name: FX.TestGPUSort
cvars.description: Test GPU sort. 1: Small, 2: Large, 3: Exhaustive, 4: Random

cvars.name: FX.Trail.MaxDistanceTessellation
cvars.description: Maximum tessellation steps allowed for distance based tessellation.

cvars.name: FX.Trail.MaxTangentTessellation
cvars.description: Maximum tessellation steps allowed for tangent based tessellation.

cvars.name: fx.TriggerDebugCrash
cvars.description: If > 0 we deliberately crash to test Crash Reporter integration.

cvars.name: fx.UseNewGraphHash
cvars.description: If > 0 a hash of the graph node state will be used, otherwise will use the older code path.

cvars.name: FX.VisualizeGPUSimulation
cvars.description: Visualize the current state of GPU simulation. 0 = off 1 = visualize particle state 2 = visualize curve texture

cvars.name: fx.WaitForAsyncStallWarnThresholdMS
cvars.description: If we stall in WaitForAsync for longer than this threshold then we emit a stall warning message.

cvars.name: g.bEnablePendingCleanupObjectsCommandBatching
cvars.description: Enable batching PendingCleanupObjects destruction.

cvars.name: g.DebugCameraTraceComplex
cvars.description: Whether DebugCamera should use complex or simple collision for the line trace. 1: complex collision, 0: simple collision

cvars.name: g.TimeoutForBlockOnRenderFence
cvars.description: Number of milliseconds the game thread should wait before failing when waiting on a render thread fence.

cvars.name: g.TimeToBlockOnRenderFence
cvars.description: Number of milliseconds the game thread should block when waiting on a render thread fence.

cvars.name: GameFeaturePlugin.LeakedAssetTrace.MaxReportCount. Deprecated use PluginManager.LeakedAssetTrace.MaxReportCount instead
cvars.description: Max number of assets to report when we find leaked assets.

cvars.name: GameFeaturePlugin.LeakedAssetTrace.RenameLeakedPackages. Deprecated used PluginManager.LeakedAssetTrace.RenameLeakedPackages instead
cvars.description: Should packages which are leaked after the Game Feature Plugin is unloaded or unmounted.

cvars.name: GameFeaturePlugin.LeakedAssetTrace.Severity
cvars.description: Controls severity of logging when the engine detects that assets from an Game Feature Plugin were leaked during unloading or unmounting. . Deprecated use GameFeaturePlugin.LeakedAssetTrace instead 0 - all reference tracing and logging is disabled 1 - logs an error 2 - ensure 3 - fatal error

cvars.name: GameFeaturePlugin.LeakedAssetTrace.TraceMode
cvars.description: Controls detail level of reference tracing when the engine detects that assets from a Game Feature Plugin were leaked during unloading or unmounting. Deprecated used PluginManager.LeakedAssetTrace.TraceMode instead 0 - direct references only 1 - full reference trace

cvars.name: GameFeaturePlugin.VerifyUnload
cvars.description: Verify plugin assets are no longer in memory when unloading. Deprecated use PluginManager.VerifyUnload instead

cvars.name: GameplayCameras.EnableInstantiationRecycling
cvars.description: (Default: true. Toggles recycling of instantiated camera objects.

cvars.name: GameplayCameras.EnableLiveEdit
cvars.description: (Default: true. Toggles live-editing of camera runtime objects.

cvars.name: GameplayTags.EnableDetailedStats
cvars.description: Runtime toggle for verbose CPU profiling stats

cvars.name: GameplayTags.PrintNetIndiceAssignment
cvars.description: Logs GameplayTag NetIndice assignment

cvars.name: GameplayTags.PrintReportOnShutdown
cvars.description: Print gameplay tag replication report on shutdown

cvars.name: gc.ActorClusteringEnabled
cvars.description: Whether to allow levels to create actor clusters for GC.

cvars.name: gc.AdditionalFinishDestroyTimeGC
cvars.description: Additional wait time in seconds to allow FinishDestroy to complete.

cvars.name: gc.AllowIncrementalGather
cvars.description: Set to control incremental Gather Unreachable Objects (experimental)

cvars.name: gc.AllowIncrementalReachability
cvars.description: Set to control incremental Reachability Analysis (experimental)

cvars.name: gc.AllowParallelGC
cvars.description: Used to control parallel GC.

cvars.name: gc.AssetClustreringEnabled
cvars.description: If true, the engine will attempt to create clusters from asset files.

cvars.name: gc.CollectGarbageEveryFrame
cvars.description: Used to debug garbage collection...Collects garbage every N frames if the value is > 0.

cvars.name: gc.ContinuousIncrementalGC
cvars.description: Used to debug garbage collection...Kicks off Incremental Garbage Collection as soon as the previous one finishes.

cvars.name: gc.CreateGCClusters
cvars.description: If true, the engine will attempt to create clusters of objects for better garbage collection performance.

cvars.name: gc.DebugGraphSafeDurationThresholdMs
cvars.description: GC Debug Graph: Safe GC duration threshold (in milliseconds).

cvars.name: gc.DelayReachabilityIterations
cvars.description: Causes the Garbage Collector to delay incremental reachability iterations by the provided number of frames.

cvars.name: gc.DumpAnalyticsToLog
cvars.description: Dumps Garbage Collection analytics to log at the end of each GC.

cvars.name: gc.DumpObjectCountsToLogWhenMaxObjectLimitExceeded
cvars.description: If not 0 dumps UObject counts to log when maximum object count limit has been reached.

cvars.name: gc.FlushStreamingOnGC
cvars.description: If enabled, streaming will be flushed each time garbage collection is triggered.

cvars.name: gc.ForceCollectGarbageEveryFrame
cvars.description: If set to 1, the engine will force GC each frame.

cvars.name: gc.ForceEnableGCProcessor
cvars.description: Force garbage collection to use the debug processor which may provide additional information during GC crashes.

cvars.name: gc.GarbageEliminationEnabled
cvars.description: If true, objects marked as Garbage will be automatically nulled and destroyed by Garbage Collector.

cvars.name: gc.GarbageReferenceTrackingEnabled
cvars.description: Causes the Garbage Collector to track and log unreleased garbage objects. If 1, will dump every reference. If 2, will dump a sample of the references to highlight problematic properties.

cvars.name: gc.IncrementalBeginDestroyEnabled
cvars.description: If true, the engine will destroy objects incrementally using time limit each frame

cvars.name: gc.IncrementalGatherTimeLimit
cvars.description: Override Incremental Gather Time Limit (in seconds).

cvars.name: gc.IncrementalGCTimePerFrame
cvars.description: How much time is allowed for incremental GC each frame in seconds

cvars.name: gc.IncrementalReachabilityTimeLimit
cvars.description: Time in seconds (game time) we should allow for incremental GC (experimental).

cvars.name: gc.LowMemory.IncrementalGCTimePerFrame
cvars.description: How much time is allowed for incremental GC each frame in seconds if memory is low

cvars.name: gc.LowMemory.MemoryThresholdMB
cvars.description: Memory threshold for low memory GC mode, in MB

cvars.name: gc.LowMemory.TimeBetweenPurgingPendingKillObjects
cvars.description: Time in seconds (game time) we should wait between purging object references to objects that are pending kill when we're low on memory

cvars.name: gc.LowMemory.TimeBetweenPurgingPendingLevels
cvars.description: Time in seconds (game time) we should wait between GC when we're low on memory and there are levels pending unload

cvars.name: gc.MaxFinishDestroyTimeoutObjectsToLog
cvars.description: Maximum number of objects to log out when object destruction takes longer than expected

cvars.name: gc.MaxObjectsInEditor
cvars.description: Placeholder console variable, currently not used in runtime.

cvars.name: gc.MaxObjectsInGame
cvars.description: Placeholder console variable, currently not used in runtime.

cvars.name: gc.MaxObjectsNotConsideredByGC
cvars.description: Placeholder console variable, currently not used in runtime.

cvars.name: gc.MinGCClusterSize
cvars.description: Minimum GC cluster size

cvars.name: gc.MultithreadedDestructionEnabled
cvars.description: If true, the engine will free objects' memory from a worker thread

cvars.name: gc.NumRetriesBeforeForcingGC
cvars.description: Maximum number of times GC can be skipped if worker threads are currently modifying UObject state.

cvars.name: gc.PerformGCWhileAsyncLoading
cvars.description: Allow performing GC even if there's async loading in progress.

cvars.name: gc.SizeOfPermanentObjectPool
cvars.description: Placeholder console variable, currently not used in runtime.

cvars.name: gc.StressTestGC
cvars.description: If set to 1, the engine will attempt to trigger GC each frame while async loading.

cvars.name: gc.TimeBetweenPurgingPendingKillObjects
cvars.description: Time in seconds (game time) we should wait between purging object references to objects that are pending kill.

cvars.name: gc.TimeBetweenPurgingPendingKillObjectsOnIdleServerMultiplier
cvars.description: Multiplier to apply to time between purging pending kill objects when on an idle server.

cvars.name: gc.UseDisregardForGCOnDedicatedServers
cvars.description: If false, DisregardForGC will be disabled for dedicated servers.

cvars.name: gc.VerifyAssumptions
cvars.description: Whether to verify GC assumptions (disregard for GC, clustering) on each GC.

cvars.name: gc.VerifyAssumptionsChance
cvars.description: Chance (0-1) to randomly verify GC assumptions on each GC.

cvars.name: gc.VerifyAssumptionsOnFullPurge
cvars.description: Whether to verify GC assumptions (disregard for GC, clustering) on full purge GCs.

cvars.name: gc.VerifyNoUnreachableObjects
cvars.description: Enables or disables no unreachable objects are reachable verification

cvars.name: gc.VerifyUObjectsAreNotFGCObjects
cvars.description: If true, the engine will throw a warning when it detects a UObject-derived class which also derives from FGCObject or any of its members is derived from FGCObject

cvars.name: geometry.CombineInstances.DebugRemoveHiddenStrategy
cvars.description: Configure hidden-removal strategy via (temporary debug)

cvars.name: geometry.CombineInstances.Verbose
cvars.description: Enable Verbose logging in Combine Mesh Instances, also disables parallel LOD processing

cvars.name: geometry.DynamicMesh.DupeStashTimeout
cvars.description: Timeout in seconds for references held by internal UDynamicMesh duplication helper system. See FDynamicMeshCopyHelper.

cvars.name: geometry.DynamicMesh.EnableDebugMeshes
cvars.description: Enable/Disable FDynamicMesh3 Global Debug Mesh support. Debug Mesh support is only available in the Editor.

cvars.name: geometry.DynamicMesh.MaxPoolSize
cvars.description: Maximum number of meshes a UDynamicMeshPool will allow to be in the pool before running garbage collection

cvars.name: geometry.DynamicMesh.TextBasedDupeTriThreshold
cvars.description: Triangle count threshold for text-based UDynamicMesh duplication using Base64. Large values are quite slow.

cvars.name: geometry.MeshSceneAdapter.SingleThreaded
cvars.description: Determines whether or not to use multi-threading in MeshSceneAdapter.

cvars.name: GeometryCache.Codec.Debug
cvars.description: Enables debug logging for the codec.

cvars.name: GeometryCache.InterpolateFrames
cvars.description: Interpolate between geometry cache frames (if topology allows this).

cvars.name: GeometryCache.LookaheadSeconds
cvars.description: The amount of data (expressed in seconds of animation) to try and keep resident in advance for geometry caches. Note this works regardless of the playback direction.

cvars.name: GeometryCache.OffloadUpdate
cvars.description: Offloat some updates from the render thread to the workers & RHI threads.

cvars.name: GeometryCache.PrefetchSeconds
cvars.description: The amount of data (expressed in seconds of animation) to preload of geometry caches. This is the data blockingly loaded at component spawn time.

cvars.name: GeometryCache.Streamer.BlockTillFinishStreaming
cvars.description: Force the GeometryCache streamer to block until it has finished streaming all the requested frames

cvars.name: GeometryCache.Streamer.ShowNotification
cvars.description: Show notification while the GeometryCache streamer is streaming data

cvars.name: GeometryCache.TrailingSeconds
cvars.description: The amount of data (expressed in seconds of animation) to try and keep resident inverse to the playback direction for geometry caches.

cvars.name: Gizmos.DebugDraw
cvars.description: Displays debugging information.

cvars.name: Gizmos.DotThreshold
cvars.description: Dot threshold for determining whether the rotation plane is perpendicular to the camera view [0.2, 1.0]

cvars.name: Gizmos.ProjectIndirect
cvars.description: Project to the nearest point of the curve when handling indirect rotation.

cvars.name: GPUSort.DebugOffsets
cvars.description: Debug GPU sort offsets.

cvars.name: GPUSort.DebugSort
cvars.description: Debug GPU sorting.

cvars.name: grass.CullDistanceScale
cvars.description: Multiplier on all grass cull distances.

cvars.name: grass.CullSubsections
cvars.description: 1: Cull each foliage component; 0: Cull only based on the landscape component.

cvars.name: grass.densityScale
cvars.description: Multiplier on all grass densities.

cvars.name: grass.DisableDynamicShadows
cvars.description: 0: Dynamic shadows from grass follow the grass type bCastDynamicShadow flag; 1: Dynamic shadows are disabled for all grass

cvars.name: grass.DisableGPUCull
cvars.description: For debugging. Set this to zero to see where the grass is generated. Useful for tweaking the guard bands.

cvars.name: grass.DiscardDataOnLoad
cvars.description: 1: Discard grass data on load (disables grass); 0: Keep grass data (requires reloading level)

cvars.name: grass.DrawExclusionVolumes
cvars.description: Whether we should draw the exclusion volumes or not

cvars.name: grass.Enable
cvars.description: 1: Enable Grass; 0: Disable Grass

cvars.name: grass.GrassCreationPrioritizedMultipler
cvars.description: Multiplier applied to MaxCreatePerFrame and MaxAsyncTasks when grass creation is prioritized.

cvars.name: grass.GrassMap.AlwaysBuildRuntimeGenerationResources
cvars.description: By default we only compile shaders and build resources for runtime generation when runtime generation is enabled. Set this to 1 to always build them for all platforms, allowing you to toggle runtime generation in a cooked build.

cvars.name: grass.GrassMap.GuardBandDiscardMultiplier
cvars.description: Used to control discarding in the grass map runtime generation system. Approximate range, 1-4. Multiplied by the cull distance to control when we discard grass maps.

cvars.name: grass.GrassMap.GuardBandMultiplier
cvars.description: Used to control discarding in the grass map runtime generation system. Approximate range, 1-4. Multiplied by the cull distance to control when we add grass maps.

cvars.name: grass.GrassMap.MaxComponentsForBlockingUpdate
cvars.description: How many landscape components can update simultaneously when running a blocking grass map update (i.e. on editor save).

cvars.name: grass.GrassMap.MaxComponentsRendering
cvars.description: How many landscape components can be rendering grass maps at once, when using amortized runtime generation.

cvars.name: grass.GrassMap.MaxComponentsStreaming
cvars.description: How many landscape components can be streaming their textures at once for grass map renders, when using amortized runtime generation.

cvars.name: grass.GrassMap.MaxDiscardChecksPerFrame
cvars.description: How many landscape components are checked if they should discard their grass maps each frame.

cvars.name: grass.GrassMap.PrioritizedMultiplier
cvars.description: Multiplier applied to MaxComponentsStreaming and MaxComponentsRendering when grass creation is prioritized.

cvars.name: grass.GrassMap.RenderCaptureNextDraws
cvars.description: Trigger render captures during the next N grassmap draw calls.

cvars.name: grass.GrassMap.UseAsyncFetch
cvars.description: Enable async fetch tasks to readback the runtime grass maps from the GPU. When disabled, it the fetch is performed on the game thread, when enabled it uses an async task instead.

cvars.name: grass.GrassMap.UseRuntimeGeneration
cvars.description: Enable runtime grass map generation to save disk space and runtime memory. When enabled the grass density maps are not serialized and are built on the fly at runtime.

cvars.name: grass.GuardBandDiscardMultiplier
cvars.description: Used to control discarding in the grass system. Approximate range, 1-4. Multiplied by the cull distance to control when we discard grass components.

cvars.name: grass.GuardBandMultiplier
cvars.description: Used to control discarding in the grass system. Approximate range, 1-4. Multiplied by the cull distance to control when we add grass components.

cvars.name: grass.IgnoreExcludeBoxes
cvars.description: For debugging. Ignores any exclusion boxes.

cvars.name: grass.MaxAsyncTasks
cvars.description: Used to control the number of grass components created at a time.

cvars.name: grass.MaxCreatePerFrame
cvars.description: Maximum number of Grass components to create per frame

cvars.name: grass.MaxInstancesPerComponent
cvars.description: Used to control the number of grass components created. More can be more efficient, but can be hitchy as new components come into range

cvars.name: grass.MinFramesToKeepGrass
cvars.description: Minimum number of frames before cached grass can be discarded; used to prevent thrashing.

cvars.name: grass.MinTimeToKeepGrass
cvars.description: Minimum number of seconds before cached grass can be discarded; used to prevent thrashing.

cvars.name: grass.PrerenderGrassmaps
cvars.description: 1: Pre-render grass maps for all components in the editor; 0: Generate grass maps on demand while moving through the editor

cvars.name: grass.TickInterval
cvars.description: Number of frames between grass ticks.

cvars.name: grass.UseStreamingManagerForCameras
cvars.description: 1: Use Streaming Manager; 0: Use ViewLocationsRenderedLastFrame

cvars.name: health.logHealthSnapshot
cvars.description: Log health snapshot

cvars.name: http.CurlDebugServerResponseEnabled
cvars.description: Enable debugging of server response

cvars.name: http.CurlEventLoopEnableChance
cvars.description: Enable chance of event loop, from 0 to 100

cvars.name: http.DefaultUserAgentCommentsEnabled
cvars.description: Whether comments are supported in the defualt user agent string

cvars.name: Http.InsecureProtocolEnabled
cvars.description: Enable insecure http protocol

cvars.name: Http.RetrySystemNonGameThreadSupportEnabled
cvars.description: Enable retry system non-game thread support

cvars.name: IA.ValidateAccessFromGameThread
cvars.description: If set errors will get reported when trying to resolve or access the handle from non game threads.

cvars.name: ias.DisplayOnScreenStatistics
cvars.description: Enables display of Ias on screen statistics

cvars.name: ias.DistributedEndpointAttemptCount
cvars.description: Number of times we should try to resolve a distributed endpoint befor eusing the fallback url (if there is one)

cvars.name: ias.DistributedEndpointFallbackUrl
cvars.description: CDN url to be used if a distributed endpoint cannot be reached (overrides IoStoreOnDemand.ini)

cvars.name: ias.DistributedEndpointRetryWaitTime
cvars.description: How long to wait (in seconds) after failing to resolve a distributed endpoint before retrying

cvars.name: ias.DistributedEndpointTimeout
cvars.description: How long to wait (in seconds) for a distributed endoint resolve request before timing out

cvars.name: ias.HttpChangeEndpointAfterSuccessfulRetry
cvars.description: Whether to change the current endpoint after a sucessful retry

cvars.name: ias.HttpConcurrentRequests
cvars.description: Number of concurrent requests in the http client.

cvars.name: ias.HttpConnectionCount
cvars.description: Number of open HTTP connections to the on demand endpoint(s).

cvars.name: ias.HttpEnabled
cvars.description: Enables individual asset streaming via HTTP

cvars.name: ias.HttpErrorHighWater
cvars.description: High water mark when HTTP streaming will be disabled

cvars.name: ias.HttpErrorSampleCount
cvars.description: Number of samples for computing the moving average of failed HTTP requests

cvars.name: ias.HttpFailTimeOutMs
cvars.description: Fail infinite network waits that take longer than this (in ms, 0=disabled)

cvars.name: ias.HttpHealthCheckWaitTime
cvars.description: Number of milliseconds to wait before reconnecting to avaiable endpoint(s)

cvars.name: ias.HttpIdleMs
cvars.description: Time in seconds to close idle connections or fail waits

cvars.name: ias.HttpOptionalBulkDataEnabled
cvars.description: Enables optional bulk data via HTTP

cvars.name: ias.HttpPipelineLength
cvars.description: Number of concurrent requests on one connection

cvars.name: ias.HttpPollTimeoutMs
cvars.description: Http tick poll timeout in milliseconds

cvars.name: ias.HttpPrimaryEndpoint
cvars.description: Primary endpoint to use returned from the distribution endpoint

cvars.name: ias.HttpRangeRequestMinSizeKiB
cvars.description: Minimum chunk size for partial chunk request(s)

cvars.name: ias.HttpRateLimitKiBPerSecond
cvars.description: Http throttle limit in KiBPerSecond

cvars.name: ias.HttpRecvBufKiB
cvars.description: Recv buffer size

cvars.name: ias.HttpRecvWorkThresholdKiB
cvars.description: Threshold of data remaining at which next request is sent (in KiB)

cvars.name: ias.HttpRetryCount
cvars.description: Number of HTTP request retries before failing the request (if connected to a service url rather than distributed endpoints).

cvars.name: ias.HttpSocksIp
cvars.description: Routes all IAS HTTP traffic through the given SOCKS proxy

cvars.name: ias.HttpSocksPort
cvars.description: Port of the SOCKS proxy to use

cvars.name: ias.HttpSocksVersion
cvars.description: SOCKS proxy protocol version to use

cvars.name: ias.HttpTimeOutMs
cvars.description: Time out value for HTTP requests in milliseconds

cvars.name: ias.MaxEndpointTestCountAtStartup
cvars.description: Number of endpoint(s) to test at startup

cvars.name: ias.ReportAnalytics
cvars.description: Enables reporting statics to the analytics system

cvars.name: ias.ReportCacheAnalytics
cvars.description: Enables reporting statics on our file cache usage to the analytics system

cvars.name: ias.ReportHttpAnalytics
cvars.description: Enables reporting statics on our http traffic to the analytics system

cvars.name: ias.StatisticsLogInterval
cvars.description: Enables and sets interval for periodic logging of statistics

cvars.name: ias.SuspendSystem
cvars.description: Suspends the use of the OnDemand system

cvars.name: ias.TocMode
cvars.description: How should the IAS system load it's toc (see ETocMode). 0 = Load a single .iochunktoc 1 = Try to find a .uondemandtoc each time a pak file is mounted 2 = Download the toc from the target CDN

cvars.name: IDO.Enable
cvars.description: Allows property bags and IDOs to be created for supported classes.

cvars.name: ImageWriteQueue.MaxConcurrency
cvars.description: The maximum number of async image writes allowable at any given time.Default is to use the number of cores available.

cvars.name: ImageWriteQueue.MaxQueueSize
cvars.description: The maximum number of queued image write tasks allowable before the queue will block when adding more.Default is to use 4 times the number of cores available or 16 when multithreading is disabled on the command line.

cvars.name: ImgMedia.FieldOfViewMultiplier
cvars.description: Multiply the field of view for active cameras by this value, generally to increase the frustum overall sizes to mitigate missing tile artifacts.

cvars.name: ImgMedia.FrameInvalidationMaxCount
cvars.description: Maximum number of cached frames that can be invalidated when missing the latest mips/tiles.

cvars.name: ImgMedia.ICVFX.InnerOnlyTiles
cvars.description: This CVar will ignore tile calculation for all viewports except for Display Cluster inner viewports. User should enable upscaling on Media plate to display lower quality mips instead, otherwise other viewports will only display tiles loaded specifically for inner viewport and nothing else.

cvars.name: ImgMedia.MipMapDebug
cvars.description: Display debug on mipmaps and tiles used by the ImgMedia plugin. 0: off (default) 1: on

cvars.name: ImgMedia.MipMapLevelPadding
cvars.description: Value padded onto the estimated (minimum and maximum) mipmap levels used by the loader.

cvars.name: InGamePerformanceTracking.Enabled
cvars.description: If in-game performance tracking is enabled. Most games will likely not use or need this so it should be left disabled.

cvars.name: InGamePerformanceTracking.HistorySize
cvars.description: How many frames in game performance tracking should store in it's history.

cvars.name: Input.AutoReconcilePressedEventsOnFirstRepeat
cvars.description: If true, then we will automatically mark a IE_Pressed event if we receive an IE_Repeat event but have not received a pressed event first. Note: This option will be removed in a future update.

cvars.name: Input.AxisEventsCanBeConsumed
cvars.description: If true and all FKey's for a given Axis Event are consumed, then the axis delegate will not fire.

cvars.name: input.bRemapDeviceIdForOffsetPlayerGamepadIds
cvars.description: If true, then when bOffsetPlayerGamepadIds is true we will create a new Input Device Id as needed for the next local player. This fixes the behavior in split screen. Note: This CVar will be removed in a future release, this is a temporary wrapper for bug fix behavior.

cvars.name: Input.Debug.ShowBindingNames
cvars.description: True to show binding names in the input binding editor.

cvars.name: Input.Debug.ShowTouches
cvars.description: Whether to show touch input on screen.

cvars.name: input.DisableHaptics
cvars.description: If greater than zero, no haptic feedback is processed.

cvars.name: input.GlobalAxisConfigMode
cvars.description: Whether or not to apply Global Axis Config settings. 0 = Default (Mouse Only), 1 = All, 2 = None

cvars.name: Input.ShouldAlwaysEvaluateForceFeedbackDuration
cvars.description: Should the duration of a force feedback effect be evaluated every time it is called?

cvars.name: Insights.RecordAllWorldTypes
cvars.description: Gameplay Insights recording by default only records Game and PIE worlds.Toggle this value to 1 to record other world types.

cvars.name: Interchange.FeatureFlags.Import.BMP
cvars.description: Whether BMP support is enabled.

cvars.name: Interchange.FeatureFlags.Import.DDS
cvars.description: Whether DDS support is enabled.

cvars.name: Interchange.FeatureFlags.Import.DefaultBasicLayoutView
cvars.description: Whether the import dialog start by default in basic layout.

cvars.name: Interchange.FeatureFlags.Import.Enable
cvars.description: Whether Interchange import is enabled.

cvars.name: Interchange.FeatureFlags.Import.EXR
cvars.description: Whether OpenEXR support is enabled.

cvars.name: Interchange.FeatureFlags.Import.FBX
cvars.description: Whether FBX support is enabled.

cvars.name: Interchange.FeatureFlags.Import.FBX.ToLevel
cvars.description: Whether support for FBX level import is enabled.

cvars.name: Interchange.FeatureFlags.Import.HDR
cvars.description: Whether HDR support is enabled.

cvars.name: Interchange.FeatureFlags.Import.IES
cvars.description: Whether IES support is enabled.

cvars.name: Interchange.FeatureFlags.Import.JPG
cvars.description: Whether JPG support is enabled.

cvars.name: Interchange.FeatureFlags.Import.MTLX
cvars.description: Whether MaterialX support is enabled.

cvars.name: Interchange.FeatureFlags.Import.OBJ
cvars.description: Whether OBJ support is enabled.

cvars.name: Interchange.FeatureFlags.Import.PCX
cvars.description: Whether PCX support is enabled.

cvars.name: Interchange.FeatureFlags.Import.PNG
cvars.description: Whether PNG support is enabled.

cvars.name: Interchange.FeatureFlags.Import.PSD
cvars.description: Whether PSD support is enabled.

cvars.name: Interchange.FeatureFlags.Import.Substrate
cvars.description: Enable or disable support of Substrate with Interchange (only works if Substrate is enabled in the Project Settings). Enabled by default.

cvars.name: Interchange.FeatureFlags.Import.TGA
cvars.description: Whether TGA support is enabled.

cvars.name: Interchange.FeatureFlags.Import.TIFF
cvars.description: Whether TIFF support is enabled.

cvars.name: Interchange.FeatureFlags.Import.UEJPEG
cvars.description: Whether UEJPEG support is enabled.

cvars.name: Interchange.FeatureFlags.Translator.UseWorker.FBX
cvars.description: Whether FBX translator can be execute in parallel using the InterchangeWorker process.

cvars.name: landscape.AllowGrassStripping
cvars.description: Enables the conditional stripping of grass data during cook. Disabling this means the bStripGrassWhenCooked* will be ignored.

cvars.name: landscape.AllowNonNaniteVirtualShadowMapInvalidation
cvars.description: For non-Nanite landscape, cached virtual shadow map pages need to be invalidated when the vertex morphing introduces a height difference that is too large. This enables or disables this behavior entirely

cvars.name: landscape.AllowPhysicsStripping
cvars.description: Enables the conditional stripping of physics data during cook. Disabling this means the bStripPhysicsWhenCooked* will be ignored.

cvars.name: landscape.ApplyPhysicalMaterialChangesImmediately
cvars.description: Applies physical material task changes immediately rather than during the next cook/PIE.

cvars.name: landscape.BrushFramePadding
cvars.description: The number of frames to wait before pushing a full Landscape update when a brush is calling RequestLandscapeUpdate

cvars.name: landscape.BrushOptim
cvars.description: This will enable landscape layers optim.

cvars.name: landscape.CollisionMesh.HeightOffset
cvars.description: Offsets the collision mesh wireframe to assist in viewing from distances where the lower landscape lods might hide it.

cvars.name: landscape.CollisionMesh.Show
cvars.description: Selects which heightfield to visualize when ShowFlags.Collision is used. 0 to disable, 1 for simple, 2 for complex, 3 for editor only.

cvars.name: landscape.CollisionMesh.ShowPhysicalMaterial
cvars.description: When enabled, vertex colors of the collision mesh are chosen based on the physical material

cvars.name: Landscape.DebugViewMode
cvars.description: Change the view mode of the landscape rendering. Valid Input: 0 = Normal, 2 = DebugLayer, 3 = LayerDensity, 4 = LayerUsage, 5 = LOD Distribution, 6 = WireframeOnTop, 7 = LayerContribution

cvars.name: landscape.DirtyHeightmapHeightThreshold
cvars.description: Threshold to avoid imprecision issues on certain GPUs when detecting when a heightmap height changes, i.e. only a height difference > than this threshold (N over 16-bits uint height) will be detected as a change.

cvars.name: landscape.DirtyHeightmapNormalThreshold
cvars.description: Threshold to avoid imprecision issues on certain GPUs when detecting when a heightmap normal changes, i.e. only a normal channel difference > than this threshold (N over each 8-bits uint B & A channels independently) will be detected as a change.

cvars.name: landscape.DirtyWeightmapThreshold
cvars.description: Threshold to avoid imprecision issues on certain GPUs when detecting when a weightmap changes, i.e. only a difference > than this threshold (N over each 8-bits uint weightmap channel).

cvars.name: landscape.DumpDiffDetails
cvars.description: When dumping diffs for heightmap (landscape.DumpHeightmapDiff) or weightmap (landscape.DumpWeightmapDiff), dumps additional details about the pixels being different

cvars.name: landscape.DumpHeightmapDiff
cvars.description: This will save images for readback heightmap textures that have changed in the last edit layer blend phase. (= 0 No Diff, 1 = Mip 0 Diff, 2 = All Mips Diff

cvars.name: landscape.DumpWeightmapDiff
cvars.description: This will save images for readback weightmap textures that have changed in the last edit layer blend phase. (= 0 No Diff, 1 = Mip 0 Diff, 2 = All Mips Diff

cvars.name: landscape.EditLayersLocalMerge.Enable
cvars.description: This will allow the new merge algorithm (that merges layers at the landscape component level) to be used on landscapes that support it. This is a temporary measure while waiting for non-compatible landscapes to be deprecated.

cvars.name: landscape.EditLayersLocalMerge.MaxComponentsPerHeightmapResolveBatch
cvars.description: Number of components being rendered in a single batch when resolving heightmaps. The higher the number, the more heightmaps can be resolved in a single batch (and the higher the GPU memory consumption since more transient textures will be needed in memory at a time)

cvars.name: landscape.EditLayersLocalMerge.MaxComponentsPerWeightmapResolveBatch
cvars.description: Number of components being rendered in a single batch when resolving weightmaps. The higher the number, the more weightmaps can be resolved in a single batch (and the higher the GPU memory consumption since more transient textures will be needed in memory at a time)

cvars.name: landscape.EnableGPUCulling
cvars.description: Whether to use landscape GPU culling when it's supported. Allows to toggle culling at runtime

cvars.name: landscape.EnableGPUCullingShadows
cvars.description: Whether to use landscape GPU culling for a shadow views when it's supported. Allows to toggle shadow views culling at runtime

cvars.name: landscape.ForceFlush
cvars.description: This will force a render flush every frame when landscape editing.

cvars.name: landscape.ForceInvalidateNaniteOnLoad
cvars.description: Trigger a rebuild of Nanite representation on load (for debugging purposes)

cvars.name: landscape.ForceLayersUpdate
cvars.description: This will force landscape edit layers to be update every frame, rather than when requested only.

cvars.name: landscape.HeightmapCompressionMode
cvars.description: Defines whether compression is applied to landscapes. 0: use the per-landscape setting bUseCompressedHeightmapStorage (default) 1: force enable heightmap compression on all landscapes -1: force disable heightmap compression on all landscapes

cvars.name: landscape.MobileWeightTextureArray
cvars.description: Use Texture Arrays for weights on Mobile platforms

cvars.name: landscape.Nanite.AsyncDebugWait
cvars.description: Time in seconds to pause the async Nanite build. Used for debugging

cvars.name: landscape.Nanite.LiveRebuildOnModification
cvars.description: Trigger a rebuild of Nanite representation immediately when a modification is performed (World Partition Maps Only)

cvars.name: landscape.Nanite.MaxAsyncProxyBuildsPerSecond
cvars.description: Number of Async nanite proxies to dispatch per second

cvars.name: landscape.Nanite.MaxSimultaneousMultithreadBuilds
cvars.description: Max number of simultaneous Nanite static mesh tasks (-1 = unlimited )

cvars.name: landscape.Nanite.MultithreadBuild
cvars.description: Multithread nanite landscape build in (World Partition Maps Only)

cvars.name: landscape.Nanite.UpdateLag
cvars.description: Time to wait in seconds after the last landscape update before triggering a nanite rebuild

cvars.name: landscape.NonNaniteVirtualShadowMapInvalidationLODAttenuationExponent
cvars.description: For non-Nanite landscape, controls the shape of the curve of the attenuation of the virtual shadow map pages' invalidation rate (1 - X^N), where X is the relative LOD value (LODValue/NumMips in the [0,1] range) and N, the CVar

cvars.name: landscape.Optim
cvars.description: This will enable landscape layers optim.

cvars.name: landscape.OutputLayersRTContent
cvars.description: This will output the content of render target. This is used for debugging only.

cvars.name: landscape.OutputLayersWeightmapsRTContent
cvars.description: This will output the content of render target used for weightmap. This is used for debugging only.

cvars.name: landscape.OverrideLOD0Distribution
cvars.description: When > 0, force override the LOD0DistributionSetting property on all landscapes, and ignore r.LandscapeLOD0DistributionScale

cvars.name: landscape.OverrideLOD0ScreenSize
cvars.description: When > 0, force override the landscape LOD0ScreenSize property on all landscapes

cvars.name: landscape.OverrideLODBlendRange
cvars.description: When > 0, force the LODBlendRange property on all landscapes

cvars.name: landscape.OverrideLODDistribution
cvars.description: When > 0, force override the landscape LODDistributionSetting property on all landscapes, and ignore r.LandscapeLODDistributionScale

cvars.name: landscape.OverrideNonNaniteVirtualShadowMapConstantDepthBiasOverride
cvars.description: When > 0, force override the landscape NonNaniteVirtualShadowMapConstantDepthBias property on all landscapes

cvars.name: landscape.OverrideNonNaniteVirtualShadowMapInvalidationHeightErrorThreshold
cvars.description: When > 0, force override the landscape NonNaniteVirtualShadowMapInvalidationHeightErrorThreshold property on all landscapes

cvars.name: landscape.OverrideNonNaniteVirtualShadowMapInvalidationScreenSizeLimit
cvars.description: When > 0, force override the landscape NonNaniteVirtualShadowMapInvalidationScreenSizeLimit property on all landscapes

cvars.name: landscape.RemoveEmptyPaintLayersOnEdit
cvars.description: This will analyze weightmaps on readback and remove unneeded allocations (for unpainted layers).

cvars.name: landscape.RenderCaptureLayersNextHeightmapDraws
cvars.description: Trigger N render captures during the next heightmap draw calls.

cvars.name: landscape.RenderCaptureLayersNextPhysicalMaterialDraws
cvars.description: Trigger N render captures during the next landscape physical material draw calls.

cvars.name: landscape.RenderCaptureLayersNextWeightmapDraws
cvars.description: Trigger N render captures during the next weightmap draw calls.

cvars.name: landscape.RenderCaptureNextMergeRenders
cvars.description: Trigger a render capture during the next N RenderHeightmap/RenderWeightmap(s) draws

cvars.name: landscape.RenderNanite
cvars.description: Render Landscape using Nanite.

cvars.name: landscape.ShowDirty
cvars.description: This will highlight the data that has changed during the layer blend phase.

cvars.name: landscape.SilenceSharedPropertyDeprecationFixup
cvars.description: Silently performs the fixup of discrepancies in shared properties when handling data modified before the enforcement introduction.

cvars.name: landscape.SimulateAlphaBrushTextureLoadFailure
cvars.description: Debug utility to simulate a loading failure (e.g. invalid source data, which can happen in cooked editor or with a badly virtualized texture) when loading the alpha brush texture

cvars.name: landscape.SimulatePhysics
cvars.description: This will enable physic simulation on worlds containing landscape.

cvars.name: landscape.SplineFalloffModulation
cvars.description: Enable Texture Modulation fo Spline Layer Falloff.

cvars.name: Landscape.Splines.ApplyToSplineComponentMaxIterations
cvars.description: Max possible iterations when converting a landscape spline into a spline component

cvars.name: landscape.StripLayerMipsOnLoad
cvars.description: Remove (on load) the mip chain from textures used in layers which don't require them

cvars.name: landscape.SupportGPUCulling
cvars.description: Whether to support landscape GPU culling

cvars.name: landscape.SupressMapCheckWarnings.Nanite
cvars.description: Issue MapCheck Info messages instead of warnings if Nanite Data is out of date

cvars.name: landscape.TrackDirty
cvars.description: This will track the accumulation of data changes during the layer blend phase.

cvars.name: landscape.UpdateProxyActorRenderMethodOnTickAtRuntime
cvars.description: Update landscape proxy's rendering method (nanite enabled) when ticked. Always enabled in editor.

cvars.name: landscape.ValidateProxyWeightmapUsages
cvars.description: This will validate that weightmap usages in landscape proxies and their components don't get desynchronized with the landscape component layer allocations.

cvars.name: LayoutUV.TracePackingForInputHash
cvars.description: Activate tracing for the input hash specified in the value.

cvars.name: levelinstance.debug.forcelevelstreaming
cvars.description: Set to 1 to force Level Instance to be streamed instead of embedded in World Partition grid.

cvars.name: LevelInstance.ForceEditorWorldMode
cvars.description: Allow -game instances to behave like an editor with temporary root object attached to instance. This will prevent HLOD from working in -game. This feature is only supported on non WP worlds.

cvars.name: LevelSequence.DefaultClockSource
cvars.description: Specifies the default clock source for newly created level sequences. 0: Tick, 1: Platform, 2: Audio, 3: RelativeTimecode, 4: Timecode, 5: Custom

cvars.name: LevelSequence.DefaultDisplayRate
cvars.description: Specifies the default display frame rate for newly created level sequences; also defines frame locked frame rate where sequences are set to be frame locked. Examples: 30 fps, 120/1 (120 fps), 30000/1001 (29.97), 0.01s (10ms).

cvars.name: LevelSequence.DefaultLockEngineToDisplayRate
cvars.description: 0: Playback locked to playback frames 1: Unlocked playback with sub frame interpolation

cvars.name: LevelSequence.DefaultTickResolution
cvars.description: Specifies the default tick resolution for newly created level sequences. Examples: 30 fps, 120/1 (120 fps), 30000/1001 (29.97), 0.01s (10ms).

cvars.name: LevelSequence.InvalidBindingTagWarnings
cvars.description: Whether to emit a warning when invalid object binding tags are used to override bindings or not.

cvars.name: LevelSequence.MarkSequencePlayerAsGarbageOnDestroy
cvars.description: Whether to flag the sequence player object as garbage when the actor is being destroyed

cvars.name: LevelStreaming.DefaultAllowClientUseMakingInvisibleTransactionRequests
cvars.description: Flag combined with world support to use making invisible transaction requests to the server that determines whether the client should wait for the server to acknowledge visibility update before making streaming levels invisible. 0: Disable, 1: Enable

cvars.name: LevelStreaming.DefaultAllowClientUseMakingVisibleTransactionRequests
cvars.description: Flag combined with world support to use making visible transaction requests to the server that determines whether the client should wait for the server to acknowledge visibility update before making streaming levels visible. 0: Disable, 1: Enable

cvars.name: LevelStreaming.Profiling.Enabled
cvars.description: Whether to enable the LevelStreamingProfilingSubsystem automatically.

cvars.name: LevelStreaming.Profiling.LateStreamingDistanceSquared
cvars.description: The squared distance (e.g. from world partition cell bounds) below which a level is considered to have streamed in late.

cvars.name: LevelStreaming.Profiling.StartAutomatically
cvars.description: Whether to start recording level streaminge events as soon as the subsystem is created.

cvars.name: LevelStreaming.ShouldReuseUnloadedButStillAroundLevels
cvars.description: Whether level streaming will reuse the unloaded levels that aren't GC'd yet. 0: Disable, 1: Enable

cvars.name: LevelStreaming.ShouldServerUseMakingVisibleTransactionRequest
cvars.description: Whether server should wait for client to acknowledge visibility update before treating streaming levels as visible by the client. 0: Disable, 1: Enable

cvars.name: linker.EnableFullBlueprintPreloading
cvars.description: If true, Blueprint class regeneration will perform a complete preload of all dependencies.

cvars.name: linker.TreatVerifyImportErrorsAsWarnings
cvars.description: If true, the errors emitted due to verify import failures will be warnings instead.

cvars.name: LiveCoding.ConsolePath
cvars.description: Path to the live coding console application

cvars.name: LiveCoding.SourceProject
cvars.description: Path to the project that this target was built from

cvars.name: LLM.LLMHeaderMaxSize
cvars.description: The maximum total number of characters allowed for all of the LLM titles

cvars.name: LLM.LLMWriteInterval
cvars.description: The number of seconds between each line in the LLM csv (zero to write every frame)

cvars.name: LLM.TrackPeaks
cvars.description: Track peak memory in each category since process start rather than current frame's value.

cvars.name: Localization.AsyncLoadLocalizationData
cvars.description: True to load localization data asynchronously (non-blocking), or False to load it synchronously (blocking)

cvars.name: Localization.AsyncLoadLocalizationDataOnLanguageChange
cvars.description: True to load localization data asynchronously (non-blocking) when the language changes, or False to load it synchronously (blocking)

cvars.name: Localization.DisplayStringSupport
cvars.description: Is display string support enabled? 0: Auto (default), 1: Enabled, 2: Disabled

cvars.name: Localization.HangulTextWrappingMethod
cvars.description: 0: PerSyllable, 1: PerWord (default).

cvars.name: Localization.Message.AllowTextArgumentModifiers
cvars.description: Whether to allow message -> text conversion to use text-style argument modifiers (default: false)

cvars.name: Localization.SpanishUsesMinTwoGrouping
cvars.description: False: 1234 will use a group separator, True: 1234 will not use a group separator (default).

cvars.name: Localization.SpanishUsesRAENumberFormat
cvars.description: False: Disabled (CLDR format), True: Enabled (RAE format, default).

cvars.name: Localization.UGC.AlwaysExportFullGatherLog
cvars.description: True to export the full gather log from running localization commandlet, even if there we no errors

cvars.name: Localization.UseLocaleSpecificDigitCharacters
cvars.description: False: Locales will always use Arabic digit characters (eg, 1234), True: Locales will use the digit characters specified in their CLDR data (default).

cvars.name: lod.TemporalLag
cvars.description: This controls the the time lag for temporal LOD, in seconds.

cvars.name: log.Category
cvars.description: Defines if the categoy is included in each line in the log file and in what form. 0 = Do not log category 2 = Log the category (default)

cvars.name: log.flushInterval
cvars.description: Logging interval in seconds

cvars.name: log.Timestamp
cvars.description: Defines if time is included in each line in the log file and in what form. Layout: [time][frame mod 1000] 0 = Do not display log timestamps 1 = Log time stamps in UTC and frame time (default) e.g. [2015.11.25-21.28.50:803][376] 2 = Log timestamps in seconds elapsed since GStartTime e.g. [0130.29][420] 3 = Log timestamps in local time and frame time e.g. [2017.08.04-17.59.50:803][420] 4 = Log timestamps with the engine's timecode and frame time e.g. [17:59:50:18][420]

cvars.name: LogBlueprintComponentInstanceCalls
cvars.description: Log Blueprint Component instance calls; debugging.

cvars.name: LogGameThreadFNameChurn.Enable
cvars.description: If > 0, then collect sample game thread fname create, periodically print a report of the worst offenders.

cvars.name: LogGameThreadFNameChurn.PrintFrequency
cvars.description: Number of frames between churn reports.

cvars.name: LogGameThreadFNameChurn.RemoveAliases
cvars.description: If > 0 then remove aliases from the counting process. This essentialy merges addresses that have the same human readable string. It is slower.

cvars.name: LogGameThreadFNameChurn.SampleFrequency
cvars.description: Number of fname creates per sample. This is used to prevent churn sampling from slowing the game down too much.

cvars.name: LogGameThreadFNameChurn.StackIgnore
cvars.description: Number of items to discard from the top of a stack frame.

cvars.name: LogGameThreadFNameChurn.StackLen
cvars.description: Maximum number of stack frame items to keep. This improves aggregation because calls that originate from multiple places but end up in the same place will be accounted together.

cvars.name: LogGameThreadFNameChurn.Threshhold
cvars.description: Minimum average number of fname creations per frame to include in the report.

cvars.name: LogGameThreadMallocChurn.Enable
cvars.description: If > 0, then collect sample game thread malloc, realloc and free, periodically print a report of the worst offenders.

cvars.name: LogGameThreadMallocChurn.PrintFrequency
cvars.description: Number of frames between churn reports.

cvars.name: LogGameThreadMallocChurn.RemoveAliases
cvars.description: If > 0 then remove aliases from the counting process. This essentialy merges addresses that have the same human readable string. It is slower.

cvars.name: LogGameThreadMallocChurn.SampleFrequency
cvars.description: Number of allocs to skip between samples. This is used to prevent churn sampling from slowing the game down too much.

cvars.name: LogGameThreadMallocChurn.StackIgnore
cvars.description: Number of items to discard from the top of a stack frame.

cvars.name: LogGameThreadMallocChurn.StackLen
cvars.description: Maximum number of stack frame items to keep. This improves aggregation because calls that originate from multiple places but end up in the same place will be accounted together.

cvars.name: LogGameThreadMallocChurn.Threshhold
cvars.description: Minimum average number of allocs per frame to include in the report.

cvars.name: LWI.Editor.GridSize
cvars.description: Sets the size of a grid that LWI managers will be generated with.

cvars.name: Mainframe.ShowRestoreAssetsPromptInPIE
cvars.description: Restore asset windows when running with PIE at startup (default: false). This doesn't work with immersive mode or if Mainframe.ShowRestoreAssetsPromptOnStartup is set to false.

cvars.name: MallocBinned2.FlushThreadCacheMaxWaitTime
cvars.description: The threshold of time before warning about FlushCurrentThreadCache taking too long (seconds).

cvars.name: MallocBinned3.FlushThreadCacheMaxWaitTime
cvars.description: The threshold of time before warning about FlushCurrentThreadCache taking too long (seconds).

cvars.name: MaterialBaking.ForceDisableEmissiveScaling
cvars.description: If set to true, values stored in the emissive textures will be clamped to the [0, 1] range rather than being normalized and scaled back using the EmissiveScale material static parameter.

cvars.name: MaterialBaking.RenderDocCapture
cvars.description: Determines whether or not to trigger a RenderDoc capture. 0: Turned Off 1: Turned On

cvars.name: MaterialBaking.SaveIntermediateTextures
cvars.description: Determines whether or not to save out intermediate BMP images for each flattened material property. 0: Turned Off 1: Turned On

cvars.name: MaterialBaking.UseMaterialProxyCaching
cvars.description: Determines whether or not Material Proxies should be cached to speed up material baking. 0: Turned Off 1: Turned On

cvars.name: MaterialBaking.VTWarmupFrames
cvars.description: Number of frames to render for virtual texture warmup when material baking.

cvars.name: MaterialUtilities.WarmupFrames
cvars.description: Number of frames to render before each capture in order to warmup various rendering systems (VT/Nanite/etc).

cvars.name: MaxAssetFullPath
cvars.description: Maximum full path name of an asset.

cvars.name: MediaIO.PreventFieldFlipping
cvars.description: Whether to enable an interlace field flipping fix. (Experimental)

cvars.name: memory.logGenericPlatformMemoryStats
cvars.description: Report Platform Memory Stats)

cvars.name: memory.MemoryPressureCriticalThresholdMB
cvars.description: When the available physical memory drops below this threshold memory stats will consider this to be at critical pressure. Where a platform can specifically state it's memory pressure this test maybe ignored. 0 (default) critical pressure will not use the threshold.

cvars.name: memory.WindowsPlatformMemoryGetStatsLimitTotalGB
cvars.description: Set a synthetic platform total memory size (in GB) which will be returned as Total and Available memory from GetStats

cvars.name: memory.WindowsPlatformMemoryUseContainerMemory
cvars.description: Set to assume that this process is running in a docker container and take the entire container's memory usage into consideration when computing available memory.

cvars.name: mi.MemoryResetDelay
cvars.description: The time in milliseconds to keep recently freed memory pages inside the process for reuse. This can dramatically reduce OS overhead of memory zeroing and page faults during alloc intense workloads.

cvars.name: mmio.enable
cvars.description: If > 0, then enable memory mapped IO on platforms that support it.

cvars.name: MeshMergeUtilities.UVGenerationMethod
cvars.description: UV generation method when creating merged or proxy meshes 0 - Engine default - (currently Patch Builder) 1 - Legacy 2 - UVAtlas 3 - XAtlas 4 - Patch Builder

cvars.name: n.bNavmeshAllowPartitionedBuildingFromEditor
cvars.description: Enable experimental navmesh partition building. Deprecated 5.3: use ai.nav.bNavmeshAllowPartitionedBuildingFromEditor instead.

cvars.name: MessageBus.UDP.BadEndpointPeriod
cvars.description: The period of time, in seconds, between endpoint socket errors to be considered a bad endpoint.

cvars.name: MessageBus.UDP.CheckForExpiredWithFullQueue
cvars.description: Attempts to release pressure on the work queue by checking if inflight segments have expired with no acknowledgement.

cvars.name: MessageBus.UDP.ConnectionsToError
cvars.description: Connections to error out on when MessageBus.UDP.InduceSocketError is enabled. This can be a comma separated list in the form IPAddr2:port,IPAddr3:port

cvars.name: MessageBus.UDP.EndpointDenyListEnabled
cvars.description: Specifies if the endpoint deny list is enabled. If enabled, a problematic endpoint will be tagged for possible exclusion from communication.The maximum attempts allowed is determined by MessageBus.UDP.MaxRetriesForBadEndpoint

cvars.name: MessageBus.UDP.InduceSocketError
cvars.description: This CVar can be used to induce a socket failure on outbound communication. Any non zero value will force the output socket connection to fail if the IP address matches one of the values in MessageBus.UDP.ConnectionsToError. The list can be cleared by invoking MessageBus.UDP.ClearDenyList.

cvars.name: MessageBus.UDP.MaxRetriesForBadEndpoint
cvars.description: The maximum number of retries that will be attempted when a socket connection fails to reach an endpoint.

cvars.name: MessageBus.UDP.SegmenterMaxResends
cvars.description: The number of attempts to resend data to an endpoint. Values are clamped between 1 and 100.

cvars.name: MessageBus.UDP.SegmenterTimeout
cvars.description: The number of milliseconds to wait for a segment to be acknowledge before attempting to resend. Values are clamped between 10 and 1000

cvars.name: modeling.CreateMesh.IgnoreProjectSettings
cvars.description: If enabled, do not use the preferences set in Modeling Tools' Project Settings when constructing new mesh objects

cvars.name: modeling.DisableAutoUVAreaDensitySampling
cvars.description: If set, return the behavior of AutoUV's PatchBuilder algorithm to the legacy behavior.

cvars.name: modeling.EnablePolyModel
cvars.description: Enable prototype PolyEdit tab

cvars.name: modeling.EnablePresets
cvars.description: Enable tool preset features and UX

cvars.name: modeling.EnablePrototypes
cvars.description: Enable unsupported Experimental prototype Modeling Tools

cvars.name: modeling.EnableVolumeSnapping
cvars.description: Enable snapping to volumes

cvars.name: modeling.PolyEdit.EdgeLimit
cvars.description: Maximal number of edges that PolyEd and TriEd support. Meshes that would require more than this number of edges to be rendered in PolyEd or TriEd force the tools to be disabled to avoid hanging the editor.

cvars.name: modeling.Selection.EnableStaticMeshLocking
cvars.description: Control whether Selection Locking is enabled by default for Static Meshes

cvars.name: modeling.Selection.EnableVolumeLocking
cvars.description: Control whether Selection Locking is enabled by default for Volumes

cvars.name: modeling.Selection.FullHoverHighlights
cvars.description: Use full selection hover highlights instead of simplified highlights

cvars.name: modeling.UVEditor.EnableLivePreviewArrangement
cvars.description: Enable auto arranging objects in the UV Editor's live viewport when multiple objects are loaded from the Content Browser.

cvars.name: modeling.UVEditor.LivePreviewArrangementMode
cvars.description: Pattern to use for UV Editor Live Preview auto arrangement: 0 - Line, 1 - Circular

cvars.name: modeling.UVEditor.UDIMSupport
cvars.description: Enable experimental UDIM support in the UVEditor

cvars.name: modeling.VolumeMaxTriCount
cvars.description: Limit on triangle count for Volumes that will be emitted by modeling tools. Meshes above this limit will be auto-simplified.

cvars.name: modeling.WorldRenderCapture.VTWarmupFrames
cvars.description: Number of frames to render before each capture in order to warmup the renderer.

cvars.name: MovieScene.LegacyConversionFrameRate
cvars.description: Specifies default tick resolution for UMovieScene data saved before 4.20 (default: 60000fps). Examples: 60000 fps, 120/1 (120 fps), 30000/1001 (29.97), 0.01s (10ms).

cvars.name: MovieScene.RemoveMutedTracksOnCook
cvars.description: If 1 remove muted tracks on cook, otherwise leave as is.

cvars.name: n.IpNetDriverMaxFrameTimeBeforeAlert
cvars.description: Time to spend processing networking data in a single frame before an alert is raised (in seconds) It may get called multiple times in a single frame if additional processing after a previous alert exceeds the threshold again default: 1 s

cvars.name: n.IpNetDriverMaxFrameTimeBeforeLogging
cvars.description: Time to spend processing networking data in a single frame before an output log warning is printed (in seconds) default: 10 s

cvars.name: n.VerifyPeer
cvars.description: Sets libcurl's CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER option to verify authenticity of the peer's certificate. 0 = disable (allows self-signed certificates) 1 = enable [default]

cvars.name: net.ActorChannelPool
cvars.description: If nonzero, actor channels will be pooled to save memory and object creation cost.

cvars.name: net.AddNetDriverInfoToNetAnalytics
cvars.description: Automatically add NetDriver information to the NetAnalytics cache

cvars.name: net.AllowAsyncLoading
cvars.description: Allow async loading of unloaded assets referenced in packets. If false the client will hitch and immediately load the asset, if true the packet will be delayed while the asset is async loaded. net.DelayUnmappedRPCs can be enabled to delay RPCs relying on async loading assets.

cvars.name: net.AllowClientRemapCacheObject
cvars.description: When enabled, we will allow clients to remap read only cache objects and keep the same NetGUID.

cvars.name: net.AllowEncryption
cvars.description: If true, the engine will attempt to load an encryption PacketHandler component and fill in the EncryptionToken parameter of the NMT_Hello message based on the ?EncryptionToken= URL option and call callbacks if it's non-empty. Additionally, a value of '2' will make the EncryptionToken required - which is enforced serverside. (0 = Disabled, 1 = Allowed (default), 2 = Required)

cvars.name: net.AllowPIESeamlessTravel
cvars.description: When true, allow seamless travels in single process PIE.

cvars.name: net.AllowReliableMulticastToNonRelevantChannels
cvars.description: Allow Reliable Server Multicasts to be sent to non-Relevant Actors, as long as their is an existing ActorChannel.

cvars.name: net.AllowRPCDoSDetectionBlocking
cvars.description: Overrides whether or not RPC DoS Detection RPC blocking is allowed. 0 = disabled, 1 = enabled.

cvars.name: net.AllowRPCDoSDetectionKicking
cvars.description: Overrides whether or not RPC DoS Detection kicking is enabled. 0 = disabled, 1 = enabled.

cvars.name: net.AlwaysUpdateGuidReferenceMapForNetSerializeObjectStruct
cvars.description: Requires net.TrackNetSerializeObjectReferences. If true, entries in the GuidReferenceMap for NetSerialize struct properties with object properties will always be updated, not just when the Guid changes or goes NULL. This should prevent issues with old property data being applied when an unmapped actor ref in the struct is mapped.

cvars.name: net.BitReader.EnsureOnOverflow
cvars.description: Ensures if BitReader overflows. 'BitReader.LogFatalOnOverflow' takes precedence over this, if set.

cvars.name: net.BlockSend
cvars.description: When enabled, blocks packet sends on NetConnection's.

cvars.name: net.CheckNoLoadPackages
cvars.description: If enabled, check the no load flag in GetObjectFromNetGUID before forcing a sync load on packages that are not marked IsFullyLoaded

cvars.name: Net.CheckPushBPRepIndexAgainstName
cvars.description: When enabled, validates that BP generated values passed to MarkPropertyDirtyFromRepIndex match the actual property data

cvars.name: net.CleanUpRenamedDynamicActors
cvars.description: When enabled, dynamic actors that change outers via Rename() on the server will close their channel or send a destruction info to clients without the actor's new level loaded.

cvars.name: net.ClientIncomingBunchFrameTimeLimitMS
cvars.description: Time in milliseconds to limit client incoming bunch processing to. If 0, no limit. As long as we're below the limit, will start processing another bunch. A single bunch that takes a while to process can overshoot the limit. After the limit is hit, remaining bunches in a packet are queued, and the IpNetDriver will not process any more packets in the current frame.

cvars.name: net.ClientToServerUnreliableRPCQueueSize
cvars.description: Maximum number of unreliable RPCs queued for sending from the client to the server. If more RPCs are queued then older ones will be dropped.

cvars.name: net.CloseTimingDebug
cvars.description: Logs the last packet send/receive and TickFlush/TickDispatch times, on connection close - for debugging blocked send/recv paths.

cvars.name: net.ContextDebug
cvars.description: Debugging option to set a context string during replication

cvars.name: net.ControlChannelDestructionInfo
cvars.description: If enabled, send destruction info updates via the control channel instead of creating a new actor channel.0: Old behavior, use an actor channel. 1: New behavior, use the control channel

cvars.name: net.CurrentHandshakeVersion
cvars.description: The current supported stateless handshake protocol version (numeric)

cvars.name: net.DebugAppendResolverAddress
cvars.description: If this is set, all IP address resolution methods will add the value of this CVAR to the list of results.This allows for testing resolution functionality across all multiple addresses with the end goal of having a successful result(being the value of this CVAR)

cvars.name: net.DebugDraw
cvars.description: Draws debug information for network dormancy and relevancy 1 Enables network debug drawing. 0 disables.

cvars.name: net.DebugDrawCullDistance
cvars.description: Cull distance for net.DebugDraw. World UnitsMax world units an actor can be away from the local view to draw its dormancy status. Zero disables culling

cvars.name: net.DebugDualIPs
cvars.description: If true, will duplicate every packet received, and process with a new (deterministic) IP, to emulate receiving client packets from dual IP's - which can happen under real-world network conditions(only supports a single client on the server).

cvars.name: net.DebugInitialConnect
cvars.description: When enabled, periodically logs socket-level send stats clientside, until a packet is successfully received to verify connection.

cvars.name: net.DebugInitialConnectLogFrequency
cvars.description: The amount of time, in seconds, between initial connect debug logging.

cvars.name: net.DelayUnmappedRPCs
cvars.description: If true delay received RPCs with unmapped object references until they are received or loaded, if false RPCs will execute immediately with null parameters. This can be used with net.AllowAsyncLoading to avoid null asset parameters during async loads.

cvars.name: net.DelinquencyNumberOfTopOffendersToTrack
cvars.description: When > 0 , this will be the number of 'TopOffenders' that are tracked by the PackageMap and GuidCache for Queued Actors and Async Loads respectively. net.TrackAsyncLoadingGUIDThreshold / net.TrackQueuedActorThreshold still dictate whether or not any of these items are tracked.

cvars.name: net.DeltaInitialFastArrayElements
cvars.description: If true, send delta struct changelists for initial fast array elements.

cvars.name: net.DisableBandwithThrottling
cvars.description: Forces IsNetReady to always return true. Not available in shipping builds.

cvars.name: net.DisableIPv6
cvars.description: If true, IPv6 will not resolve and its usage will be avoided when possible

cvars.name: net.DisableRemapScriptActors
cvars.description: When set, disables name remapping of compiled script actors (for networking)

cvars.name: net.DiscardTornOffActorRPCs
cvars.description: If enabled, discard RPCs if the actor has been torn off.

cvars.name: net.DoHandshakeVersionFallback
cvars.description: Whether or not to (clientside) perform randomized falling-back to previous versions of the handshake protocol, upon failure.

cvars.name: net.DoPacketOrderCorrection
cvars.description: Whether or not to try to fix 'out of order' packet sequences, by caching packets and waiting for the missing sequence.

cvars.name: net.DoPropertyChecksum
cvars.description: When true and ENABLE_PROPERTY_CHECKSUMS is defined, checksums of replicated properties are compared on client and server

cvars.name: net.DormancyEnable
cvars.description: Enables Network Dormancy System for reducing CPU and bandwidth overhead of infrequently updated actors 1 Enables network dormancy. 0 disables network dormancy.

cvars.name: net.DormancyHysteresis
cvars.description: When > 0, represents the time we'll wait before letting a channel become fully dormant (in seconds). This can prevent churn when objects are going in and out of dormant more frequently than normal.

cvars.name: net.DormancyValidate
cvars.description: Validates that dormant actors do not change state while in a dormant state (on server only)0: Dont validate. 1: Validate on wake up. 2: Validate on each net update

cvars.name: net.EnableCongestionControl
cvars.description: Enables congestion control module.

cvars.name: net.EnableDetailedScopeCounters
cvars.description: Enables detailed networking scope cycle counters. There are often lots of these which can negatively impact performance.

cvars.name: net.EnableFlushDormantSubObjects
cvars.description: If enabled, FlushNetDormancy will flush replicated subobjects in addition to replicated components. Only applies to objects using the replicated subobject list.

cvars.name: net.EnableFlushDormantSubObjectsCheckConditions
cvars.description: If enabled, when net.EnableFlushDormantSubObjects is also true a dormancy flush will also check replicated subobject conditions

cvars.name: net.EnableNetInitialSubObjects
cvars.description: Enables new SubObjects to set bNetInitial to true to make sure all replicated properties are replicated.

cvars.name: net.FilterGuidRemapping
cvars.description: Remove destroyed and parent guids from unmapped list

cvars.name: net.fix.AllowListenParamSentToClient
cvars.description: When true, allow '?listen' sent to the client during Travel. This would confuse the client and cause crashes with RPCs.

cvars.name: net.FlushDormancyUseDefaultStateForUnloadedLevels
cvars.description: If enabled, dormancy flushing will init replicators with default object state if the client doesn't have the actor's level loaded.

cvars.name: Net.ForceConnectionViewerPriority
cvars.description: Force the connection's player controller and viewing pawn as topmost priority.

cvars.name: net.ForceNetFlush
cvars.description: Immediately flush send buffer when written to (helps trace packet writes - WARNING: May be unstable).

cvars.name: net.HandshakeEnforceNetworkCLVersion
cvars.description: Whether or not the stateless handshake should enforce the Network CL version, instead of the higher level netcode.

cvars.name: net.HandshakeResendInterval
cvars.description: The delay between resending handshake packets which we have not received a response for.

cvars.name: net.IgnoreNetworkChecksumMismatch
cvars.description: If true, the integrity checksum on packagemap objects will be ignored, which can cause issues with out of sync data

cvars.name: net.InstantReplayProcessQueuedBunchesMillisecondLimit
cvars.description: Time threshold for processing queued bunches during instant replays. If it takes longer than this in a single frame, wait until the next frame to continue processing queued bunches. For unlimited time, set to 0.

cvars.name: net.IpConnectionDisableResolution
cvars.description: If enabled, any future ip connections will not use resolution methods.

cvars.name: net.IpConnectionUseSendTasks
cvars.description: If true, the IpConnection will call the socket's SendTo function in a task graph task so that it can run off the game thread.

cvars.name: net.IpNetDriverReceiveThreadPollTimeMS
cvars.description: If net.IpNetDriverUseReceiveThread is true, the number of milliseconds to use as the timeout value for FSocket::Wait on the receive thread. A negative value means to wait indefinitely (FSocket::Shutdown should cancel it though).

cvars.name: net.IpNetDriverReceiveThreadQueueMaxPackets
cvars.description: If net.IpNetDriverUseReceiveThread is true, the maximum number of packets that can be waiting in the queue. Additional packets received will be dropped.

cvars.name: net.IpNetDriverUseReceiveThread
cvars.description: If true, the IpNetDriver will call the socket's RecvFrom function on a separate thread (not the game thread)

cvars.name: net.iris.AllowAsyncLoading
cvars.description: Flag to allow or disallow async loading when using iris replication. Note: net.allowAsyncLoading must also be enabled.

cvars.name: net.Iris.AllowPollPeriodOverrides
cvars.description: Whether we allow poll period overrides set in ObjectReplicationBridgeConfig. Default is true.

cvars.name: net.Iris.Attachments.AllowSendPolicyFlags
cvars.description: Allow use of ENetObjectAttachmentSendPolicyFlags to specify behavior of RPCs.

cvars.name: net.Iris.bWarnAboutStructPropertiesWithSuspectedNotReplicatedProperties
cvars.description: Try to detect if a struct replicated as a property might contain unannotated members, disabled by default.

cvars.name: net.Iris.ColdResolvingRetryTimeMS
cvars.description: Resolve unresolved cold references after this many milliseconds.

cvars.name: Net.Iris.CullNonRelevant
cvars.description: When enabled will cull replicated actors that are not relevant to any client.

cvars.name: Net.Iris.DebugName
cvars.description: Set a class name or object name to break on.

cvars.name: Net.Iris.DebugRPCName
cvars.description: Set the name of an RPC to break on.

cvars.name: net.Iris.DeferEndReplication
cvars.description: bDeferEndReplication if true calls to EndReplication will be defered until after we have applied statedata. Default is true.

cvars.name: net.Iris.DeltaCompressInitialState
cvars.description: if true we compare with default state when serializing inital state.

cvars.name: net.Iris.DispatchUnresolvedPreviouslyReceivedChanges
cvars.description: Whether to include previously received changes with unresolved object references to data received this frame when applying state data. This can call rep notify functions to be called despite being unchanged. Default is false.

cvars.name: net.Iris.EnableActorLevelChanges
cvars.description: When true the ActorReplicationBridge will process actors that change levels by updating the actor's level groups.

cvars.name: net.Iris.EnableDeltaCompression
cvars.description: Enable delta compression for replicated objects. Default is true.

cvars.name: net.Iris.EnableFilterMappings
cvars.description: Whether we honor filter mappings set in ObjectReplicationBridgeConfig. If filter mappings are enabled then objects may also be assigned the default spatial filter even if there aren't any specific mappings. Default is true.

cvars.name: net.Iris.EnableForceNetUpdate
cvars.description: When true the system only allows ForceNetUpdate to skip the poll frequency of objects. When false any MarkDirty object will be immediately polled.

cvars.name: net.Iris.EnableRPCs
cvars.description: If > 0 let Iris replicate and execute RPCs.

cvars.name: net.Iris.EnsureIfNumGroupMembershipsExceeds
cvars.description: If set to a positive number we will warn and ensure if an object is added to a high number of groups.

cvars.name: net.Iris.ExecuteReliableRPCsBeforeApplyState
cvars.description: If true and Iris runs in backwards compatibility mode then reliable RPCs will be executed before we apply state data on the target object unless we first need to spawn the object.

cvars.name: net.iris.ForceFullCopyAndQuantize
cvars.description: When enabled a full copy and quantize will be used, if disabled we will only copy and quantize dirty state data.

cvars.name: net.iris.ForceFullDequantizeAndApply
cvars.description: When enabled a full dequantize of dirty states will be used when applying received statedata regardless of traits set in the fragments.

cvars.name: net.Iris.ForcePruneBeforeUpdate
cvars.description: Verify integrity of all tracked instances at the start of every update.

cvars.name: net.Iris.HotResolvingLifetimeMS
cvars.description: An unresolved reference is considered hot if it was created within this many milliseconds, and cold otherwise.

cvars.name: net.Iris.IrisPreExportExistingNetTokensOnConnect
cvars.description: If true we will enqueue all existing NetTokens for pre-export when a new connection is added.

cvars.name: net.Iris.LogReplicationProtocols
cvars.description: If true, log all created replication protocols.

cvars.name: net.Iris.MinimumNumberOfFramesBetweenBaselines
cvars.description: Minimum number of frames between creation of new delta compression baselines for an object. Default is 60.

cvars.name: net.Iris.OnlyQuantizeDirtyMembers
cvars.description: if true we only quantize members marked as dirty unless this is a new object.

cvars.name: net.Iris.PacketSequenceSafetyMargin
cvars.description: How many packets to spare before considering packet sequence full. This allows a few non-DataStreamChannel packets to be sent without messing up packet acking.

cvars.name: net.Iris.PushModelMode
cvars.description: 0 = disabled but runtime togglable, 1 = enabled and not togglable, 2 = enabled but runtime togglable. Requires Net.IsPushModelEnabled is true and WITH_PUSH_MODEL > 0 to use push based dirtiness in the backwards compatibility mode.

cvars.name: net.Iris.RemapDynamicObjects
cvars.description: Allow remapping of dynamic objects on the receiving end. This allows properties previously pointing to a particular object to be updated if the object is re-created. Default is true.

cvars.name: net.Iris.ReplicationWriter.ValidateObjectsWithDirtyChanges
cvars.description: Ensure that we don't try to mark invalid objects as dirty when they shouldn't.
