cvars.name: net.Iris.ReplicationWriterMaxAllowedPacketsIfNotHugeObject
cvars.description: Allow ReplicationWriter to overcommit data if we have more data to write.

cvars.name: net.Iris.ReplicationWriterMaxHugeObjectsInTransit
cvars.description: How many very large objects, one whose payload doesn't fit in a single packet, is allowed to be scheduled for send. Needs to be at least 1.

cvars.name: net.Iris.ResolvedObjectsDispatchDebugging
cvars.description: Debug logging of resolved object state dispatching. Default is false.

cvars.name: net.Iris.SaturateBandwidth
cvars.description: Whether to saturate the bandwidth or not. Default is false.

cvars.name: net.Iris.Stats.ShouldIncludeSubObjectWithRoot
cvars.description: If enabled SubObjects will reports stats with RootObject, if set to false SubObjects will be treated as separate objects.

cvars.name: net.Iris.UseChangeMaskForTArray
cvars.description: Enable or disable the use of a changemask for individual elements in TArrays. When enabled and packet loss occurs the received array may not reflect a state which was ever present on the sending side since the array won't be replicated atomically. Enabled by default.

cvars.name: net.Iris.UseDormancyToFilterPolling
cvars.description: Whether we should use dormancy to filter out objects that we should not poll. Default is true.

cvars.name: net.Iris.UseFrequencyBasedPolling
cvars.description: Whether to use frequency based polling or not. Default is true.

cvars.name: net.Iris.UseIrisReplication
cvars.description: Enables Iris replication system. 0 will fallback to legacy replicationsystem.

cvars.name: net.Iris.UseNativeFastArray
cvars.description: Enable or disable IrisNativeFastArray.

cvars.name: net.Iris.UsePrevReceivedStateForOnReps
cvars.description: If true OnReps will use the previous received state when doing onreps and not do any compares, if set to false we will copy the local state and do a compare before issuing onreps

cvars.name: net.Iris.UseResolvingHandleCache
cvars.description: Enable the use of a hot and cold cache when resolving unresolved caches to reduce the time spent resolving references.

cvars.name: net.Iris.UseSupportsStructNetSerializerList
cvars.description: If enabled structs in the SupportsStructNetSerializerList will not raise warnings even if the struct has a NetSerialize/NetDeltaSerialize but has no custom NetSerializer.

cvars.name: net.Iris.WarnAboutDroppedAttachmentsToObjectsNotInScope
cvars.description: Warn when attachments are dropped due to object not in scope. Default is false.

cvars.name: net.Iris.WarnAboutStructsWithCustomSerialization
cvars.description: Warn when generating descriptors for structs with custom serialization.

cvars.name: Net.IsPushModelEnabled
cvars.description: Whether or not Push Model is enabled. This networking mode allows game code to notify the networking system of changes, rather than scraping.

cvars.name: Net.LogSkippedRepNotifies
cvars.description: Log when the networking code skips calling a repnotify clientside due to the property value not changing.

cvars.name: net.LogUnhandledFaults
cvars.description: Whether or not to warn about unhandled net faults (could be deliberate, depending on implementation). 0 = off, 1 = log once, 2 = log always.

cvars.name: net.MagicHeader
cvars.description: String representing binary bits which are prepended to every packet sent by the game. Max length: 32 bits.

cvars.name: Net.MakeBpPropertiesPushModel
cvars.description: Whether or not properties declared in Blueprints will be forced to used Push Model

cvars.name: net.MaxAggregateIPLogs
cvars.description: The maximum number of IP's to include in aggregated pre-connection logging, before such logging is disabled altogether (Min: 1, Max: 128).

cvars.name: net.MaxChannelSize
cvars.description: The maximum number of network channels allowed across the entire server, if <= 0 the connection DefaultMaxChannelSize will be used.

cvars.name: net.MaxClientGuidRemaps
cvars.description: Max client resolves of unmapped network guids per tick

cvars.name: net.MaxConnectionsToTickPerServerFrame
cvars.description: When non-zero, the maximum number of channels that will have changed replicated to them per server update

cvars.name: net.MaxConstructedPartialBunchSizeBytes
cvars.description: The maximum size allowed for Partial Bunches.

cvars.name: net.MaxIPHitLogs
cvars.description: The maximum number of times to individually log a specific IP pre-connection, before aggregating further logs.

cvars.name: net.MaxNetStringSize
cvars.description: Maximum allowed size for strings sent/received by the netcode (in bytes).

cvars.name: net.MaxPlayersOverride
cvars.description: If greater than 0, will override the standard max players count. Useful for testing full servers.

cvars.name: net.MaxRPCPerNetUpdate
cvars.description: Maximum number of unreliable multicast RPC calls allowed per net update, additional ones will be dropped

cvars.name: net.MaxSerializedNetExportGroups
cvars.description: Maximum number of network export groups we would expect to receive in a bunch

cvars.name: net.MaxSerializedNetExportsPerGroup
cvars.description: Maximum number of network exports in each group we would expect to receive in a bunch

cvars.name: net.MaxSerializedNetGuids
cvars.description: Maximum number of network guids we would expect to receive in a bunch

cvars.name: net.MaxSerializedReplayNetGuids
cvars.description: Maximum number of network guids we would expect to receive in replay export data.

cvars.name: net.MaxSimultaneousObjectsWithRPCs
cvars.description: Maximum number of objects that can have unsent RPCs at the same time.

cvars.name: net.MinHandshakeVersion
cvars.description: The minimum supported stateless handshake protocol version (numeric).

cvars.name: net.Montage.Debug
cvars.description: Prints Replication information about AnimMontages 0: no print. 1: Print AnimMontage info on client side as they are played.

cvars.name: net.NetFaultRecoveryLogQuotaChecks
cvars.description: Whether or not to enable debug logging for quota checks (useful for debugging new net faults used with 'RegisterCounterCategory')

cvars.name: Net.NetGuidCacheHistoryEnabled
cvars.description: When enabled, allows logging of NetGUIDCache History. Warning, this can eat up a lot of memory, and won't free itself until the Cache is destroyed.

cvars.name: net.NetPingDebugDump
cvars.description: Whether or not to dump NetPing ping values to log every 5 seconds.

cvars.name: net.NetPingEnabled
cvars.description: Whether or not the NetPing ping handling interface is enabled. Used for centralized ping tracking, and ICMP/UDP ping. (Valid values: 0 = Off, 1 = Enabled for client, 2 = Enabled for server and client, 3 = Enabled for server only)

cvars.name: net.NetPingICMPInterval
cvars.description: Specifies the interval (in seconds) for performing ICMP pings.

cvars.name: net.NetPingTimeoutDisableThreshold
cvars.description: The number of times to send an ICMP/UDP ping when at a failure/timeout rate of 100%, before giving up and disabling pings.

cvars.name: net.NetPingTypes
cvars.description: A comma-delimited list of EPingType pings to enable, and (optionally) the EPingAverageType averaging to apply to the ping (e.g: RoundTrip=None \| RoundTripExclFrame=PlayerStateAvg \| ICMP=MovingAverage")."

cvars.name: net.NetPingUDPInterval
cvars.description: Specifies the interval (in seconds) for performing UDP pings.

cvars.name: net.NetPingUDPPort
cvars.description: For 'UDPQoS' ping type, sets the port used for pinging.

cvars.name: net.NetServerMoveTimestampExpiredWarningThreshold
cvars.description: Tolerance for ServerMove() to warn when client moves are expired more than this time threshold behind the server.

cvars.name: net.OodleClientEnableMode
cvars.description: When to enable compression on the client (overrides the 'ClientEnableMode' .ini setting).

cvars.name: net.OodleMinSizeForCompression
cvars.description: The minimum size an outgoing packet must be, for it to be considered for compression (does not count overhead of handler components which process packets after Oodle).

cvars.name: net.OodleNetwork.TimeGuardLimit
cvars.description: Sets the maximum number of OodleNetworkHandlerComponent timeguard logs.

cvars.name: net.OodleNetwork.TimeGuardThresholdMS
cvars.description: Threshold in milliseconds for the OodleNetworkHandlerComponent timeguard.

cvars.name: net.OodleServerEnableMode
cvars.description: When to enable compression on the server (overrides the 'ServerEnableMode' .ini setting).

cvars.name: net.OptimizedRemapping
cvars.description: Uses optimized path to remap unmapped network guids

cvars.name: net.PackageMap.DebugAll
cvars.description: Debugs PackageMap serialization of all objects

cvars.name: net.PackageMap.DebugObject
cvars.description: Debugs PackageMap serialization of objectPartial name of object to debug

cvars.name: net.PackageMap.LongLoadThreshhold
cvars.description: Threshhold time in seconds for printing long load warnings in object serialization

cvars.name: net.PacketHandlerCRCDump
cvars.description: Enables or disables dumping of packet CRC's for every HandlerComponent, Incoming and Outgoing, for debugging.

cvars.name: net.PacketHandlerTimeguardLimit
cvars.description: Sets the maximum number of HandlerComponent timeguard logs.

cvars.name: net.PacketHandlerTimeguardThresholdMS
cvars.description: Threshold in milliseconds for the HandlerComponent timeguard, Incoming and Outgoing.

cvars.name: net.PacketOrderCorrectionEnableThreshold
cvars.description: The number of 'out of order' packet sequences that need to occur, before correction is enabled.

cvars.name: net.PacketOrderMaxCachedPackets
cvars.description: (NOTE: Must be power of 2!) The maximum number of packets to cache while waiting for missing packet sequences, before treating missing packets as lost.

cvars.name: net.PacketOrderMaxMissingPackets
cvars.description: The maximum number of missed packet sequences that is allowed, before treating missing packets as lost.

cvars.name: net.PartialBunchReliableThreshold
cvars.description: If a bunch is broken up into this many partial bunches are more, we will send it reliable even if the original bunch was not reliable. Partial bunches are atonmic and must all make it over to be used

cvars.name: net.PingDisplayServerTime
cvars.description: Show server frame time. Not available in shipping builds.

cvars.name: net.PingExcludeFrameTime
cvars.description: If true, game frame times are subtracted from calculated ping to approximate actual network ping

cvars.name: net.PingUsePacketRecvTime
cvars.description: Use OS or Receive Thread packet receive time, for calculating the ping. Excludes frame time.

cvars.name: net.ProcessQueuedBunchesMillisecondLimit
cvars.description: Time threshold for processing queued bunches. If it takes longer than this in a single frame, wait until the next frame to continue processing queued bunches. For unlimited time, set to 0.

cvars.name: net.PushModelSkipUndirtiedFastArrays
cvars.description: When true, include fast arrays when skipping objects that we can safely see aren't dirty.

cvars.name: net.PushModelSkipUndirtiedReplication
cvars.description: When true, skip replicating any objects that we can safely see aren't dirty.

cvars.name: net.PushModelValidateProperties
cvars.description: When true, we will compare all push model properties and warn if they haven't been marked dirty properly.

cvars.name: net.PushModelValidateSkipUpdate
cvars.description: If enabled, detect when we thought we could skip an object replication based on push model state, but we sent data anyway.

cvars.name: net.QuantizeActorLocationOnSpawn
cvars.description: When enabled, we will quantize Location for newly spawned actors to a single decimal of precision.

cvars.name: net.QuantizeActorRotationOnSpawn
cvars.description: When enabled, we will quantize Rotation for newly spawned actors to a single decimal of precision.

cvars.name: net.QuantizeActorScaleOnSpawn
cvars.description: When enabled, we will quantize Scale for newly spawned actors to a single decimal of precision.

cvars.name: net.QuantizeActorVelocityOnSpawn
cvars.description: When enabled, we will quantize Velocity for newly spawned actors to a single decimal of precision.

cvars.name: net.QueuedBunchTimeFailsafeSeconds
cvars.description: Amount of time in seconds to wait with queued bunches before forcibly processing them all, ignoring the NetDriver's HasExceededIncomingBunchFrameProcessingTime.

cvars.name: net.QueuedBunchTimeoutSeconds
cvars.description: Time in seconds to wait for queued bunches on a channel to flush before logging a warning.

cvars.name: net.RandomizeSequence
cvars.description: Randomize initial packet sequence, can provide some obfuscation

cvars.name: net.RcvThreadShouldSleepForLongRecvErrors
cvars.description: Whether or not the receive thread should sleep for RecvFrom errors which are expected to last a long time. 0 = don't sleep, 1 = sleep, 2 = exit receive thread.

cvars.name: net.RcvThreadSleepTimeForWaitableErrorsInSeconds
cvars.description: Time the receive thread will sleep when a waitable error is returned by a socket operation.

cvars.name: net.RecreateSocketCooldown
cvars.description: The minimum amount of time, in seconds, between socket recreation attempts.

cvars.name: net.RecreateSocketTimeoutThreshold
cvars.description: The amount of time, in seconds, without receiving a packet or alternatively without a send ack, before triggering socket recreation. (0.0 = off)

cvars.name: net.RecvMultiCapacity
cvars.description: When RecvMulti is enabled, this is the number of packets it is allocated to handle per call - bigger is better (especially under a DDoS), but keep an eye on memory cost.

cvars.name: net.Reliable.Debug
cvars.description: Print all reliable bunches sent over the network 0: no print. 1: Print bunches as they are sent. 2: Print reliable bunch buffer each net update

cvars.name: net.ReliableRPCQueueSize
cvars.description: Maximum number of reliable RPCs queued per object. This is in addition to the 256 that are in the send window. This is to support very large RPCs that are split into smaller pieces.

cvars.name: net.RemapStableSubobjects
cvars.description: If enabled, attempts to remap stable subobjects when net.OptimizedRemapping is also enabled.

cvars.name: Net.RepDriver.Enable
cvars.description: Enables Replication Driver. 0 will fallback to legacy NetDriver implementation.

cvars.name: Net.RepGraph.ForceConnectionViewerPriority
cvars.description: Force the connection's player controller and viewing pawn as topmost priority. Same as Net.ForceConnectionViewerPriority.

cvars.name: net.ReplicateCustomDeltaPropertiesInRepIndexOrder
cvars.description: If false (default) custom delta properties will replicate in the same order as they're added to the lifetime property array during the call to GetLifetimeReplicatedProps. If true custom delta properties will be replicated in the property RepIndex order, which is typically in increasing property offset order. Note that custom delta properties are always serialized after regular properties.

cvars.name: net.ReplicateOnlyBeginPlay
cvars.description: Only allow property replication of actors that had BeginPlay called on them.

cvars.name: net.Replication.DebugProperty
cvars.description: Debugs Replication of property by name, this should be set to the partial name of the property to debug

cvars.name: net.ReportGameTickFlushTime
cvars.description: Record and report to the perf tracking system the processing time of the GameNetDriver's TickFlush.

cvars.name: net.ReportSyncLoads
cvars.description: If enabled, the engine will track objects loaded by the networking system and broadcast FNetDelegates::OnSyncLoadDetected to report them.By default they are logged to the LogNetSyncLoads category.

cvars.name: net.RequiredEncryptionNetDriverDefNames
cvars.description: Comma-delimited list of NetDriverDefinition's where 'IsEncryptionRequired' will return true, when 'net.AllowEncryption' is 2. (specifying 'all' will enable this for all NetDriverDefinition's)

cvars.name: net.ReservedNetGuidSize
cvars.description: Reserved size in bytes for NetGUID serialization, used as a placeholder for later serialization

cvars.name: net.ResetAckStatePostSeamlessTravel
cvars.description: If 1, the server will reset the ack state of the package map after seamless travel. Increases bandwidth usage, but may resolve some issues with GUIDs not being available on clients after seamlessly traveling.

cvars.name: Net.ReuseReplicatorsForDormantObjects
cvars.description: When true, Server's will persist and attempt to reuse replicators for Dormant Actors and Objects. This can cut down on bandwidth by preventing redundant information from being sent when waking objects from Dormancy.

cvars.name: net.RPC.Debug
cvars.description: Print all RPC bunches sent over the network 0: no print. 1: Print bunches as they are sent.

cvars.name: net.RPCDoSAnalyticsMaxRPCs
cvars.description: The top 'x' number of RPC's to include in RPC DoS analytics, ranked by RPC rate per Second.

cvars.name: net.RPCDoSDetectionOverride
cvars.description: Overrides whether or not RPC DoS Detection is enabled per-NetDriver. 0 = disabled, 1 = enabled. Example: net.RPCDoSDetectionOverride=GameNetDriver=1,BeaconNetDriver=0

cvars.name: net.RPCDoSForcedRPCTracking
cvars.description: Sets a single RPC that, when encountered, forcibly enables RPC tracking (limited to one RPC for performance). Can also specify a random chance, between 0.0 and 1.0, for when encountering the RPC enables tracking, and a length of time for leaving tracking enabled (disables the next tick, otherwise).Example (50% chance for 10 seconds): net.RPCDoSForcedRPCTracking=ServerAdmin,0.5,10

cvars.name: net.RPCDoSScopeDebugging
cvars.description: Sets whether or not debugging/ensures for RPC DoS Tick/Packet scopes should be enabled.

cvars.name: net.SerializeNewActorOverrideLevel
cvars.description: If true, servers will serialize a spawned, replicated actor's level so the client attempts to spawn it into that level too. If false, clients will spawn all these actors into the persistent level.

cvars.name: net.ShareInitialCompareState
cvars.description: If true and net.ShareShadowState is enabled, attempt to also share initial replication compares across connections.

cvars.name: net.ShareSerializedData
cvars.description: If true, enable shared serialization system used by replication to reduce CPU usage when multiple clients need the same data

cvars.name: net.ShareShadowState
cvars.description: If true, work done to compare properties will be shared across connections

cvars.name: net.SkipDestroyNetStartupActorsOnChannelCloseDueToLevelUnloaded
cvars.description: Controls if Actor that is a NetStartUpActor assosciated with the channel is destroyed or not when we receive a channel close with ECloseReason::LevelUnloaded.

cvars.name: net.SkipReplicatorForDestructionInfos
cvars.description: If enabled, skip creation of object replicator in SetChannelActor when we know there is no content payload and we're going to immediately destroy the actor.

cvars.name: net.SubObjects.CompareWithLegacy
cvars.description: When turned on we will collect the subobjects replicated by the ReplicateSubObjects method and compare them with the ones replicated via the Actor's registered list. If a divergence is detected it will trigger an ensure.

cvars.name: net.SubObjects.DefaultUseSubObjectReplicationList
cvars.description: Do actors and actorcomponents replicate subobjects using the registration method by default.

cvars.name: net.SubObjects.DetectDeprecatedReplicatedSubObjects
cvars.description: When turned on, we trigger an ensure if we detect a ReplicateSubObjects() function is still implemented in a class that is using the new SubObject list.

cvars.name: net.SubObjects.LogAllComparisonErrors
cvars.description: If enabled log all the errors detected by the CompareWithLegacy cheat. Otherwise only the first ensure triggered gets logged.

cvars.name: net.SupportFastArrayDelta
cvars.description: Whether or not Fast Array Struct Delta Serialization is enabled.

cvars.name: net.TickAllOpenChannels
cvars.description: If nonzero, each net connection will tick all of its open channels every tick. Leaving this off will improve performance.

cvars.name: net.TrackAsyncLoadingGUIDThreshold
cvars.description: When > 0, any objects that take longer than the threshold to async load will be tracked. Threshold in seconds, @see FNetGUIDCache::ConsumeDelinquencyAnalytics. Used for Debugging and Analytics

cvars.name: net.TrackAsyncLoadingGUIDThresholdOwner
cvars.description: When > 0, if the Net Connection's owning Controller or Pawn is waiting on Async Loads for longer than this threshold, we will fire a CSV Event to track it. Used for Debugging and Profiling

cvars.name: net.TrackDormantObjectsByLevel
cvars.description: When true, network object list will maintain a set of dormant actors per connnection per level.

cvars.name: net.TrackFlushedDormantObjects
cvars.description: If enabled, track dormant subobjects when dormancy is flushed, so they can be properly deleted if destroyed prior to the next ReplicateActor.

cvars.name: net.TrackNetSerializeObjectReferences
cvars.description: If true, we will create small layouts for Net Serialize Structs if they have Object Properties. This can prevent some Shadow State GC crashes.

cvars.name: net.TrackQueuedActorThreshold
cvars.description: When > 0, any actors that spend longer than the threshold with queued bunches will be tracked. Threshold in seconds, @see UPackageMap::ConsumeDelinquencyAnalytics. Used for Debugging and Analytics

cvars.name: net.TrackQueuedActorThresholdOwner
cvars.description: When > 0, if the Net Connection's owning Controller or Pawn has Queued Bunches for longer than this threshold, we will fire a CSV Event to track it. Used for Debugging and Profiling

cvars.name: net.UnreliableRPCQueueSize
cvars.description: Maximum number of unreliable RPCs queued per object. If more RPCs are queued then older ones will be dropped.

cvars.name: net.UseAdaptiveNetUpdateFrequency
cvars.description: If 1, NetUpdateFrequency will be calculated based on how often actors actually send something when replicating

cvars.name: Net.UseGranularNetworkTracking
cvars.description: When enabled, Obj List will print out highly detailed information about Network Memory Usage

cvars.name: Net.UsePackedShadowBuffers
cvars.description: When enabled, FRepLayout will generate shadow buffers that are packed with only the necessary NetProperties, instead of copying entire object state.

cvars.name: net.UseRecvMulti
cvars.description: If true, and if running on a Unix/Linux platform, multiple packets will be retrieved from the socket with one syscall, improving performance and also allowing retrieval of timestamp information.

cvars.name: net.UseRecvTimestamps
cvars.description: If true and if net.UseRecvMulti is also true, on a Unix/Linux platform, the kernel timestamp will be retrieved for each packet received, providing more accurate ping calculations.

cvars.name: net.ValidateReplicatedPropertyRegistration
cvars.description: Warns if replicated properties were not registered in GetLifetimeReplicatedProps.

cvars.name: net.VerifyMagicHeader
cvars.description: Whether or not verification of the magic header is performed, prior to processing a packet. Disable if transitioning to a new magic header, while wishing to continue supporting the old header for a time.

cvars.name: net.VerifyNetClientID
cvars.description: Whether or not verification of the packet ClientID value is performed.

cvars.name: net.VerifyNetSessionID
cvars.description: Whether or not verification of the packet SessionID value is performed.

cvars.name: net.VerifyShareSerializedData
cvars.description: Debug option to verify shared serialization data during replication

cvars.name: net.WithArrayOnRepFix
cvars.description: If true, attempt to prevent issues with Arrays not receiving OnRep calls until their size changes if their Archetypes have different values from instances in levels.

cvars.name: NetAnalytics.MinimumNumberOfPacketsForBurstTracking
cvars.description: The minimum number of packets that must have been notified (in our out) in order to consider a frame for packet loss by percentage.See NetAnalytics.PercentOfDroppedPacketsToConsiderBurst

cvars.name: NetAnalytics.NumberOfConsecutiveDroppedPacketsToConsiderBurst
cvars.description: The number of packets lost in a row (in or out) for us to consider the frame as having bursts of packet loss.Not affected by NetAnalytics.MinimumNumberOfPacketsForBurstTracking.

cvars.name: NetAnalytics.PercentOfDroppedPacketsToConsiderBurst
cvars.description: The percentage of packets lost in a frame (in or out) for us to consider the frame as having bursts of packet loss. See NetAnalytics.MinimumNumberOfPacketsForBurstTracking.

cvars.name: networkversionoverride
cvars.description: Sets network version used for multiplayer

cvars.name: niagara.AllowAllNiagaraNodesInEmitterGraphs
cvars.description: If true, all nodes will be allowed in the Niagara emitter graphs.

cvars.name: niagara.CreateShadersOnLoad
cvars.description: Whether to create Niagara's simulation shaders on load, which can reduce hitching, but use more memory. Otherwise they will be created as needed.

cvars.name: Niagara.EmitterStatsFormat
cvars.description: 0 shows the particles count, ms, mb and state. 1 shows particles count.

cvars.name: Niagara.GPUCountBufferSlack
cvars.description: Multiplier of the GPU count buffer size to prevent frequent re-allocation.

cvars.name: Niagara.GPUCountManager.AllocateIncrement
cvars.description: If we run out of space for allocations this is how many allocate rather than a single entry. (default=64)

cvars.name: Niagara.GPUCulling
cvars.description: Whether to frustum and camera distance cull particles on the GPU

cvars.name: Niagara.GPUCulling.CPUToGPUThreshold
cvars.description: Particle count to move from a CPU sort to a GPU cull. -1 disables. (default=0)

cvars.name: Niagara.GPUSorting.CPUToGPUThreshold
cvars.description: Particle count to move from a CPU sort to a GPU sort. -1 disables. (default=-1)

cvars.name: Niagara.MinCulledGPUInstanceCount
cvars.description: Minimum number of culled (per-view) instance count entries allocated in the global buffer. (default=2048)

cvars.name: Niagara.MinGPUInstanceCount
cvars.description: Minimum number of instance count entries allocated in the global buffer. (default=2048)

cvars.name: Niagara.RadixSortThreshold
cvars.description: Instance count at which radix sort gets used instead of introspective sort. Set to -1 to never use radixsort. (default=400)

cvars.name: Niagara.Ribbon.GpuAllocateMaxCount
cvars.description: When enabled (default) we allocate the maximum number of required elements.This can result in memory bloat if the count is highly variable but will be more stable performance wise

cvars.name: Niagara.Ribbon.GpuBufferAlign
cvars.description: When not allocating the maximum number of required elements we align up the request elements to this size to improve buffer reuse.

cvars.name: Niagara.Ribbon.GpuBufferCachePurgeCounter
cvars.description: The number of frames we hold onto ribbon buffer for.Where 0 (Default) we purge them if not used next frame.Negative values will purge the buffers the same frame, essentially zero reusing.

cvars.name: Niagara.Ribbon.GpuEnabled
cvars.description: Enable any GPU ribbon related code (including GPU init).

cvars.name: Niagara.Ribbon.GpuInitMode
cvars.description: Modifies the GPU initialization mode used, i.e. offloading CPU calculations to the GPU. 0 = Respect bUseGPUInit from properties (Default) 1 = Force enabled 2 = Force disabled

cvars.name: Niagara.Ribbon.MinSegmentLength
cvars.description: Min length of niagara ribbon segments. (default=1)

cvars.name: Niagara.Ribbon.ShareGeneratedData
cvars.description: Allow ribbons to share the generate data where possible.

cvars.name: Niagara.Ribbon.Tessellation.Enabled
cvars.description: Determine if we allow tesellation on this platform or not.

cvars.name: Niagara.Ribbon.Tessellation.MaxErrorScreenPercentage
cvars.description: Screen percentage used to compute the tessellation factor. Smaller values will generate more tessellation, up to max tesselltion. (default=0.002)

cvars.name: Niagara.Ribbon.Tessellation.MaxInterp
cvars.description: When TessellationAngle is > 0, this is the maximum tesselation factor. Higher values allow more evenly divided tesselation. When TessellationAngle is 0, this is the actually tesselation factor (default=16).

cvars.name: Niagara.Ribbon.Tessellation.MinAbsoluteError
cvars.description: Minimum absolute world size error when tessellating. Prevent over tessellating when distance gets really small. (default=0.5)

cvars.name: Niagara.Ribbon.Tessellation.MinAngle
cvars.description: Ribbon segment angle to tesselate in radian. (default=15 degrees)

cvars.name: niagara.ShowShaderCompilerWarnings
cvars.description: When set to 1, will display all warnings from Niagara shader compiles.

cvars.name: Niagara.StaticSwitch.EnableAutoRefreshOldStaticSwitches
cvars.description: Enables auto refresh for old static switch nodes on post load and updates to enum assets. Enable this and cook assets to check how many old nodes operate on outdated enums

cvars.name: np2.EnableDebugRPC
cvars.description: (DEPRECATED 5.4, only part of the legacy physics frame offset logic) Sends extra debug information to clients about server side input buffering

cvars.name: np2.EnableDefaultReplication
cvars.description: Enable default replication in the networked physics prediction flow.

cvars.name: np2.NetworkPhysicsPredictionFrameOffset
cvars.description: (DEPRECATED 5.4, use np2.PredictionAsyncFrameBuffer instead) Additional frame offset to be added to the local to server offset used by network prediction

cvars.name: np2.NumRedundantCmds
cvars.description: (DEPRECATED 5.4, only part of the legacy physics frame offset logic) Number of redundant user cmds to send per frame

cvars.name: np2.PredictionAsyncFrameBuffer
cvars.description: Additional frame offset to be added to the local to server offset used by network prediction

cvars.name: np2.PredictiveInterpolation.AlwaysHardSnap
cvars.description: When true, predictive interpolation replication mode will always hard snap. Used as a backup measure

cvars.name: np2.PredictiveInterpolation.AverageReceiveIntervalSmoothing
cvars.description: Recommended range: 1.0 - 5.0. Higher value makes the average receive interval adjust itself slower, reducing spikes in InterpolationTime.

cvars.name: np2.PredictiveInterpolation.DisableErrorVelocityLimits
cvars.description: Disable the velocity limit and allow error accumulation at any velocity.

cvars.name: np2.PredictiveInterpolation.DisableSoftSnap
cvars.description: When true, predictive interpolation will not use softsnap to correct the replication with when velocity fails. Hardsnap will still eventually kick in if replication can't reach the target.

cvars.name: np2.PredictiveInterpolation.DontClearTarget
cvars.description: When true, predictive interpolation will not lose track of the last replicated state after coming to rest.

cvars.name: np2.PredictiveInterpolation.DrawDebugTargets
cvars.description: Draw target states, color coded by which ServerFrame they originate from, replicated targets are large and extrapolated targets are small. There is a Z offset to the draw calls.

cvars.name: np2.PredictiveInterpolation.DrawDebugVectors
cvars.description: Draw replication vectors, target velocity, replicated velocity, velocity change between replication calls etc.

cvars.name: np2.PredictiveInterpolation.EarlyOutAngle
cvars.description: If object is within this rotational angle (in degrees) from the source target, early out from replication and apply sleep if replicated.

cvars.name: np2.PredictiveInterpolation.EarlyOutDistanceSqr
cvars.description: Squared value. If object is within this distance from the source target, early out from replication and apply sleep if replicated.

cvars.name: np2.PredictiveInterpolation.EarlyOutWithVelocity
cvars.description: If true, allow replication logic to early out if current velocities are driving replication well enough. If false, only early out if target velocity is zero.

cvars.name: np2.PredictiveInterpolation.ErrorAccAngVelMaxLimit
cvars.description: If target angular velocity (in degrees) is below this limit we check for desync to trigger softsnap and accumulate time to build up to a hardsnap.

cvars.name: np2.PredictiveInterpolation.ErrorAccLinVelMaxLimit
cvars.description: If target velocity is below this limit we check for desync to trigger softsnap and accumulate time to build up to a hardsnap.

cvars.name: np2.PredictiveInterpolation.ErrorAccumulationDecreaseMultiplier
cvars.description: Multiplier to adjust how fast we decrease accumulated error time when we no longer accumulate error.

cvars.name: np2.PredictiveInterpolation.ErrorAccumulationSeconds
cvars.description: Perform a reposition if replication have not been able to cover the min expected distance towards the target for this amount of time.

cvars.name: np2.PredictiveInterpolation.ExtrapolationMinTime
cvars.description: Clamps minimum extrapolation time. Value in seconds. Disable minimum clamp by setting to 0.

cvars.name: np2.PredictiveInterpolation.ExtrapolationTimeMultiplier
cvars.description: Multiplier to adjust the time to extrapolate the target forward over, the time is based on current send-rate.

cvars.name: np2.PredictiveInterpolation.FakeTargetOnClientWakeUp
cvars.description: When true, predictive interpolation will fake a replication target at the current transform marked as asleep, this target only apply if the client doesn't receive targets from the server. This stops the client from desyncing from the server if being woken up by mistake

cvars.name: np2.PredictiveInterpolation.InterpolationTimeMultiplier
cvars.description: Multiplier to adjust the replication interpolation time which is based on the sendrate of replication data from the server.

cvars.name: np2.PredictiveInterpolation.MinExpectedDistanceCovered
cvars.description: Value between 0-1, in percentage where 0.25 = 25%. How much of the expected distance based on replication velocity should the object have covered in a simulation tick to Not be considered stuck.

cvars.name: np2.PredictiveInterpolation.PosCorrectionAsVelocity
cvars.description: When true, predictive interpolation will apply positional offset correction as a velocity instead of as a positional change each tick.

cvars.name: np2.PredictiveInterpolation.PosCorrectionTimeBase
cvars.description: Base time to correct positional offset over. RTT x PosCorrectionTimeMultiplier are added on top of this.

cvars.name: np2.PredictiveInterpolation.PosCorrectionTimeMin
cvars.description: Min time time to correct positional offset over. DeltaSeconds is added on top of this.

cvars.name: np2.PredictiveInterpolation.PosCorrectionTimeMultiplier
cvars.description: Multiplier to adjust how much of RTT (network Round Trip Time) to add to positional offset correction.

cvars.name: np2.PredictiveInterpolation.PostResimWaitForUpdate
cvars.description: After a resimulation, wait for replicated states that correspond to post-resim state before processing replication again.

cvars.name: np2.PredictiveInterpolation.RotCorrectionTimeBase
cvars.description: Base time to correct positional offset over. RTT x PosCorrectionTimeMultiplier are added on top of this.

cvars.name: np2.PredictiveInterpolation.RotCorrectionTimeMin
cvars.description: Min time time to correct rotational offset over. DeltaSeconds is added on top of this.

cvars.name: np2.PredictiveInterpolation.RotCorrectionTimeMultiplier
cvars.description: Multiplier to adjust how much of RTT (network Round Trip Time) to add to positional offset correction.

cvars.name: np2.PredictiveInterpolation.RotInterpolationTimeMultiplier
cvars.description: Multiplier to adjust the rotational replication interpolation time which is based on the sendrate of replication data from the server.

cvars.name: np2.PredictiveInterpolation.SkipReplication
cvars.description: When true, predictive interpolation is not applied anymore letting the object simulate freely instead

cvars.name: np2.PredictiveInterpolation.SkipVelocityRepOnPosEarlyOut
cvars.description: If true, don't run linear velocity replication if position can early out but angular can't early out.

cvars.name: np2.PredictiveInterpolation.SleepSecondsClearTarget
cvars.description: Wait for the object to sleep for this many seconds before clearing the replication target, to ensure nothing wakes up the object just after it goes to sleep on the client.

cvars.name: np2.PredictiveInterpolation.SoftSnapPosStrength
cvars.description: Value in percent between 0.0 - 1.0 representing how much to softsnap each tick of the remaining distance.

cvars.name: np2.PredictiveInterpolation.SoftSnapRotStrength
cvars.description: Value in percent between 0.0 - 1.0 representing how much to softsnap each tick of the remaining distance.

cvars.name: np2.PredictiveInterpolation.SoftSnapToSource
cvars.description: If true, soft snap will be performed towards the source state of the current target instead of the predicted state of the current target.

cvars.name: np2.PredictiveInterpolation.TargetTickAlignmentClampMultiplier
cvars.description: Multiplier to adjust clamping of target alignment via TickCount. Multiplier is performed on AverageReceiveInterval.

cvars.name: np2.PredictiveInterpolation.VelocityBased
cvars.description: When true, predictive interpolation replication mode will only apply linear velocity and angular velocity

cvars.name: np2.ReplicationCache.LingerForNSeconds
cvars.description: How long to keep data in the replication cache without the actor accessing it, after this we stop caching the actors state until it tries to access it again.

cvars.name: np2.Resim.AllowRewindToClosestState
cvars.description: When rewinding to a specific frame, if the client doens't have state data for that frame, use closest data available. Only affects the first rewind frame, when FPBDRigidsEvolution is set to Reset.

cvars.name: np2.Resim.AngVelStabilityMultiplier
cvars.description: Recommended range between 0.0-1.0. Lower value means more stable angular velocity corrections.

cvars.name: np2.Resim.ApplyTargetsWhileResimulating
cvars.description: If false, target states from the server are only applied on rewind. If true, target states from the server are applied during resimulation if there are any available.

cvars.name: np2.Resim.CompareInputToTriggerRewind
cvars.description: If we should compare local players predicted inputs with incoming server inputs to trigger resimulations if they differ, comparison done through FNetworkPhysicsData::CompareData.

cvars.name: np2.Resim.CompareStateToTriggerRewind
cvars.description: If we should cache local players custom state struct in rewind history and compare the predicted state with incoming server state to trigger resimulations if they differ, comparison done through FNetworkPhysicsData::CompareData.

cvars.name: np2.Resim.DisableReplicationOnInteraction
cvars.description: If a resim object interacts with another object not running resimulation, deactivate that objects replication until interaction stops.

cvars.name: np2.Resim.DrawDebug
cvars.description: Resimulation debug draw-calls

cvars.name: np2.Resim.PosStabilityMultiplier
cvars.description: Recommended range between 0.0-1.0. Lower value means more stable positional corrections.

cvars.name: np2.Resim.RotStabilityMultiplier
cvars.description: Recommended range between 0.0-1.0. Lower value means more stable rotational corrections.

cvars.name: np2.Resim.RuntimeCorrectConnectedBodies
cvars.description: If true runtime position and rotation correction will also shift transform of any connected physics objects. Used if RuntimeCorrectionEnabled is true.

cvars.name: np2.Resim.RuntimeCorrectionEnabled
cvars.description: Apply runtime corrections while error is small enough not to trigger a resim.

cvars.name: np2.Resim.RuntimeVelocityCorrection
cvars.description: Apply linear and angular velocity corrections in runtime while within resim trigger. Used if RuntimeCorrectionEnabled is true.

cvars.name: np2.Resim.SimProxyRepMode
cvars.description: All actors with a NetworkPhysicsSettingsComponent and that are running resimulation and is ROLE_SimulatedProxy will change their physics replication mode. -1 = Disabled, 0 = Default, 1 = PredictiveInterpolation, 2 = Resimulation

cvars.name: np2.Resim.VelStabilityMultiplier
cvars.description: Recommended range between 0.0-1.0. Lower value means more stable linear velocity corrections.

cvars.name: np2.TickOffsetCorrectionLimit
cvars.description: If the client gets out of sync with physics ticks more than this limit, cut the losses and reset the offset.

cvars.name: np2.TickOffsetUpdateInterval
cvars.description: How many physics ticks to wait between each tick offset update. Lowest viable value = 1, which means update each tick. Deactivate physics offset updates by setting to 0 or negative value.

cvars.name: np2.TimeDilationAmount
cvars.description: Server-side CVar, Disable TimeDilation by setting to 0. Value is in percent where 0.01 = 1% dilation. Example: 1.0/0.01 = 100, meaning that over the time it usually takes to tick 100 physics steps we will tick 99 or 101 depending on if we dilate up or down.

cvars.name: np2.TimeDilationEscalation
cvars.description: Server-side CVar, Dilate the time more depending on how many ticks we need to adjust. When set to false we use the set TimeDilationAmount and wait the amount of time it takes to perform correct the offset. When set to true we multiply the TimeDilationAmount with the buffer offset count which will correct the offset in one TimeDilationAmount cycle.

cvars.name: np2.TimeDilationEscalationDecay
cvars.description: Value is a multiplier, Default: 0.05. For each escalated TimeDilation amount, also decay by this much. Disable by setting to 0.

cvars.name: np2.TimeDilationEscalationDecayMax
cvars.description: Value is a multiplier, Default: 0.5. The max decay value for escalated time dilation. Lower value means higher decay.

cvars.name: np2.TimeDilationMax
cvars.description: Max value of the time dilation multiplier.

cvars.name: np2.TimeDilationMin
cvars.description: Min value of the time dilation multiplier

cvars.name: ObjectTools.MaxRecursionDepth
cvars.description: How many times to recurse to find the object to search for

cvars.name: ObjectTools.MaxTimesToCheckSameObject
cvars.description: Number of times to recurse on the same object when mapping property chains to objects.

cvars.name: OpenGL.UseEmulatedUBs
cvars.description: If true, enable using emulated uniform buffers on OpenGL Mobile mode.

cvars.name: OSS.DelayAsyncTaskOutQueue
cvars.description: Min total async task time Time in secs

cvars.name: oss.PlatformOverride
cvars.description: Overrides the detected platform of this client for various debugging Valid values WIN MAC PSN XBL IOS AND LIN SWT OTHER

cvars.name: OSS.VoiceLoopback
cvars.description: Enables voice loopback 1 Enabled. 0 Disabled.

cvars.name: OSSNull.AddUserNumToNullId
cvars.description: True if login name should include the local user number, which allows different stable Ids per user num

cvars.name: OSSNull.AutoLoginAtStartup
cvars.description: True if it should login the first user at startup like single-user platforms, false to only login when requested

cvars.name: OSSNull.ForceOfflineMode
cvars.description: True if it should fail faked network queries and act like an offline system

cvars.name: OSSNull.ForceShowLoginUIUserChange
cvars.description: True if the user index should change during login UI to emulate a platform user change

cvars.name: OSSNull.ForceStableNullId
cvars.description: True if it should use a system-stable null Id for login, same as -StableNullID on command line

cvars.name: OSSNull.OnlineRequiresSecondLogin
cvars.description: True if the first login only counts as local login, a second is required for online access

cvars.name: OSSNull.RequireLoginCredentials
cvars.description: True if login should require a user/pass to act like an external service, false to match most platforms and use the default

cvars.name: OSSNull.RequireShowLoginUI
cvars.description: True if login requires calling ShowLoginUI on the externalUI, depends on SupportExternalUI

cvars.name: OSSNull.SupportExternalUI
cvars.description: True if it should support an external UI interface

cvars.name: OutputLogModule.HideConsole
cvars.description: Whether debug console widgets should be hidden (false by default)

cvars.name: p.aabbtree.DirtyElementGridCellSize
cvars.description: DirtyElement Grid acceleration structure cell size in cm. 0 or less will disable the feature

cvars.name: p.aabbtree.DirtyElementMaxCellCapacity
cvars.description: The maximum number of dirty elements that can be added to a single grid cell before spilling to slower flat list

cvars.name: p.aabbtree.DirtyElementMaxGridCellQueryCount
cvars.description: Maximum grid cells to query (per raycast for example) in DirtyElement grid acceleration structure before falling back to brute force

cvars.name: p.aabbtree.DirtyElementMaxPhysicalSizeInCells
cvars.description: If a dirty element stradles more than this number of cells, it will no be added to the grid acceleration structure

cvars.name: p.aabbtree.DynamicTreeBoundingBoxPadding
cvars.description: Additional padding added to bounding boxes for dynamic AABB trees to amortize update cost

cvars.name: p.aabbtree.DynamicTreeLeafCapacity
cvars.description: Dynamic Tree Leaf Capacity

cvars.name: p.aabbtree.MaxProcessingTimePerSliceSeconds
cvars.description: Set to True if we want to timeslice tree generation by a milisecond budget instead of per nodes processed or data size copied

cvars.name: p.aabbtree.MinDataChunkToProcessBetweenTimeChecks
cvars.description: Minimum amount of data elements to process before checking if we are withing budget

cvars.name: p.aabbtree.MinNodesChunkToProcessBetweenTimeChecks
cvars.description: Minimum amount of nodes we want to process before checking if we are withing budget

cvars.name: p.aabbtree.splitataveragecenter
cvars.description: Split AABB tree nodes at the average of the element centers

cvars.name: p.aabbtree.splitonvarianceaxis
cvars.description: Split AABB tree nodes along the axis with the largest element center variance

cvars.name: p.aabbtree.updatedirtyelementpayloads
cvars.description: Allow AABB tree elements to update internal payload data when they receive a payload update

cvars.name: p.aabbtree.UseTimeSliceMillisecondBudget
cvars.description: Set to True if we want to timeslice tree generation by a milisecond budget instead of per nodes processed

cvars.name: p.AddFormerBaseVelocityToRootMotionOverrideWhenFalling
cvars.description: To avoid sudden velocity changes when a root motion source moves the pawn from a moving base to free fall, this CVar will enable the FormerBaseVelocityDecayHalfLife property on CharacterMovementComponent.

cvars.name: p.AggregateGeom.ISPC
cvars.description: Whether to use ISPC optimizations in physics aggregate geometry calculations

cvars.name: p.AllowCachedOverlaps
cvars.description: Primitive Component physics 0: disable cached overlaps, 1: enable (default)

cvars.name: p.AllowDestroyNonNetworkActors
cvars.description: When enabled, allows Clients in Networked Games to destroy non-networked actors (AActor::Role == ROLE_None). Does not change behavior on Servers or Standalone games.

cvars.name: p.AllowKinematicKinematicConstraints
cvars.description: Do not create constraints between two rigid kinematics.

cvars.name: p.AllowNotForDedServerPhysicsAssets
cvars.description: Allow 'Not For Dedicated Server' flag on PhysicsAssets 0: ignore flag, 1: obey flag (default)

cvars.name: p.AlwaysCreatePhysicsStateConversionHack
cvars.description: Hack to convert actors with query and ignore all to always create physics.

cvars.name: p.AngularEtherDragOverride
cvars.description: Set an override angular ether drag value. -1.f to disable

cvars.name: p.AnimDynamics
cvars.description: Enables/Disables anim dynamics node updates.

cvars.name: p.AnimDynamics.ComponentAppliedLinearAccClampOverride
cvars.description: Override the per asset setting for all axis (X,Y & Z) of ComponentAppliedLinearAccClamp for all Anim Dynamics Nodes. Negative values are ignored.

cvars.name: p.animdynamics.debugbone
cvars.description: Filters p.animdynamics.showdebug to a specific bone by name.

cvars.name: p.AnimDynamics.GravityScale
cvars.description: Multiplies the defalut gravity and the gravity override on all Anim Dynamics Nodes.

cvars.name: p.animdynamics.showdebug
cvars.description: Enable/disable the drawing of animdynamics data.

cvars.name: p.AnimDynamicsAdaptiveSubstep
cvars.description: Enables/disables adaptive substepping. Adaptive substepping will substep the simulation when it is necessary and maintain a debt buffer for time, always trying to utilise as much time as possible.

cvars.name: p.AnimDynamicsDetailedStats
cvars.description: When set to 1, will enable more detailed stats.

cvars.name: p.AnimDynamicsLODThreshold
cvars.description: Max LOD that anim dynamics is allowed to run on. Provides a global threshold that overrides per-node the LODThreshold property. -1 means no override.

cvars.name: p.AnimDynamicsNumDebtFrames
cvars.description: Number of frames to maintain as time debt when using adaptive substepping, this should be at least 1 or the time debt will never be cleared.

cvars.name: p.AnimDynamicsRestrictLOD
cvars.description: Forces anim dynamics to be enabled for only a specified LOD, -1 to enable on all LODs.

cvars.name: p.AnimDynamicsWind
cvars.description: Enables/Disables anim dynamics wind forces globally.

cvars.name: p.AsyncCharacterMovement
cvars.description: 1 enables asynchronous simulation of character movement on physics thread. Toggling this at runtime is not recommended. This feature is not fully developed, and its use is discouraged.

cvars.name: p.AsyncInterpolationMultiplier
cvars.description: How many multiples of the fixed dt should we look behind for interpolation

cvars.name: p.AsyncPhysicsBlockMode
cvars.description: Setting to 0 blocks on any physics steps generated from past GT Frames, and blocks on none of the tasks from current frame. 1 blocks on everything except the single most recent task (including tasks from current frame). 1 should gurantee we will always have a future output for interpolation from 2 frames in the past. 2 doesn't block the game thread, physics steps could be eventually be dropped if taking too much time.

cvars.name: p.BasedMovementMode
cvars.description: 0 means always on regular tick (default); 1 means only if not deferring updates; 2 means update and save based movement both on regular ticks and post physics when on a physics base.

cvars.name: p.bGeometryCollectionRepUseClusterVelocityMatch
cvars.description: Use physical velocity to match cluster states

cvars.name: p.BodySetupSkipDDCThreshold
cvars.description: Enables skipping the DDC for body setups with vertice count under threshold. Default: 16384

cvars.name: p.BoundingBoxMarginForConnectionGraphFiltering
cvars.description: when UseBoundingBoxForConnectionGraphFiltering is on, the margin to use for the oevrlap test [def: 0]

cvars.name: p.BPTreeOfGrids
cvars.description: Whether to use a seperate tree of grids for bp

cvars.name: p.bUseUnifiedHeightfield
cvars.description: Whether to use the PhysX unified heightfield. This feature of PhysX makes landscape collision consistent with triangle meshes but the thickness parameter is not supported for unified heightfields. 1 enables and 0 disables. Default: 1

cvars.name: p.Chaos.AABBTransform.ISPC
cvars.description: Whether to use ISPC optimizations when computing AABB transforms

cvars.name: p.Chaos.AABBTransform.Optimized
cvars.description: Whether to use optimized AABB transform

cvars.name: p.Chaos.AccelerationStructureCacheOverlappingLeaves
cvars.description: Set to 1: Cache the overlapping leaves for faster overlap query, any other value will disable the feature

cvars.name: p.Chaos.AccelerationStructureIsolateQueryOnlyObjects
cvars.description: Set to 1: QueryOnly Objects will not be moved to acceleration structures on the Physics Thread

cvars.name: p.Chaos.AccelerationStructureSplitStaticDynamic
cvars.description: Set to 1: Sort Dynamic and Static bodies into seperate acceleration structures, any other value will disable the feature

cvars.name: p.Chaos.AccelerationStructureTimeSlicingMaxBytesCopy
cvars.description: The Maximum number of bytes to copy to the external acceleration structure during Copy Time Slicing

cvars.name: p.Chaos.AccelerationStructureTimeSlicingMaxQueueSizeBeforeForce
cvars.description: If the update queue reaches this limit, time slicing will be disabled, and the acceleration structure will be built at once

cvars.name: p.Chaos.AccelerationStructureUseDirtyTreeInsteadOfGrid
cvars.description: Use a dynamic tree structure for dirty elements instead of a 2D grid

cvars.name: p.Chaos.AccelerationStructureUseDynamicTree
cvars.description: Use a dynamic BVH tree structure for dynamic objects

cvars.name: p.chaos.AllowCreatePhysxBodies
cvars.description: 0 is off, 1 is on (default)

cvars.name: p.Chaos.ArrayCollection.MaxSlackFraction
cvars.description: Shrink particle arrays if the number of slack elements exceeds the number of elements by this fraction

cvars.name: p.Chaos.ArrayCollection.MinSlack
cvars.description: Do not reduce the size of particle arrays if it would leave less slack than this

cvars.name: p.Chaos.AxialSpring.ISPC
cvars.description: Whether to use ISPC optimizations in AxialSpring constraints

cvars.name: p.Chaos.AxialSpring.ParallelConstraintCount
cvars.description: If we have more constraints than this, use parallel-for in Apply.

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Bending.ISPC
cvars.description: Whether to use ISPC optimizations in Bending constraints

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Bending.ParallelConstraintCount
cvars.description: If we have more constraints than this, use parallel-for in Apply.

cvars.name: p.Chaos.BoxCalcBounds.ISPC
cvars.description: Whether to use ISPC optimizations in calculating box bounds in geometry collections

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Cache.CompressTracksAfterRecording
cvars.description: When enabled, cache will compress the transform tracks after recording is done.[def: true]

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Cache.UseInterpolation
cvars.description: When enabled, cache interpolates between keys.[def: true]

cvars.name: p.Chaos.CalculateBounds.ISPC
cvars.description: Whether to use ISPC optimizations in CalculateBounds

cvars.name: p.Chaos.CCD.AllowedDepthBoundsScale
cvars.description: When rolling back to TOI, allow (smallest bound's extent) AllowedDepthBoundsScale, instead of rolling back to exact TOI w/ penetration = 0.

cvars.name: p.Chaos.CCD.AxisThresholdMode
cvars.description: Change the mode used to generate CCD axis threshold bounds for particle geometries. 0: Use object bounds 1: Find the thinnest object bound on any axis and use it for all CCD axes 2: On each axis, use the thinnest shape bound on that axis 3: Find the thinnest shape bound on any axis and use this for all axes

cvars.name: p.Chaos.CCD.CCDAxisThresholdUsesProbeShapes
cvars.description: When true, probe shapes are considered for CCD axis threshold computation, and can generate contacts in the initial CCD phase.

cvars.name: p.Chaos.CCD.CCDSweepsUseProbeShapes
cvars.description: When true, probe shapes can be swept for more accurate collision detection.

cvars.name: p.Chaos.CCD.EnableThresholdBoundsScale
cvars.description: CCD is used when object position is changing > smallest bound's extent BoundsScale. 0 will always Use CCD. Values < 0 disables CCD.

cvars.name: p.Chaos.CCD.NewTargetDepthMode
cvars.description: Find the first contact with that results in a penetration of (CCDAllowedDepthBoundsScale*Size) as opposed to the first contact

cvars.name: p.Chaos.CCD.NoCullAllShapePairs
cvars.description: Whether to cull contacts early based on phi for sweeps for all shape pairs (not just convex convex).

cvars.name: p.Chaos.CCD.OnlyConsiderDynamicStatic
cvars.description: Only enable CCD for dynamic-static pairs.

cvars.name: p.Chaos.CCD.UseGenericSweptConvexConstraints
cvars.description: Use generic convex convex swept constraint generation for convex shape pairs which don't have specialized implementations.

cvars.name: p.Chaos.CharacterGroundConstraint.ExternalMovementThreshold
cvars.description: If distance moved is less than this then retain current movement target relative to ground.

cvars.name: p.Chaos.CharacterGroundConstraint.InputMovementThreshold
cvars.description: Minimum per frame input movement distance in cm.

cvars.name: p.Chaos.CheckForInterclusterEdgesOnRelease
cvars.description: Whether to check for intercluster edges when removing a child from its parent cluster so that we can add the particle back into a cluster union.

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Cloth.CGTol
cvars.description: CG Tolerance [def: 1e-4]

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Cloth.DisplayResidual
cvars.description: Diplay residual norms for the first 10 iters [def: false]

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Cloth.DoQuasistatics
cvars.description: Do cloth quasistatics [def: false]

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Cloth.EnableCG
cvars.description: Use conjugate gradient instead of nonlinear gauss seidel [def: false]

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Cloth.EnableGaussSeidel
cvars.description: Use Gauss Seidel constraints instead of XPBD [def: false]

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Cloth.MakeSandwich
cvars.description: MakeSandwich solver of xpbd - Newton/GS [def: false]

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Cloth.MaxItCG
cvars.description: Max iter for CG [def: 50]

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Cloth.MaxResidualIters
cvars.description: Max number of iterations to diaplay residuals [def: 10]

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Cloth.MiddleBreadIters
cvars.description: Middle Bread Iters for the sandwich solver [def: 3]

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Cloth.ReplaceBiasElementsWithCorotatedCod
cvars.description: Replace existing aniso bias element constraint with gauss seidel corotated codimensional [def: false]

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Cloth.SOROmega
cvars.description: SOR omega coefficient for acceleration [def: 1.7]

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Cloth.StiffnessPaddingRatio
cvars.description: stiffness padding for gauss seidel [def: 1]

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Cloth.UpperBreadIters
cvars.description: Upper Bread Iters for the sandwich solver [def: 3]

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Cloth.UseSOR
cvars.description: Use SOR acceleration for Gauss Seidel [def: true]

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Cloth.WriteFinalResiduals
cvars.description: Write final residuals at each timestep to a file [def: false]

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Cloth.WriteResidual2File
cvars.description: Write residual to file [def: false]

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Cloth.YoungsModulus
cvars.description: Youngs modulus [def: 1e4]

cvars.name: p.chaos.clustering.breakonlystrained
cvars.description: If enabled we only process strained clusters for breaks, if disabled all clusters are traversed and checked

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Clustering.DumpClusterAndReleaseStats
cvars.description: Report the number of cluster processes and released particles per frame, on/off 1/0

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Clustering.PerAdvanceBreaksAllowed
cvars.description: Number of breaks allowed to occur for each invokation of AdvanceClustering

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Clustering.PerAdvanceBreaksRescheduleLimit
cvars.description: Number of breaks allowed to be rescheduled for next frame if any

cvars.name: p.Chaos.ClusterUnion.DoNotAddEmptyClusters
cvars.description: Gating a risky bug fix.

cvars.name: p.Chaos.ClusterUnion.GenerateInterclusterEdges
cvars.description: Whether to generate intercluster edges automatically when adding to a cluster union (and remove them when removing from the cluster union).

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Collision.AllowLevelsetManifolds
cvars.description: Use incremental manifolds for levelset-levelset collision. This does not work well atm - too much rotation in the small pieces

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Collision.AllowParticleTracking
cvars.description: Allow particles to track their collisions constraints when their DoBufferCollisions flag is enable [def:true]

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Collision.CCD.AllowClipping
cvars.description: This will clip the CCD object at colliding positions when computation budgets run out. Default is true. Turning this option off might cause tunneling.

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Collision.CCD.ConstraintMaxProcessCount
cvars.description: The max number of times each constraint can be resolved when applying CCD constraints. Default is 2. The larger this number is, the more fully CCD constraints are resolved.

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Collision.CCD.CorrectionIterations
cvars.description: The number of post-solve CCD correction ietaryions to run.

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Collision.CCD.CorrectionPhiToleranceScale
cvars.description: How much penetration we allow during the correction phase (multiplier on shape size)

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Collision.CCD.EnableResweep
cvars.description: Enable resweep for CCD. Resweeping allows CCD to catch more secondary collisions but also is more costly. Default is true.

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Collision.DebugDrawProbeDetection
cvars.description: Draw probe constraint detection.

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Collision.EnableCollisionManager
cvars.description: Enable Chaos's Collision Manager for ignoring collisions between rigid bodies. [def:1]

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Collision.EnableLargeMeshManifolds
cvars.description: Whether to allow large mesh manifolds for collisions against meshes (required for good behaviour)

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Collision.EnableOneWayInteraction
cvars.description: Whether the one-way interaction flag is respected in collision constraints

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Collision.GBFCharacteristicTimeRatio
cvars.description: The ratio between characteristic time and Dt

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Collision.Manifold.ForceOneShotManifoldEdgeEdgeCaseZeroCullDistance
cvars.description: If enabled, if one shot manifold hits edge/edge case, we will force a cull distance of zero. That means edge/edge contacts will be thrown out if separated at all. Only applies to Convex/Convex oneshot impl.

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Collision.Manifold.MatchNormalTolerance
cvars.description: A tolerance on the normal dot product used to determine if two contact points are the same

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Collision.Manifold.MatchPositionTolerance
cvars.description: A tolerance as a fraction of object size used to determine if two contact points are the same

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Collision.Manifold.PlaneContactNormalEpsilon
cvars.description: Normal tolerance used to distinguish face contacts from edge-edge contacts

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Collision.MarginFraction
cvars.description: Override the collision margin fraction set in Physics Settings (if >= 0)

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Collision.MarginMax
cvars.description: Override the max collision margin set in Physics Settings (if >= 0)

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Collision.MeshContactNormalRejectionThreshold
cvars.description: Don't correct edge and vertex normals if they are beyond the valid range by more than this

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Collision.MeshContactNormalThreshold
cvars.description: Treat contact with a dot product between the normal and the triangle face greater than this as face collisions

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Collision.MeshManifoldHashSize
cvars.description: Hash table size to use in vertex and edge maps in convex-mesh collision

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Collision.OneWayStiffness
cvars.description: Collision solver stiffnes for one-way interactions

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Collision.SortMeshManifoldByDistance
cvars.description: Sort large mesh manifold points by RxN for improved solver stability (less rotation in first iteration)

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Collision.Stiffness
cvars.description: Override the collision solver stiffness (if >= 0)

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Collision.UnionBVH.Enabled
cvars.description: Set to false to disable use of BVH during collision detection (without affecting creations and serialization)

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Collision.UnionBVH.MaxDepth
cvars.description: The allowed depth of the BVH when used to wrap a shape hiererchy

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Collision.UnionBVH.NumShapes
cvars.description: If a geometry hierarchy has this many shapes, wrap it in a BVH for collision detection (negative to disable BVH)

cvars.name: p.Chaos.CollisionSpring.FalloffMultiplier
cvars.description: Tangential distance away from a triangle (scaled by thickness) beyond which a point isn't considered to be kinematically colliding

cvars.name: p.Chaos.CollisionSpring.ISPC
cvars.description: Whether to use ISPC optimizations in collision spring constraints

cvars.name: p.Chaos.CollisionSpring.MaxDepthMultiplier

cvars.name: p.Chaos.CollisionSpring.MaxTimer
cvars.description: Amount of time (in seconds) to remember a kinematic collision connection after it has moved more than Thickness away. Increasing this can reduce jitter at the cost of more computation.

cvars.description: Enable per-tick ConstraintGraph validation checks/assertions

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Convex.KinematicMode

cvars.name: p.Chaos.CU.UseFlushNetDormancy
cvars.description: When true it will flush the net dormancy of the owner the next frame instead of awaking the actor

cvars.description: Enable/Disable Hardstop part of suspension constraint

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Suspension.MaxPushout
cvars.description: Chaos Suspension Max Pushout Value

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Suspension.MaxPushoutVelocity
cvars.description: Chaos Suspension Max Pushout Velocity Value

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Suspension.SlopeSpeedBlendThreshold
cvars.description: Speed below which the anti-slide on slope blend mechanism starts

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Suspension.SlopeSpeedThreshold
cvars.description: Speed below which the anti-slide on slope mechanism is fully employed

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Suspension.SlopeThreshold
cvars.description: Slope threshold below which the anti-slide on slope mechanism is employed, value = Cos(AlopeAngle), i.e. for 50 degree slope = 0.6428, 30 degree slope = 0.866

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Suspension.Spring.Enabled
cvars.description: Enable/Disable Spring part of suspension constraint

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Suspension.VelocitySolve
cvars.description: Enable/Disable VelocitySolve

cvars.name: P.Chaos.SyncKinematicOnGameThread
cvars.description: If set to 1, kinematic bodies will always send their transforms back to the game thread, following the simulation step/results. If 0, then they will never do so, and kinematics will be updated immediately their kinematic target is set. Any other value (e.g. the default -1) means that the behavior is determined on a per-object basis with the UpdateKinematicFromSimulation flag in BodyInstance.

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Thread.DesiredHz
cvars.description: Desired update rate of the dedicated physics thread in Hz/FPS (Default 60.0f)

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Thread.WaitThreshold
cvars.description: Desired wait time in ms before the game thread stops waiting to sync physics and just takes the last result. (default 16ms)

cvars.name: p.Chaos.Timestep.VariableCapped.Cap
cvars.description: Time in seconds to set as the cap when using a ranged timestep for Chaos.

cvars.name: p.Chaos.TriangleIntersections.MaxDelta
cvars.description: Maximum delta position applied to resolve triangle intersections.

cvars.name: p.Chaos.TriangleMesh.ISPC
cvars.description: Whether to use ISPC optimizations in triangle mesh calculations

cvars.name: p.Chaos.TriMeshPerPolySupport
cvars.description: Disabling removes memory cost of vertex map on triangle mesh. Note: Changing at runtime will not work.

cvars.name: P.Chaos.UpdateKinematicsOnDeferredSkelMeshes
cvars.description: Whether to defer update kinematics for skeletal meshes.

cvars.name: p.chaos.UseContactSpeedForStrainEval
cvars.description: Whether to use contact speed to discard contacts when updating cluster strain (true: use speed, false: use impulse)

cvars.name: p.Chaos.UseRBANForDefaultPhysicsAssetSolverType
cvars.description: Boolean to use RBAN for default physics asset solver type (false by default)

cvars.name: p.Chaos.VD.CompressBinaryData
cvars.description: If true, serialized binary data will be compressed using Oodle on the fly before being traced

cvars.name: p.Chaos.VD.CompressionMode
cvars.description: Oodle compression mode to use, 4 is by default which equsals to ECompressionLevel::VeryFast

cvars.name: p.Chaos.VD.TimeBetweenFullCaptures
cvars.description: Time interval in seconds after which a full capture (not only delta changes) should be recorded

cvars.name: p.Chaos.VD.Tool.BroadcastGameFrameUpdateEvenIfNotChanged
cvars.description: If true, each time we get a controller data updated event, a game frame update will be triggered even if the frame didn't change...

cvars.name: p.Chaos.VD.Tool.DisableUVsSupport
cvars.description: If true, the generated meshes will not have UV data

cvars.name: p.Chaos.VD.Tool.ForceStaticMeshComponentUse
cvars.description: If true, static mesh components will be used instead of Instanced Static mesh components when recreating the geometry for each particle

cvars.name: p.Chaos.VD.Tool.GeometryToProcessPerTick
cvars.description: Number of generated geometry to process each tick when loading a teace file in the CVD tool.

cvars.name: p.Chaos.VD.Tool.MaxDebugDrawLinesPerFrame
cvars.description: Sets the max number of lines CVD is allowed to draw between all instances in a single frame.

cvars.name: p.Chaos.VD.Tool.PlayAllPreviousFrameSteps
cvars.description: If true, each time we get playback a solver frame in a specific stage, we will play all the previous steps from that frame in sequence to ensure we have the correct visualization for what happened in that frame.

cvars.name: p.Chaos.VD.Tool.QueueAndCombineSceneOutlinerEvents
cvars.description: If set to true, scene outliner events will be queued and sent once per frame. If there was a unprocessed event for an item, the las queued event will replace it

cvars.name: p.Chaos.VD.Tool.UseComponentsPool
cvars.description: Set to false to disable the use of a pool system for Mesh Components.

cvars.name: p.Chaos.VD.Tool.UseCVDDynamicMeshGenerator
cvars.description: If true, when creating a dynamic mesh from a mesh generator, CVD will use it's own mesh creation logic which included error handling that tries to repair broken geometry

cvars.name: p.Chaos.VelocityField.ISPC
cvars.description: Whether to use ISPC optimizations in velocity field calculations

cvars.name: p.Chaos.VelocityField.MaxVelocity
cvars.description: The maximum relative velocity to process the aerodynamics forces with.

cvars.name: p.Chaos.VisualDebuggerEnable
cvars.description: Enable/Disable pushing/saving data to the visual debugger

cvars.name: p.Chaos.XPBDBending.ISPC
cvars.description: Whether to use ISPC optimizations in XPBD Bending constraints

cvars.name: p.Chaos.XPBDBending.ISPC.MinNumParallelBatches
cvars.description: Min number of batches to invoke parallelFor ISPC XPBDBending constraints

cvars.name: p.Chaos.XPBDBending.ISPC.ParallelBatchSize
cvars.description: Parallel batch size for ISPC XPBDBending constraints

cvars.name: p.Chaos.XPBDBending.ParallelConstraintCount
cvars.description: If we have more constraints than this, use parallel-for in Apply.

cvars.name: p.Chaos.XPBDBending.SplitLambdaDamping
cvars.description: Use the split two-pass damping model (slower but doesn't make cloth too soft at high damping levels).

cvars.name: p.Chaos.XPBDSpring.ISPC
cvars.description: Whether to use ISPC optimizations in XPBD Spring constraints

cvars.name: p.Chaos.XPBDSpring.ParallelConstraintCount
cvars.description: If we have more constraints than this, use parallel-for in Apply.

cvars.name: p.Chaos.XPBDSpring.SplitDamping
cvars.description: Test xpbd spring split damping mode. 0 = single lambda, 1 = interleaved with damping after (non-ispc only), 2 interleaved with damping before (non-ispc only), 3 = two passes damping after (non-ispc only), 4 = two passes damping before (default).

cvars.name: p.Chaos.XPBDStretchBias.ISPC
cvars.description: Whether to use ISPC optimizations in XPBD Stretch Bias constraints

cvars.name: p.ChaosCloth.DebugDrawAmimNormals
cvars.description: Whether to debug draw the animated/kinematic Cloth normals

cvars.name: p.ChaosCloth.DebugDrawAnimDrive
cvars.description: Whether to debug draw the Chaos Cloth anim drive

cvars.name: p.ChaosCloth.DebugDrawAnimMeshWired
cvars.description: Whether to debug draw the animated/kinematic Cloth wireframe meshes

cvars.name: p.ChaosCloth.DebugDrawBackstopDistances
cvars.description: Whether to debug draw the Chaos Cloth backstop distances

cvars.name: p.ChaosCloth.DebugDrawBackstops
cvars.description: Whether to debug draw the Chaos Cloth backstops

cvars.name: p.ChaosCloth.DebugDrawBendingConstraint
cvars.description: Whether to debug draw the Chaos Cloth bending constraint

cvars.name: p.ChaosCloth.DebugDrawBounds
cvars.description: Whether to debug draw the Chaos Cloth bounds

cvars.name: p.ChaosCloth.DebugDrawCollision
cvars.description: Whether to debug draw the Chaos Cloth collisions

cvars.name: p.ChaosCloth.DebugDrawEdgeConstraint
cvars.description: Whether to debug draw the Chaos Cloth edge constraint

cvars.name: p.ChaosCloth.DebugDrawFaceNormals
cvars.description: Whether to debug draw the Chaos Cloth face normals

cvars.name: p.ChaosCloth.DebugDrawGravity
cvars.description: Whether to debug draw the Chaos Cloth gravity acceleration vector

cvars.name: p.ChaosCloth.DebugDrawInversedFaceNormals
cvars.description: Whether to debug draw the Chaos Cloth inversed face normals

cvars.name: p.ChaosCloth.DebugDrawLocalSpace
cvars.description: Whether to debug draw the Chaos Cloth local space

cvars.name: p.ChaosCloth.DebugDrawLongRangeConstraint
cvars.description: Whether to debug draw the Chaos Cloth long range constraint (aka tether constraint)

cvars.name: p.ChaosCloth.DebugDrawMaxDistances
cvars.description: Whether to debug draw the Chaos Cloth max distances

cvars.name: p.ChaosCloth.DebugDrawPhysMeshWired
cvars.description: Whether to debug draw the Chaos Cloth wireframe meshes

cvars.name: p.ChaosCloth.DebugDrawPointNormals
cvars.description: Whether to debug draw the Chaos Cloth point normals

cvars.name: p.ChaosCloth.DebugDrawPointVelocities
cvars.description: Whether to debug draw the Chaos Cloth point velocities

cvars.name: p.ChaosCloth.DebugDrawSelfCollision
cvars.description: Whether to debug draw the Chaos Cloth self collision information

cvars.name: p.ChaosCloth.DebugDrawSelfIntersection
cvars.description: Whether to debug draw the Chaos Cloth self intersection information

cvars.name: p.ChaosCloth.DebugDrawWindForces
cvars.description: Whether to debug draw the Chaos Cloth wind forces

cvars.name: p.ChaosCloth.GravityMultiplier
cvars.description: Scalar multiplier applied at the final stage of the cloth's gravity formulation.

cvars.name: p.ChaosCloth.LegacyDisablesAccurateWind
cvars.description: Whether using the Legacy wind model switches off the accurate wind model, or adds up to it

cvars.name: p.ChaosCloth.Solver.DebugHitchInterval
cvars.description: Hitch interval in frames. Create artificial hitches to debug simulation jitter. 0 to disable

cvars.name: p.ChaosCloth.Solver.DebugHitchLength
cvars.description: Hitch length in ms. Create artificial hitches to debug simulation jitter. 0 to disable

cvars.name: p.ChaosCloth.Solver.DisableCollision
cvars.description: Disable all collision particles. Needs reset of the simulation (p.ChaosCloth.Reset).

cvars.name: p.ChaosCloth.Solver.DisableTimeDependentNumIterations
cvars.description: Make the number of iterations independent from the time step.

cvars.name: p.ChaosCloth.Solver.MaxVelocity
cvars.description: Maximum relative velocity of the cloth particles relatively to their animated positions equivalent. 0 to disable.

cvars.name: p.ChaosCloth.Solver.MinParallelBatchSize
cvars.description: The minimum number of particle to process in parallel batch by the solver.

cvars.name: p.ChaosCloth.Solver.ParallelClothPostUpdate
cvars.description: Pre-transform the cloth particles for each cloth in parallel.

cvars.name: p.ChaosCloth.Solver.ParallelClothPreUpdate
cvars.description: Pre-transform the cloth particles for each cloth in parallel.

cvars.name: p.ChaosCloth.Solver.ParallelClothUpdate
cvars.description: Skin the physics mesh and do the other cloth update for each cloth in parallel.

cvars.name: p.ChaosCloth.Solver.UseVelocityScale
cvars.description: Use the velocity scale to compensate for clamping to MaxPhysicsDelta, in order to avoid miscalculating velocities during hitches.

cvars.name: p.ChaosCloth.UseOptimizedTaperedCapsule
cvars.description: Use the optimized TaperedCapsule code instead of using a tapered cylinder and two spheres

cvars.name: p.ChaosCloth.UseTimeStepSmoothing
cvars.description: Use time step smoothing to avoid jitter during drastic changes in time steps.

cvars.name: p.ChaosClothEditor.DebugDrawAnimDrive
cvars.description: Draws the current skinned reference mesh for the simulation which anim drive will attempt to reach if enabled

cvars.name: p.ChaosClothEditor.DebugDrawAnimMeshWired
cvars.description: Draws the current animated mesh input in wireframe

cvars.name: p.ChaosClothEditor.DebugDrawAnimNormals
cvars.description: Draws the current point normals for the animated mesh

cvars.name: p.ChaosClothEditor.DebugDrawBackstopDistances
cvars.description: Draws the backstop distance offset for each simulation particle

cvars.name: p.ChaosClothEditor.DebugDrawBackstops
cvars.description: Draws the backstop radius and position for each simulation particle

cvars.name: p.ChaosClothEditor.DebugDrawBendingConstraint
cvars.description: Draws the bending spring constraints

cvars.name: p.ChaosClothEditor.DebugDrawCollision
cvars.description: Draws the collision bodies the simulation is currently using

cvars.name: p.ChaosClothEditor.DebugDrawEdgeConstraint
cvars.description: Draws the edge spring constraints

cvars.name: p.ChaosClothEditor.DebugDrawElementIndices
cvars.description: Draws the element's (triangle or other) indices as instantiated by the solver

cvars.name: p.ChaosClothEditor.DebugDrawLocalSpace
cvars.description: Draws the local space reference bone

cvars.name: p.ChaosClothEditor.DebugDrawLongRangeConstraint
cvars.description: Draws the long range attachment constraint distances

cvars.name: p.ChaosClothEditor.DebugDrawMaxDistances
cvars.description: Draws the current max distances for the sim particles as a line along its normal

cvars.name: p.ChaosClothEditor.DebugDrawMaxDistanceValues
cvars.description: Draws the current max distances as numbers

cvars.name: p.ChaosClothEditor.DebugDrawParticleIndices
cvars.description: Draws the particle indices as instantiated by the solver

cvars.name: p.ChaosClothEditor.DebugDrawPhysMeshShaded
cvars.description: Draws the current physical result as a doubled sided flat shaded mesh

cvars.name: p.ChaosClothEditor.DebugDrawPhysMeshWired
cvars.description: Draws the current physical mesh result in wireframe

cvars.name: p.ChaosClothEditor.DebugDrawPointNormals
cvars.description: Draws the current point normals for the simulation mesh

cvars.name: p.ChaosClothEditor.DebugDrawPointVelocities
cvars.description: Draws the current point velocities for the simulation mesh

cvars.name: p.ChaosClothEditor.DebugDrawSelfCollision
cvars.description: Draws the self collision thickness/debugging information

cvars.name: p.ChaosClothEditor.DebugDrawSelfIntersection
