cvars.description: Draws the self intersection contour/region information

cvars.name: p.ChaosClothEditor.DebugDrawWindAndPressureForces
cvars.description: Draws the Wind drag and lift and pressure forces

cvars.name: p.ChaosClothVisualization.AnisoSpringDrawMode
cvars.description: Stretch draw mode, 0 = Parallel graph color, 1 = Anisotropy

cvars.name: p.ChaosClothVisualization.BendingDrawMode
cvars.description: Bending draw mode, 0 = BuckleStatus, 1 = Parallel graph color, 2 = Anisotropy, 3 = RestAngle

cvars.name: p.ChaosClothVisualization.DrawSkinnedLattice
cvars.description: Draw skinned lattice, 0 = none, 1 = filled, 2 = empty, 3 = both

cvars.name: p.ChaosClothVisualization.StretchBiasDrawMode
cvars.description: Stretch draw mode, 0 = Parallel graph color, 1 = Warp Stretch, 2 = Weft Stretch, 3 = BiasStretch

cvars.name: p.ChaosClothVisualization.StretchBiasDrawOutOfRange
cvars.description: Draw out of range elements (When drawing warp/weft stretch)

cvars.name: p.ChaosClothVisualization.StretchBiasDrawRangeMax
cvars.description: Max stretch in draw color range. Negative = compressed, 0 = undeformed, positive = stretched. (When drawing warp/weft stretch)

cvars.name: p.ChaosClothVisualization.StretchBiasDrawRangeMin
cvars.description: Min stretch in draw color range. Negative = compressed, 0 = undeformed, positive = stretched. (When drawing warp/weft stretch)

cvars.name: p.ChaosClothVisualization.WeightMapName
cvars.description: Weight map name to be visualized

cvars.name: p.ChaosNumContactIterationsOverride
cvars.description: Override for num contact iterations if >= 0. [def:-1]

cvars.name: p.ChaosNumPushOutIterationsOverride
cvars.description: Override for num push out iterations if >= 0 [def:-1]

cvars.name: p.ChaosRigidsEvolutionApplyAllowEarlyOut
cvars.description: Allow Chaos Rigids Evolution apply iterations to early out when resolved.[def:1]

cvars.name: p.ChaosRigidsEvolutionApplyPushoutAllowEarlyOut
cvars.description: Allow Chaos Rigids Evolution apply-pushout iterations to early out when resolved.[def:1]

cvars.name: p.ChaosSolverEnableJointConstraints
cvars.description: Enable Joint Constraints defined within the Physics Asset Editor

cvars.name: p.CharacterStuckWarningPeriod
cvars.description: How often (in seconds) we are allowed to log a message about being stuck in geometry. <0: Disable, >=0: Enable and log this often, in seconds.

cvars.name: p.ClientAuthorityThresholdOnBaseChange
cvars.description: When a pawn moves onto or off of a moving base, this can cause an abrupt correction. In these cases, trust the client up to this distance away from the server component location.

cvars.name: p.ClosestIntersectionStepSizeMultiplier
cvars.description: When raycasting we use this multiplier to substep the travel distance along the ray. Smaller number gives better accuracy at higher cost

cvars.name: p.Cloth.DefaultClothingSimulationFactoryClass
cvars.description: The class name of the default clothing simulation factory. Known providers are: ChaosClothingSimulationFactory

cvars.name: p.Cloth.MaxDeltaTimeTeleportMultiplier
cvars.description: A multiplier of the MaxPhysicsDelta time at which we will automatically just teleport cloth to its new location default: 1.5

cvars.name: p.Cloth.MaxVelocityScale
cvars.description: The maximum amount of the component induced velocity allowed on all cloths. Use 1.0 for fully induced velocity(default), or use 0.0 for no induced velocity, and any other values in between for a reduced induced velocity. When set to 0.0, it also provides a way to force the clothing to simulate in local space. default: 1.0

cvars.name: p.Cloth.ResetAfterTeleport
cvars.description: Require p.Cloth.TeleportOverride. Reset the clothing after moving the clothing position (called teleport). Default: true.

cvars.name: p.Cloth.TeleportDistanceThreshold
cvars.description: Require p.Cloth.TeleportOverride. Conduct teleportation if the character's movement is greater than this threshold in 1 frame. Zero or negative values will skip the check. Default: 300.

cvars.name: p.Cloth.TeleportOverride
cvars.description: Force console variable teleport override values over skeletal mesh properties. Default: false.

cvars.name: p.Cloth.TeleportRotationThreshold
cvars.description: Require p.Cloth.TeleportOverride. Rotation threshold in degrees, ranging from 0 to 180. Conduct teleportation if the character's rotation is greater than this threshold in 1 frame. Zero or negative values will skip the check. Default 0.

cvars.name: p.ClothPhysics
cvars.description: If 1, physics cloth will be used for simulation.

cvars.name: p.ClothPhysics.UseTaskThread
cvars.description: If 1, run cloth on the task thread. If 0, run on game thread.

cvars.name: p.ClothPhysics.WaitForParallelClothTask
cvars.description: If 1, always wait for cloth task completion in the Cloth Tick function. If 0, wait at end-of-frame updates instead if allowed by component settings

cvars.name: p.ClusterDistanceThreshold
cvars.description: How close a cluster child must be to a contact to break off

cvars.name: p.Clustering.ParticleReleaseThrottlingMaxCount
cvars.description: Maximum number of active geometry collection to reach before all released clustering disable all released particle instantly

cvars.name: p.Clustering.ParticleReleaseThrottlingMinCount
cvars.description: Minimum number of active geometry collection to reach before clustering start to disable a percentage of the released particle per cluster

cvars.name: p.ClusterUnion.SyncBodiesMoveNewComponents
cvars.description: Enable a fix to ensure new components in a cluster union are moved once on add (even if the cluster is not moving).

cvars.name: p.CollisionAngularFriction
cvars.description: Collision angular friction for all contacts if >= 0

cvars.name: p.CollisionBaseFrictionImpulse
cvars.description: Collision base friction position impulse for all contacts if >= 0

cvars.name: p.CollisionCanAlwaysDisableContacts
cvars.description: Collision culling will always be able to permanently disable contacts

cvars.name: p.CollisionCanNeverDisableContacts
cvars.description: Collision culling will never be able to permanently disable contacts

cvars.name: p.CollisionDisableCulledContacts
cvars.description: Allow the PBDRigidsEvolutionGBF collision constraints to throw out contacts mid solve if they are culled.

cvars.name: p.CollisionFriction
cvars.description: Collision friction for all contacts if >= 0

cvars.name: p.CollisionParticlesBVHDepth
cvars.description: The maximum depth for collision particles bvh

cvars.name: p.CollisionParticlesMax
cvars.description: Maximum number of particles after simplicial pruning

cvars.name: p.CollisionParticlesMin
cvars.description: Minimum number of particles after simplicial pruning (assuming it started with more)

cvars.name: p.CollisionParticlesPerObjectFractionDefault
cvars.description: Fraction of verts

cvars.name: p.CollisionParticlesSpatialDivision
cvars.description: Spatial bucketing to cull collision particles.

cvars.name: p.CollisionParticlesUseImplicitCulling
cvars.description: Use the implicit to cull interior vertices.

cvars.name: p.CollisionRestitution
cvars.description: Collision restitution for all contacts if >= 0

cvars.name: p.CollisionRestitutionThreshold
cvars.description: Collision restitution threshold override if >= 0 (units of acceleration)

cvars.name: p.ComputeClusterCollisionStrains
cvars.description: Whether to use collision constraints when processing clustering.

cvars.name: p.ConstraintAngularDampingScale
cvars.description: The multiplier of constraint angular damping in simulation. Default: 100000

cvars.name: p.ConstraintAngularStiffnessScale
cvars.description: The multiplier of constraint angular stiffness in simulation. Default: 100000

cvars.name: p.ConstraintBPBVHDepth
cvars.description: The maximum depth for constraint bvh

cvars.name: p.ConstraintLinearDampingScale
cvars.description: The multiplier of constraint linear damping in simulation. Default: 1

cvars.name: p.ConstraintLinearStiffnessScale
cvars.description: The multiplier of constraint linear stiffness in simulation. Default: 1

cvars.name: p.ContactOffsetFactor
cvars.description: Multiplied by min dimension of object to calculate how close objects get before generating contacts. < 0 implies use project settings. Default: 0.01

cvars.name: p.CVarGeometryCollectionImpulseWorkAround
cvars.description: This enabled a workaround to allow impulses to be applied to geometry collection.

cvars.name: p.DeactivateClusterChildren
cvars.description: If children should be decativated when broken and put into another cluster.

cvars.name: p.DebugTimeDiscrepancy
cvars.description: Whether to log detailed Movement Time Discrepancy values for testing0: Disable, 1: Enable Detection logging, 2: Enable Detection and Resolution logging

cvars.name: p.DefaultCollisionFriction
cvars.description: Collision friction default value if no materials are found.

cvars.name: p.DefaultCollisionRestitution
cvars.description: Collision restitution default value if no materials are found.

cvars.name: p.DeferCharacterMeshMovement
cvars.description: Optimization - When enabled, defers CharacterMesh move propagation until the end of larger scoped moves. The mesh will still move, but all attached components will wait until all mesh movement is done within the scope.

cvars.name: p.DeferCharacterMeshMovementForAllCorrections
cvars.description: Optimization - When enabled, defers CharacterMesh move propagation for all corrections until the end of larger scoped moves. Requires bDeferCharacterMeshMovement=true.

cvars.name: p.DisableEditorPhysicsHandle
cvars.description: When true, disable the physics spring for dragging objects in PIE. Use a teleport instead.

cvars.name: p.DisableParticleUpdateVelocityParallelFor
cvars.description: Disable Particle Update Velocity ParallelFor and run the update on a single thread

cvars.name: p.DisableQueryOnlyActors
cvars.description: If QueryOnly is used, actors are marked as simulation disabled. This is NOT compatible with origin shifting at the moment.

cvars.name: p.DisableThreshold2
cvars.description: Disable threshold frames to transition to sleeping

cvars.name: p.EnableCollisions
cvars.description: Enable/Disable collisions on the Chaos solver.

cvars.name: p.EnableDeferredPhysicsCreation
cvars.description: Enables/Disables deferred physics creation.

cvars.name: p.EnableDynamicPerBodyFilterHacks
cvars.description: Enables/Disables the use of a set of game focused hacks - allowing users to modify skel body collision dynamically (changes the behavior of per-body collision filtering).

cvars.name: p.EnableFastOverlapCheck
cvars.description: Enable fast overlap check against sweep hits, avoiding UpdateOverlaps (for the swept component).

cvars.name: p.EnableKinematicDeferralPrePhysicsCondition
cvars.description: If is 1, and deferral would've been disallowed due to EUpdateTransformFlags, allow if in PrePhysics tick. If 0, condition is unchanged.

cvars.name: p.EnableKinematicDeferralStartPhysicsCondition
cvars.description: If is 1, allow kinematics to be deferred in start physics (probably only called from replication tick). If 0, no deferral in startphysics.

cvars.name: p.EnableMeshClean
cvars.description: Enable/Disable mesh cleanup during cook.

cvars.name: p.EnableMultiplayerWorldOriginRebasing
cvars.description: Enable world origin rebasing for multiplayer, meaning that servers and clients can have different world origin locations.

cvars.name: p.EnableOverrideSolverDeltaTime
cvars.description: If true, setting for override solver delta time can be used. False will disable this feature.

cvars.name: p.EnableSkeletalMeshConstraints
cvars.description: Enable skeletal mesh constraints defined within the Physics Asset Editor

cvars.name: p.EncroachEpsilon
cvars.description: Epsilon value used during encroachment checking for shape components 0: use full sized shape. > 0: shrink shape size by this amount (world units)

cvars.name: p.EnsureUnweldModifiesGTOnly
cvars.description: Ensure if unweld modifies geometry shared with physics thread

cvars.name: p.FixReplayOverSampling
cvars.description: If 1, remove invalid replay samples that can occur due to oversampling (sampling at higher rate than physics is being ticked)

cvars.name: p.ForceDisableAsyncPhysics
cvars.description: Whether to force async physics off regardless of other settings

cvars.name: p.ForceJumpPeakSubstep
cvars.description: If 1, force a jump substep to always reach the peak position of a jump, which can often be cut off as framerate lowers.

cvars.name: p.ForceNoCollisionIntoSQ
cvars.description: When enabled, all particles end up in sq structure, even ones with no collision

cvars.name: p.ForceStandardSQ
cvars.description: If enabled, we force the standard scene query even if custom SQ structure is enabled

cvars.name: p.fracture.ValidateResultsOfEditOperations
cvars.description: When on this will enable result validation for fracture tool edit operations (can be slow for large geometry collection) [def:0]

cvars.name: p.gc.BuildGeometryForChildrenOnGT
cvars.description: If true build all children geometry on Game Thread at initilaization time, otherwise wait until destruction occurs.

cvars.name: p.gc.BuildGeometryForChildrenOnPT
cvars.description: If true build all children geometry on Physics Thread at initilaization time, otherwise wait until destruction occurs.

cvars.name: p.gc.CreateGTParticlesForChildren
cvars.description: If true create all children particles at initilaization time, otherwise wait until destruction occurs.

cvars.name: p.gc.GlobalMaxSimulatedLevel
cvars.description: Allow to set the Global Maximum Simulated Level for Geoemtry Collection. The min between the MaxSimulatedLevel and the GlobalMaxSimulatedLevel will be used.

cvars.name: p.gc.logcachereduction
cvars.description: Logs amount of data removed from a cache after processing

cvars.name: p.gc.RemoveImplicitsInDynamicCollections
cvars.description: This cvar has an impact only if geometry are not added for children. It removes implicits from the Dynamic Collections, and recreate then from the rest collection. Using this cvar could have an impact if geometry are updated from the dynamic collection on the GT, then those changes won't be ported to the PT.

cvars.name: p.gc.ReportHighParticleFraction
cvars.description: Report any objects with particle fraction above this threshold

cvars.name: p.gc.ReportNoLevelsetCluster
cvars.description: Report any cluster objects without levelsets

cvars.name: p.gc.UseLargestClusterToComputeRelativeSize
cvars.description: Use the largest Cluster as reference for the releative size instead of the largest child (def: false)

cvars.name: p.gc.UseVolumeToComputeRelativeSize
cvars.description: Use Volume To Compute RelativeSize instead of the side of the cubic volume (def: false)

cvars.name: p.GeometryCollection.AlwaysGenerateConnectionGraph
cvars.description: When enabled, always generate the cluster's connection graph instead of using the rest collection stored one - Note: this should only be used for troubleshooting.[def: false]

cvars.name: p.GeometryCollection.AlwaysGenerateGTCollisionForClusters
cvars.description: When enabled, always generate a game thread side collision for clusters.[def: true]

cvars.name: p.GeometryCollection.AreaBasedDamageThresholdMode
cvars.description: Area based damage threshold computation mode (0: sum of areas, 1: max of areas, 2: min of areas, 3: average of areas) [def: 0]

cvars.name: p.GeometryCollection.EnabledNestedChildTransformUpdates
cvars.description: Enable updates for driven, disabled, child bodies. Used for line trace results against geometry collections.[def: true]

cvars.name: p.GeometryCollection.ForceOverrideGCCollisionSetupForTraces
cvars.description: Force the usage of a specific type of collision for traces on the game thread when creating new GC physics representations (-1: use the value of the property, 0: force to use SM collision, 1: force to use GC collision) [def: -1]

cvars.name: p.GeometryCollection.LocalInertiaDropOffDiagonalTerms
cvars.description: When true, force diagonal inertia for GCs in their local space by simply dropping off-diagonal terms

cvars.name: p.GeometryCollection.PositionUpdateTolerance
cvars.description: Tolerance to detect if particle position has changed has changed when syncing PT to GT

cvars.name: p.GeometryCollection.PropagateInternalClusterDisableFlagToChildren
cvars.description: If enabled, disabled internal clusters will propagate their disabled flag to their children when buffering instead of implicitly activating the children.

cvars.name: p.GeometryCollection.RotationUpdateTolerance
cvars.description: Tolerance to detect if particle rotation has changed has changed when syncing PT to GT

cvars.name: p.GeometryCollection.ScaleClusterGeometry
cvars.description: If enabled, update the cluster geometry if the scale has changed

cvars.name: p.GeometryCollection.TransformTolerance
cvars.description: Tolerance to detect if a transform has changed

cvars.name: p.GeometryCollection.UseRootBrokenFlag
cvars.description: If enabled, check if the root transform is broken in the proxy and disable the GT particle if so. Should be enabled - cvar is a failsafe to revert behaviour

cvars.name: p.GeometryCollectionAlwaysRecreateSimulationData
cvars.description: always recreate the simulation data even if the simulation data is not marked as dirty - this has runtime cost in editor - only use as a last resort if default has issues [def:false]

cvars.name: p.GeometryCollectionAssetForceStripOnCook
cvars.description: Bypass the construction of simulation properties when all bodies are simply cached for playback.

cvars.name: p.GeometryCollectionCollideAll
cvars.description: Bypass the collision matrix and make geometry collections collide against everything

cvars.name: p.GeometryCollectionDisableGravity
cvars.description: Disable gravity for geometry collections

cvars.name: p.GeometryCollectionEnableForcedConvexGenerationInSerialize
cvars.description: Enable generation of convex geometry on older destruction files.[def:true]

cvars.name: p.GeometryCollectionHardMissingUpdatesSnapThreshold
cvars.description: Determines how many missing updates before we trigger a hard snap

cvars.name: p.GeometryCollectionHardsnapThresholdMs
cvars.description: Determines how many ms since the last hardsnap to trigger a new one

cvars.name: p.GeometryCollectionNavigationSizeThreshold
cvars.description: Size in CM used as a threshold for whether a geometry in the collection is collected and exported for navigation purposes. Measured as the diagonal of the leaf node bounds.

cvars.name: p.GeometryCollectionRepAngularMatchTime
cvars.description: In seconds, how quickly should the angle match the replicated target angle

cvars.name: p.GeometryCollectionRepLinearMatchStrength
cvars.description: Units can be interpreted as %/s^2 - acceleration of percent linear correction

cvars.name: p.GeometryCollectionRepMaxExtrapolationTime
cvars.description: Number of seconds that replicated physics data will persist for a GC, extrapolating velocities

cvars.name: p.GeometryCollectionSingleThreadedBoundsCalculation
cvars.description: [Debug Only] Single threaded bounds calculation. [def:false]

cvars.name: p.GraphPropagationBasedCollisionFactor
cvars.description: when p.GraphPropagationBasedCollisionImpulseProcessing is on, the percentage [0-1] of remaining damage that is distributed to the connected pieces

cvars.name: p.GraphPropagationBasedCollisionImpulseProcessing
cvars.description: when processing collision impulse toc ompute strain, pick the closest child from the impact point and propagate using the connection graph [def: 0]

cvars.name: p.HackMaxAngularVelocity
cvars.description: Max cap on angular velocity: rad/s. This is only a temp solution and should not be relied on as a feature. -1.f to disable

cvars.name: p.HackMaxVelocity2
cvars.description: Max cap on velocity: cm/s. This is only a temp solution and should not be relied on as a feature. -1.f to disable

cvars.name: p.HitDistanceTolerance
cvars.description: Tolerance for hit distance for overlap test in PrimitiveComponent movement. Hits that are less than this distance are ignored.

cvars.name: p.IgnoreAnalyticCollisionsOverride
cvars.description: Overrides the default for ignroing analytic collsions.

cvars.name: p.InitialOverlapTolerance
cvars.description: Tolerance for initial overlapping test in PrimitiveComponent movement. Normals within this tolerance are ignored if moving out of the object. Dot product of movement direction and surface normal.

cvars.name: p.KinematicDeferralCheckValidBodies
cvars.description: If true, don't attempt to update deferred kinematic skeletal mesh bodies which are pending delete.

cvars.name: p.KinematicDeferralLogInvalidBodies
cvars.description: If true and p.KinematicDeferralCheckValidBodies is true, log when an invalid body is found on kinematic update.

cvars.name: p.KinematicDeferralUpdateExternalAccelerationStructure
cvars.description: If true, process any operations in PendingSpatialOperations_External before doing deferred kinematic updates.

cvars.name: p.LevelSetAvgAngleErrorTolerance
cvars.description: Average error in of the mesh normal and computed normal on the level set.

cvars.name: p.LevelSetAvgDistErrorTolerance
cvars.description: Error tolerance for average distance between the triangles and generated levelset. Note this is a fraction of the average bounding box dimensions.

cvars.name: p.LevelSetFailureOnHighError
cvars.description: Set level sets with high error to null in the solver

cvars.name: p.LevelsetGhostCells
cvars.description: Increase the level set grid by this many ghost cells

cvars.name: p.LevelSetMaxDistErrorTolerance
cvars.description: Max error for the highest error triangle generated from a levelset. Note this is a fraction of the average bounding box dimensions.

cvars.name: p.LevelSetOutputFailedDebugData
cvars.description: Output debug obj files for level set and mesh when error tolerances are too high

cvars.name: p.LevelsetOverlapCapsuleSamples
cvars.description: Number of spiral points to generate for levelset-capsule overlaps

cvars.name: p.LevelsetOverlapSphereSamples
cvars.description: Number of spiral points to generate for levelset-sphere overlaps

cvars.name: p.LinearEtherDragOverride
cvars.description: Set an override linear ether drag value. -1.f to disable

cvars.name: p.LogDirtyParticles
cvars.description: Logs out which particles are dirty every frame

cvars.name: p.MaxBoundsForTree
cvars.description: The max bounds before moving object into a large objects structure. Only applies on object registration

cvars.name: p.MaxContactOffset
cvars.description: Max value of contact offset, which controls how close objects get before generating contacts. < 0 implies use project settings. Default: 1.0

cvars.name: p.MaxDirtyElements
cvars.description: The max number of dirty elements. This forces a flush which is very expensive

cvars.name: p.MaxFallingCorrectionLeash
cvars.description: When airborne, some distance between the server and client locations may remain to avoid sudden corrections as clients jump from moving bases. This value is the maximum allowed distance.

cvars.name: p.MaxFallingCorrectionLeashBuffer
cvars.description: To avoid constant corrections, when an airborne server and client are further than p.MaxFallingCorrectionLeash cm apart, they'll be pulled in to that distance minus this value.

cvars.name: p.MaxLevelsetDimension
cvars.description: The maximum number of cells on a single level set axis

cvars.name: p.MinCleanedPointsBeforeRemovingInternals
cvars.description: If we only have this many clean points, don't bother removing internal points as the object is likely very small

cvars.name: p.MinLevelsetDimension
cvars.description: The minimum number of cells on a single level set axis

cvars.name: p.MinLevelsetSize
cvars.description: The minimum size on the smallest axis to use a level set

cvars.name: p.MoveIgnoreFirstBlockingOverlap
cvars.description: Whether to ignore the first blocking overlap in SafeMoveUpdatedComponent (if moving out from object and starting in penetration). The 'p.InitialOverlapTolerance' setting determines the 'move out' rules, but by default we always try to depenetrate first (not ignore the hit). 0: Disable (do not ignore), 1: Enable (ignore)

cvars.name: p.net.CmdOffsetEnabled
cvars.description: Enables deprecated (5.4) logic for legacy that handles physics frame offset. Recommended: Set this to 0 to stop the deprecated physics frame offset flow.

cvars.name: p.net.ForceFault
cvars.description: Forces server side input fault

cvars.name: p.net.ForceInputDrop
cvars.description: Forces client to drop inputs. Useful for simulating desync

cvars.name: p.net.LerpTargetNumBufferedCmdsAggresively
cvars.description: Aggresively lerp towards TargetNumBufferedCmds. Reduces server side buffering but can cause more artifacts.

cvars.name: p.net.MaxBufferedCmds
cvars.description: MaxNumber of buffered server side commands

cvars.name: p.net.MaxTargetNumBufferedCmds
cvars.description: Maximum number of buffered inputs the server will target per client.

cvars.name: p.net.MaxTimeDilationMag
cvars.description: Maximum time dilation that client will use to slow down / catch up with server

cvars.name: p.net.TargetNumBufferedCmds
cvars.description: How much to increase TargetNumBufferedCmds when an input fault occurs

cvars.name: p.net.TargetNumBufferedCmdsAlpha
cvars.description: Lerp strength for TargetNumBufferedCmds

cvars.name: p.net.TargetNumBufferedCmdsDeltaOnFault
cvars.description: How much to increase TargetNumBufferedCmds when an input fault occurs

cvars.name: p.net.TimeDilationAlpha
cvars.description: Lerp strength for sliding client time dilation

cvars.name: p.net.TimeDilationEnabled
cvars.description: Enable clientside TimeDilation

cvars.name: p.NetCorrectionLifetime
cvars.description: How long a visualized network correction persists. Time in seconds each visualized network correction persists.

cvars.name: p.NetEnableListenServerSmoothing
cvars.description: Whether to enable mesh smoothing on listen servers for the local view of remote clients. 0: Disable, 1: Enable

cvars.name: p.NetEnableMoveCombining
cvars.description: Whether to enable move combining on the client to reduce bandwidth by combining similar moves. 0: Disable, 1: Enable

cvars.name: p.NetEnableMoveCombiningOnStaticBaseChange
cvars.description: Whether to allow combining client moves when moving between static geometry. 0: Disable, 1: Enable

cvars.name: p.NetEnableSkipProxyPredictionOnNetUpdate
cvars.description: Whether to allow proxies to skip prediction on frames with a network position update, if bNetworkSkipProxyPredictionOnNetUpdate is also true on the movement component. 0: Disable, 1: Enable

cvars.name: p.NetForceClientAdjustmentPercent
cvars.description: Percent of ServerCheckClientError checks to return true regardless of actual error. Useful for testing client correction code. <=0: Disable, 0.05: 5% of checks will return failed, 1.0: Always send client adjustments

cvars.name: p.NetForceClientServerMoveLossDuration
cvars.description: Duration in seconds for client to drop ServerMove calls when NetForceClientServerMoveLossPercent check passes. Useful for testing server force correction code. Duration of zero means single frame loss.

cvars.name: p.NetForceClientServerMoveLossPercent
cvars.description: Percent of ServerMove calls for client to not send. Useful for testing server force correction code. <=0: Disable, 0.05: 5% of checks will return failed, 1.0: never send server moves

cvars.name: p.NetMoveCombiningAttachedLocationTolerance
cvars.description: Tolerance for relative location attachment change when combining moves. Small tolerances allow for very slight jitter due to transform updates.

cvars.name: p.NetMoveCombiningAttachedRotationTolerance
cvars.description: Tolerance for relative rotation attachment change when combining moves. Small tolerances allow for very slight jitter due to transform updates.

cvars.name: p.NetPackedMovementMaxBits
cvars.description: Max number of bits allowed in each packed movement RPC. Used to protect against bad data causing the server to allocate too much memory.

cvars.name: p.NetShowCorrections
cvars.description: Whether to draw client position corrections (red is incorrect, green is corrected). 0: Disable, 1: Enable

cvars.name: p.NetStationaryRotationTolerance
cvars.description: Tolerance for GetClientNetSendDeltaTime() to remain throttled when small control rotation changes occur.

cvars.name: p.NetUseBaseRelativeAcceleration
cvars.description: If enabled, character acceleration will be treated as relative to dynamic movement bases.

cvars.name: p.NetUseBaseRelativeVelocity
cvars.description: If enabled, character velocity corrections will be treated as relative to dynamic movement bases.

cvars.name: p.NetUseClientTimestampForReplicatedTransform
cvars.description: If enabled, use client timestamp changes to track the replicated transform timestamp, otherwise uses server tick time as the timestamp. Game session usually needs to be restarted if this is changed at runtime. 0: Disable, 1: Enable

cvars.name: p.NetUsePackedMovementRPCs
cvars.description: Whether to use newer movement RPC parameter packed serialization. If disabled, old deprecated movement RPCs will be used instead. 0: Disable, 1: Enable

cvars.name: p.NetVisualizeSimulatedCorrections
cvars.description: 0: Disable, 1: Enable

cvars.name: p.PenetrationOverlapCheckInflation
cvars.description: Inflation added to object when checking if a location is free of blocking collision. Distance added to inflation in penetration overlap check.

cvars.name: p.PenetrationPullbackDistance
cvars.description: Pull out from penetration of an object by this extra distance. Distance added to penetration fix-ups.

cvars.name: p.PhysDrawing.SkinnedLatticeBoneWeight
cvars.description: Draw skinned lattice bone weight. -1 = all lattice points

cvars.name: p.PhysicsAnimBlendUpdatesPhysX
cvars.description: Whether to update the physx simulation with the results of physics animation blending

cvars.name: p.PhysicsRunsOnGT
cvars.description: If true the physics thread runs on the game thread, but will still go wide on tasks like collision detection

cvars.name: p.PreventInvalidBodyInstanceTransforms
cvars.description: If true, an attempt to create a BodyInstance with an invalid transform will fail with a warning

cvars.name: p.PreventNonVerticalOrientationBlock
cvars.description: When enabled, this allows a character that's supposed to remain vertical to snap to a vertical orientation even if RotationRate settings would block it. See @ShouldRemainVertical and @RotationRate.

cvars.name: p.PrimitiveComponent.ReplicatePhysicsObject
cvars.description: When a primitive component has no BodyInstance, allow replication based on PhysicsObject

cvars.name: p.RagdollPhysics
cvars.description: If 1, ragdoll physics will be used. Otherwise just root body is simulated

cvars.name: p.RemoveFarBodiesFromBVH
cvars.description: Removes bodies far from the scene from the bvh 0: Kept, 1: Removed

cvars.name: p.ReplaySQs
cvars.description: If enabled, we rerun the sq against chaos

cvars.name: p.ReportTooManyChildrenNum
cvars.description: Issue warning if more than this many children exist in a single cluster

cvars.name: p.Resim.AllowRewindToResimulatedFrames
cvars.description: Allow rewinding back to a frame that was previously part of a resimulation. If a resimulation is performed between frame 100-110, allow a new resim from 105-115 if needed, else next resim will be able to start from frame 111.

cvars.name: p.Resim.IncompleteHistory
cvars.description: If a valid resim frame can't be found, use the requested resim frame and perform a resimulation with incomplete data.

cvars.name: p.Resim.InterpolateTargetGaps
cvars.description: How many frame gaps in replicated targets we should fill by interpolating between the previous and the new target received. Value in max number of frames to interpolate, deactivate by setting to 0.

cvars.name: p.Resim.ResimFrameValidation
cvars.description: 0 = no leniency, all dirty particles need a valid target. 1 = Island leniency, all particles in resim islands need a valid target. 2 = Full leniency, only the particle triggering the resim need a valid target.

cvars.name: p.RestoreBreakingMomentumPercent
cvars.description: When a rigid cluster is broken, objects that its in contact with will receive an impulse to restore this percent of their momentum prior to the break.

cvars.name: p.RigidBodyLODThreshold
cvars.description: Max LOD that rigid body node is allowed to run on. Provides a global threshold that overrides per-node the LODThreshold property. -1 means no override.

cvars.name: p.RigidBodyNode
cvars.description: Enables/disables the whole rigid body node system. When disabled, avoids all allocations and runtime costs. Can be used to disable RB Nodes on low-end platforms.

cvars.name: p.RigidBodyNode.ComponentAppliedLinearAccClamp
cvars.description: ComponentAppliedLinearAccClamp override

cvars.name: p.RigidBodyNode.ComponentLinearAccScale
cvars.description: ComponentLinearAccScale override

cvars.name: p.RigidBodyNode.ComponentLinearVelcale
cvars.description: ComponentLinearVelcale override

cvars.name: p.RigidBodyNode.DebugDraw
cvars.description: Whether to debug draw the rigid body simulation state. Requires p.Chaos.DebugDraw.Enabled 1 to function as well.

cvars.name: p.RigidBodyNode.DeferredSimulationDefault
cvars.description: Whether rigid body simulations are deferred one frame for assets that don't opt into a specific simulation timing

cvars.name: p.RigidBodyNode.DeferredSimulationForceDefault
cvars.description: When true, rigid body simulation will always use the value of p.RigidBodyNode.DeferredSimulationDefault to determine whether to defer the simulation work, ignoring the setting in the individual node.

cvars.name: p.RigidBodyNode.EnableComponentAcceleration
cvars.description: Enable/Disable the simple acceleration transfer system for component- or bone-space simulation

cvars.name: p.RigidBodyNode.EnableSimulation
cvars.description: Runtime Enable/Disable RB Node Simulation for debugging and testing (node is initialized and bodies and constraints are created, even when disabled.)

cvars.name: p.RigidBodyNode.EnableTimeBasedReset
cvars.description: If true, Rigid Body nodes are reset when they have not been updated for a while (default true)

cvars.name: p.RigidBodyNode.GravityScale
cvars.description: Multiplies the gravity on all RBANs

cvars.name: p.RigidBodyNode.IncludeClothColliders
cvars.description: Include cloth colliders as kinematic bodies in the immediate physics simulation.

cvars.name: p.RigidBodyNode.MaxSubSteps
cvars.description: Set the maximum number of simulation steps in the update loop

cvars.name: p.RigidBodyNode.Space.MaxAngularAcceleration
cvars.description: RBAN SimSpaceSettings overrides

cvars.name: p.RigidBodyNode.Space.MaxAngularVelocity
cvars.description: RBAN SimSpaceSettings overrides

cvars.name: p.RigidBodyNode.Space.MaxLinearAcceleration
cvars.description: RBAN SimSpaceSettings overrides

cvars.name: p.RigidBodyNode.Space.MaxLinearVelocity
cvars.description: RBAN SimSpaceSettings overrides

cvars.name: p.RigidBodyNode.Space.Override
cvars.description: Force-enable the advanced simulation space movement forces

cvars.name: p.RigidBodyNode.Space.VelocityScaleZ
cvars.description: RBAN SimSpaceSettings overrides

cvars.name: p.RigidBodyNode.Space.WorldAlpha
cvars.description: RBAN SimSpaceSettings overrides

cvars.name: p.RigidBodyNode.TaskPriority.Simulation
cvars.description: Task priority for running the rigid body node simulation task (0 = foreground/high, 1 = foreground/normal, 2 = background/high, 3 = background/normal, 4 = background/low).

cvars.name: p.RigidBodyNode.WorldObjectExpiry
cvars.description: World objects are removed from the simulation if not detected after this many tests

cvars.name: p.RK4SpringInterpolator.MaxIter
cvars.description: RK4 Spring Interpolator's max number of iterations

cvars.name: p.RK4SpringInterpolator.UpdateRate
cvars.description: RK4 Spring Interpolator's rate of update

cvars.name: p.RootMotion.Debug
cvars.description: Whether to draw root motion source debug information. 0: Disable, 1: Enable

cvars.name: p.RootMotion.DebugSourceLifeTime
cvars.description: How long a visualized root motion source persists. Time in seconds each visualized root motion source persists.

cvars.name: p.SampleMinParticlesForAcceleration
cvars.description: The minimum number of particles needed before using an acceleration structure when sampling

cvars.name: p.SensitiveSleepThresholdMultiplier
cvars.description: The sleep threshold multiplier to use for bodies using the Sensitive sleep family.

cvars.name: p.SerializeBadSQs
cvars.description: If enabled, we create a sq capture whenever chaos and physx diverge

cvars.name: p.SerializeSQs
cvars.description: If enabled, we create a sq capture per sq that takes more than provided value in microseconds. This can be very expensive as the entire scene is saved out

cvars.name: p.SerializeSQSampleCount
cvars.description: If Query exceeds duration threshold, we will re-measure SQ this many times before serializing. Larger values cause hitching.

cvars.name: p.SerializeSQsOverlapEnabled
cvars.description: If disabled, p.SerializeSQs will not consider overlaps

cvars.name: p.SerializeSQsRaycastEnabled
cvars.description: If disabled, p.SerializeSQs will not consider raycasts

cvars.name: p.SerializeSQsSweepEnabled
cvars.description: If disabled, p.SerializeSQs will not consider sweeps

cvars.name: p.ShallowCopyOnClusterUnionUpdate
cvars.description: If 1, shallow copy the root union geometry of a cluster union when its geometry updates, otherwise deep copy the geometry hierarchy

cvars.name: p.ShowInitialOverlaps
cvars.description: Show initial overlaps when moving a component, including estimated 'exit' direction. 0:off, otherwise on

cvars.name: p.SimCollisionEnabled
cvars.description: If 0 no sim collision will be used

cvars.name: p.SkipDesyncTest
cvars.description: Skips hard desync test, this means all particles will assume to be clean except spawning at different times. This is useful for a perf lower bound, not actually correct

cvars.name: p.SkipShapeCreationForEmptyBodySetup
cvars.description: If true, CreateShapesAndActors will not try to create actors and shapes for all instances if the body setup doesn't have any geometry.

cvars.name: p.SkipSkeletalRepOptimization
cvars.description: If true, we don't move the skeletal mesh component during replication. This is ok because the skeletal mesh already polls physx after its results

cvars.name: p.SkipUpdateOverlapsOptimEnabled
cvars.description: If enabled, we cache whether we need to call UpdateOverlaps on certain components

cvars.name: p.SQHitchDetection
cvars.description: Whether to detect scene query hitches. 0 is off. 1 repeats a slow scene query once and prints extra information. 2+ repeat slow query n times without recording (useful when profiling)

cvars.name: p.SQHitchDetectionForceNames
cvars.description: Whether name resolution is forced off the game thread. This is not 100% safe, but can be useful when looking at hitches off GT

cvars.name: p.SQHitchDetectionThreshold
cvars.description: Determines the threshold in milliseconds for a scene query hitch.

cvars.name: p.ToleranceScale_Length
cvars.description: The approximate size of objects in the simulation. Default: 100

cvars.name: p.ToleranceScale_Speed
cvars.description: The typical magnitude of velocities of objects in simulation. Default: 1000

cvars.name: p.UseAsyncInterpolation
cvars.description: Whether to interpolate when async mode is enabled

cvars.name: p.UseBoundingBoxForConnectionGraphFiltering
cvars.description: when on, use bounding box overlaps to filter connection during the connection graph generation [def: 0]

cvars.name: p.UseConnectivity
cvars.description: Whether to use connectivity graph when breaking up clusters

cvars.name: p.UseDeprecatedBehaviorUpdateMassScaleChanges
cvars.description: Allows FBodyInstanceCore::bUpdateMassWhenScaleChanges to default to false. This has potential issues, but allows existing projects to retain old behavior

cvars.name: p.UseLastGoodRotationDuringCorrection
cvars.description: When enabled, during a correction, restore the last good rotation before re-simulating saved moves if the server didn't specify one. This improves visual quality with options like bOrientToMovement or bUseControllerDesiredRotation that rotate over time.

cvars.name: p.UseLevelsetCollision
cvars.description: Whether unioned objects use levelsets

cvars.name: p.UseTargetVelocityOnImpact
cvars.description: When disabled, we recalculate velocity after impact by comparing our position before we moved to our position after we moved. This doesn't work correctly when colliding with physics objects, so setting this to 1 fixes this one the hit object is moving.

cvars.name: p.ValidateSceneComponentAttachmentDetailLevel_High
cvars.description: If enabled, checks that cooking for a target detail level of High and removing unneeded components will not remove the parents of any components.

cvars.name: p.ValidateSceneComponentAttachmentDetailLevel_Low
cvars.description: If enabled, checks that cooking for a target detail level of Low and removing unneeded components will not remove the parents of any components.

cvars.name: p.ValidateSceneComponentAttachmentDetailLevel_Medium
cvars.description: If enabled, checks that cooking for a target detail level of Medium and removing unneeded components will not remove the parents of any components.

cvars.name: p.ValidateSceneComponentAttachmentEditorOnlySettings
cvars.description: If enabled, checks that components which are editor only don't have attached components which are not editor only

cvars.name: p.VisualizeMovement
cvars.description: Whether to draw in-world debug information for character movement. 0: Disable, 1: Enable

cvars.name: p4.AlwaysBranchFilesOnCopy
cvars.description: Use legacy behavior of always branching a file in perforce when copying.

cvars.name: Package.Relocation
cvars.description: Define when we should run the relocation logic for the dependencies of a package. Note changing this value at runtime won't update the cached depencencies in the asset registry. 0: Off (never apply relocation. References to other relocated packages will give errors and fail to resolve.) 1: Relocate any asset saved after EUnrealEngineObjectUE5Version::ADD_SOFTOBJECTPATH_LIST (5.1). Default value for the new projects.

cvars.name: PackageReload.EnableFastPath
cvars.description: When 'true', an optimized codepath is used to speed up reloading packages (experimental).

cvars.name: PackageTools.UnloadPackagesUnloadsPrimaryAssets
cvars.description: During unload packages, also unload primary assets

cvars.name: pak.ReaderReleaseDelay
cvars.description: If > 0, then synchronous pak readers older than this will be deleted.

cvars.name: PerfWarn.CoarseMinFPS
cvars.description: The FPS threshold below which we warn about for coarse-grained sampling.

cvars.name: PerfWarn.CoarsePercentThreshold
cvars.description: The percentage of samples that fall below min FPS above which we warn for.

cvars.name: PerfWarn.CoarseSampleTime
cvars.description: How many seconds we sample the percentage for the coarse-grained minimum FPS.

cvars.name: PerfWarn.FineMinFPS
cvars.description: The FPS threshold below which we warn about for fine-grained sampling.

cvars.name: PerfWarn.FinePercentThreshold
cvars.description: The percentage of samples that fall below min FPS above which we warn for.

cvars.name: PerfWarn.FineSampleTime
cvars.description: How many seconds we sample the percentage for the fine-grained minimum FPS.

cvars.name: PlacementMode.AllowNonPrimitiveComponentHits
cvars.description: When raycasting the world in placement mode, allow hits of physics objects that are not tied to a UPrimitiveComponent (to work with non-actor workflows).

cvars.name: PlacementMode.ItemInternalsInTooltip
cvars.description: Shows placeable item internal information in its tooltip

cvars.name: PlayerController.LevelVisibilityDontSerializeFileName
cvars.description: When true, we'll always skip serializing FileName with FUpdateLevelVisibilityLevelInfo's. This will save bandwidth when games don't need both.

cvars.name: PlayerController.NetResetServerPredictionDataOnPawnAck
cvars.description: Whether to reset server prediction data for the possessed Pawn when the pawn ack handshake completes. 0: Disable, 1: Enable

cvars.name: PluginManager.LeakedAssetTrace.MaxReportCount
cvars.description: Max number of assets to report when we find leaked assets.

cvars.name: PluginManager.LeakedAssetTrace.RenameLeakedPackages
cvars.description: Should packages which are leaked after the Game Feature Plugin is unloaded or unmounted.

cvars.name: PluginManager.LeakedAssetTrace.Severity
cvars.description: Controls severity of logging when the engine detects that assets from an Game Feature Plugin were leaked during unloading or unmounting. 0 - all reference tracing and logging is disabled 1 - logs an error 2 - ensure 3 - fatal error

cvars.name: PluginManager.LeakedAssetTrace.TraceMode
cvars.description: Controls detail level of reference tracing when the engine detects that assets from a Game Feature Plugin were leaked during unloading or unmounting. 0 - direct references only 1 - full reference trace

cvars.name: PluginManager.VerifyUnload
cvars.description: Verify plugin assets are no longer in memory when unloading.

cvars.name: PurgeOldLightmaps
cvars.description: If non-zero, purge old lightmap data when rebuilding lighting.

cvars.name: r.AllowCachedUniformExpressions
cvars.description: Allow uniform expressions to be cached.

cvars.name: r.AllowDepthBoundsTest
cvars.description: If true, use enable depth bounds test when rendering deferred lights.

cvars.name: r.AllowGlobalClipPlane
cvars.description: Enables mesh shaders to support a global clip plane, needed for planar reflections, which adds about 15% BasePass GPU cost on PS4.

cvars.name: r.AllowHDR
cvars.description: Creates an HDR compatible swap-chain and enables HDR display output.0: Disabled (default) 1: Allow HDR, if supported by the platform and display

cvars.name: r.AllowLandscapeShadows
cvars.description: Allow Landscape Shadows

cvars.name: r.AllowOcclusionQueries
cvars.description: Enables hardware occlusion culling.

cvars.name: r.AllowPointLightCubemapShadows
cvars.description: When 0, will prevent point light cube map shadows from being used and the light will be unshadowed.

cvars.name: r.AllowPrecomputedVisibility
cvars.description: If zero, precomputed visibility will not be used to cull primitives.

cvars.name: r.AllowSimpleLights
cvars.description: If true, we allow simple (ie particle) lights

cvars.name: r.AllowStaticLighting
cvars.description: Whether to allow any static lighting to be generated and used, like lightmaps and shadowmaps. Games that only use dynamic lighting should set this to 0 to save some static lighting overhead.

cvars.name: r.AllowSubPrimitiveQueries
cvars.description: Enables sub primitive queries, currently only used by hierarchical instanced static meshes. 1: Enable, 0 Disabled. When disabled, one query is used for the entire proxy.

cvars.name: r.AllowTexture2DArrayCreation
cvars.description: Enable UTexture2DArray assets

cvars.name: r.AnisotropicMaterials
cvars.description: Whether anisotropic BRDF is used for material with anisotropy.

cvars.name: r.AntiAliasingMethod
cvars.description: Engine default (project setting) for AntiAliasingMethod is (postprocess volume/camera/game setting still can override) 0: off (no anti-aliasing) 1: Fast Approximate Anti-Aliasing (FXAA) 2: Temporal Anti-Aliasing (TAA) 3: Multisample Anti-Aliasing (MSAA, Only available on the desktop forward renderer) 4: Temporal Super-Resolution (TSR, Default)

cvars.name: r.AreShaderErrorsFatal
cvars.description: When enabled, when a the default material or global shaders fail to compile it will issue a Fatal error. Otherwise just an Error. Default: true

cvars.name: r.BackbufferQuantizationDitheringOverride
cvars.description: Override the bitdepth in bits of each channel of the backbuffer targeted by the quantization dithering. Disabled by default. Instead is automatically found out by FSceneViewFamily::RenderTarget's pixel format of the backbuffer.

cvars.name: r.BadDriverWarningIsFatal
cvars.description: If non-zero, trigger a fatal error if a denylisted driver is detected. For the fatal error to occur, r.WarnOfBadDrivers must be non-zero. 0: off (default) 1: a fatal error occurs after the out-of-date driver message is dismissed (non-Shipping only)

cvars.name: r.BasePassOutputsVelocity
cvars.description: Deprecated CVar. Use r.VelocityOutputPass instead.

cvars.name: r.BasePassWriteDepthEvenWithFullPrepass
cvars.description: 0 to allow a readonly base pass, which skips an MSAA depth resolve, and allows masked materials to get EarlyZ (writing to depth while doing clip() disables EarlyZ) (default) 1 to force depth writes in the base pass. Useful for debugging when the prepass and base pass don't match what they render.

cvars.name: r.BlackBorders
cvars.description: To draw black borders around the rendered image (prevents artifacts from post processing passes that read outside of the image e.g. PostProcessAA) in pixels, 0:off

cvars.name: r.CatmullRomEndParamOffset
cvars.description: The parameter offset for catmul rom end points.

cvars.name: r.chaos.ReflectionCaptureStaticSceneOnly
cvars.description: 0 is off, 1 is on (default)

cvars.name: r.CheckSRVTransitions
cvars.description: Tests that render targets are properly transitioned to SRV when SRVs are set.

cvars.name: r.ClearCoatNormal
cvars.description: 0 to disable clear coat normal. 0: off 1: on

cvars.name: r.ClearGBufferDBeforeBasePass
cvars.description: Whether to clear GBuffer D before basepass

cvars.name: r.ClearSceneMethod
cvars.description: Select how the g-buffer is cleared in game mode (only affects deferred shading). 0: No clear 1: RHIClear (default) 2: Quad at max z

cvars.name: r.CloudDefaultTexturesNoFastClear
cvars.description: Remove fast clear on default cloud textures

cvars.name: r.CompileMaterialsForShaderFormat
cvars.description: When enabled, compile materials for this shader format in addition to those for the running platform. Note that these shaders are compiled and immediately tossed. This is only useful when directly inspecting output via r.DebugDumpShaderInfo.

cvars.name: r.CompileShadersForDevelopment
cvars.description: Setting this to 0 allows to ship a game with more optimized shaders as some editor and development features are not longer compiled into the shaders. Note: This should be done when shipping but it's not done automatically yet (feature need to mature and shaders will compile slower as shader caching from development isn't shared). Cannot be changed at runtime - can be put into BaseEngine.ini 0: off, shader can run a bit faster 1: on (Default)

cvars.name: r.Composite.TemporalUpsampleDepth
cvars.description: Temporal upsample factor of the depth buffer for depth testing editor primitives against.

cvars.name: r.CookOutUnusedDetailModeComponents
cvars.description: If set, components which are not relevant for the current detail mode will be cooked out. 0: keep components even if not relevant for the current detail mode. 1: cook out components not relevant for the current detail mode.

cvars.name: r.CreateShadersOnLoad
cvars.description: Whether to create shaders on load, which can reduce hitching, but use more memory. Otherwise they will be created as needed.

cvars.name: r.CullBeforeFetch
cvars.description: Enable Cull-Before-Fetch optimization for platforms that support it. 0: Disable (default) 1: Enable

cvars.name: r.CullInstances
cvars.description: CullInstances.

cvars.name: r.DBuffer
cvars.description: Enables DBuffer decal material blend modes. DBuffer decals are rendered before the base pass, allowing them to affect static lighting and skylighting correctly. When enabled, a full prepass will be forced which adds CPU / GPU cost. Several texture lookups will be done in the base pass to fetch the decal properties, which adds pixel work. 0: off 1: on (default)

cvars.name: r.Deferred.UsesLightFunctionAtlas
cvars.description: Whether the light function atlas is sampled when rendering local lights.

cvars.name: r.DeferredMeshPassSetupTaskSync
cvars.description: If enabled, the sync point of the mesh pass setup task is deferred until RDG execute (from during RDG setup) significantly increasing the overlap possible.

cvars.name: r.DeferSkeletalDynamicDataUpdateUntilGDME
cvars.description: If > 0, then do skeletal mesh dynamic data updates will be deferred until GDME. Experimental option.

cvars.name: r.DeferUniformExpressionCaching
cvars.description: Whether to defer caching of uniform expressions until a rendering command needs them up to date. Deferring updates is more efficient because multiple SetVectorParameterValue calls in a frame will only result in one update.

cvars.name: r.DeferUpdateRenderStates
cvars.description: Whether to defer updating the render states of material parameter collections when a paramter is changed until a rendering command needs them up to date. Deferring updates is more efficient because multiple SetVectorParameterValue and SetScalarParameterValue calls in a frame will only result in one update.

cvars.name: r.DemosaicVposOffset
cvars.description: This offset is added to the rasterized position used for demosaic in the mobile tonemapping shader. It exists to workaround driver bugs on some Android devices that have a half-pixel offset.

cvars.name: r.DemotedLocalMemoryWarning
cvars.description: If set to 1, a warning will be displayed when local memory has been demoted to system memory.

cvars.name: r.DetailedMipAlphaLogging
cvars.description: Prints extra log messages for tracking when alpha gets removed/introduced during textureimage processing.

cvars.name: r.DetailMode
cvars.description: Current detail mode; determines whether components of actors should be updated/ ticked. 0: low, show objects with DetailMode low 1: medium, show objects with DetailMode medium or below 2: high, show objects with DetailMode high or below 3: epic, show all objects (default)

cvars.name: r.DisableDistortion
cvars.description: Prevents distortion effects from rendering. Saves a full-screen framebuffer's worth of memory.

cvars.name: r.DisableEngineAndAppRegistration
cvars.description: If true, disables engine and app registration, to disable GPU driver optimizations during debugging and development Changes will only take effect in new game/editor instances - can't be changed at runtime.

cvars.name: r.DisableLandscapeNaniteGI
cvars.description: Disable Landscape Nanite GI

cvars.name: r.DisableLODFade
cvars.description: Disable fading for distance culling

cvars.name: r.DiscardUnusedQuality
cvars.description: Whether to keep or discard unused quality level shadermaps in memory. 0: keep all quality levels in memory. (default) 1: Discard unused quality levels on load.

cvars.name: r.DisplayInternals
cvars.description: Allows to enable screen printouts that show the internals on the engine/renderer This is mostly useful to be able to reason why a screenshots looks different. 0: off (default) 1: enabled

cvars.name: r.DistanceFadeMaxTravel
cvars.description: Max distance that the player can travel during the fade time.

cvars.name: r.DontLimitOnBattery
cvars.description: 0: Limit performance on devices with a battery.(default) 1: Do not limit performance due to device having a battery.

cvars.name: r.DoTiledReflections
cvars.description: Compute Reflection Environment with Tiled compute shader.. 0: off 1: on (default)

cvars.name: r.DownsampledOcclusionQueries
cvars.description: Whether to issue occlusion queries to a downsampled depth buffer

cvars.name: r.DrawRectangleOptimization
cvars.description: Controls an optimization for DrawRectangle(). When enabled a triangle can be used to draw a quad in certain situations (viewport sized quad). Using a triangle allows for slightly faster post processing in lower resolutions but can not always be used. 0: Optimization is disabled, DrawDenormalizedQuad always render with quad 1: Optimization is enabled, a triangle can be rendered where specified (default)

cvars.name: r.DriverDetectionMethod
cvars.description: Defines which implementation is used to detect the GPU driver (to check for old drivers, logs and statistics) 0: Iterate available drivers in registry and choose the one with the same name, if in question use next method (happens) 1: Get the driver of the primary adapter (might not be correct when dealing with multiple adapters) 2: Use DirectX LUID (would be the best, not yet implemented) 3: Use Windows functions, use the primary device (might be wrong when API is using another adapter) 4: Use Windows functions, use names such as DirectX Device (newest, most promising) 5: Use Windows SetupAPI functions

cvars.name: r.DumpingMovie
cvars.description: Allows to dump each rendered frame to disk (slow fps, names MovieFrame..). <=0:off (default), <0:remains on, >0:remains on for n frames (n is the number specified)

cvars.name: r.DumpShaderDebugInfo
cvars.description: Dumps debug info for compiled shaders to GameName/Saved/ShaderDebugInfo When set to 1, debug info is dumped for all compiled shader When set to 2, it is restricted to shaders with compilation errors When set to 3, it is restricted to shaders with compilation errors or warnings The debug info is platform dependent, but usually includes a preprocessed version of the shader source. Global shaders automatically dump debug info if r.ShaderDevelopmentMode is enabled, this cvar is not necessary. On iOS, if the PowerVR graphics SDK is installed to the default path, the PowerVR shader compiler will be called and errors will be reported during the cook.

cvars.name: r.DumpShaderDebugShortNames
cvars.description: Only valid when r.DumpShaderDebugInfo > 0. When set to 1, will shorten names factory and shader type folder names to avoid issues with long paths.

cvars.name: r.DumpShaderDebugWorkerCommandLine
cvars.description: Only valid when r.DumpShaderDebugInfo > 0. When set to 1, it will generate a file that can be used with ShaderCompileWorker's -directcompile.

cvars.name: r.DumpShaderOutputCacheHits
cvars.description: Dumps shader output bytecode and cache hits with reference to original output. Dumping shader output bytecode for all compile shaders also requires CVar r.DumpShaderDebugInfo=1.

cvars.name: r.DumpTransitionsForResource
cvars.description: Prints callstack when the given resource is transitioned. Only implemented for DX11 at the moment.Name of the resource to dump

cvars.name: r.DX12NVAfterMathDumpWaitTime
cvars.description: Amount of time to wait for NV Aftermath to finish processing GPU crash dumps.

cvars.name: r.DX12NVAfterMathEnabled
cvars.description: Use NV Aftermath for GPU crash analysis in D3D12

cvars.name: r.DX12NVAfterMathTrackResources
cvars.description: Enable NV Aftermath resource tracing in D3D12

cvars.name: r.DynamicGlobalIlluminationMethod
cvars.description: 0 - None. Global Illumination can be baked into Lightmaps but no technique will be used for Dynamic Global Illumination. 1 - Lumen. Use Lumen Global Illumination for all lights, emissive materials casting light and SkyLight Occlusion. Requires 'Generate Mesh Distance Fields' enabled for Software Ray Tracing and 'Support Hardware Ray Tracing' enabled for Hardware Ray Tracing. 2 - SSGI. Standalone Screen Space Global Illumination. Low cost, but limited by screen space information. 3 - Plugin. Use a plugin for Global Illumination.

cvars.name: r.FBlueprintContext.VirtualStackAllocator.DecommitMode
cvars.description: Specifies DecommitMode for FVirtualStackAllocator when used through its ThreadSingleton. Values are from EVirtualStackAllocatorDecommitMode.

cvars.name: r.FBlueprintContext.VirtualStackAllocatorStackSize
cvars.description: Default size for FBlueprintContext's FVirtualStackAllocator

cvars.name: r.FeatureLevelPreview
cvars.description: If 1 the quick settings menu will contain an option to enable feature level preview modes

cvars.name: r.FilmGrain
cvars.description: Whether to enable film grain.

cvars.name: r.FilmGrain.CacheTextureConstants
cvars.description: Wether the constants related to the film grain should be cached.

cvars.name: r.FilmGrain.SequenceLength
cvars.description: Length of the random sequence for film grain (preferably a prime number, default=97).

cvars.name: r.Filter.LoopMode
cvars.description: Controls when to use either dynamic or unrolled loops to iterates over the Gaussian filtering. This passes is used for Gaussian Blur, Bloom and Depth of Field. The dynamic loop allows up to 128 samples versus the 32 samples of unrolled loops, but add an additional cost for the loop's stop test at every iterations. 0: Unrolled loop only (default; limited to 32 samples). 1: Fall back to dynamic loop if needs more than 32 samples. 2: Dynamic loop only.

cvars.name: r.Filter.SizeScale
cvars.description: Allows to scale down or up the sample count used for bloom and Gaussian depth of field (scale is clamped to give reasonable results). Values down to 0.6 are hard to notice 1 full quality (default) >1 more samples (slower) <1 less samples (faster, artifacts with HDR content or boxy results with GaussianDOF)

cvars.name: r.FinishCurrentFrame
cvars.description: If on, the current frame will be forced to finish and render to the screen instead of being buffered. This will improve latency, but slow down overall performance.

cvars.name: r.FlushRHIThreadOnSTreamingTextureLocks
cvars.description: If set to 0, we won't do any flushes for streaming textures. This is safe because the texture streamer deals with these hazards explicitly.

cvars.name: r.Fog
cvars.description: 0: disabled 1: enabled (default)

cvars.name: r.FogUseDepthBounds
cvars.description: Allows enable depth bounds optimization on fog full screen pass. false: disabled true: enabled (default)

cvars.name: r.ForceAllCoresForShaderCompiling
cvars.description: When set to 1, it will ignore INI settings and launch as many ShaderCompileWorker instances as cores are available. Improves shader throughput but for big projects it can make the machine run OOM

cvars.name: r.ForceDebugViewModes
cvars.description: 0: Setting has no effect. 1: Forces debug view modes to be available, even on cooked builds.2: Forces debug view modes to be unavailable, even on editor builds. Removes many shader permutations for faster shader iteration.

cvars.name: r.ForceHighestMipOnUITextures
cvars.description: If set to 1, texutres in the UI Group will have their highest mip level forced.

cvars.name: r.ForceLOD
cvars.description: LOD level to force, -1 is off.

cvars.name: r.ForceLODShadow
cvars.description: LOD level to force for the shadow map generation only, -1 is off.

cvars.name: r.ForceRetileTextures
cvars.description: If Shared Linear Texture Encoding is enabled in project settings, this will force the tiling build step to rebuild,however the linear texture is allowed to fetch from cache.

cvars.name: r.ForceSceneHasDecals
cvars.description: Whether to always assume that scene has decals, so we don't switch depth state conditionally. This can significantly reduce total number of PSOs at a minor GPU cost.

cvars.name: r.Forward.LightGridDebug
cvars.description: Whether to display on screen culledlight per tile. 0: off (default) 1: on - showing light count onto the depth buffer 2: on - showing max light count per tile accoung for each slice but the last one (culling there is too conservative) 3: on - showing max light count per tile accoung for each slice and the last one

cvars.name: r.Forward.LightGridPixelSize
cvars.description: Size of a cell in the light grid, in pixels.

cvars.name: r.Forward.LightGridSizeZ
cvars.description: Number of Z slices in the light grid.

cvars.name: r.Forward.LightLinkedListCulling
cvars.description: Uses a reverse linked list to store culled lights, removing the fixed limit on how many lights can affect a cell - it becomes a global limit instead.

cvars.name: r.Forward.MaxCulledLightsPerCell
cvars.description: Controls how much memory is allocated for each cell for light culling. When r.Forward.LightLinkedListCulling is enabled, this is used to compute a global max instead of a per-cell limit on culled lights.

cvars.name: r.ForwardShading
cvars.description: Whether to use forward shading on desktop platforms - requires Shader Model 5 hardware. Forward shading has lower constant cost, but fewer features supported. 0:off, 1:on This rendering path is a work in progress with many unimplemented features, notably only a single reflection capture is applied per object and no translucency dynamic shadow receiving.

cvars.name: r.ForwardShading.ForceSkyLightCubemapBlending
cvars.description: Forces in shader sky box blending for forward shading. More expenssive but higher quality. This is similar to having Blend Sky Light Cubemaps = true on all forward materials.

cvars.name: r.FramesToExpandNewlyOcclusionTestedBBoxes
cvars.description: If we don't occlusion test a primitive for r.GFramesNotOcclusionTestedToExpandBBoxes frames, then we expand the BBox when we do occlusion test it for this number of frames. See also r.GFramesNotOcclusionTestedToExpandBBoxes, r.ExpandNewlyOcclusionTestedBBoxesAmount

cvars.name: r.FreeSkeletalMeshBuffers
cvars.description: Controls whether skeletal mesh buffers are kept in CPU memory to support merging of skeletal meshes. 0: Keep buffers(default) 1: Free buffers

cvars.name: r.FreezeMouseCursor
cvars.description: Free the mouse cursor position, for passes which use it to display debug information. 0: default 1: freeze mouse cursor position at current location

cvars.name: r.FullScreenMode
cvars.description: Defines how we do full screen when requested (e.g. command line option -fullscreen or in ini [SystemSettings] fullscreen=true) 0: normal full screen (renders faster, more control over vsync, less GPU memory, 10bit color if possible) 1: windowed full screen (quick switch between applications and window mode, slight performance loss) any other number behaves like 0

cvars.name: r.FXAA.Quality
cvars.description: Selects the quality permutation of FXAA. 0: Console 1: PC medium-dither 3-sample 2: PC medium-dither 5-sample 3: PC medium-dither 8-sample 4: PC low-dither 12-sample (Default) 5: PC extrem quality 12-samples

cvars.name: r.Gamma
cvars.description: Gamma on output

cvars.name: r.GaussianBloom.Cross
cvars.description: Experimental feature to give bloom kernel a more bright center sample (values between 1 and 3 work without causing aliasing) Existing bloom get lowered to match the same brightness <0 for a anisomorphic lens flare look (X only) 0 off (default) >0 for a cross look (X and Y)

cvars.name: r.GBufferDiffuseSampleOcclusion
cvars.description: Whether the gbuffer contain occlusion information for individual diffuse samples.

cvars.name: r.GBufferFormat
cvars.description: Defines the memory layout used for the GBuffer. (affects performance, mostly through bandwidth, quality of normals and material attributes). 0: lower precision (8bit per component, for profiling) 1: low precision (default) 3: high precision normals encoding 5: high precision

cvars.name: r.GeneralPurposeTweak
cvars.description: Useful for low level shader development to get quick iteration time without having to change any c++ code. Value maps to Frame.GeneralPurposeTweak inside the shaders. Example usage: Multiplier on some value to tweak, toggle to switch between different algorithms (Default: 1.0) DON'T USE THIS FOR ANYTHING THAT IS CHECKED IN. Compiled out in SHIPPING to make cheating a bit harder.

cvars.name: r.GeneralPurposeTweak2
cvars.description: Useful for low level shader development to get quick iteration time without having to change any c++ code. Value maps to Frame.GeneralPurposeTweak2 inside the shaders. Example usage: Multiplier on some value to tweak, toggle to switch between different algorithms (Default: 1.0) DON'T USE THIS FOR ANYTHING THAT IS CHECKED IN. Compiled out in SHIPPING to make cheating a bit harder.

cvars.name: r.GenerateMeshDistanceFields
cvars.description: Whether to build distance fields of static meshes, needed for Lumen Software Ray Tracing and Distance Field AO, which is used to implement Movable SkyLight shadows. Enabling will increase mesh build times and memory usage. Changing this value will cause a rebuild of all static meshes.

cvars.name: r.GeometryCollection.CustomRenderer.ForceBreak
cvars.description: Force the specified number of pieces to render individually, replacing their root proxy mesh.

cvars.name: r.GeometryCollection.Nanite
cvars.description: Render geometry collections using Nanite.

cvars.name: r.GeometryCollectionSetDynamicData.ISPC
cvars.description: Whether to use ISPC optimizations to set dynamic data in geometry collections

cvars.name: r.GeometryCollectionTripleBufferUploads
cvars.description: Whether to triple buffer geometry collection uploads, which allows Lock_NoOverwrite uploads which are much faster on the GPU with large amounts of data.

cvars.name: r.GFramesNotOcclusionTestedToExpandBBoxes
cvars.description: If we don't occlusion test a primitive for this many frames, then we expand the BBox when we do occlusion test it for a few frames. See also r.ExpandNewlyOcclusionTestedBBoxesAmount, r.FramesToExpandNewlyOcclusionTestedBBoxes

cvars.name: r.GlobalDistanceField.Debug.DrawModifiedPrimitives
cvars.description: Whether to draw primitive modifications (add, remove, updatetransform) that caused an update of the global distance field. This can be useful for tracking down why updating the global distance field is always costing a lot, since it should be mostly cached.

cvars.name: r.GlobalDistanceField.Debug.ForceMovementUpdate
cvars.description: Whether to force N texel border on X, Y and Z update each frame.

cvars.name: r.GlobalDistanceField.Debug.LogModifiedPrimitives
cvars.description: Whether to log primitive modifications (add, remove, updatetransform) that caused an update of the global distance field. This can be useful for tracking down why updating the global distance field is always costing a lot, since it should be mostly cached. Pass 2 to log only non movable object updates.

cvars.name: r.GlobalDistanceField.Debug.ShowStats
cvars.description: Debug drawing for the Global Distance Field.

cvars.name: r.GlobalDistanceFieldHeightFieldThicknessScale
cvars.description: Thickness of the height field when it's entered into the global distance field, measured in distance field voxels. Defaults to 4 which means 4x the voxel size as thickness.

cvars.name: r.GraphicsAdapter
cvars.description: User request to pick a specific graphics adapter (e.g. when using a integrated graphics card with a discrete one) For Windows D3D, unless a specific adapter is chosen we reject Microsoft adapters because we don't want the software emulation. This takes precedence over -prefer{AMD\|NVidia\|Intel} when the value is >= 0. -2: Take the first one that fulfills the criteria -1: Favour non integrated because there are usually faster (default) 0: Adapter #0 1: Adapter #1, ...

cvars.name: r.grass.DensityQualityLevel
cvars.description: The quality level for grass (low, medium, high, epic).

cvars.name: r.grass.ShowBothPerQualityAndPerPlaformProperties
cvars.description: Show both per platform and per quality properties in the editor.

cvars.name: r.HFShadowAverageObjectsPerCullTile
cvars.description: Determines how much memory should be allocated in height field object culling data structures. Too much = memory waste, too little = flickering due to buffer overflow.

cvars.name: r.HFShadowQuality
cvars.description: Defines the height field shadow method which allows to adjust for quality or performance. 0:off, 1:low (8 steps), 2:medium (16 steps, default), 3:high (32 steps, hole aware)

cvars.name: r.HighQualityLightMaps
cvars.description: If set to 1, allow high quality lightmaps which don't bake in direct lighting of stationary lights

cvars.name: r.HighResScreenshot.AdditionalCmds
cvars.description: Additional command to execute when a high res screenshot is requested.

cvars.name: r.HighResScreenshotDelay
cvars.description: When high-res screenshots are requested there is a small delay to allow temporal effects to converge. Default: 4. Using a value below the default will disable TemporalAA for improved image quality.

cvars.name: r.Histogram.UseAtomic
cvars.description: Uses atomic to speed up the generation of the histogram.

cvars.name: r.HitProxy.CaptureNextUpdate
cvars.description: Enables GPU capture of hit proxy rendering on the next update.

cvars.name: r.HLOD.DistanceOverride
cvars.description: If non-zero, overrides the distance that HLOD transitions will take place for all objects at the HLOD level index, formatting is as follows: 'r.HLOD.DistanceOverride 5000, 10000, 20000' would result in HLOD levels 0, 1 and 2 transitioning at 5000, 1000 and 20000 respectively.

cvars.name: r.HLOD.DistanceOverrideScale
cvars.description: Scales the value in r.HLOD.DistanceOverride, Default off. This is an optional scale intended to allow game logic to dynamically modify without impacting scalability.

cvars.name: r.HLOD.DitherPauseTime
cvars.description: HLOD dither pause time in seconds

cvars.name: r.HLOD.ForceDisableCastDynamicShadow
cvars.description: If non-zero, will set bCastDynamicShadow to false for all LODActors, regardless of the shadowing setting of their subactors.

cvars.name: r.HLOD.MaximumLevel
cvars.description: How far down the LOD hierarchy to allow showing (can be used to limit quality loss and streaming texture memory usage on high scalability settings) -1: No maximum level (default) 0: Prevent ever showing a HLOD cluster instead of individual meshes 1: Allow only the first level of HLOD clusters to be shown 2+: Allow up to the Nth level of HLOD clusters to be shown

cvars.name: r.HZB.BuildUseCompute
cvars.description: Selects whether HZB should be built with compute.

cvars.name: r.HZBOcclusion
cvars.description: Defines which occlusion system is used. 0: Hardware occlusion queries 1: Use HZB occlusion system (default, less GPU and CPU cost, more conservative results) 2: Force HZB occlusion system (overrides rendering platform preferences)

cvars.name: r.IESAtlas.Debug
cvars.description: Enable IES atlas debug information.

cvars.name: r.IESAtlas.ForceUpdate
cvars.description: Force IES atlas to update very frame.

cvars.name: r.IESAtlas.MaxProfileCount
cvars.description: The maximum number of IES profiles which can be stored.

cvars.name: r.IESAtlas.Resolution
cvars.description: Resolution for storing IES textures.

cvars.name: r.IgnorePerformanceModeCheck
cvars.description: Ignore performance mode check

cvars.name: r.IncludeNonVirtualTexturedLightmaps
cvars.description: If 'r.VirtualTexturedLightmaps' is enabled, controls whether non-VT lightmaps are generated/saved as well. Including non-VT lightmaps will constrain lightmap atlas size, which removes some of the benefit of VT lightmaps. 0: Not included. 1: Included.

cvars.name: r.IndirectLightingCache
cvars.description: Whether to use the indirect lighting cache on dynamic objects. 0 is off, 1 is on (default)

cvars.name: r.InstanceCulling.AllowBatchedBuildRenderingCommands
cvars.description: Whether to allow batching BuildRenderingCommands for GPU instance culling

cvars.name: r.InstanceCulling.AllowInstanceOrderPreservation
cvars.description: Whether or not to allow instances to preserve instance draw order using GPU compaction.

cvars.name: r.InstanceCulling.ForceInstanceCulling
cvars.description: Whether to force per instance occlusion culling.

cvars.name: r.InstanceCulling.OcclusionCull
cvars.description: Whether to do per instance occlusion culling for GPU instance culling.

cvars.name: r.InstanceCulling.OcclusionQueries
cvars.description: EXPERIMENTAL: Use per-instance software occlusion queries to perform less conservative visibility test than what's possible with HZB alone

cvars.name: r.InstanceData.MinInstanceCountToOptimize
cvars.description: Minimum number of instances to perform optimized build for (if enabled), can be used to disable optimized build for small ISMs as there is some overhead from doing so.

cvars.name: r.InstanceData.ResetTrackingOnRegister
cvars.description: Chicken switch to disable the new code to reset tracking & instance count during OnRegister, if this causes problems. TODO: Remove.

cvars.name: r.InstancedStaticMeshes.AllowCreateEmpty
cvars.description: Whether to allow creation of empty ISMS.

cvars.name: r.InstancedStaticMeshes.ConservativeBounds.Threshold
cvars.description: Number of instances in an ISM before we start using conservative bounds. Set to -1 to disable conservative bounds.

cvars.name: r.InstancedStaticMeshes.FetchInstanceCountFromScene
cvars.description: Enables the data path that allows instance count to be fetched from the Scene rather than the Mesh Draw Commands (MDCs), which removes the need to re-cache MDCs when instance count changes.

cvars.name: r.InstancedStaticMeshes.ForceRemoveAtSwap
cvars.description: Force the RemoveAtSwap optimization when removing instances from an ISM.

cvars.name: r.InstancedStaticMeshes.GpuLod
cvars.description: Whether to enable GPU LOD selection on InstancedStaticMesh.

cvars.name: r.InstanceUpdateTaskDebugDelay
cvars.description: Instance update debug delay in seconds.

cvars.name: r.IrisNormal
cvars.description: 0 to disable iris normal. 0: off 1: on

cvars.name: r.ISMPool.ComponentFreeListTargetSize
cvars.description: Target size for number of ISM components in the recycling free list.

cvars.name: r.ISMPool.ComponentKeepAlive
cvars.description: Keep ISM components alive when all their instances are removed.

cvars.name: r.ISMPool.ComponentRecycle
cvars.description: Recycle ISM components to a free list for reuse when all their instances are removed.

cvars.name: r.ISMPool.ShadowCopyCustomData
cvars.description: Keeps a copy of custom instance data so it can be restored if the instance is removed and readded.

cvars.name: r.KeepOverrideVertexColorsOnCPU
cvars.description: Keeps a CPU copy of override vertex colors. May be required for some blueprints / object spawning.

cvars.name: r.LandscapeLOD0DistributionScale
cvars.description: Multiplier for the landscape LOD0DistributionSetting property

cvars.name: r.LandscapeLODDistributionScale
cvars.description: Multiplier for the landscape LODDistributionSetting property

cvars.name: r.LandscapeUseAsyncTasksForLODComputation
cvars.description: Use async tasks for computing per-landscape component LOD biases.

cvars.name: r.LensFlareQuality
cvars.description: 0: off but best for performance 1: low quality with good performance 2: good quality (default) 3: very good quality but bad performance

cvars.name: r.LightCulling.MaxDistanceOverrideKilometers
cvars.description: Used to override the maximum far distance at which we can store data in the light grid. If this is increase, you might want to update r.Forward.LightGridSizeZ to a reasonable value according to your use case light count and distribution. <=0: off >0: the far distance in kilometers.

cvars.name: r.LightCulling.Quality
cvars.description: Whether to run compute light culling pass. 0: off 1: on (default)

cvars.name: r.LightFunctionAtlas
