cvars.description: Experimental: enable the light function atlas generation at runtime. The atlas will only be generated if other systems are using it at runtime.

cvars.name: r.LightFunctionAtlas.Format
cvars.description: 0: grey scale in [0,1]. 1: colored in [0,1]

cvars.name: r.LightFunctionAtlas.MaxLightCount
cvars.description: Experimental: Clamp the number of lights that can sample light function atlas. -1 means unlimited light count.

cvars.name: r.LightFunctionAtlas.Size
cvars.description: Experimental: The default size in atlas slot count of the edge of the 2D texture atlas.

cvars.name: r.LightFunctionAtlas.SlotResolution
cvars.description: Experimental: The resolution of each atlas slot.

cvars.name: r.LightFunctionQuality
cvars.description: Defines the light function quality which allows to adjust for quality or performance. <=0: off (fastest) 1: low quality (e.g. half res with blurring, not yet implemented) 2: normal quality (default) 3: high quality (e.g. super-sampled or colored, not yet implemented)

cvars.name: r.LightMaxDrawDistanceScale
cvars.description: Scale applied to the MaxDrawDistance of lights. Useful for fading out local lights more aggressively on some platforms.

cvars.name: r.LightShaftAllowTAA
cvars.description: Allows temporal filtering for lightshafts. 0: off 1: on (default)

cvars.name: r.LightShaftBlurPasses
cvars.description: Number of light shaft blur passes.

cvars.name: r.LightShaftDownSampleFactor
cvars.description: Downsample factor for light shafts. range: 1..8

cvars.name: r.LightShaftFirstPassDistance
cvars.description: Fraction of the distance to the light to blur on the first radial blur pass.

cvars.name: r.LightShaftNumSamples
cvars.description: Number of samples per light shaft radial blur pass. Also affects how quickly the blur distance increases with each pass.

cvars.name: r.LightShaftQuality
cvars.description: Defines the light shaft quality (mobile and non mobile). 0: off 1: on (default)

cvars.name: r.LightShaftRenderToSeparateTranslucency
cvars.description: If enabled, light shafts will be rendered to the separate translucency buffer. This ensures postprocess materials with BL_BeforeTranslucnecy are applied before light shafts

cvars.name: r.LimitRenderingFeatures
cvars.description: Allows to quickly reduce render feature to increase render performance. This is just a quick way to alter multiple show flags and console variables in the game Disabled more feature the higher the number <=0:off, order is defined in code (can be documented here when we settled on an order)

cvars.name: r.LODFadeTime
cvars.description: How long LOD takes to fade (in seconds).

cvars.name: r.LogShaderCompilerStats
cvars.description: When set to 1, Log detailed shader compiler stats.

cvars.name: r.LUT.Size
cvars.description: Size of film LUT

cvars.name: r.LUT.UpdateEveryFrame
cvars.description: Controls whether the tonemapping LUT pass is executed every frame.

cvars.name: r.MaxAnisotropy
cvars.description: MaxAnisotropy should range from 1 to 16. Higher values mean better texure quality when using anisotropic filtering but at a cost to performance. Default is 4.

cvars.name: r.MaxCSMRadiusToAllowPerObjectShadows
cvars.description: Only stationary lights with a CSM radius smaller than this will create per object shadows for dynamic objects.

cvars.name: r.MaxQualityMode
cvars.description: If set to 1, override certain system settings to highest quality regardless of performance impact

cvars.name: r.MaxVertexBytesAllocatedPerFrame
cvars.description: The maximum number of transient vertex buffer bytes to allocate before we start panic logging who is doing the allocations

cvars.name: r.MinRoughnessOverride
cvars.description: WARNING: This is an experimental feature that may change at any time. Sets a global limit for roughness when used in the direct lighting calculations. This can be used to limit the amount of fireflies caused by low roughness, in particular when AA is not in use. 0.0: no change (default)

cvars.name: r.MinScreenRadiusForCSMDepth
cvars.description: Threshold below which meshes will be culled from CSM depth pass.

cvars.name: r.MinScreenRadiusForDepthPrepass
cvars.description: Threshold below which meshes will be culled from depth only pass.

cvars.name: r.MinScreenRadiusForLights
cvars.description: Threshold below which lights will be culled.

cvars.name: r.MinYResolutionFor3DView
cvars.description: Defines the smallest Y resolution we want to support in the 3D view

cvars.name: r.MinYResolutionForUI
cvars.description: Defines the smallest Y resolution we want to support in the UI (default is 720)

cvars.name: r.MipMapLODBias
cvars.description: Apply additional mip map bias for all 2D textures, range of -15.0 to 15.0

cvars.name: r.MotionVectorSimulation
cvars.description: Controls whether to allow simulated motion vectors on scene components, geometry caches and skinned meshes on camera cut frames.

cvars.name: r.MrMesh.BrickCullingDebugState
cvars.description: MR Mesh brick culling debug state: 0=off, 1=on, 2=paused

cvars.name: r.MSAA.CompositingSampleCount
cvars.description: Affects the render quality of the editor 3d objects. 1: no MSAA, lowest quality 2: 2x MSAA, medium quality (medium GPU memory consumption) 4: 4x MSAA, high quality (high GPU memory consumption) 8: 8x MSAA, very high quality (insane GPU memory consumption)

cvars.name: r.MSAACount
cvars.description: Number of MSAA samples to use with the forward renderer. Only used when MSAA is enabled in the rendering project settings. 0: MSAA disabled (Temporal AA enabled) 1: MSAA disabled 2: Use 2x MSAA 4: Use 4x MSAA8: Use 8x MSAA

cvars.name: r.MultithreadedLightmapEncode
cvars.description: Lightmap encoding after rebuild lightmaps is done multithreaded.

cvars.name: r.MultithreadedShadowmapEncode
cvars.description: Shadowmap encoding after rebuild lightmaps is done multithreaded.

cvars.name: r.NeverOcclusionTestDistance
cvars.description: When the distance between the viewpoint and the bounding sphere center is less than this, never occlusion cull.

cvars.name: r.NormalCurvatureToRoughnessBias
cvars.description: Biases the roughness resulting from screen space normal changes for materials with NormalCurvatureToRoughness enabled. Valid range [-1, 1]

cvars.name: r.NormalCurvatureToRoughnessExponent
cvars.description: Exponent on the roughness resulting from screen space normal changes for materials with NormalCurvatureToRoughness enabled.

cvars.name: r.NormalCurvatureToRoughnessScale
cvars.description: Scales the roughness resulting from screen space normal changes for materials with NormalCurvatureToRoughness enabled. Valid range [0, 2]

cvars.name: r.NormalMapsForStaticLighting
cvars.description: Whether to allow any static lighting to use normal maps for lighting computations.

cvars.name: r.NumBufferedOcclusionQueries
cvars.description: Number of frames to buffer occlusion queries (including the current renderthread frame). More frames reduces the chance of stalling the CPU waiting for results, but increases out of date query artifacts.

cvars.name: r.NumFramesUnusedBeforeReleasingGlobalResourceBuffers
cvars.description: Number of frames after which unused global resource allocations will be discarded. Set 0 to ignore. (default=30)

cvars.name: r.OcclusionFeedback.Blending
cvars.description: 0: Opaque 1: Enable blending (default) 2: Enable pixel discard

cvars.name: r.OcclusionFeedback.Enable
cvars.description: Whether to enable occlusion system based on a rendering feedback. Currently works only with a mobile rendering

cvars.name: r.OcclusionQueryDispatchOrder
cvars.description: 0: Grouped queries before individual (default) 1: Individual queries before grouped

cvars.name: r.OIT.SortedPixels
cvars.description: Enable OIT rendering (project settings, can't be changed at runtime)

cvars.name: r.OIT.SortedPixels.Debug
cvars.description: Enable debug rendering for OIT. 1: Enable debug for std. translucency 2: Enable for separated translucency.

cvars.name: r.OIT.SortedPixels.Enable
cvars.description: Enable OIT rendering (runtime setting, selects shader permutation)

cvars.name: r.OIT.SortedPixels.MaxSampleCount
cvars.description: Max sample count.

cvars.name: r.OIT.SortedPixels.Method
cvars.description: Toggle OIT methods 0: Regular alpha-blending (i.e., no OIT) 1: MLAB

cvars.name: r.OIT.SortedPixels.PassType
cvars.description: Enable OIT rendering. 0: disable 1: enable OIT for std. translucency 2: enable OIT for separated translucency 3: enable for both std. and separated translucency (default)

cvars.name: r.OIT.SortedPixels.TransmittanceThreshold
cvars.description: Remove translucent rendering surfaces when the accumulated thransmittance is below this threshold

cvars.name: r.OIT.SortedTriangles
cvars.description: Enable per-instance triangle sorting to avoid invalid triangle ordering.

cvars.name: r.OIT.SortedTriangles.Debug
cvars.description: Enable per-instance triangle sorting debug rendering.

cvars.name: r.OIT.SortedTriangles.Pool
cvars.description: Enable index buffer pool allocation which reduce creation/deletion time by re-use buffers.

cvars.name: r.OIT.SortedTriangles.Pool.ReleaseFrameThreshold
cvars.description: Number of frame after which unused buffer are released.

cvars.name: r.OneFrameThreadLag
cvars.description: Whether to allow the rendering thread to lag one frame behind the game thread (0: disabled, otherwise enabled)

cvars.name: r.OpenGL.DisableTextureStreamingSupport
cvars.description: Disable support for texture streaming on OpenGL. 0 = Texture streaming will be used if device supports it [default] 1 = Texture streaming will be disabled.

cvars.name: r.OpenGL.ForceDXC
cvars.description: Forces DirectX Shader Compiler (DXC) to be used for all OpenGL shaders instead of hlslcc. 0: Disable 1: Force new compiler for all shaders (default)

cvars.name: r.OptimizedWPO.AffectNonNaniteShaderSelection
cvars.description: Whether the per primitive WPO flag should affect shader selection for non-nanite primitives. It increase the chance of selecting the position only depth VS at the cost of updating cached draw commands whenever the WPO flag changes.

cvars.name: r.Ortho.AllowNearPlaneCorrection
cvars.description: Orthographic near planes can be behind the camera position, which causes some issues with Unreal resolving lighting behind the camera position This CVar enables the Orthographic cameras globally to automatically update the camera location to match the NearPlane location, and force the pseudo camera position to be the replaced near plane location for the projection matrix calculation. This means Unreal can resolve lighting behind the camera correctly.

cvars.name: r.Ortho.AutoPlanes
cvars.description: Globally allow Ortho cameras to utilise the automatic Near/Far plane evaluations.

cvars.name: r.Ortho.AutoPlanes.ClampToMaxFPBuffer
cvars.description: When auto evaluating clip planes, determines whether 16bit depth scaling should be used.16bit scaling is advantageous for any depth downscaling that occurs (e.g. HZB downscaling uses 16 bit textures instead of 32).This feature will calculate the maximum depth scale needed based on the Unreal Unit (cm by default) to Pixel ratio.It assumes that we don't need 32bit depth range for smaller scenes, because most actors will be within a reasonable visible frustumHowever it does still scale up to a maximum of UE_OLD_WORLD_MAX which is the typical full range of the depth buffer, so larger scenes still work too.

cvars.name: r.Ortho.AutoPlanes.DepthScale
cvars.description: Allows the 16 bit depth scaling to be adjusted from the default +FP16 Max (66504.0f)This is useful if the far plane doesn't need to be as far away, so it will improve depth deltas

cvars.name: r.Ortho.AutoPlanes.ScaleIncrementingUnits
cvars.description: Select whether to scale the Near/Far plane Min/Max values as we increase in unit to pixel ratio (i.e. as we go from CM to M to KM)

cvars.name: r.Ortho.AutoPlanes.ShiftPlanes
cvars.description: Shifts the whole frustum in the Z direction.This can be useful if, for example you need the Near plane closer to the camera, at the reduction of the Far plane value (e.g. a horizontal 2.5D scene).

cvars.name: r.Ortho.CalculateDepthThicknessScaling
cvars.description: Whether to automatically derive the depth thickness test scale from the Near/FarPlane difference. 0: Disabled (use scaling specified by r.Ortho.DepthThicknessScale) 1: Enabled (default)

cvars.name: r.Ortho.CameraHeightAsViewTarget
cvars.description: Sets whether to use the camera height as a pseudo camera to view target. Primarily helps with VSM clipmap selection and avoids overcorrecting NearPlanes.

cvars.name: r.Ortho.Debug.ForceAllCamerasToOrtho
cvars.description: Debug Force all cameras in the scene to use Orthographic views

cvars.name: r.Ortho.Debug.ForceCameraFarPlane
cvars.description: Debug Force Ortho Far Plane when creating a new camera actor

cvars.name: r.Ortho.Debug.ForceCameraNearPlane
cvars.description: Debug Force Ortho Near Plane when creating a new camera actor

cvars.name: r.Ortho.Debug.ForceOrthoWidth
cvars.description: Debug Force Ortho Width when creating a new camera actor

cvars.name: r.Ortho.Debug.ForceUseAutoPlanes
cvars.description: Debug Force boolean for whether to use the automatic near and far plane evaluation

cvars.name: r.Ortho.DefaultUpdateNearClipPlane
cvars.description: Ortho near clip plane value to correct to when using ortho near clip correction

cvars.name: r.Ortho.DepthThicknessScale
cvars.description: Orthographic scene depth scales proportionally lower than perspective, typically on a scale of 1/100Use this value to tweak the scale of depth thickness testing values simultaneously across various screen trace passes

cvars.name: r.Ortho.EditorDebugClipPlaneScale
cvars.description: Only affects the editor ortho viewports in Lit modes. Set the scale to proportionally alter the near plane based on current Ortho width that is set. This changes when geometry clips in the scene as the Orthozoom is changed. Helpful for varying mesh sizes. Other light artefacts may appear when this value changes, this is unavoidable for now.

cvars.name: r.Ortho.VSM.ClipmapLODBias
cvars.description: LOD setting for adjusting the VSM first level from it's OrthoWidth based value.

cvars.name: r.Ortho.VSM.EstimateClipmapLevels
cvars.description: Enable/Disable calculating the FirstLevel VSM based on the current camera OrthoWidth

cvars.name: r.Ortho.VSM.ProjectViewOrigin
cvars.description: Enable/Disable moving the WorldOrigin of the VSM clipmaps to focus around the ViewTarget (if present)

cvars.name: r.Ortho.VSM.RayCastViewOrigin
cvars.description: Enable/Disable whether the ViewOrigin should be estimated with a raycast if the ViewTarget is not present (i.e. standalone camera)

cvars.name: r.OverrideShaderDebugDir
cvars.description: Override output location of shader debug files Empty: use default location Saved\ShaderDebugInfo.

cvars.name: r.Paper2D.DrawTwoSided
cvars.description: Draw sprites as two sided.

cvars.name: r.Paper2D.UsePrebuiltVertexBuffers
cvars.description: Draw sprites using prebuilt vertex buffers.

cvars.name: r.ParallelBasePass
cvars.description: Toggles parallel base pass rendering. Parallel rendering must be enabled for this to have an effect.

cvars.name: r.ParallelCmdListInheritBreadcrumbs
cvars.description: Whether to inherit breadcrumbs to parallel cmd lists

cvars.name: r.ParallelGatherNumPrimitivesPerPacket
cvars.description: Number of primitives per packet. Only used when r.Shadow.UseOctreeForCulling is disabled.

cvars.name: r.ParallelGatherShadowPrimitives
cvars.description: Toggles parallel Gather shadow primitives. 0 = off; 1 = on

cvars.name: r.ParallelGeometryCollectionBatchSize
cvars.description: The number of vertices per thread dispatch in a single collection.

cvars.name: r.ParallelInitDynamicShadows
cvars.description: Toggles parallel dynamic shadow initialization. 0 = off; 1 = on

cvars.name: r.ParallelPrePass
cvars.description: Toggles parallel zprepass rendering. Parallel rendering must be enabled for this to have an effect.

cvars.name: r.ParallelShadows
cvars.description: Toggles parallel shadow rendering. Parallel rendering must be enabled for this to have an effect.

cvars.name: r.ParallelShadowsNonWholeScene
cvars.description: Toggles parallel shadow rendering for non whole-scene shadows. r.ParallelShadows must be enabled for this to have an effect.

cvars.name: r.ParallelSingleLayerWaterPass
cvars.description: Toggles parallel single layer water pass rendering. Parallel rendering must be enabled for this to have an effect.

cvars.name: r.ParallelTranslucency
cvars.description: Toggles parallel translucency rendering. Parallel rendering must be enabled for this to have an effect.

cvars.name: r.ParallelVelocity
cvars.description: Toggles parallel velocity rendering. Parallel rendering must be enabled for this to have an effect.

cvars.name: r.ParticleLightQuality
cvars.description: 0: No lights. 1:Only simple lights. 2:Simple+HQ lights

cvars.name: r.ParticleLODBias
cvars.description: LOD bias for particle systems, default is 0

cvars.name: r.Photography.Available
cvars.description: (Read-only) If 1, the photography system is potentially available to the user. Otherwise, a functioning back-end is not available.

cvars.name: r.PrecomputedVisibilityWarning
cvars.description: If set to 1, a warning will be displayed when rendering a scene from a view point without precomputed visibility.

cvars.name: r.PreTileTextures
cvars.description: If set to 1, textures will be tiled during cook and are expected to be cooked at runtime

cvars.name: r.PreventInvalidMaterialConnections
cvars.description: Controls whether users can make connections in the material editor if the system determines that they may cause compile errors 0: Allow all connections 1: Prevent invalid connections

cvars.name: r.PrimitiveHasTileOffsetData
cvars.description: 1 to upload lower-precision tileoffset primitive data to gpu, 0 to use higher-precision double float.

cvars.name: r.PurgeEditorSceneDuringPIE
cvars.description: 0 to keep editor scene fully initialized during PIE (default) 1 to purge editor scene from memory during PIE and restore when the session finishes.

cvars.name: r.RenderCaptureDraws
cvars.description: Enable capturing of render capture texture for the next N draws

cvars.name: r.RenderCommandPipe.Cable
cvars.description: Whether to enable the Cable Render Command Pipe 0: off; 1: on (default)

cvars.name: r.RenderCommandPipe.NiagaraDynamicData
cvars.description: Whether to enable the NiagaraDynamicData Render Command Pipe 0: off; 1: on (default)

cvars.name: r.RenderCommandPipe.SkeletalMesh
cvars.description: Whether to enable the SkeletalMesh Render Command Pipe 0: off; 1: on (default)

cvars.name: r.RenderCommandPipeMode
cvars.description: Controls behavior of the main render thread command pipe. 0: Render commands are launched individually as tasks; 1: Render commands are enqueued into a render command pipe for the render thread only.; 2: Render commands are enqueued into a render command pipe for all declared pipes.;

cvars.name: r.RenderLastFrameInStreamingPause
cvars.description: If 1 the previous frame is displayed during streaming pause. If zero the screen is left black.

cvars.name: r.RenderTargetPoolMin
cvars.description: If the render target pool size (in MB) is below this number there is no deallocation of rendertargetsDefault is 200 MB.

cvars.name: r.RenderThreadTimeIncludesDependentWaits
cvars.description: 0: RT stat only includes non-idle time, 1: RT stat includes dependent waits (matching RenderThreadTime_CriticalPath)

cvars.name: r.RenderTimeFrozen
cvars.description: Allows to freeze time based effects in order to provide more deterministic render profiling. 0: off 1: on (Note: this also disables occlusion queries)

cvars.name: r.Roughness.Max
cvars.description: Allows quick material test by remapping the roughness at 1 to a new value (0..1), Only for non shipping built! 1: (default)

cvars.name: r.Roughness.Min
cvars.description: Allows quick material test by remapping the roughness at 0 to a new value (0..1), Only for non shipping built! 0: (default)

cvars.name: r.SafeStateLookup
cvars.description: Forces new-style safe state lookup for easy runtime perf comparison

cvars.name: r.SaveEXR.CompressionQuality
cvars.description: Defines how we save HDR screenshots in the EXR format. 0: no compression 1: default compression which can be slow (default)

cvars.name: r.ScreenPercentage
cvars.description: To render in lower resolution and upscale for better performance (combined up with the blenable post process setting). 70 is a good value for low aliasing and performance, can be verified with 'show TestImage' in percent, >0 and <=100, larger numbers are possible (supersampling) but the downsampling quality is improvable.<=0 compute the screen percentage is determined by r.ScreenPercentage.Default cvars.

cvars.name: r.ScreenPercentage.MaxResolution
cvars.description: Controls the absolute maximum number of rendered pixel before any upscaling such that doesn't go higher than the specified 16:9 resolution of this variable. For instance set this value to 1440 so that you are not rendering more than 2560x1440 = 3.6M pixels. This is useful to set this on PC in your project's DefaultEditor.ini so you are not rendering more pixel on PC in PIE that you would in average on console with your project specific dynamic resolution settings.

cvars.name: r.ScreenPercentage.MinResolution
cvars.description: Controls the absolute minimum number of rendered pixel.

cvars.name: r.ScreenshotDelegate
cvars.description: ScreenshotDelegates prevent processing of incoming screenshot request and break some features. This allows to disable them. Ideally we rework the delegate code to not make that needed. 0: off 1: delegates are on (default)

cvars.name: r.SecondaryScreenPercentage.GameViewport
cvars.description: Override secondary screen percentage for game viewport. 0: Compute secondary screen percentage = 100 / DPIScalefactor automaticaly (default); 1: override secondary screen percentage.

cvars.name: r.SelectiveBasePassOutputs
cvars.description: Enables shaders to only export to relevant rendertargets. 0: Export in all rendertargets. 1: Export only into relevant rendertarget.

cvars.name: r.SeparateTranslucency
cvars.description: Allows to disable the separate translucency feature (all translucency is rendered in separate RT and composited after DOF, if not specified otherwise in the material). 0: off (translucency is affected by depth of field) 1: on costs GPU performance and memory but keeps translucency unaffected by Depth of Field. (default)

cvars.name: r.SeparateTranslucencyScreenPercentage
cvars.description: Render separate translucency at this percentage of the full resolution. in percent, >0 and <=100, larger numbers are possible (supersampling).<0 is treated like 100.

cvars.name: r.SeparateTranslucencyUpsampleMode
cvars.description: Upsample method to use on separate translucency. These are only used when r.SeparateTranslucencyScreenPercentage is less than 100. 0: bilinear 1: Nearest-Depth Neighbor (only when r.SeparateTranslucencyScreenPercentage is 50)

cvars.name: r.SetRes
cvars.description: Set the display resolution for the current game view. Has no effect in the editor. e.g. 1280x720w for windowed 1920x1080f for fullscreen 1920x1080wf for windowed fullscreen

cvars.name: r.ShaderCodeLibrary.MaxShaderGroupSize
cvars.description: Max (uncompressed) size of a group of shaders to be compressed/decompressed together.If a group exceeds it, it will be evenly split into subgroups which strive to not exceed it. However, if a shader group is down to one shader and still exceeds the limit, the limit will be ignored.

cvars.name: r.ShaderCodeLibrary.MaxShaderPreloadWaitTime
cvars.description: If we wait on shader preloads longer than this amount of seconds, we will log it as a warning.

cvars.name: r.ShaderCodeLibrary.SeparateLoadingCache
cvars.description: if > 0, each shader code library has it's own loading cache.

cvars.name: r.ShaderCodeLibrary.VisualizeShaderUsage
cvars.description: If 1, a bitmap with the used shaders (for each shader library chunk) will be saved at the exit. Works in standalone games only.

cvars.name: r.ShowMaterialDrawEvents
cvars.description: Whether to emit a draw event around every mesh draw call with information about the assets used. Introduces severe CPU and GPU overhead when enabled, but useful for debugging.

cvars.name: r.ShowPrecomputedVisibilityCells
cvars.description: If not zero, draw all precomputed visibility cells.

cvars.name: r.ShowRelevantPrecomputedVisibilityCells
cvars.description: If not zero, draw relevant precomputed visibility cells only.

cvars.name: r.ShowShaderCompilerWarnings
cvars.description: When set to 1, will display all warnings.

cvars.name: r.SingleLayerWater.UsesLightFunctionAtlas
cvars.description: Enable sampling of the light function atlas on SingleLAyer Water mateirals.

cvars.name: r.SkinnedMesh.ReleasePreviousLODInfoOnInitialization
cvars.description: Whether to flush the render thread (incurring a game thread stall) and clean existing LOD info when re-initializating.

cvars.name: r.SkinnedMesh.UpdateBoundsNotifyStreamingRadiusChangeRatio
cvars.description: Update the streaming manager when the radius changes by more than this ratio since the last update. A negative value will disable the update.

cvars.name: r.SkipDrawOnPSOPrecaching
cvars.description: Skips mesh draw call when the PSO is still compiling (default 0).

cvars.name: r.SkipInvalidDXTDimensions
cvars.description: If set will skip over creating DXT textures that are smaller than 4x4 or other invalid dimensions.

cvars.name: r.SkipRedundantTransformUpdate
cvars.description: Skip updates UpdatePrimitiveTransform is called redundantly, if the proxy allows it.

cvars.name: r.StencilForLODDither
cvars.description: Whether to use stencil tests in the prepass, and depth-equal tests in the base pass to implement LOD dithering. If disabled, LOD dithering will be done through clip() instructions in the prepass and base pass, which disables EarlyZ. Forces a full prepass when enabled.

cvars.name: r.StencilLODMode
cvars.description: Specifies the dither LOD stencil mode. 0: Graphics pass. 1: Compute pass (on supported platforms). 2: Compute async pass (on supported platforms).

cvars.name: r.TrackCsvNamedEvents
cvars.description: Whether to record named events in the csv profiler

cvars.name: r.TriangleOrderOptimization
cvars.description: Controls the algorithm to use when optimizing the triangle order for the post-transform cache. 0: Use NVTriStrip (slower) 1: Use Forsyth algorithm (fastest)(default)2: No triangle order optimization. (least efficient, debugging purposes only)

cvars.name: r.UITextureLODBias
cvars.description: Extra LOD bias to apply to UI textures. (default=0)

cvars.name: r.UniformBufferPooling
cvars.description: If we pool object in RHICreateUniformBuffer to have less real API calls to create buffers 0: off (for debugging) 1: on (optimization)

cvars.name: r.UniformExpressionCacheAsyncUpdates
cvars.description: Whether to allow async updates of uniform expression caches.

cvars.name: r.Upscale.Panini.D
cvars.description: Allow and configure to apply a panini distortion to the rendered image. Values between 0 and 1 allow to fade the effect (lerp). Implementation from research paper Pannini: A New Projection for Rendering Wide Angle Perspective Images" 0: off (default) >0: enabled (requires an extra post processing pass if upsampling wasn't used - see r.ScreenPercentage) 1: Panini cylindrical stereographic projection"

cvars.name: r.Upscale.Panini.S
cvars.description: Panini projection's hard vertical compression factor. 0: no vertical compression factor (default) 1: Hard vertical compression

cvars.name: r.Upscale.Panini.ScreenFit
cvars.description: Panini projection screen fit effect factor (lerp). 0: fit vertically 1: fit horizontally (default)

cvars.name: r.Upscale.Quality
cvars.description: Defines the quality in which ScreenPercentage and WindowedFullscreen scales the 3d rendering. 0: Nearest filtering 1: Simple Bilinear 2: Directional blur with unsharp mask upsample. 3: 5-tap Catmull-Rom bicubic, approximating Lanczos 2. (default) 4: 13-tap Lanczos 3. 5: 36-tap Gaussian-filtered unsharp mask (very expensive, but good for extreme upsampling).

cvars.name: r.Upscale.Softness
cvars.description: Amount of sharpening for Gaussian Unsharp filter (r.UpscaleQuality=5). Reduce if ringing is visible 1: Normal sharpening (default) 0: No sharpening (pure Gaussian).

cvars.name: r.UseClusteredDeferredShading
cvars.description: Toggle use of clustered deferred shading for lights that support it. 0 is off (default), 1 is on (also required is SM5 to actually turn on).

cvars.name: r.UseFastDebugObjectDiscovery
cvars.description: Enable new optimised debug object discovery

cvars.name: r.UseLegacyMaintainYFOVViewMatrix
cvars.description: Whether to use the old way to compute perspective view matrices when the aspect ratio constraint is vertical

cvars.name: r.Velocity.EnableLandscapeGrass
cvars.description: Specify if you want to output velocity for the grass component for WPO. True (default) False

cvars.name: r.Velocity.EnableVertexDeformation
cvars.description: Enables materials with World Position Offset and/or World Displacement to output velocities during velocity pass even when the actor has not moved. 0=Off, 1=On, 2=Auto(Default). Auto setting is off if r.VelocityOutputPass=2, or else on. When r.VelocityOutputPass=2 this can incur a performance cost due to additional draw calls.

cvars.name: r.Velocity.ForceOutput
cvars.description: Force velocity output on all primitives. This can incur a performance cost unless r.VelocityOutputPass=1. But it can be useful for testing where velocity output isn't being enabled as expected. 0: Disabled (default) 1: Enabled

cvars.name: r.VelocityOutputPass
cvars.description: When to write velocity buffer. 0: Renders during the depth pass. This splits the depth pass into 2 phases: with and without velocity. 1: Renders during the regular base pass. This adds an extra GBuffer target during base pass rendering. 2: Renders after the regular base pass.

cvars.name: r.VelocityTest
cvars.description: Allows to enable some low level testing code for the velocity rendering (Affects object motion blur and TemporalAA). 0: off (default) 1: add random data to the buffer where we store skeletal mesh bone data to test if the code (good to test in PAUSED as well).

cvars.name: r.VertexDeformationOutputsVelocity
cvars.description: Deprecated CVar. Use r.Velocity.EnableVertexDeformation instead.

cvars.name: r.VertexFoggingForOpaque
cvars.description: Causes opaque materials to use per-vertex fogging, which costs less and integrates properly with MSAA. Only supported with forward shading.

cvars.name: r.ViewHasTileOffsetData
cvars.description: 1 to upload lower-precision tileoffset view data to gpu, 0 to use only higher-precision double float.

cvars.name: r.ViewRectUseScreenBottom
cvars.description: WARNING: This is an experimental, unsupported feature and does not work with all postprocesses (e.g DOF and DFAO) If enabled, the view rectangle will use the bottom left corner instead of top left

cvars.name: r.ViewTextureMipBias.Min
cvars.description: Automatic view mip bias's minimum value (default to -2).

cvars.name: r.ViewTextureMipBias.Offset
cvars.description: Automatic view mip bias's constant offset (default to -0.3).

cvars.name: r.VisualizeLightingOnProbes
cvars.description: Enables debug probes rendering to visualise diffuse/specular lighting (direct and indirect) on simple sphere scattered in the world. 0: disabled. 1: camera probes only. 2: world probes only. 3: camera and world probes.

cvars.name: r.VisualizeOccludedPrimitives
cvars.description: Draw boxes for all occluded primitives

cvars.name: r.VisualizeTexture.AllowBlinking
cvars.description: Whether to allow blinking when visualizing NaN or inf that can become irritating over time.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricLightmap.VisualizationMinScreenFraction
cvars.description: Minimum screen size of a volumetric lightmap visualization sphere

cvars.name: r.VolumetricLightmap.VisualizationRadiusScale
cvars.description: Scales the size of the spheres used to visualize volumetric lightmap samples.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricRenderTarget.MinimumDistanceKmToEnableReprojection
cvars.description: This is the distance in kilometer at which the cloud surface must be before we enable reprojection of the previous frame data. One could start with a value of 4km. This helps hide reprojection issues due to imperfect approximation of cloud depth as a single front surface, especially visible when flying through the cloud layer. It is not perfect but will help in lots of cases. The problem when using this method: clouds will look noisier when closer to that distance.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricRenderTarget.Mode
cvars.description: [0] trace quarter resolution + reconstruct at half resolution + upsample [1] trace half res + reconstruct full res + upsample [2] trace at quarter resolution + reconstruct full resolution (cannot intersect with opaque meshes and forces UpsamplingMode=2 [3] Cinematic mode with tracing done at full reoslution in render target so that clouds can also be applied on translucent.)

cvars.name: r.VolumetricRenderTarget.PreferAsyncCompute
cvars.description: Whether to prefer using async compute to generate volumetric cloud render targets.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricRenderTarget.ReprojectionBoxConstraint
cvars.description: Whether reprojected data should be constrained to the new incoming cloud data neighborhod value.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricRenderTarget.UpsamplingMode
cvars.description: Used in compositing volumetric RT over the scene. [0] bilinear [1] bilinear + jitter [2] nearest + depth test [3] bilinear + jitter + keep closest [4] bilaterial upsampling

cvars.name: r.VolumetricRenderTarget.UvNoiseSampleAcceptanceWeight
cvars.description: Used when r.VolumetricRenderTarget.UpsamplingMode is in a mode using jitter - this value control the acceptance of noisy cloud samples according to their similarities. A higher value means large differences will be less accepted for blending.

cvars.name: r.VSync
cvars.description: 0: VSync is disabled.(default) 1: VSync is enabled.

cvars.name: r.VSyncEditor
cvars.description: 0: VSync is disabled in editor.(default) 1: VSync is enabled in editor.

cvars.name: r.WarningOnRedundantTransformUpdate
cvars.description: Produce a warning when UpdatePrimitiveTransform is called redundantly.

cvars.name: r.WarnOfBadDrivers
cvars.description: Check the current GPU driver on engine startup, warn the user about issues and suggest a specific version. The driver denylist is used to check for bad drivers according to their release date and/or driver versions. 0: off 1: check the driver and display a pop-up message if the driver is denylisted (default)

cvars.name: r.WarpCulling
cvars.description: Enable Warp Culling optimization for platforms that support it. 0: Disable (default) 1: Enable

cvars.name: r.WideCustomResolve
cvars.description: Use a wide custom resolve filter when MSAA is enabled0: Disabled [hardware box filter]1: Wide (r=1.25, 12 samples)2: Wider (r=1.4, 16 samples)3: Widest (r=1.5, 20 samples)

cvars.name: r.WireframeCullThreshold
cvars.description: Threshold below which objects in ortho wireframe views will be culled.

cvars.name: r.XGEController.AvoidUsingLocalMachine
cvars.description: Whether XGE tasks should avoid running on the local machine (to reduce the oversubscription with local async and out-of-process work). 0: Do not avoid. Distributed tasks will be spawned on all available XGE agents. Can cause oversubscription on the initiator machine. 1: Avoid spawning tasks on the local (initiator) machine except when running a commandlet or -buildmachine is passed (default). 2: Avoid spawning tasks on the local (initiator) machine.

cvars.name: r.XGEController.Enabled
cvars.description: Enables or disables the use of XGE for various build tasks in the engine. 0: Local builds only. 1: Distribute builds using XGE (default).

cvars.name: r.XGEController.Timeout
cvars.description: The time, in seconds, to wait after all tasks have been completed before shutting down the controller. (default: 2 seconds).

cvars.name: r.XGEShaderCompile.MinBatchSize
cvars.description: This CVar is deprecated, please use r.ShaderCompiler.DistributedMinBatchSize

cvars.name: rContextMenu.PercentageMatchWeightMultiplier
cvars.description: A multiplier for how much weight to give something based on the percentage match it is

cvars.name: ref.AllowParallelCollection
cvars.description: Used to control parallel reference collection.

cvars.name: r.AmbientOcclusion.AsyncComputeBudget
cvars.description: Defines which level of EAsyncComputeBudget to use for balancing AsyncCompute work against Gfx work. Only matters if the compute version of SSAO is active (requires CS support, enabled by cvar, single pass, no normals) This is a low level developer tweak to get best performance on hardware that supports AsyncCompute. 0: least AsyncCompute 1: .. (default) 2: .. 3: .. 4: most AsyncCompute

cvars.name: r.AmbientOcclusion.Compute
cvars.description: If SSAO should use ComputeShader (not available on all platforms) or PixelShader. The [Async] Compute Shader version is WIP, not optimized, requires hardware support (not mobile/DX10/OpenGL3), does not use normals which allows it to run right after EarlyZPass (better performance when used with AyncCompute) AyncCompute is currently only functional on PS4. 0: PixelShader (default) 1: (WIP) Use ComputeShader if possible, otherwise fall back to '0' 2: (WIP) Use AsyncCompute if efficient, otherwise fall back to '1' 3: (WIP) Use AsyncCompute if possible, otherwise fall back to '1'

cvars.name: r.AmbientOcclusion.Compute.Smooth
cvars.description: Whether to smooth SSAO output when TAA is disabled

cvars.name: r.AmbientOcclusion.Denoiser
cvars.description: Choose the denoising algorithm. 0: Disabled; 1: Forces the default denoiser of the renderer; 2: GScreenSpaceDenoiser witch may be overriden by a third party plugin (default).

cvars.name: r.AmbientOcclusion.Denoiser.HistoryConvolution.KernelSpreadFactor
cvars.description: Multiplication factor applied on the kernel sample offset (default = 7).

cvars.name: r.AmbientOcclusion.Denoiser.HistoryConvolution.SampleCount
cvars.description: Number of samples to use for history post filter (default = 16).

cvars.name: r.AmbientOcclusion.Denoiser.KernelSpreadFactor
cvars.description: Spread factor of the preconvolution passes.

cvars.name: r.AmbientOcclusion.Denoiser.PreConvolution
cvars.description: Number of pre-convolution passes (default = 1).

cvars.name: r.AmbientOcclusion.Denoiser.ReconstructionSamples
cvars.description: Maximum number of samples for the reconstruction pass (default = 16).

cvars.name: r.AmbientOcclusion.Denoiser.TemporalAccumulation
cvars.description: Accumulates the samples over multiple frames.

cvars.name: r.AmbientOcclusion.DepthBoundsTest
cvars.description: Whether to use depth bounds test to cull distant pixels during AO pass. This option is only valid when pixel shader path is used (r.AmbientOcclusion.Compute=0), without upsampling.

cvars.name: r.AmbientOcclusion.FadeRadiusScale
cvars.description: Allows to scale the ambient occlusion fade radius (SSAO). 0.01:smallest .. 1.0:normal (default), <1:smaller, >1:larger

cvars.name: r.AmbientOcclusion.Method
cvars.description: Select between SSAO methods 0: SSAO (default) 1: GTAO

cvars.name: r.AmbientOcclusionLevels
cvars.description: Defines how many mip levels are using during the ambient occlusion calculation. This is useful when tweaking the algorithm. <0: decide based on the quality setting in the postprocess settings/volume and r.AmbientOcclusionMaxQuality (default) 0: none (disable AmbientOcclusion) 1: one 2: two (costs extra performance, soft addition) 3: three (larger radius cost less but can flicker)

cvars.name: r.AmbientOcclusionMaxQuality
cvars.description: Defines the max clamping value from the post process volume's quality level for ScreenSpace Ambient Occlusion 100: don't override quality level from the post process volume (default) 0..99: clamp down quality level from the post process volume to the maximum set by this cvar -100..0: Enforces a different quality (the absolute value) even if the postprocessvolume asks for a lower quality.

cvars.name: r.AmbientOcclusionMipLevelFactor
cvars.description: Controls mipmap level according to the SSAO step id 0: always look into the HZB mipmap level 0 (memory cache trashing) 0.5: sample count depends on post process settings (default) 1: Go into higher mipmap level (quality loss)

cvars.name: r.AmbientOcclusionRadiusScale
cvars.description: Allows to scale the ambient occlusion radius (SSAO). 0:off, 1.0:normal, <1:smaller, >1:larger

cvars.name: r.AmbientOcclusionStaticFraction
cvars.description: Allows to override the Ambient Occlusion Static Fraction (see post process volume). Fractions are between 0 and 1. <0: use default setting (default -1) 0: no effect on static lighting, 0 is free meaning no extra rendering pass 1: AO affects the stat lighting

cvars.name: r.AOApplyToStaticIndirect
cvars.description: Whether to apply DFAO as indirect shadowing even to static indirect sources (lightmaps + stationary skylight + reflection captures)

cvars.name: r.AOAsyncBuildQueue
cvars.description: Whether to asynchronously build distance field volume data from meshes.

cvars.name: r.AOAverageObjectsPerCullTile
cvars.description: Determines how much memory should be allocated in distance field object culling data structures. Too much = memory waste, too little = flickering due to buffer overflow.

cvars.name: r.AOComputeShaderNormalCalculation
cvars.description: Whether to use the compute shader version of the distance field normal computation.

cvars.name: r.AOGlobalDFClipmapDistanceExponent
cvars.description: Exponent used to derive each clipmap's size, together with r.AOInnerGlobalDFClipmapDistance.

cvars.name: r.AOGlobalDFResolution
cvars.description: Resolution of the global distance field. Higher values increase fidelity but also increase memory and composition cost.

cvars.name: r.AOGlobalDFStartDistance
cvars.description: World space distance along a cone trace to switch to using the global distance field instead of the object distance fields. This has to be large enough to hide the low res nature of the global distance field, but smaller values result in faster cone tracing.

cvars.name: r.AOGlobalDistanceField
cvars.description: Whether to use a global distance field to optimize occlusion cone traces. The global distance field is created by compositing object distance fields into clipmaps as the viewer moves through the level.

cvars.name: r.AOGlobalDistanceField.AverageCulledObjectsPerCell
cvars.description: Average expected number of objects per cull grid cell, used to preallocate memory for the cull grid.

cvars.name: r.AOGlobalDistanceField.DetailedNecessityCheck
cvars.description: Whether to perform detailed necessity check in FSceneRenderer::ShouldPrepareGlobalDistanceField().

cvars.name: r.AOGlobalDistanceField.FastCameraMode
cvars.description: Whether to update the Global SDF for fast camera movement - lower quality, faster updates so lighting can keep up with the camera.

cvars.name: r.AOGlobalDistanceField.ForceRecacheForStreaming
cvars.description: Useful for debugging or profiling full clipmap updates that happen when a clipmap is detected to have pending streaming.

cvars.name: r.AOGlobalDistanceField.Heightfield
cvars.description: Whether to voxelize Heightfield into the global distance field.

cvars.name: r.AOGlobalDistanceField.MinMeshSDFRadius
cvars.description: Meshes with a smaller world space radius than this are culled from the global SDF.

cvars.name: r.AOGlobalDistanceField.MinMeshSDFRadiusInVoxels
cvars.description: Meshes with a smaller radius than this number of voxels are culled from the global SDF.

cvars.name: r.AOGlobalDistanceField.MipFactor
cvars.description: Resolution divider for the mip map of a distance field clipmap.

cvars.name: r.AOGlobalDistanceField.NumClipmaps
cvars.description: Num clipmaps in the global distance field. Setting this to anything other than 4 is currently only supported by Lumen.

cvars.name: r.AOGlobalDistanceField.OccupancyRatio
cvars.description: Expected sparse global distacne field occupancy for the page atlas allocation. 0.25 means 25% - filled and 75% - empty.

cvars.name: r.AOGlobalDistanceField.RecacheClipmapsWithPendingStreaming
cvars.description: Whether to readback clipmaps cached with incomplete Mesh SDFs due to streaming and recache them on subsequent frames. Fixes innaccurate Global SDF around the camera after teleporting or loading a new level.

cvars.name: r.AOGlobalDistanceFieldCacheMostlyStaticSeparately
cvars.description: Whether to cache mostly static primitives separately from movable primitives, which reduces global DF update cost when a movable primitive is modified. Adds another 12Mb of volume textures.

cvars.name: r.AOGlobalDistanceFieldClipmapUpdatesPerFrame
cvars.description: How many clipmaps to update each frame. With values less than 2, the first clipmap is only updated every other frame, which can cause incorrect self occlusion during movement.

cvars.name: r.AOGlobalDistanceFieldForceFullUpdate
cvars.description: Whether to force full global distance field update every frame.

cvars.name: r.AOGlobalDistanceFieldForceUpdateOnce
cvars.description: Whether to force full global distance field once.

cvars.name: r.AOGlobalDistanceFieldPartialUpdates
cvars.description: Whether to allow partial updates of the global distance field. When profiling it's useful to disable this and get the worst case composition time that happens on camera cuts.

cvars.name: r.AOGlobalDistanceFieldRepresentHeightfields
cvars.description: Whether to put landscape in the global distance field. Changing this won't propagate until the global distance field gets recached (fly away and back).

cvars.name: r.AOGlobalDistanceFieldStaggeredUpdates
cvars.description: Whether to allow the larger clipmaps to be updated less frequently.

cvars.name: r.AOHistoryDistanceThreshold
cvars.description: World space distance threshold needed to discard last frame's DFAO results. Lower values reduce ghosting from characters when near a wall but increase flickering artifacts.

cvars.name: r.AOHistoryStabilityPass
cvars.description: Whether to gather stable results to fill in holes in the temporal reprojection. Adds some GPU cost but improves temporal stability with foliage.

cvars.name: r.AOHistoryWeight
cvars.description: Amount of last frame's AO to lerp into the final result. Higher values increase stability, lower values have less streaking under occluder movement.

cvars.name: r.AOMaxViewDistance
cvars.description: The maximum distance that AO will be computed at.

cvars.name: r.AOObjectDistanceField
cvars.description: Determines whether object distance fields are used to compute ambient occlusion. Only global distance field will be used when this option is disabled.

cvars.name: r.AOQuality
cvars.description: Defines the distance field AO method which allows to adjust for quality or performance. 0:off, 1:medium, 2:high (default)

cvars.name: r.AOSampleSet
cvars.description: 0 = Original set, 1 = Relaxed set

cvars.name: r.AOScatterTileCulling
cvars.description: Whether to use the rasterizer for binning occluder objects into screenspace tiles.

cvars.name: r.AOSpecularOcclusionMode
cvars.description: Determines how specular should be occluded by DFAO 0: Apply non-directional AO to specular. 1: (default) Intersect the reflection cone with the unoccluded cone produced by DFAO. This gives more accurate occlusion than 0, but can bring out DFAO sampling artifacts.

cvars.name: r.AOStepExponentScale
cvars.description: Exponent used to distribute AO samples along a cone direction.

cvars.name: r.AOUpdateGlobalDistanceField
cvars.description: Whether to update the global distance field, useful for debugging.

cvars.name: r.AOUseHistory
cvars.description: Whether to apply a temporal filter to the distance field AO, which reduces flickering but also adds trails when occluders are moving.

cvars.name: r.AOUseJitter
cvars.description: Whether to use 4x temporal supersampling with Screen Grid DFAO. When jitter is disabled, a shorter history can be used but there will be more spatial aliasing.

cvars.name: r.AOViewFadeDistanceScale
cvars.description: Distance over which AO will fade out as it approaches r.AOMaxViewDistance, as a fraction of r.AOMaxViewDistance.

cvars.name: r.ApproximateOcclusionQueries
cvars.description: Batch occlusion for a static and skeletal mesh even if there are movable.In general it's more beneficial to batch occlusion queires for all meshes

cvars.name: r.Android.DisableASTCSupport
cvars.description: Disable support for ASTC Texture compression if OpenGL driver supports it. (Android Only) 0 = ASTC texture compression will be used if driver supports it [default] 1 = ASTC texture compression will not be used.

cvars.name: r.Android.DisableOpenGLES31Support
cvars.description: Disable support for OpenGLES 3.1 API. (Android Only) 0 = OpenGLES 3.1 API will be used (providing device and project supports it) [default] 1 = OpenGLES 3.1 will be disabled, Vulkan will be used.

cvars.name: r.Android.DisableVulkanSM5Support
cvars.description: Disable support for vulkan API. (Android Only) 0 = Vulkan SM5 API will be used (providing device and project supports it) [default] 1 = Vulkan SM5 will be disabled, Vulkan or OpenGL fall back will be used.

cvars.name: r.Android.DisableVulkanSupport
cvars.description: Disable support for vulkan API. (Android Only) 0 = vulkan API will be used (providing device and project supports it) [default] 1 = vulkan will be disabled, opengl fall back will be used.

cvars.name: r.Android.OverrideExternalTextureSupport
cvars.description: Override external texture support for OpenGLES API. (Android Only) 0 = normal detection used [default] 1 = disable external texture support 2 = force ImageExternal100 (version #100 with GL_OES_EGL_image_external) 3 = force ImageExternal300 (version #300 with GL_OES_EGL_image_external) 4 = force ImageExternalESSL300 (version #300 with GL_OES_EGL_image_external_essl3)

cvars.name: r.AndroidDisableThreadedRendering
cvars.description: Sets whether or not to allow threaded rendering for a particular Android device profile. 0 = Allow threaded rendering [default] 1 = Disable creation of render thread on startup

cvars.name: r.AndroidDisableThreadedRenderingFirstLoad
cvars.description: Sets whether or not to allow threaded rendering for a particular Android device profile on the initial load. 0 = Allow threaded rendering on the initial load [default] 1 = Disable threaded rendering on the initial load

cvars.name: r.AsyncCacheMaterialUniformExpressions
cvars.description: Material uniform expression caching is offloaded to an async task.

cvars.name: r.AsyncCacheMeshDrawCommands
cvars.description: Mesh draw command caching is offloaded to an async task.

cvars.name: r.AsyncCreateLightPrimitiveInteractions
cvars.description: Light primitive interactions are created off the render thread in an async task.

cvars.name: r.AsyncPipelineCompile
cvars.description: 0 to Create PSOs at the moment they are requested 1 to Create Pipeline State Objects asynchronously(default) 2 to Create Only precompile PSOs asynchronously 3 to Create Only non-precompile PSOs asynchronously

cvars.name: r.AutoExposure.IgnoreMaterials
cvars.description: (Experimental) Whether to calculate auto exposure assuming every surface uses a perfectly diffuse white material. (default: false)

cvars.name: r.AutoExposure.LuminanceMethod
cvars.description: 0 - Uniform. 1 - NSTC. 2 - Rec709.

cvars.name: r.Bloom.ApplyLocalExposure
cvars.description: Whether to apply local exposure when calculating bloom, default: true

cvars.name: r.Bloom.AsyncCompute
cvars.description: Whether to run FFT bloom on async compute.

cvars.name: r.Bloom.CacheKernel
cvars.description: Whether to cache the kernel in spectral domain.

cvars.name: r.Bloom.ScreenPercentage
cvars.description: Controles the axis resolution of the FFT convolution for bloom.

cvars.name: r.Bloom.WarnKernelResolution
cvars.description: Whether to emit a warning when the resolution of the kernel is unecessary to high. 0: Disabled; 1: Emit the warning on consoles (default); 2: Emit the warning on all platforms;

cvars.name: r.BloomQuality
cvars.description: 0: off, no performance impact. 1: average quality, least performance impact. 2: average quality, least performance impact. 3: good quality. 4: good quality. 5: Best quality, most significant performance impact. (default) >5: force experimental higher quality on mobile (can be quite slow on some hardware)

cvars.name: r.BufferVisualizationDumpFrames
cvars.description: When screenshots or movies dumps are requested, also save out dumps of the current buffer visualization materials 0:off (default) 1:on

cvars.name: r.BufferVisualizationDumpFramesAsHDR
cvars.description: When saving out buffer visualization materials in a HDR capable format 0: Do not override default save format. 1: Force HDR format for buffer visualization materials.

cvars.name: r.BufferVisualizationOverviewTargets
cvars.description: Specify the list of post process materials that can be used in the buffer visualization overview. Put nothing between the commas to leave a gap. Choose from: BaseColor, CustomDepth, CustomStencil, FinalImage, ShadingModel, MaterialAO, Metallic, Opacity, Roughness, Anisotropy, SceneColor, SceneDepth, SeparateTranslucencyRGB, SeparateTranslucencyA, Specular, SubsurfaceColor, WorldNormal, WorldTangent, AmbientOcclusion, CustomDepthWorldUnits, SceneDepthWorldUnits, Velocity, PreTonemapHDRColor, PostTonemapHDRColor. For example: r.BufferVisualizationOverviewTargets = "BaseColor,Specular,SubsurfaceColor,WorldNormal,SeparateTranslucencyRGB,,,WorldTangent,SeparateTranslucencyA,,,Opacity,SceneDepth,Roughness,Metallic,ShadingModel,,SceneDepthWorldUnits,SceneColor,PreTonemapHDRColor,PostTonemapHDRColor"

cvars.name: r.BufferVisualizationTarget
cvars.description: When the viewport view-mode is set to 'Buffer Visualization', this command specifies which of the various channels to display. Values entered other than the allowed values shown below will be ignored. BaseColor CustomDepth CustomStencil FinalImage ShadingModel MaterialAO Metallic Opacity Roughness Anisotropy SceneColor SceneDepth SeparateTranslucencyRGB SeparateTranslucencyA Specular SubsurfaceColor WorldNormal WorldTangent AmbientOcclusion CustomDepthWorldUnits SceneDepthWorldUnits Velocity PreTonemapHDRColor PostTonemapHDRColor

cvars.name: r.Cache.DrawDirectionalShadowing
cvars.description: Whether to draw direct shadowing sample points as generated by Lightmass. 0 is off (default), 1 is on

cvars.name: r.Cache.DrawInterpolationPoints
cvars.description: Whether to draw positions that indirect lighting is interpolated at when they are updated, which are stored in the cache. Probably need 'r.CacheUpdateEveryFrame 1' as well to be useful, otherwise points will flicker as they update. 0 is off (default), 1 is on

cvars.name: r.Cache.DrawLightingSamples
cvars.description: Whether to draw indirect lighting sample points as generated by Lightmass. 0 is off (default), 1 is on

cvars.name: r.Cache.LightingCacheDimension
cvars.description: Dimensions of the lighting cache. This should be a multiple of r.LightingCacheMovableObjectAllocationSize for least waste.

cvars.name: r.Cache.LightingCacheMovableObjectAllocationSize
cvars.description: Resolution of the interpolation sample volume used to light a dynamic object. Values of 1 or 2 will result in a single interpolation sample per object which does not provide continuous lighting under movement, so interpolation is done over time. Values of 3 or more support the necessary padding to provide continuous results under movement.

cvars.name: r.Cache.LimitQuerySize
cvars.description: 0 is off, 1 is on (default)

cvars.name: r.Cache.QueryNodeLevel
cvars.description: Level of the lighting sample octree whose node's extents should be the target size for queries into the octree. Primitive blocks will be broken up into multiple octree queries if they are larger than this.0 is the root, 12 is the leaf level

cvars.name: r.Cache.ReduceSHRinging
cvars.description: Whether to modify indirect lighting cache SH samples to reduce ringing. 0 is off, 1 is on (default)

cvars.name: r.Cache.SampleTransitionSpeed
cvars.description: When using single sample lighting, controls the speed of the transition between two point samples (fade over time).

cvars.name: r.Cache.UpdateEveryFrame
cvars.description: Whether to update indirect lighting cache allocations every frame, even if they would have been cached. 0 is off (default), 1 is on

cvars.name: r.Cache.UpdatePrimsTaskEnabled
cvars.description: Enable threading for ILC primitive update. Will overlap with the rest the end of InitViews.

cvars.name: r.CalcLocalPlayerCachedLODDistanceFactor
cvars.description: Should we calculate a LOD Distance Factor based on the current FOV. Should not be necessary since LOD is already based on screen size.

cvars.name: r.CameraAnimation.LegacyPostProcessBlending
cvars.description: Blend camera animation post process settings under the main camera instead of over it

cvars.name: r.CameraCutTranslationThreshold
cvars.description: The maximum camera translation disatance in centimeters allowed between two frames before a camera cut is automatically inserted.

cvars.name: r.CameraShake.LegacyPostProcessBlending
cvars.description: Blend camera shake post process settings under the main camera instead of over it

cvars.name: r.CameraShakeDebug
cvars.description: Show extra debug info for camera shakes (requires showdebug CAMERA)

cvars.name: r.CameraShakeDebug.InfoRecordLimit
cvars.description: How many seconds to keep while recording camera shake debug info (defaults to 2 seconds)

cvars.name: r.CameraShakeDebug.LargeGraph
cvars.description: Draws larger graphs for camera shake debug info

cvars.name: r.CameraShakeDebug.Location
cvars.description: Whether to show camera shakes' location modifications (defaults to true)

cvars.name: r.CameraShakeDebug.Rotation
cvars.description: Whether to show camera shakes' rotation modifications (defaults to true)

cvars.name: r.CapsuleDirectShadows
cvars.description: Whether to allow capsule direct shadowing on skinned components with bCastCapsuleDirectShadow enabled.

cvars.name: r.CapsuleIndirectConeAngle
cvars.description: Light source angle used when the indirect shadow direction is derived from precomputed indirect lighting (no stationary skylight present)

cvars.name: r.CapsuleIndirectShadows
cvars.description: Whether to allow capsule indirect shadowing on skinned components with bCastCapsuleIndirectShadow enabled.

cvars.name: r.CapsuleMaxDirectOcclusionDistance
cvars.description: Maximum cast distance for direct shadows from capsules. This has a big impact on performance.

cvars.name: r.CapsuleMaxIndirectOcclusionDistance
cvars.description: Maximum cast distance for indirect shadows from capsules. This has a big impact on performance.

cvars.name: r.CapsuleMinSkyAngle
cvars.description: Minimum light source angle derived from the precomputed unoccluded sky vector (stationary skylight present)

cvars.name: r.CapsuleShadowFadeAngleFromVertical
cvars.description: Angle from vertical up to start fading out the indirect shadow, to avoid self shadowing artifacts.

cvars.name: r.CapsuleShadows
cvars.description: Whether to allow capsule shadowing on skinned components with bCastCapsuleDirectShadow or bCastCapsuleIndirectShadow enabled.

cvars.name: r.CapsuleShadowsFullResolution
cvars.description: Whether to compute capsule shadows at full resolution.

cvars.name: r.CapsuleSkyAngleScale
cvars.description: Scales the light source angle derived from the precomputed unoccluded sky vector (stationary skylight present)

cvars.name: r.CaptureNextDeferredShadingRendererFrame
cvars.description: 0 to capture the immideately next frame using e.g. RenderDoc or PIX. > 0: N frames delay < 0: disabled

cvars.name: r.CaptureNextSceneCullingUpdate
cvars.description: 0 to capture the immideately next frame using e.g. RenderDoc or PIX. > 0: N frames delay < 0: disabled

cvars.name: r.Color.Grading
cvars.description: Controls whether post process settings's color grading settings should be applied.

cvars.name: r.Color.Max
cvars.description: Allows to define where the value 1.0 in the color channels is mapped to after color grading. Value should be around 1, smaller values darken the highlights, larger values move more colors towards white, Default: 1

cvars.name: r.Color.Mid
cvars.description: Allows to define where the value 0.5 in the color channels is mapped to after color grading (This is similar to a gamma correction). Value should be around 0.5, smaller values darken the mid tones, larger values brighten the mid tones, Default: 0.5

cvars.name: r.Color.Min
cvars.description: Allows to define where the value 0 in the color channels is mapped to after color grading. The value should be around 0, positive: a gray scale is added to the darks, negative: more dark values become black, Default: 0

cvars.name: r.ContactShadows
cvars.description: 0: disabled. 1: enabled.

cvars.name: r.ContactShadows.Bend.OverrideSurfaceThickness
cvars.description: How thick the surface represented by a pixel is assumed to be when determining whether a ray intersects it.

cvars.name: r.ContactShadows.Intensity.FadeLength
cvars.description: Length of the fading interval from NonCastingIntensity to CastingIntensity. Only used when r.ContactShadows.Intensity.Mode=1

cvars.name: r.ContactShadows.Intensity.FadeStart
cvars.description: Depth value at which contact shadows starts fading from NonCastingIntensity to CastingIntensity. Only used when r.ContactShadows.Intensity.Mode=1

cvars.name: r.ContactShadows.Intensity.Mode
cvars.description: Control how contact shadow intensity is calculated: 0 - Respect bCastContactShadow flag on Primitive Component. 1 - Depth based approximation. 2 - Use Casting Intensity.

cvars.name: r.ContactShadows.NonShadowCastingIntensity
cvars.description: DEPRECATED. Please use the parameters on the Light Component directly instead.

cvars.name: r.ContactShadows.OverrideLength
cvars.description: Allows overriding the contact shadow length for all directional lights. Disabled when < 0. Should generally be left disabled outside of debugging.

cvars.name: r.ContactShadows.OverrideLengthInWS
cvars.description: Whether r.ContactShadows.OverrideLength is in world space units or in screen space units.

cvars.name: r.ContactShadows.OverrideNonShadowCastingIntensity
cvars.description: Allows overriding the contact shadow non casting intensity for all directional lights. Disabled when < 0. Should generally be left disabled outside of debugging.

cvars.name: r.ContactShadows.OverrideShadowCastingIntensity
cvars.description: Allows overriding the contact shadow casting intensity for all directional lights. Disabled when < 0. Should generally be left disabled outside of debugging.

cvars.name: r.ContactShadows.Standalone.Method
cvars.description: Technique to use to calculate Contact (Screen Space) Shadows: 0 - Stochastic Jittering. 1 - Bend Screen Space Shadows.

cvars.name: r.CustomDepth
cvars.description: 0: feature is disabled 1: feature is enabled, texture is created on demand 2: feature is enabled, texture is not released until required (should be the project setting if the feature should not stall) 3: feature is enabled, stencil writes are enabled, texture is not released until required (should be the project setting if the feature should not stall)

cvars.name: r.CustomDepth.Order
cvars.description: When CustomDepth (and CustomStencil) is getting rendered 0: Before Base Pass (Allows samping in DBuffer pass. Can be more efficient with AsyncCompute.) 1: After Base Pass 2: Default (Before Base Pass if DBuffer enabled.)

cvars.name: r.CustomDepthEnableFastClear
cvars.description: Enable HTile on the custom depth buffer (default:false).

cvars.name: r.CustomDepthTemporalAAJitter
cvars.description: If disabled the Engine will remove the TemporalAA Jitter from the Custom Depth Pass. Only has effect when TemporalAA is used.

cvars.name: r.CustomUnsafeZones
cvars.description: Allows you to set custom unsafe zones. Define them based on Portrait (P) or Landscape (L) for a device oriented 'upright'.Unsafe zones may be either fixed or free, depending on if they move along with the rotation of the device.Format is (P:fixed[x1, y1][width, height]), semicolon-separated for each custom unsafe zone. +Values add from 0, -Values subtract from Height or Width

cvars.name: r.D3D.CheckedForTypedUAVs
cvars.description: Whether to disallow usage of typed UAV loads, as they are unavailable in Windows 7 D3D 11.0. 0: Allow usage of typed UAV loads. 1: Disallow usage of typed UAV loads. (default)

cvars.name: r.D3D.ForceDXC
cvars.description: Forces DirectX Shader Compiler (DXC) to be used for all D3D shaders. Shaders compiled with this option are only compatible with D3D12. 0: Disable (default) 1: Force new compiler for all shaders

cvars.name: r.D3D12.AllowAsyncCompute
cvars.description: Allow usage of async compute

cvars.name: r.D3D12.AllowPayloadMerge
cvars.description: Whether to attempt to merge command lists into a single payload, saving perf. Mainly applies to QueueAsyncCommandListSubmit. (Default = 1)

cvars.name: r.D3D12.AutoAttachPIX
cvars.description: Automatically attach PIX on startup

cvars.name: r.D3D12.BreadCrumbs
cvars.description: Enable minimal overhead GPU Breadcrumbs to track the current GPU state and logs information what operations the GPU executed last.

cvars.name: r.D3D12.Depth24Bit
cvars.description: 0: Use 32-bit float depth buffer 1: Use 24-bit fixed point depth buffer(default)

cvars.name: r.D3D12.DiagnosticBufferExtraMemory
cvars.description: Extra allocated memory for diagnostic buffer

cvars.name: r.D3D12.DRED
cvars.description: Enable DRED GPU Crash debugging mode to track the current GPU state and logs information what operations the GPU executed last.Has GPU overhead but gives the most information on the current GPU state when it crashes or hangs.

cvars.name: r.D3D12.DXR.MinimumDriverVersionAMD
cvars.description: Sets the minimum driver version required to enable ray tracing on AMD GPUs.

cvars.name: r.D3D12.DXR.MinimumDriverVersionNVIDIA
cvars.description: Sets the minimum driver version required to enable ray tracing on NVIDIA GPUs.

cvars.name: r.D3D12.DXR.MinimumWindowsBuildVersion
cvars.description: Sets the minimum Windows build version required to enable ray tracing.

cvars.name: r.D3D12.EnableD3DDebug
cvars.description: 0 to disable d3ddebug layer (default) 1 to enable error logging (-d3ddebug) 2 to enable error & warning logging (-d3dlogwarnings) 3 to enable breaking on errors & warnings (-d3dbreakonwarning) 4 to enable CONTINUING on errors (-d3dcontinueonerrors)

cvars.name: r.D3D12.ExperimentalShaderModels
cvars.description: Controls whether D3D12 experimental shader models should be allowed. Not available in shipping builds. (default = 0).

cvars.name: r.D3D12.ExplicitDescriptorHeap.DeduplicateSamplers
cvars.description: Use an exhaustive search to deduplicate sampler descriptors when generating shader binding tables. Reduces sampler heap usage at the cost of some CPU time. (default = 1)

cvars.name: r.D3D12.ExplicitDescriptorHeap.ViewDescriptorHeapSize
cvars.description: Maximum number of descriptors per explicit view descriptor heap. (default = 250k, ~8MB per heap) Typical measured descriptor heap usage in large scenes is ~50k. An error is reported when this limit is reached and shader bindings for subsequent objects are skipped.

cvars.name: r.D3D12.GPUTimeFromTimestamps
cvars.description: Prefer timestamps instead of GetHardwareGPUFrameTime to compute GPU frame time

cvars.name: r.D3D12.GPUTimeout
cvars.description: 0: Disable GPU Timeout; use with care as it could freeze your PC! 1: Enable GPU Timeout; operation taking long on the GPU will fail(default)

cvars.name: r.D3D12.LightweightDRED
cvars.description: Enable Lightweight DRED GPU Crash debugging mode to track the current GPU state and logs information what operations the GPU executed last.Gives the basic information on the current GPU state when it crashes or hangs on all PC hardware.

cvars.name: r.D3D12.NvAfterMath
cvars.description: Enable NvAftermath to track the current GPU state and logs information what operations the GPU executed last. Only works on nVidia hardware and will dump GPU crashdumps as well.

cvars.name: r.D3D12.RayTracing.AllowCompaction
cvars.description: Whether to automatically perform compaction for static acceleration structures to save GPU memory. (default = 1)

cvars.name: r.D3D12.RayTracing.AllowSpecializedStateObjects
cvars.description: Whether to use specialized RTPSOs if they have been created. This is intended for performance testingand has no effect if r.D3D12.RayTracing.SpecializeStateObjects is 0. (default = 1)

cvars.name: r.D3D12.RayTracing.CacheShaderRecords
cvars.description: Automatically cache and re-use SBT hit group records. This significantly improves CPU performance in large scenes with many identical mesh instances. (default = 1) This mode assumes that contents of uniform buffers does not change during ray tracing resource binding.

cvars.name: r.D3D12.RayTracing.DebugForceBuildMode
cvars.description: Forces specific acceleration structure build mode (not runtime-tweakable). 0: Use build mode requested by high-level code (Default) 1: Force fast build mode 2: Force fast trace mode

cvars.name: r.D3D12.RayTracing.GPUValidation
cvars.description: Whether to perform validation of ray tracing geometry and other structures on the GPU. Requires Shader Model 6. (default = 0)

cvars.name: r.D3D12.RayTracing.MaxBatchedCompaction
cvars.description: Maximum of amount of compaction requests and rebuilds per frame. (default = 64)

cvars.name: r.D3D12.RayTracing.SpecializeStateObjects
cvars.description: Whether to create specialized unique ray tracing pipeline state objects for each ray generation shader. (default = 0) This option can produce more more efficient PSOs for the GPU at the cost of longer creation times and more memory. Requires DXR 1.1.

cvars.name: r.D3D12.SubmissionTimeout
cvars.description: The maximum time, in seconds, that a submitted GPU command list is allowed to take before the RHI reports a GPU hang

cvars.name: r.D3D12.UseAllowTearing
cvars.description: Enable new dxgi flip mode with d3d12

cvars.name: r.DBuffer
cvars.description: Enables DBuffer decal material blend modes. DBuffer decals are rendered before the base pass, allowing them to affect static lighting and skylighting correctly. When enabled, a full prepass will be forced which adds CPU / GPU cost. Several texture lookups will be done in the base pass to fetch the decal properties, which adds pixel work. 0: off 1: on (default)

cvars.name: r.Debug.DrawCurrentDebugTargetBoundingBox
cvars.description: Draw the bounding box of the currently selected debug target (Default: 1)

cvars.name: r.DebugActionZone.ActionRatio
cvars.description: The action zone ratio that will be returned by FDisplayMetrics::GetDisplayMetrics on platforms that don't have a defined safe zone (0..1) default: 1.0

cvars.name: r.DebugLightDiscardProp
cvars.description: [0,1]: Proportion of lights to discard for debug/performance profiling purposes.

cvars.name: r.DebugSafeZone.MaxDebugTextStringsPerActor
cvars.description: The maximum number of debug strings that can be attached to a given actor (<=0 : no limit)

cvars.name: r.DebugSafeZone.Mode
cvars.description: The safe zone visualization mode (0..2) 0: Disabled (default) 1: Show Title Safe Zone 2: Show Action Safe Zone

cvars.name: r.DebugSafeZone.OverlayAlpha
cvars.description: The alpha value of the safe zone overlay (0..1) default: 0.2

cvars.name: r.DebugSafeZone.TitleRatio
cvars.description: The safe zone ratio that will be returned by FDisplayMetrics::GetDisplayMetrics on platforms that don't have a defined safe zone (0..1) default: 1.0

cvars.name: r.Decal.FadeDurationScale
cvars.description: Scales the per decal fade durations. Lower values shortens lifetime and fade duration. Default is 1.0f.

cvars.name: r.Decal.FadeScreenSizeMult
cvars.description: Control the per decal fade screen size. Multiplies with the per-decal screen size fade threshold. Smaller means decals fade less aggressively.

cvars.name: r.Decal.NormalReprojectionEnabled
cvars.description: If true, normal reprojection from the previous frame is allowed in SceneTexture nodes on DBuffer decals, provided that motion in depth prepass is enabled as well (r.VelocityOutputPass=0). Otherwise the fallback is the normal extracted from the depth buffer.

cvars.name: r.Decal.NormalReprojectionThresholdHigh
cvars.description: When reading the normal from a SceneTexture node in a DBuffer decal shader, the normal is a mix of the geometry normal (extracted from the depth buffer) and the normal from the reprojected previous frame. When the dot product of the geometry and reprojected normal is below the r.Decal.NormalReprojectionThresholdLow, the geometry normal is used. When that value is above r.Decal.NormalReprojectionThresholdHigh, the reprojected normal is used. Otherwise it uses a lerp between them.

cvars.name: r.Decal.NormalReprojectionThresholdLow
cvars.description: When reading the normal from a SceneTexture node in a DBuffer decal shader, the normal is a mix of the geometry normal (extracted from the depth buffer) and the normal from the reprojected previous frame. When the dot product of the geometry and reprojected normal is below the r.Decal.NormalReprojectionThresholdLow, the geometry normal is used. When that value is above r.Decal.NormalReprojectionThresholdHigh, the reprojected normal is used. Otherwise it uses a lerp between them.

cvars.name: r.Decal.StencilSizeThreshold
cvars.description: Control a per decal stencil pass that allows to large (screen space) decals faster. It adds more overhead per decals so this <0: optimization is disabled 0: optimization is enabled no matter how small (screen space) the decal is 0..1: optimization is enabled, value defines the minimum size (screen space) to trigger the optimization (default 0.1)

cvars.name: r.Decal.Visibility.Multithreaded
cvars.description: Whether to build visible decal list using multithreading. 0=disabled, 1=enabled (default)

cvars.name: r.DecalDepthBias
cvars.description: Global depth bias used by mesh decals. Default is 0.005

cvars.name: r.DefaultBackBufferPixelFormat
cvars.description: Defines the default back buffer pixel format. 0: 8bit RGBA 1: 16bit RGBA 2: Float RGB 3: Float RGBA 4: 10bit RGB, 2bit Alpha

cvars.name: r.DefaultFeature.AmbientOcclusion
cvars.description: Engine default (project setting) for AmbientOcclusion is (postprocess volume/camera/game setting still can override) 0: off, sets AmbientOcclusionIntensity to 0 1: on (default)

cvars.name: r.DefaultFeature.AmbientOcclusionStaticFraction
cvars.description: Engine default (project setting) for AmbientOcclusion is (postprocess volume/camera/game setting still can override) 0: off, sets AmbientOcclusionStaticFraction to 0 1: on (default, costs extra pass, only useful if there is some baked lighting)

cvars.name: r.DefaultFeature.AutoExposure
cvars.description: Engine default (project setting) for AutoExposure is (postprocess volume/camera/game setting still can override) 0: off, sets AutoExposureMinBrightness and AutoExposureMaxBrightness to 1 1: on (default)

cvars.name: r.DefaultFeature.AutoExposure.Bias
cvars.description: Engine default (project setting) for AutoExposure Exposure Bias (postprocess volume/camera/game setting still can override)

cvars.name: r.DefaultFeature.AutoExposure.ExtendDefaultLuminanceRange
cvars.description: Whether the default values for AutoExposure should support an extended range of scene luminance. This also change the PostProcessSettings.Exposure.MinBrightness, MaxBrightness, HistogramLogMin and HisogramLogMax to be expressed in EV100 values instead of in Luminance and Log2 Luminance. 0: Legacy range (UE4 default) 1: Extended range (UE5 default)

cvars.name: r.DefaultFeature.AutoExposure.Method
cvars.description: Engine default (project setting) for AutoExposure Method (postprocess volume/camera/game setting still can override) 0: Histogram based (requires compute shader, default) 1: Basic AutoExposure

cvars.name: r.DefaultFeature.Bloom
cvars.description: Engine default (project setting) for Bloom is (postprocess volume/camera/game setting still can override) 0: off, set BloomIntensity to 0 1: on (default)

cvars.name: r.DefaultFeature.LensFlare
cvars.description: Engine default (project setting) for LensFlare is (postprocess volume/camera/game setting still can override) 0: off, sets LensFlareIntensity to 0 1: on (default)

cvars.name: r.DefaultFeature.LightUnits
cvars.description: Default units to use for point, spot and rect lights 0: unitless 1: candelas (default) 2: lumens

cvars.name: r.DefaultFeature.LocalExposure.HighlightContrastScale
cvars.description: Engine default (project setting) for Local Exposure Highlight Contrast (postprocess volume/camera/game setting still can override)

cvars.name: r.DefaultFeature.LocalExposure.ShadowContrastScale
cvars.description: Engine default (project setting) for Local Exposure Shadow Contrast (postprocess volume/camera/game setting still can override)

cvars.name: r.DefaultFeature.MotionBlur
cvars.description: Engine default (project setting) for MotionBlur is (postprocess volume/camera/game setting still can override) 0: off, sets MotionBlurAmount to 0 1: on (default)

cvars.name: r.DepthOfField.DepthBlur.Amount
cvars.description: This scale multiplier only affects the CircleDOF DepthBlur feature (value defines in how many km the radius goes to 50%). x: Multiply the existing Depth Blur Amount with x -x: Override the existing Depth Blur Amount with x (in km) 1: No adjustments (default)

cvars.name: r.DepthOfField.DepthBlur.ResolutionScale
cvars.description: This scale multiplier only affects the CircleDOF DepthBlur feature. It's a temporary hack. It lineary scale the DepthBlur by the resolution increase over 1920 (in width), does only affect resolution larger than that. Actual math: float Factor = max(ViewWidth / 1920 - 1, 0); DepthBlurRadius x= 1 + Factor x (CVar - 1) 1: No adjustments (default) x: if the resolution is 1920 there is no change, if 2x larger than 1920 it scale the radius by x

cvars.name: r.DepthOfField.DepthBlur.Scale
cvars.description: This scale multiplier only affects the CircleDOF DepthBlur feature. This is applied after r.DepthOfField.DepthBlur.ResolutionScale. 0: Disable Depth Blur x: Multiply the existing Depth Blur Radius with x -x: Override the existing Depth Blur Radius with x 1: No adjustments (default)

cvars.name: r.DepthOfField.MaxSize
cvars.description: Allows to clamp the gaussian depth of field radius (for better performance), default: 100

cvars.name: r.DepthOfField.NearBlurSizeThreshold
cvars.description: Sets the minimum near blur size before the effect is forcably disabled. Currently only affects Gaussian DOF. (default: 0.01)

cvars.name: r.DepthOfFieldQuality
cvars.description: Allows to adjust the depth of field quality. Currently only fully affects BokehDOF.
