GaussianDOF is either 0 for off, otherwise on. 0: Off 1: Low 2: high quality (default, adaptive, can be 4x slower) 3: very high quality, intended for non realtime cutscenes, CircleDOF only (slow) 4: extremely high quality, intended for non realtime cutscenes, CircleDOF only (very slow)

cvars.name: r.DOF.Gather.AccumulatorQuality
cvars.description: Controles the quality of the gathering accumulator.

cvars.name: r.DOF.Gather.EnableBokehSettings
cvars.description: Whether to applies bokeh settings on foreground and background gathering. 0: Disable; 1: Enable (default).

cvars.name: r.DOF.Gather.PostfilterMethod
cvars.description: Method to use to post filter a gather pass. 0: None; 1: Per RGB channel median 3x3 (default); 2: Per RGB channel max 3x3.

cvars.name: r.DOF.Gather.ResolutionDivisor
cvars.description: Selects the resolution divisor of the gather pass. 1: Do gathering pass at full resolution; 2: Do gathering pass at half resolution (default).

cvars.name: r.DOF.Gather.RingCount
cvars.description: Number of rings for gathering kernels [[3; 5]]. Default to 5.

cvars.name: r.DOF.Kernel.MaxBackgroundRadius
cvars.description: Maximum size of the background bluring radius in screen space (default=0.025).

cvars.name: r.DOF.Kernel.MaxForegroundRadius
cvars.description: Maximum size of the foreground bluring radius in screen space (default=0.025).

cvars.name: r.DOF.Recombine.EnableBokehSettings
cvars.description: Whether to applies bokeh settings on slight out of focus done in recombine pass. 0: Disable; 1: Enable (default).

cvars.name: r.DOF.Recombine.MinFullresBlurRadius
cvars.description: Minimal blurring radius used in full resolution pixel width to actually do DOF when slight out of focus is enabled (default = 0.1).

cvars.name: r.DOF.Recombine.Quality
cvars.description: Configures the quality of the recombine pass. 0: No slight out of focus; 1: Slight out of focus 24spp; 2: Slight out of focus 32spp (default).

cvars.name: r.DOF.Scatter.BackgroundCompositing
cvars.description: Compositing mode of the background hybrid scattering. 0: Disabled; 1: Additive; 2: Gather occlusion (default).

cvars.name: r.DOF.Scatter.EnableBokehSettings
cvars.description: Whether to enable bokeh settings on scattering. 0: Disable; 1: Enable (default).

cvars.name: r.DOF.Scatter.ForegroundCompositing
cvars.description: Compositing mode of the foreground hybrid scattering. 0: Disabled; 1: Additive (default).

cvars.name: r.DOF.Scatter.MaxSpriteRatio
cvars.description: Maximum ratio of scattered pixel quad as sprite, usefull to control DOF's scattering upperbound. 1 will allow to scatter 100% pixel quads, whereas 0.2 will only allow 20% (default = 0.1).

cvars.name: r.DOF.Scatter.MinCocRadius
cvars.description: Minimal Coc radius required to be scattered (default = 3).

cvars.name: r.DOF.Scatter.NeighborCompareMaxColor
cvars.description: Controles the linear color clamping upperbound applied before color of pixel and neighbors are compared. To low, and you may not scatter enough; to high you may scatter unnecessarily too much in highlights (Default: 10).

cvars.name: r.DOF.TemporalAAQuality
cvars.description: Quality of temporal AA pass done in DOF. 0: Faster but lower quality; 1: Higher quality pass (default).

cvars.name: r.DFDistanceScale
cvars.description: Factor to scale directional light property 'DistanceField Shadows Distance', clamped to [0.0001, 10000]. I.e.: DistanceFieldShadowsDistance *= r.DFDistanceScale. [0.0001,1): shorter distance 1: normal (default) (1,10000]: larger distance.)

cvars.name: r.DFFarTransitionScale
cvars.description: Use to modify the length of the far transition (fade out) of the distance field shadows. 1.0: (default) Calculate in the same way as other cascades.0.0: Disable fade out.

cvars.name: r.DFFullResolution
cvars.description: 1 = full resolution distance field shadowing, 0 = half resolution with bilateral upsample.

cvars.name: r.DFShadow.TwoSidedMeshDistanceBiasScale
cvars.description: Scale applied to distance bias when calculating distance field shadows of two sided meshes. This is useful to get tree shadows to match up with standard shadow mapping.

cvars.name: r.DFShadowAsyncCompute
cvars.description: Whether render distance field shadows using async compute if possible

cvars.name: r.DFShadowAverageObjectsPerCullTile
cvars.description: Determines how much memory should be allocated in distance field object culling data structures. Too much = memory waste, too little = flickering due to buffer overflow.

cvars.name: r.DFShadowCompactCulledObjects
cvars.description: Whether to compact culled object indices when using scattered tile culling. Note that each tile can only hold up to r.DFShadowAverageObjectsPerCullTile number of objects when compaction is not used.

cvars.name: r.DFShadowCullTileWorldSize
cvars.description: World space size of a tile used for culling for directional lights.

cvars.name: r.DFShadowQuality
cvars.description: Defines the distance field shadow method which allows to adjust for quality or performance. 0:off, 1:low (20 steps, no SSS), 2:medium (32 steps, no SSS), 3:high (64 steps, SSS, default)

cvars.name: r.DFShadowScatterTileCulling
cvars.description: Whether to use the rasterizer to scatter objects onto the tile grid for culling.

cvars.name: r.DistanceFieldAO
cvars.description: Whether the distance field AO feature is allowed, which is used to implement shadows of Movable sky lights from static meshes.

cvars.name: r.DistanceFieldAO.MultiView
cvars.description: Whether the distance field AO feature is allowed when rendering multiple views.

cvars.name: r.DistanceFieldAO.TraverseMips
cvars.description: Whether to traverse mips while tracing AO cones against object SDFs.

cvars.name: r.DistanceFields
cvars.description: Enables distance fields rendering. 0: Disabled. 1: Enabled.

cvars.name: r.DistanceFields.BlockAllocatorSizeInBricks
cvars.description: Allocation granularity of the distance field block allocator. Higher number may cause more memory wasted on padding but allocation may be faster.

cvars.name: r.DistanceFields.BrickAtlasMaxSizeZ
cvars.description: Target for maximum depth of the Mesh Distance Field atlas, in 8^3 bricks. 32 => 128 x 128 x 32 x 8^3 = 256Mb. Actual atlas size can go over since mip2 is always loaded.

cvars.name: r.DistanceFields.BrickAtlasSizeXYInBricks
cvars.description: Controls the allocation granularity of the atlas, which grows in Z.

cvars.name: r.DistanceFields.Debug.ForceNumMips
cvars.description: When set to > 0, overrides the requested number of mips for streaming. 1 = only lowest resolution mip loaded, 3 = all mips loaded. Mips will still be clamped by available space in the atlas.

cvars.name: r.DistanceFields.Debug.ResizeAtlasEveryFrame
cvars.description: Whether to resize the Distance Field atlas every frame, which is useful for debugging.

cvars.name: r.DistanceFields.DefaultVoxelDensity
cvars.description: Determines how the default scale of a mesh converts into distance field voxel dimensions. Changing this will cause all distance fields to be rebuilt. Large values can consume memory very quickly!

cvars.name: r.DistanceFields.DefragmentIndirectionAtlas
cvars.description: Whether to defragment the Distance Field indirection atlas when it requires resizing.

cvars.name: r.DistanceFields.LogAtlasStats
cvars.description: Set to 1 to dump atlas stats, set to 2 to dump atlas and SDF asset stats.

cvars.name: r.DistanceFields.MaxIndirectionAtlasSizeXYZ
cvars.description: Maximum size of indirection atlas texture

cvars.name: r.DistanceFields.MaxObjectBoundingRadius
cvars.description: Objects larger than this will not be included in the Mesh Distance Field scene, to improve performance.

cvars.name: r.DistanceFields.MaxPerMeshResolution
cvars.description: Highest resolution (in one dimension) allowed for a single static mesh asset, used to cap the memory usage of meshes with a large scale. Changing this will cause all distance fields to be rebuilt. Large values such as 512 can consume memory very quickly! (64Mb for one asset at 512)

cvars.name: r.DistanceFields.MinIndirectionAtlasSizeXYZ
cvars.description: Minimum size of indirection atlas texture

cvars.name: r.DistanceFields.OffsetDataStructure
cvars.description: Which data structure to store offset in, 0 - base, 1 - buffer, 2 - texture

cvars.name: r.DistanceFields.SupportEvenIfHardwareRayTracingSupported
cvars.description: Whether to support distance fields when hardware ray tracing is supported. Setting it to 0 will skip distance field overhead when hardware ray tracing is supported.

cvars.name: r.DistanceFields.SurfaceBiasExpand
cvars.description: Fraction of a Mesh SDF voxel to expand the surface during intersection. Expanding the surface improves representation quality, at the cost of over-occlusion.

cvars.name: r.DistanceFields.TextureUploadLimitKBytes
cvars.description: Max KB of distance field texture data to upload per frame from streaming requests.

cvars.name: r.DistanceFieldShadowing
cvars.description: Whether the distance field shadowing feature is allowed.

cvars.name: r.DiffuseColor.Max
cvars.description: Allows quick material test by remapping the diffuse color at 1 to a new value (0..1), Only for non shipping built! 1: (default)

cvars.name: r.DiffuseColor.Min
cvars.description: Allows quick material test by remapping the diffuse color at 1 to a new value (0..1), Only for non shipping built! 1: (default)

cvars.name: r.DiffuseIndirect.Denoiser
cvars.description: Denoising options (default = 1)

cvars.name: r.DiffuseIndirect.HalfRes
cvars.description: TODO(Guillaume)

cvars.name: r.DiffuseIndirect.RayPerPixel
cvars.description: TODO(Guillaume)

cvars.name: r.DiffuseIndirectForceCopyPass
cvars.description: Forces use of copy pass instead of dual source blend. (for debugging)

cvars.name: r.DiffuseIndirectOffUseDepthBoundsAO
cvars.description: Use depth bounds when we apply the AO when DiffuseIndirect is disabled.

cvars.name: r.DumpGPU.Buffer
cvars.description: Whether to dump buffer. 0: Ignores all buffers 1: Dump only buffers' descriptors 2: Dump buffers' descriptors and binaries (default)

cvars.name: r.DumpGPU.CameraCut
cvars.description: Whether to issue a camera cut on the first frame of the dump.

cvars.name: r.DumpGPU.ConsoleVariables
cvars.description: Whether to dump rendering console variables (enabled by default).

cvars.name: r.DumpGPU.Delay
cvars.description: Delay in seconds before dumping the frame.

cvars.name: r.DumpGPU.Directory
cvars.description: Directory to dump to.

cvars.name: r.DumpGPU.Draws
cvars.description: Whether to dump resource after each individual draw call (disabled by default).

cvars.name: r.DumpGPU.DumpOnScreenshotTest
cvars.description: Allows to filter the tree when using r.DumpGPU command, the pattern match is case sensitive.

cvars.name: r.DumpGPU.Explore
cvars.description: Whether to open file explorer to where the GPU dump on completion (enabled by default).

cvars.name: r.DumpGPU.FixedTickRate
cvars.description: Override the engine's tick rate to be fixed for every dumped frames (default=0).

cvars.name: r.DumpGPU.FrameCount
cvars.description: Number of consecutive frames to dump (default=1).

cvars.name: r.DumpGPU.Mask
cvars.description: Whether to include GPU mask in the name of each Pass (has no effect unless system has multiple GPUs).

cvars.name: r.DumpGPU.MaxStagingSize
cvars.description: Maximum size of stating resource in MB (default=64).

cvars.name: r.DumpGPU.PassParameters
cvars.description: Whether to dump the pass parameters.

cvars.name: r.DumpGPU.Root
cvars.description: Allows to filter the tree when using r.DumpGPU command, the pattern match is case sensitive.

cvars.name: r.DumpGPU.Screenshot
cvars.description: Whether to take a final screenshot.

cvars.name: r.DumpGPU.Stream
cvars.description: Asynchronously readback from GPU to disk. 0: Synchronously copy from GPU to disk with extra carefulness to avoid OOM (default); 1: Asynchronously copy from GPU to disk with dedicated staging resources pool. May run OOM. Please consider using r.DumpGPU.Root to minimise amount of passes to stream and r.Test.SecondaryUpscaleOverride to reduce resource size to minimise OOM and disk bandwidth bottleneck per frame.

cvars.name: r.DumpGPU.Test.EnableDiskWrite
cvars.description: Main switch whether any files should be written to disk, used for r.DumpGPU automation tests to not fill up workers' hard drive.

cvars.name: r.DumpGPU.Test.PrettifyResourceFileNames
cvars.description: Whether the resource file names should include resource name. May increase the likelyness of running into Windows' filepath limit.

cvars.name: r.DumpGPU.Texture
cvars.description: Whether to dump textures. 0: Ignores all textures 1: Dump only textures' descriptors 2: Dump textures' descriptors and binaries (default)

cvars.name: r.DumpGPU.Upload
cvars.description: Allows to upload the GPU dump automatically if set-up.

cvars.name: r.DumpGPU.Upload.CompressResources
cvars.description: Whether to compress resource binary. 0: Disabled (default) 1: Zlib 2: GZip

cvars.name: r.DumpGPU.Viewer.Visualize
cvars.description: Name of RDG output resource to automatically open in the dump viewer.

cvars.name: r.DynamicRes.ChangePercentageThreshold
cvars.description: Minimal increase percentage threshold to alow when changing resolution.

cvars.name: r.DynamicRes.DynamicFrameTime
cvars.description: Whether the r.DynamicRes.FrameTimeBudget should automatically increases when frame rate is bound by CPU.

cvars.name: r.DynamicRes.DynamicFrameTime.ErrorMarginPercent
cvars.description: How much headroom should be left between CPU and GPU.

cvars.name: r.DynamicRes.DynamicFrameTime.RoundUpToVSyncError
cvars.description: Error to use to round up the dynamic frame time to vsync boundaries (default=10%).

cvars.name: r.DynamicRes.DynamicFrameTime.Track
cvars.description: What to track to control the budget 0: Frametime (but can create feedback loop when GPU bound and VSync); 1: Threads time (default);

cvars.name: r.DynamicRes.FrameTimeBudget
cvars.description: Frame's time budget in milliseconds.

cvars.name: r.DynamicRes.FrameWeightExponent
cvars.description: Recursive weight of frame N-1 against frame N.

cvars.name: r.DynamicRes.GPUTimingMeasureMethod
cvars.description: Selects the method to use to measure GPU timings. 0: Same as stat unit (default); 1: Timestamp queries.

cvars.name: r.DynamicRes.HistorySize
cvars.description: Number of frames keept in the history.

cvars.name: r.DynamicRes.IncreaseAmortizationBlendFactor
cvars.description: Amortization blend factor when scale resolution back up to reduce resolution fraction oscillations.

cvars.name: r.DynamicRes.MaxConsecutiveOverBudgetGPUFrameCount
cvars.description: Maximum number of consecutive frames tolerated over GPU budget.

cvars.name: r.DynamicRes.MaxScreenPercentage
cvars.description: Maximal primary screen percentage. Importantly this setting controls the preallocated video memory needed by the renderer to render.

cvars.name: r.DynamicRes.MinResolutionChangePeriod
cvars.description: Minimal number of frames between resolution changes, important to avoid input sample position interferences in TAA upsample.

cvars.name: r.DynamicRes.MinScreenPercentage
cvars.description: Minimal primary screen percentage.

cvars.name: r.DynamicRes.OperationMode
cvars.description: Select the operation mode for dynamic resolution. 0: Disabled (default); 1: Enable according to the game user settings; 2: Enable regardless of the game user settings.

cvars.name: r.DynamicRes.OverBudgetGPUHeadRoomPercentage
cvars.description: Amount of GPU headroom needed from which the frame is considered over budget. This is for platform not supporting controllable tearing with VSync (in percent from r.DynamicRes.FrameTimeBudget).

cvars.name: r.DynamicRes.TargetedGPUHeadRoomPercentage
cvars.description: Targeted GPU headroom (in percent from r.DynamicRes.FrameTimeBudget).

cvars.name: r.DynamicRes.TestScreenPercentage
cvars.description: Forces the screen percentage to a particular value with dynamic res. 0: Disabled (default); > 0: Screen percentage is enabled.

cvars.name: r.DynamicRes.ThrottlingMaxScreenPercentage
cvars.description: Throttle the primary screen percentage allowed by the heuristic to this max value when enabled. This has no effect on preallocated video memory. This is for instance useful when the video game wants to trottle power consumption when inactive without resizing internal renderer's render targets (which can result in popping)

cvars.name: r.DynamicRes.UpperBoundQuantization
cvars.description: Quantization step count to use for upper bound screen percentage. If non-zero, rendertargets will be resized based on the dynamic resolution fraction, saving GPU time during clears and resolves. Only recommended for use with the transient allocator (on supported platforms) with a large transient texture cache (e.g RHI.TransientAllocator.TextureCacheSize=512)

cvars.name: r.EarlyInitDynamicShadows
cvars.description: Starts shadow culling tasks earlier in the frame.

cvars.name: r.EarlyZPass
cvars.description: Whether to use a depth only pass to initialize Z culling for the base pass. Cannot be changed at runtime. Note: also look at r.EarlyZPassMovable 0: off 1: good occluders only: not masked, and large on screen 2: all opaque (including masked) x: use built in heuristic (default is 3)

cvars.name: r.EarlyZPassOnlyMaterialMasking
cvars.description: Whether to compute materials' mask opacity only in early Z pass. Changing this setting requires restarting the editor. Note: Needs r.EarlyZPass == 2 && r.EarlyZPassMovable == 1

cvars.name: r.EarlyZSortMasked
cvars.description: Sort EarlyZ masked draws to the end of the draw order.

cvars.name: r.Editor.2DGridFade
cvars.description: Tweak to define the grid rendering in 2D viewports.

cvars.name: r.Editor.2DSnapFade
cvars.description: Tweak to define the grid rendering in 2D viewports.

cvars.name: r.Editor.2DSnapMin
cvars.description: Tweak to define the grid rendering in 2D viewports.

cvars.name: r.Editor.2DSnapScale
cvars.description: Tweak to define the grid rendering in 2D viewports.

cvars.name: r.Editor.3DGridFade
cvars.description: Tweak to define the grid rendering in 3D viewports.

cvars.name: r.Editor.3DSnapFade
cvars.description: Tweak to define the grid rendering in 3D viewports.

cvars.name: r.Editor.AlignedOrthoZoom
cvars.description: Only affects the editor ortho viewports. 0: Each ortho viewport zoom in defined by the viewport width 1: All ortho viewport zoom are locked to each other to allow axis lines to be aligned with each other.

cvars.name: r.Editor.ArcballDragLimit
cvars.description: For how long the arcball rotates until it switches to a screens space rotate, default of 1.0 equals the size of the arcball

cvars.name: r.Editor.ArcballSize
cvars.description: DEPRECRATED in 5.1)

cvars.name: r.Editor.HideLightStaticMobilityWhenStaticLightingDisabled
cvars.description: Hide Static mobility on Light components when project has Static Lighting disabled.

cvars.name: r.Editor.MaxNumInstancesDetails
cvars.description: Maximum number of instances shown in the details panel. Above this value, instances are hidden by default. < 0 : No maximum

cvars.name: r.Editor.NeverStartInPreviewMode
cvars.description: 0: Editor can start in preview mode, 1: Editor never starts in preview mode

cvars.name: r.Editor.NewLevelGrid
cvars.description: Wether to show the new editor level grid 0: off 1: Analytical Antialiasing 2: Texture based(default)

cvars.name: r.Editor.SkipSourceControlCheckForEditablePackages
cvars.description: Whether to skip the revision control status check for editable packages, 0: Disable (Default), 1: Enable

cvars.name: r.Editor.Viewport.HighDPI
cvars.description: Controls whether editor & PIE viewports can be displayed at high DPI.

cvars.name: r.Editor.Viewport.InvalidateEachSIEFrame
cvars.description: Invalidate the viewport on each frame when SIE is running. Disabling this cvar (setting to 0) may improve performance, but impact the ability to click on objects that are moving in the viewport.

cvars.name: r.Editor.Viewport.MaxRenderingResolution
cvars.description: Controls the absolute maximum number of rendered pixel in editor viewports.

cvars.name: r.Editor.Viewport.MinRenderingResolution
cvars.description: Controls the minimum number of rendered pixel by default in editor viewports.

cvars.name: r.Editor.Viewport.OverridePIEScreenPercentage
cvars.description: Apply editor viewports' default screen percentage settings to game viewport clients in PIE.

cvars.name: r.Editor.Viewport.ScreenPercentage
cvars.description: Controls the editor viewports' default screen percentage when using r.Editor.Viewport.ScreenPercentageMode=0.

cvars.name: r.Editor.Viewport.ScreenPercentageMode.Mobile
cvars.description: Controls the default screen percentage mode for realtime editor viewports using mobile renderer.

cvars.name: r.Editor.Viewport.ScreenPercentageMode.NonRealTime
cvars.description: Controls the default screen percentage mode for non-realtime editor viewports.

cvars.name: r.Editor.Viewport.ScreenPercentageMode.PathTracer
cvars.description: Controls the default screen percentage mode for path-traced viewports.

cvars.name: r.Editor.Viewport.ScreenPercentageMode.RealTime
cvars.description: Controls the default screen percentage mode for realtime editor viewports using desktop renderer.

cvars.name: r.Editor.Viewport.ScreenPercentageMode.VR
cvars.description: Controls the default screen percentage mode for VR editor viewports.

cvars.name: r.EmitMeshDrawEvents
cvars.description: Emits a GPU event around each drawing policy draw call. /nUseful for seeing stats about each draw call, however it greatly distorts total time and time per draw call.

cvars.name: r.Emitter.FastPoolEnable
cvars.description: Should we use fast pools for emitters. 0: Don't pool anything 1: Pool the emitters bro (default)

cvars.name: r.Emitter.FastPoolMaxFreeSize
cvars.description: Max free pool size to keep around without cleaning up.

cvars.name: r.Emitter.SkipRibbonSpawnInterp
cvars.description: Ignore velocity based offsets when interpolating. This prevents ribbon quads from overlapping eachother (default=1)

cvars.name: r.EmitterSpawnRateScale
cvars.description: A global scale upon the spawn rate of emitters. Emitters can choose to apply or ignore it via their bApplyGlobalSpawnRateScale property.

cvars.name: r.EnableAsyncComputeTranslucencyLightingVolumeClear
cvars.description: Whether to clear the translucency lighting volume using async compute.

cvars.name: r.EnableComputeBuildHZB
cvars.description: If zero, build HZB using graphics pipeline.

cvars.name: r.EnableDebugSpam_GetObjectPositionAndScale
cvars.description: Enables or disables debug log spam for a bug in FParticleSystemSceneProxy::GetObjectPositionAndScale()

cvars.name: r.EnableMorphTargets
cvars.description: Enable Morph Targets

cvars.name: r.EnableMultiGPUForkAndJoin
cvars.description: Whether to allow unused GPUs to speedup rendering by sharing work.

cvars.name: r.EnableStereoEmulation
cvars.description: Emulate stereo rendering

cvars.name: r.ExpandAllOcclusionTestedBBoxesAmount
cvars.description: Amount to expand all occlusion test bounds by.

cvars.name: r.ExpandNewlyOcclusionTestedBBoxesAmount
cvars.description: If we don't occlusion test a primitive for r.GFramesNotOcclusionTestedToExpandBBoxes frames, then we expand the BBox when we do occlusion test it for a few frames by this amount. See also r.FramesToExpandNewlyOcclusionTestedBBoxes, r.GFramesNotOcclusionTestedToExpandBBoxes.

cvars.name: r.ExposureOffset
cvars.description: For adjusting the exposure on top of post process settings and eye adaptation. 0: default

cvars.name: r.ExrReadAndProcessOnGPU
cvars.description: Allows reading of Large Uncompressed EXR files directly into Structured Buffer. and be processed on GPU

cvars.name: r.ExrReaderGPU.ForceTileDescBuffer
cvars.description: Calculates tile description and offsets on CPU and provides a Structured buffer. to be used to access tile description on GPU

cvars.name: r.ExrReaderGPU.UseUploadHeap
cvars.description: Utilizes upload heap and copies raw exr buffer asynchronously. Requires a restart of the engine.

cvars.name: r.EyeAdaptation.BlackHistogramBucketInfluence
cvars.description: This parameter controls how much weight to apply to completely dark 0.0 values in the exposure histogram. When set to 1.0, fully dark pixels will accumulate normally, whereas when set to 0.0 fully dark pixels will have no influence.

cvars.name: r.EyeAdaptation.ExponentialTransitionDistance
cvars.description: The auto exposure moves linearly, but when it gets ExponentialTransitionDistance F-stops away from the target exposure it switches to as slower exponential function.

cvars.name: r.EyeAdaptation.LensAttenuation
cvars.description: The camera lens attenuation (q). Set this number to 0.78 for lighting to be unitless (1.0cd/m^2 becomes 1.0 at EV100) or 0.65 to match previous versions (1.0cd/m^2 becomes 1.2 at EV100).

cvars.name: r.EyeAdaptation.MethodOverride
cvars.description: Override the camera metering method set in post processing volumes -2: override with custom settings (for testing Basic Mode) -1: no override 1: Auto Histogram-based 2: Auto Basic 3: Manual

cvars.name: r.EyeAdaptation.PreExposureOverride
cvars.description: Overide the scene pre-exposure by a custom value. = 0 : No override > 0 : Override PreExposure

cvars.name: r.EyeAdaptation.VisualizeDebugType
cvars.description: When enabling Show->Visualize->HDR (Eye Adaptation) is enabled, this flag controls the scene color. 0: Scene Color after tonemapping (default). 1: Histogram Debug

cvars.name: r.EyeAdaptationQuality
cvars.description: Defines the eye adaptation quality which allows to adjust for quality or performance. <=0: off (fastest) 1: low quality (e.g. non histogram based, not yet implemented) 2: normal quality (default) 3: high quality (e.g. screen position localized, not yet implemented)

cvars.name: r.FastBlurThreshold
cvars.description: Defines at what radius the Gaussian blur optimization kicks in (estimated 25% - 40% faster). The optimization uses slightly less memory and has a quality loss on smallblur radius. 0: use the optimization always (fastest, lowest quality) 3: use the optimization starting at a 3 pixel radius (quite fast) 7: use the optimization starting at a 7 pixel radius (default) >15: barely ever use the optimization (high quality)

cvars.name: r.FASTBuild.JobProcessor.MaxTimeWithPendingJobs
cvars.description: Specifies how much time in seconds we will wait to have the min amount of pending jobs. Past this time, the build will start anyways. Default = 10

cvars.name: r.FASTBuild.JobProcessor.MinBatchSize
cvars.description: Minimum number of shaders to compile with FASTBuild. Default = 100

cvars.name: r.FASTBuild.JobProcessor.SleepTimeBetweenActions
cvars.description: How much time the job processor thread should sleep between actions .

cvars.name: r.FASTBuildController.Enabled
cvars.description: Enables or disables the use of FASTBuild to build shaders. 0: Controller will not be used (shaders will be built locally or using other controllers). 1: Distribute builds using FASTBuild.

cvars.name: r.FASTBuildController.SendAllPossibleShaderDependencies
cvars.description: Send all possible dependencies of the shaders to the remote machines.0: Use dependencies array reported in the task structure. 1: Brute-force discover all possible dependencies.

cvars.name: r.FASTBuildController.SendSCWDebugSymbols
cvars.description: Enable when distributed shader compiler workers crash. 0: Do not send along debug information in FASTBuild. 1: Send along debug information in FASTBuild.

cvars.name: r.GlobalIllumination.Denoiser.HistoryConvolution.KernelSpreadFactor
cvars.description: Multiplication factor applied on the kernel sample offset (default=3).

cvars.name: r.GlobalIllumination.Denoiser.HistoryConvolution.SampleCount
cvars.description: Number of samples to use for history post filter (default = 1).

cvars.name: r.GlobalIllumination.Denoiser.PreConvolution
cvars.description: Number of pre-convolution passes (default = 1).

cvars.name: r.GlobalIllumination.Denoiser.ReconstructionSamples
cvars.description: Maximum number of samples for the reconstruction pass (default = 16).

cvars.name: r.GlobalIllumination.Denoiser.TemporalAccumulation
cvars.description: Accumulates the samples over multiple frames.

cvars.name: r.gpucrash.collectionenable
cvars.description: Stores GPU crash data from scoped events when a applicable crash debugging system is available.

cvars.name: r.gpucrash.datadepth
cvars.description: Limits the amount of marker scope depth we record for GPU crash debugging to the given scope depth.

cvars.name: r.GPUCrashDebugging
cvars.description: Enable vendor specific GPU crash analysis tools

cvars.name: r.GPUCrashDebugging.Aftermath.Callstack
cvars.description: Enable callstack capture in Aftermath dumps

cvars.name: r.GPUCrashDebugging.Aftermath.Markers
cvars.description: Enable draw event markers in Aftermath dumps

cvars.name: r.GPUCrashDebugging.Aftermath.ResourceTracking
cvars.description: Enable resource tracking for Aftermath dumps

cvars.name: r.GPUCrashDebugging.Aftermath.TrackAll
cvars.description: Enable maximum tracking for Aftermath dumps

cvars.name: r.GPUCrashDump
cvars.description: Enable vendor specific GPU crash dumps

cvars.name: r.GPUCrashOnOutOfMemory
cvars.description: Enable crash reporting on GPU OOM

cvars.name: r.GPUCsvStatsEnabled
cvars.description: Enables or disables GPU stat recording to CSVs

cvars.name: r.GPUDefrag.AllowOverlappedMoves
cvars.description: Allows defrag relocations that partially overlap themselves.

cvars.name: r.GPUDefrag.EnableTimeLimits
cvars.description: Limits CPU time spent doing GPU defragmentation.

cvars.name: r.GPUDefrag.MaxRelocations
cvars.description: Limits the number of total relocations in a frame regardless of number of bytes moved..

cvars.name: r.GPUMessage.LogAllMessages
cvars.description: Log all messages to the console. 0: Disabled 1: Enabled

cvars.name: r.GPUMessage.MaxBufferSize
cvars.description: Specifies the maximum size of the GPU message buffer, in KiB. default: 64

cvars.name: r.GPUParticle.FixDeltaSeconds
cvars.description: GPU particle fix delta seconds.

cvars.name: r.GPUParticle.FixTolerance
cvars.description: Delta second tolerance before switching to a fix delta seconds.

cvars.name: r.GPUParticle.MaxNumIterations
cvars.description: Max number of iteration when using a fix delta seconds.

cvars.name: r.GPUParticle.Simulate
cvars.description: Enable or disable GPU particle simulation

cvars.name: r.GpuProfilerMaxEventBufferSizeKB
cvars.description: Size of the scratch buffer in kB.

cvars.name: r.GPUScene.DebugDrawRange
cvars.description: Maximum distance the to draw instance bounds, the default is -1.0 <=> infinite range.

cvars.name: r.GPUScene.DebugMode
cvars.description: Debug Rendering Mode: 0 - (show nothing, decault) 1 - Draw All 2 - Draw Selected (in the editor) 3 - Draw Updated (updated this frame) You can use r.GPUScene.DebugDrawRange to limit the range

cvars.name: r.GPUScene.MaxPooledUploadBufferSize
cvars.description: Maximum size of GPU Scene upload buffer size to pool.

cvars.name: r.GPUScene.UploadEveryFrame
cvars.description: Whether to upload the entire scene's primitive data every frame. Useful for debugging.

cvars.name: r.GPUScene.UseGrowOnlyAllocationPolicy
cvars.description: Deprecated 5.3. If set to 1 the allocators used for GPU-scene instances and similar will use a grow-only allocation policy to mimic the behavior in 5.2 and earlier. Disabled by default, which means that the buffers can shrink as well as grow.

cvars.name: r.GPUSkin.AlwaysUseDeformerForUnlimitedBoneInfluences
cvars.description: Any meshes using Unlimited Bone Influences will always be rendered with a Mesh Deformer. This reduces the number of shader permutations needed for skeletal mesh materials, saving memory at the cost of performance. Has no effect if either Unlimited Bone Influences or Deformer Graph is disabled. Cannot be changed at runtime.

cvars.name: r.GPUSkin.CopyBones.ISPC
cvars.description: Whether to use ISPC optimizations when copying bones for GPU skinning

cvars.name: r.GPUSkin.Limit2BoneInfluences
cvars.description: Whether to use 2 bones influence instead of default 4/8 for GPU skinning. Cannot be changed at runtime.

cvars.name: r.GpuSkin.Pool
cvars.description: Should we pool gpu skins. 0: Don't pool anything 1: Pool gpu skins bro (default)

cvars.name: r.GPUSkin.Support16BitBoneIndex
cvars.description: If enabled, a new mesh imported will use 8 bit (if <=256 bones) or 16 bit (if > 256 bones) bone indices for rendering.

cvars.name: r.GPUSkin.UnlimitedBoneInfluences
cvars.description: Whether to use unlimited bone influences instead of default 4/8 for GPU skinning. Cannot be changed at runtime.

cvars.name: r.GPUSkin.UnlimitedBoneInfluencesThreshold
cvars.description: Unlimited Bone Influences Threshold to use unlimited bone influences buffer if r.GPUSkin.UnlimitedBoneInfluences is enabled. Should be unsigned int. Cannot be changed at runtime.

cvars.name: r.GPUStatsChildTimesIncluded
cvars.description: If this is enabled, the child stat timings will be included in their parents' times. This presents problems for non-hierarchical stats if we're expecting them to add up to the total GPU time, so we probably want this disabled.

cvars.name: r.GPUStatsEnabled
cvars.description: Enables or disables GPU stat recording

cvars.name: r.GPUStatsMaxQueriesPerFrame
cvars.description: Limits the number of timestamps allocated per frame. -1 = no limit

cvars.name: r.GPUTracingStatsEnabled
cvars.description: Enables or disables GPU stat recording to tracing profiler

cvars.name: r.GTAO.Combined
cvars.description: Enable Spatial Filter for GTAO 0: Off 1: On (default)

cvars.name: r.GTAO.Downsample
cvars.description: Perform GTAO at Halfres 0: Off 1: On (default)

cvars.name: r.GTAO.FalloffEnd
cvars.description: Distance at when the occlusion completes the fall off.

cvars.name: r.GTAO.FalloffStartRatio
cvars.description: Ratio of the r.GTAO.FalloffEnd value at which it starts to fall off. Must be Between 0 and 1.

cvars.name: r.GTAO.FilterWidth
cvars.description: Size of the noise pattern and filter width 5: 5x5 Pattern (default) 4: 4x4 Pattern

cvars.name: r.GTAO.NumAngles
cvars.description: How Many Angles we choose per pixel Must be Between 1 and 16.

cvars.name: r.GTAO.PauseJitter
cvars.description: Whether to pause Jitter when Temporal filter is off

cvars.name: r.GTAO.SpatialFilter
cvars.description: Enable Spatial Filter for GTAO 0: Off 1: On (default)

cvars.name: r.GTAO.TemporalFilter
cvars.description: Enable Temporal Filter for GTAO 0: Off 1: On (default)

cvars.name: r.GTAO.ThicknessBlend
cvars.description: A heuristic to bias occlusion for thin or thick objects. 0 : Off >0 : On - Bigger values lead to reduced occlusion 0.5: On (default)

cvars.name: r.GTAO.Upsample
cvars.description: Enable Simple or Depth aware upsample filter for GTAO 0: Simple 1: DepthAware (default)

cvars.name: r.GTAO.UseNormals
cvars.description: Whether to use GBuffer Normals or Depth Derived normals 0: Off 1: On (default)

cvars.name: r.GTSyncType
cvars.description: Determines how the game thread syncs with the render thread, RHI thread and GPU. Syncing to the GPU swap chain flip allows for lower frame latency. 0 - Sync the game thread with the render thread (default). 1 - Sync the game thread with the RHI thread. 2 - Sync the game thread with the GPU swap chain flip (only on supported platforms).

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Binding
cvars.description: Enable/Disable hair binding, i.e., hair attached to skeletal meshes.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Cards
cvars.description: Enable/Disable hair cards rendering. This variable needs to be turned on when the engine starts.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Components.GlobalScattering
cvars.description: Enable/disable hair BSDF component global scattering

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Components.LocalScattering
cvars.description: Enable/disable hair BSDF component local scattering

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Components.R
cvars.description: Enable/disable hair BSDF component R

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Components.TRT
cvars.description: Enable/disable hair BSDF component TRT

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Components.TT
cvars.description: Enable/disable hair BSDF component TT

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Components.TTModel
cvars.description: Select hair TT model

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.ComposeAfterTranslucency
cvars.description: 0: Compose hair before translucent objects. 1: Compose hair after translucent objects, but before separate translucent objects. 2: Compose hair after all/seperate translucent objects, 3: Compose hair after translucent objects but before translucent render after DOF (which allows depth testing against hair depth)

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.ContinuousDecimationReordering
cvars.description: Enable strand reordering to allow Continuous LOD. Experimental

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.DeepShadow.AABBScale
cvars.description: Scaling value for loosing/tighting deep shadow bounding volume

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.DeepShadow.DebugDOMIndex
cvars.description: Index of the DOM texture to draw

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.DeepShadow.DebugDOMScale
cvars.description: Scaling value for the DeepOpacityMap when drawing the deep shadow stats

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.DeepShadow.DebugMode
cvars.description: Color debug mode for deep shadow

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.DeepShadow.DensityScale
cvars.description: Set density scale for compensating the lack of hair fiber in an asset

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.DeepShadow.DepthBiasScale
cvars.description: Set depth bias scale for transmittance computation

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.DeepShadow.GPUDriven
cvars.description: Enable deep shadow to be driven by GPU bounding box, rather CPU ones. This allows more robust behavior

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.DeepShadow.InjectVoxelDepth
cvars.description: Inject voxel content to generate the deep shadow map instead of rasterizing groom. This is an experimental path

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.DeepShadow.KernelAperture
cvars.description: Set the aperture angle, in degree, used by the kernel for evaluating the hair transmittance when using PCSS kernel

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.DeepShadow.KernelType
cvars.description: Set the type of kernel used for evaluating hair transmittance, 0:linear, 1:PCF_2x2, 2: PCF_6x4, 3:PCSS, 4:PCF_6x6_Accurate

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.DeepShadow.MaxFrustumAngle
cvars.description: Max deep shadow frustum angle to avoid strong deformation. Default:90

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.DeepShadow.MinResolution
cvars.description: Minimum shadow resolution for shadow atlas tiles for Deep Opacity Map rendering. (default = 64)

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.DeepShadow.MipTraversal
cvars.description: Evaluate transmittance using mip-map traversal (faster).

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.DeepShadow.RandomType
cvars.description: Change how traversal jittering is initialized. Valid value are 0, 1, and 2. Each type makes different type of tradeoff.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.DeepShadow.Resolution
cvars.description: Shadow resolution for Deep Opacity Map rendering. (default = 2048)

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.DeepShadow.ShadowMaskKernelType
cvars.description: Set the kernel type for filtering shadow cast by hair on opaque geometry (0:2x2, 1:4x4, 2:Gaussian8, 3:Gaussian16, 4:Gaussian8 with transmittance. Default is 4

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.DeepShadow.ShadowMaskPassType
cvars.description: Change how shadow mask from hair onto opaque geometry is generated. 0: one pass per hair group, 1: one pass for all groups.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.DeepShadow.SuperSampling
cvars.description: Evaluate transmittance with supersampling. This is expensive and intended to be used only in cine mode.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.DOFDepth
cvars.description: Compose hair with DOF by lerping hair depth based on its opacity.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.DualScatteringRoughness
cvars.description: Override all roughness for the dual scattering evaluation. 0 means no override. Default:0

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Enable
cvars.description: Enable/Disable the entire hair strands system. This affects all geometric representations (i.e., strands, cards, and meshes).

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.HairLUT.AbsorptionCount
cvars.description: Change the number of slices of the hair LUT for the absorption axis

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.HairLUT.IncidentAngleCount
cvars.description: Change the number of slices of the hair LUT for the incident angle axis

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.HairLUT.RoughnessCount
cvars.description: Change the number of slices of the hair LUT for the roughness axis

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.HairLUT.SampleCountScale
cvars.description: Change the number of sample used for computing the hair LUT. This is a multiplier, default is 1.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.HoldoutMode
cvars.description: Change how sample are merged when rendering with holdout.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.LightFunction
cvars.description: Enables Light function on hair

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Lighting.AllowOneTransmittancePass
cvars.description: Allows one transmittance pass for hair strands lighting to have better performance (experimental).

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.LightSampleFormat
cvars.description: Define the format used for storing the lighting of hair samples (0: RGBA-16bits, 1: RGB-11.11.10bits)

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.LODMode
cvars.description: Enable hair strands Auto LOD mode by default. Otherwise use Manual LOD mode. Auto LOD mode adapts hair curves based on screen coverage. Manual LOD mode relies on LODs manually setup per groom asset. This global behavior can be overridden per groom asset.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.MaterialCompaction.DepthThreshold
cvars.description: Compaction threshold for depth value for material compaction (in centimeters). Default 1 cm.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.MaterialCompaction.TangentThreshold
cvars.description: Compaciton threshold for tangent value for material compaction (in degrees). Default 10 deg.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Meshes
cvars.description: Enable/Disable hair meshes rendering. This variable needs to be turned on when the engine starts.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.PathTracing.InvalidationDebug
cvars.description: Enable bounding box drawing for groom element causing path tracer invalidation

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.PathTracing.InvalidationThreshold
cvars.description: Define the minimal distance to invalidate path tracer output when groom changes (in cm, default: 0.5mm) Set to a negative value to disable this feature

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.PlotBsdf
cvars.description: Debug view for visualizing hair BSDF.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.PlotBsdf.BaseColor
cvars.description: Change the base color / absorption of the debug BSDF plot.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.PlotBsdf.Exposure
cvars.description: Change the exposure of the plot.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.PlotBsdf.Roughness
cvars.description: Change the roughness of the debug BSDF plot.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.RasterizationScale
cvars.description: Rasterization scale to snap strand to pixel

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Raytracing
cvars.description: Enable/Disable hair strands raytracing geometry. This is anopt-in option per groom asset/groom instance.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.RectLightingOptim
cvars.description: Hair Visibility use projected view rect to light only relevant pixels

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.ScatterSceneLighting
cvars.description: Enable scene color lighting scattering into hair (valid for short hair only).

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Selection.CoverageThreshold
cvars.description: Coverage threshold for making hair strands outline selection finer

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Shadow.CastShadowWhenNonVisible
cvars.description: Enable shadow casting for hair strands even when culled out from the primary view

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Shadow.CullPerObjectShadowCaster
cvars.description: Enable CPU culling of object casting per-object shadow (stationnary object)

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.ShadowRasterizationScale
cvars.description: Rasterization scale to snap strand to pixel in shadow view

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Simulation
cvars.description: Enable/disable hair simulation

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.SkyAO
cvars.description: Enable (sky) AO on hair.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.SkyAO.DistanceThreshold
cvars.description: Max distance for occlusion search.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.SkyAO.SampleCount
cvars.description: Number of samples used for evaluating hair AO (default is set to 16).

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.SkyLighting
cvars.description: Enable sky lighting on hair.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.SkyLighting.ConeAngle
cvars.description: Cone angle for tracing sky lighting on hair.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.SkyLighting.DebugSample
cvars.description: Enable debug view for visualizing sample used for the sky integration

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.SkyLighting.DistanceThreshold
cvars.description: Max distance for occlusion search.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.SkyLighting.IntegrationType
cvars.description: Hair env. lighting integration type (0:Adhoc, 1:Uniform.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.SkyLighting.SampleCount
cvars.description: Number of samples used for evaluating multiple scattering and visible area (default is set to 16).

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.SkyLighting.TransmissionDensityScale
cvars.description: Density scale for controlling how much sky lighting is transmitted.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.SkyLighting.UseViewHairCount
cvars.description: Use the view hair count texture for estimating background transmitted light (enabled by default).

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.StableRasterizationScale
cvars.description: Rasterization scale to snap strand to pixel for 'stable' hair option. This value can't go below 1.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Strands
cvars.description: Enable/Disable hair strands rendering

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Strands.UseTriangleStrips
cvars.description: Enable triangle strip geometry for hair strands rendering. This improves performances, but removes the last segments of each curve.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.VelocityMagnitudeScale
cvars.description: Velocity magnitude (in pixel) at which a hair will reach its pic velocity-rasterization-scale under motion to reduce aliasing. Default is 100.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.VelocityRasterizationScale
cvars.description: Rasterization scale to snap strand to pixel under high velocity

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.VelocityThreshold
cvars.description: Threshold value (in pixel) above which a pixel is forced to be resolve with responsive AA (in order to avoid smearing). Default is 3.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.VelocityType
cvars.description: Type of velocity filtering (0:avg, 1:closest, 2:max). Default is 1.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Visibility.Clear
cvars.description: Clear hair strands visibility buffer

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Visibility.Compute.MeanSamplePerPixel
cvars.description: Scale the numer of sampler per pixel for limiting memory allocation (0..1, default 0.5f)

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Visibility.Compute.SamplePerPixel
cvars.description: Hair strands visibility sample count (2, 4, or 8)

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Visibility.ComputeRaster
cvars.description: Hair Visiblity uses raster compute. Experimental

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Visibility.ComputeRaster.ContinuousLOD
cvars.description: Enable Continuos LOD when using compute rasterization. Experimental

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Visibility.ComputeRaster.Culling
cvars.description: Use culling buffers with compute rasterization.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Visibility.ComputeRaster.Debug
cvars.description: Debug compute raster output

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Visibility.ComputeRaster.MaxTiles
cvars.description: Maximum number of tiles used for compute rasterization. 8192 is default

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Visibility.ComputeRaster.NumBinners
cvars.description: Number of Binners used in Binning compute rasterization pass. 32 is default

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Visibility.ComputeRaster.NumRasterizers
cvars.description: Number of Rasterizers used compute rasterization. 256 is default

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Visibility.ComputeRaster.NumRasterizersNaive
cvars.description: Number of Rasterizers used in naive compute rasterization. 256 is default

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Visibility.ComputeRaster.TileSize
cvars.description: Tile size used for compute rasterization. Experimental - only size of 32 currently supported

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Visibility.FullCoverageThreshold
cvars.description: Define the coverage threshold at which a pixel is considered fully covered.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Visibility.HairCount.DistanceThreshold
cvars.description: Distance threshold defining if opaque depth get injected into the 'view-hair-count' buffer.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Visibility.HWSWClassifaction
cvars.description: Enables classifying hair segments to be rasterized with a hardware rasterizer or a software rasterizer.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Visibility.MSAA.MeanSamplePerPixel
cvars.description: Scale the numer of sampler per pixel for limiting memory allocation (0..1, default 0.5f)

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Visibility.MSAA.SamplePerPixel
cvars.description: Hair strands visibility sample count (2, 4, or 8)

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Visibility.NonVisibleShadowCasting.CullDistance
cvars.description: Cull distance at which shadow casting starts to be disabled for non-visible hair strands instances.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Visibility.NonVisibleShadowCasting.Debug
cvars.description: Enable debug rendering for non-visible hair strands instance, casting shadow.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Visibility.NumClassifiers
cvars.description: Number of workgroups used in hair segment classification pass. 32 is default

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Visibility.PPLL
cvars.description: Hair Visibility uses per pixel linked list

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Visibility.PPLL.Debug
cvars.description: Draw debug per pixel light list rendering.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Visibility.PPLL.MeanSamplePerPixel
cvars.description: Scale the maximum number of node allowed for all linked list element (0..1, default 1). It will be widthheightSamplerPerPixel*Scale.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Visibility.PPLL.SamplePerPixel
cvars.description: The maximum number of node allowed to be independently shaded and composited per pixel. Total amount of node will be widthheightVisibilityPPLLMaxRenderNodePerPixel. The last node is used to aggregate all furthest strands to shade into a single one.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Visibility.SortByDepth
cvars.description: Sort hair fragment by depth and update their coverage based on ordered transmittance.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Visibility.TileCompaction
cvars.description: Enables a compaction pass to run on the output of the binning pass of the hair software rasterizer.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Visibility.UseCoverageMappping
cvars.description: Use hair count to coverage transfer function.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Visibility.UseHWRaster
cvars.description: Toggles the hardware rasterizer for hair strands visibility rendering.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Visibility.UseNaiveSWRaster
cvars.description: Toggles a naive version of the software rasterizer for hair strands visibility rendering.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Visibility.WriteVelocityCoverageThreshold
cvars.description: Define the coverage threshold at which a pixel write its hair velocity (default: 0, i.e., write for all pixel)

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Voxelization
cvars.description: Enable hair voxelization for transmittance evaluation

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Voxelization.AABBScale
cvars.description: Scale the hair macro group bounding box

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Voxelization.DensityScale
cvars.description: Scale the hair density when computing voxel transmittance. Default value is 2 (arbitraty)

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Voxelization.DensityScale.AO
cvars.description: Scale the hair density when computing voxel AO. (Default:-1, it will use the global density scale

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Voxelization.DensityScale.Environment
cvars.description: Scale the hair density when computing voxel environment. (Default:-1, it will use the global density scale

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Voxelization.DensityScale.Raytracing
cvars.description: Scale the hair density when computing voxel raytracing. (Default:-1, it will use the global density scale

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Voxelization.DensityScale.Shadow
cvars.description: Scale the hair density when computing voxel shadow. (Default:-1, it will use the global density scale

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Voxelization.DensityScale.Transmittance
cvars.description: Scale the hair density when computing voxel transmittance. (Default:-1, it will use the global density scale

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Voxelization.DepthBiasScale.Environment
cvars.description: Set depth bias for voxel ray marching for environement lights. Offset the origin position towards the light

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Voxelization.DepthBiasScale.Light
cvars.description: Set depth bias for voxel ray marching for analyticaly light. Offset the origin position towards the light for transmittance computation

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Voxelization.DepthBiasScale.Shadow
cvars.description: Set depth bias for voxel ray marching for analyticaly light. Offset the origin position towards the light for shadow computation

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Voxelization.DepthBiasScale.Transmittance
cvars.description: Set depth bias for voxel ray marching for analyticaly light. Offset the origin position towards the light for transmittance computation

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Voxelization.ForceTransmittanceAndShadow
cvars.description: For transmittance and shadow to be computed with density volume. This requires voxelization is enabled.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Voxelization.GPUDriven
cvars.description: Enable GPU driven voxelization.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Voxelization.GPUDriven.MaxPageIndexResolution
cvars.description: Max resolution of the page index. This is used for allocating a conservative page index buffer when GPU driven allocation is enabled.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Voxelization.GPUDriven.MinPageIndexResolution
cvars.description: Min resolution of the page index. This is used for allocating a conservative page index buffer when GPU driven allocation is enabled.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Voxelization.InjectOpaque.BiasCount
cvars.description: Bias, in number of voxel, at which opaque depth is injected.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Voxelization.InjectOpaque.MarkCount
cvars.description: Number of voxel marked as opaque starting along the view direction beneath the opaque surface.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Voxelization.InjectOpaqueDepth
cvars.description: Inject opaque geometry depth into the voxel volume for acting as occluder.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Voxelization.Raymarching.SteppingScale
cvars.description: Stepping scale used for raymarching the voxel structure for shadow.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Voxelization.Raymarching.SteppingScale.Environment
cvars.description: Stepping scale used for raymarching the voxel structure, override scale for env. lighting (default -1).

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Voxelization.Raymarching.SteppingScale.Raytracing
cvars.description: Stepping scale used for raymarching the voxel structure, override scale for raytracing (default -1).

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Voxelization.Raymarching.SteppingScale.Shadow
cvars.description: Stepping scale used for raymarching the voxel structure, override scale for shadow (default -1).

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Voxelization.Raymarching.SteppingScale.Transmission
cvars.description: Stepping scale used for raymarching the voxel structure, override scale for transmittance (default -1).

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Voxelization.Virtual
cvars.description: Enable the two voxel hierachy.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Voxelization.Virtual.Adaptive
cvars.description: Enable adaptive voxel allocation (default = 1)

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Voxelization.Virtual.Adaptive.CorrectionSpeed
cvars.description: Define the speed at which allocation adaption runs (value in 0..1, default = 0.25). A higher number means faster adaptation, but with a risk of oscillation i.e. over and under allocation

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Voxelization.Virtual.Adaptive.CorrectionThreshold
cvars.description: Define the allocation margin to limit over allocation (value in 0..1, default = 0.95)

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Voxelization.Virtual.ComputeRasterMaxVoxelCount
cvars.description: Max number of voxel which are rasterized for a given hair segment. This is for debug purpose only.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Voxelization.Virtual.DebugTraversalType
cvars.description: Traversal mode (0:linear, 1:mip) for debug voxel visualization.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Voxelization.Virtual.InvalidateEmptyPageIndex
cvars.description: Invalid voxel page index which does not contain any voxelized data.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Voxelization.Virtual.Jitter
cvars.description: Change jittered for voxelization/traversal. 0: No jitter 1: Regular randomized jitter: 2: Constant Jitter (default = 1)

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Voxelization.Virtual.VoxelPageCountPerDim
cvars.description: Number of voxel pages per texture dimension. The voxel page memory is allocated with a 3D texture. This value provide the resolution of this texture.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Voxelization.Virtual.VoxelPageResolution
cvars.description: Resolution of a voxel page.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Voxelization.Virtual.VoxelWorldSize
cvars.description: World size of a voxel in cm.

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.Voxelization.VoxelSizeInPixel
cvars.description: Target size of voxel size in pixels

cvars.name: r.HairStrands.WriteGBufferData
cvars.description: Write hair hair material data into GBuffer before post processing run. 0: no write, 1: dummy write into GBuffer A/B (Normal/ShadingModel), 2: write into GBuffer A/B (Normal/ShadingModel). 2: Write entire GBuffer data. (default 1).

cvars.name: r.HalfResDepthNoFastClear
cvars.description: Remove fast clear on half resolution depth buffer (checkerboard and minmax)

cvars.name: r.HDR.Aces.GamutCompression
cvars.description: HDR equivalent of BlueCorrection: Bright blue desaturates instead of going to violet

cvars.name: r.HDR.Aces.SceneColorMultiplier
cvars.description: Multiplier applied to scene color. Helps to

cvars.name: r.HDR.Display.ColorGamut
cvars.description: Color gamut of the output display: 0: Rec709 / sRGB, D65 (default) 1: DCI-P3, D65 2: Rec2020 / BT2020, D65 3: ACES, D60 4: ACEScg, D60

cvars.name: r.HDR.Display.MaxLuminance
cvars.description: The configured display output nit level, assuming HDR output is enabled.

cvars.name: r.HDR.Display.MidLuminance
cvars.description: The configured display output nit level for 18% gray

cvars.name: r.HDR.Display.MinLuminanceLog10
cvars.description: The configured minimum display output nit level (log10 value)

cvars.name: r.HDR.Display.OutputDevice
cvars.description: Device format of the output display: 0: sRGB (LDR) 1: Rec709 (LDR) 2: Explicit gamma mapping (LDR) 3: ACES 1000 nit ST-2084 (Dolby PQ) (HDR) 4: ACES 2000 nit ST-2084 (Dolby PQ) (HDR) 5: ACES 1000 nit ScRGB (HDR) 6: ACES 2000 nit ScRGB (HDR) 7: Linear EXR (HDR) 8: Linear final color, no tone curve (HDR) 9: Linear final color with tone curve

cvars.name: r.HDR.EnableHDROutput
cvars.description: Creates an HDR compatible swap-chain and enables HDR display output.0: Disabled (default) 1: Enable hardware-specific implementation

cvars.name: r.HDR.UI.CompositeMode
cvars.description: Mode used when compositing the UI layer: 0: Standard compositing 1: Shader pass to improve HDR blending

cvars.name: r.HDR.UI.Level
cvars.description: Luminance level for UI elements when compositing into HDR framebuffer (default: 1.0).

cvars.name: r.HDR.UI.Luminance
cvars.description: Base Luminance in nits for UI elements when compositing into HDR framebuffer. Gets multiplied by r.HDR.UI.Level

cvars.name: r.HeightFields.AtlasDimInTiles
cvars.description: Number of tiles the atlas has in one dimension

cvars.name: r.HeightFields.AtlasDownSampleLevel
cvars.description: Max number of times a suballocation can be down-sampled

cvars.name: r.HeightFields.AtlasTileSize
cvars.description: Suballocation granularity

cvars.name: r.HeightFields.VisibilityAtlasDimInTiles
cvars.description: Number of tiles the atlas has in one dimension

cvars.name: r.HeightFields.VisibilityAtlasDownSampleLevel
cvars.description: Max number of times a suballocation can be down-sampled

cvars.name: r.HeightFields.VisibilityAtlasTileSize
cvars.description: Suballocation granularity

cvars.name: r.HeightFieldShadowing
cvars.description: Whether the height field shadowing feature is allowed.

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes
cvars.description: Enables the Heterogeneous volume integrator (Default = 1)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.ApplyFogInscattering
cvars.description: Determines the method for applying fog in-scattering (default = 1) 0: Off 1: Reference (evaluated per ray-march step) 2: Stochastic (evaluated once per ray)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.CLOD
cvars.description: Uses Continuous Level-of-Detail to accelerate rendering (Default = 1)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.CLOD.Bias
cvars.description: Biases evaluation result when computing Continuous Level-of-Detail (Default = 0.0) > 0: Coarser < 0: Sharper

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.CompositeWithTranslucency.Refraction.TransmittanceThreshold
cvars.description: Minimum transmittance threshold to apply distortion (Default = 0.9) Requires enabling Heterogeneous Volumes Project Setting: 'Composite with Translucency'

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.CompositeWithTranslucency.Refraction.UseAVSM
cvars.description: Enables AVSM lookup (Default = 1) Requires enabling Heterogeneous Volumes Project Setting: 'Composite with Translucency'

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.Composition
cvars.description: Change the order of Heterogeneous Volumes composition (Default = 0) 0: Before Translucency 1: After Translucency Requires enabling Heterogeneous Volumes Project Setting: 'Composite with Translucency'

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.Debug
cvars.description: Creates auxillary output buffers for debugging (Default = 0)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.Debug.MarchingMode
cvars.description: The marching mode (Default = 0) 0: Ray Marching (dt=StepSize) 1: Naive DDA 2: Optimized DDA 3: Optimized DDA w/ bitmask

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.DepthSort
cvars.description: Iterates over volumes in depth-sorted order, based on its centroid (Default = 1)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.FrustumGrid
cvars.description: Enables a frustum voxel grid (Default = 1)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.FrustumGrid.DepthSliceCount
cvars.description: The number of depth slices (Default = 512)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.FrustumGrid.FarPlaneDistance
cvars.description: Sets far-plane distance for the frustum grid (Default = -1.0)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.FrustumGrid.MaxBottomLevelMemoryInMegabytes
cvars.description: The minimum voxel size (Default = 128)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.FrustumGrid.NearPlaneDistance
cvars.description: Sets near-plane distance for the frustum grid (Default = 1.0)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.FrustumGrid.ShadingRate
cvars.description: The voxel tessellation rate, in pixel-space (Default = 4.0)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.HardwareRayTracing
cvars.description: Enables hardware ray tracing acceleration (Default = 0)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.HeightFog
cvars.description: Applies height fog to Heterogeneous Volumes (Default = 1)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.IndirectLighting
cvars.description: Enables indirect lighting (Default = 0)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.Jitter
cvars.description: Enables jitter when ray marching (Default = 1)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.LightingCache
cvars.description: Enables an optimized pre-pass, caching certain volumetric rendering lighting quantities (Default = 2) 0: Disabled 1: Cache transmittance 2: Cache in-scattering

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.LightingCache.BoundsCulling
cvars.description: Enables bounds culling when populating the lighting cache (Default = 1)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.LightingCache.DownsampleFactor
cvars.description: Overrides the lighting-cache downsample factor, relative to the preshading volume resolution (Default = 0) 0: Disabled, uses per-volume attribute >0: Overrides the lighting-cache downsample factor

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.LightingCache.UseAVSM
cvars.description: Enables use of AVSMs when evaluating self-shadowing (Default = 1)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.MaxShadowTraceDistance
cvars.description: The maximum shadow-trace distance (Default = 30000)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.MaxStepCount
cvars.description: The maximum ray-marching step count (Default = 512)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.MaxTraceDistance
cvars.description: The maximum trace view-distance for direct volume rendering (Default = 30000)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.OrthoGrid
cvars.description: Enables an ortho voxel grid (Default = 1)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.OrthoGrid.MaxBottomLevelMemoryInMegabytes
cvars.description: The minimum voxel size (Default = 128)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.OrthoGrid.ShadingRate
cvars.description: The voxelization rate (Default = 4.0)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.OrthoGrid.VoxelizationMode
cvars.description: Voxelization mode (Default = 1) 0: Screen-space voxel size (legacy behavior) 1: World-space voxel size

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.Preshading
cvars.description: Evaluates the material into a canonical preshaded volume before rendering the result (Default = 0)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.Preshading.MipLevel
cvars.description: Statically determines the MIP-level when evaluating preshaded volume data (Default = 0)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.Shadows
cvars.description: Enables heterogeneous volume-casting shadows (default = 0)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.Shadows.AbsoluteErrorThreshold
cvars.description: Absolute error threshold for volume shadow compression (Default = 0.0)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.Shadows.CameraDownsampleFactor
cvars.description: Controls downsample factor for camera volumetric shadow map (default = 2)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.Shadows.DebugTweak
cvars.description: Debug tweak value (Default = 0)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.Shadows.Jitter
cvars.description: Enables jittering when constructing shadows (Default = 0)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.Shadows.MaxSampleCount
cvars.description: Maximum sample count when building volumetric shadow map (Default = 8)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.Shadows.Mode
cvars.description: 0: Live-Shading (Default)1: Preshaded Voxel Grid

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.Shadows.OutOfFrustumShadingRate
cvars.description: Debug tweak value (Default = 0)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.Shadows.RelativeErrorThreshold
cvars.description: Relative error threshold for volume shadow compression (Default = 0.05)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.Shadows.Resolution
cvars.description: Resolution when building volumetric shadow map (Default = 512)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.Shadows.ShadingRate
cvars.description: Debug tweak value (Default = 0)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.Shadows.StepSize
cvars.description: Ray marching step size when building volumetric shadow map (Default = 2.0)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.Shadows.UseAVSMCompression
cvars.description: Enables AVSM compression (Default = 1)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.ShadowStepSize
cvars.description: The ray-marching step-size override for shadow rays (Default = -1.0, disabled)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.SparseVoxel
cvars.description: Uses sparse-voxel rendering algorithms (Default = 0)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.SparseVoxel.GenerationMipBias
cvars.description: Determines MIP bias for sparse voxel generation (Default = 3)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.SparseVoxel.PerTileCulling
cvars.description: Enables sparse-voxel culling when using tiled rendering (Default = 1)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.SparseVoxel.Refinement
cvars.description: Uses hierarchical refinement to coalesce neighboring sparse-voxels (Default = 1)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.StepSize
cvars.description: The ray-marching step-size override (Default = -1.0, disabled)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.Tessellation.BottomLevelGrid.HomogeneousAggregation
cvars.description: Enables bottom-level voxel homogeneous aggregation (Default = 1)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.Tessellation.BottomLevelGrid.HomogeneousAggregationThreshold
cvars.description: Threshold for bottom-level voxel homogeneous aggregation (Default = 1.0e-3)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.Tessellation.BottomLevelGrid.Resolution
cvars.description: Determines intra-tile bottom-level grid resolution (Default = 4)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.Tessellation.BottomLevelGrid.VoxelHashing
cvars.description: Enables bottom-level voxel hashing for deduplication (Default = 0)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.Tessellation.BottomLevelGrid.VoxelHashingMemoryInMegabytes
cvars.description: Enables bottom-level voxel hashing for deduplication (Default = 64)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.Tessellation.FarPlaneAutoTransition
cvars.description: Enables auto transitioning of far-plane distance, based on projected minimum voxel size (Default = 1)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.Tessellation.IndirectionGrid
cvars.description: Enables lazy allocation of bottom-level memory (Default = 1)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.Tessellation.IndirectionGrid.Resolution
cvars.description: Determines intra-tile indirection grid resolution (Default = 4)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.Tessellation.Jitter
cvars.description: Enables jittering when tessellating the acceleration grids (Default = 1)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.Tessellation.MajorantGrid
cvars.description: Enables building majorant grids to accelerate volume tracking (Default = 0)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.Tessellation.MajorantGrid.Max
cvars.description: Enables building majorant grids to accelerate volume tracking (Default = 0)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.Tessellation.MinimumVoxelSizeInFrustum
cvars.description: The minimum voxel size (Default = 1.0)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.Tessellation.MinimumVoxelSizeOutsideFrustum
cvars.description: The minimum voxel size (Default = 100.0)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.Tessellation.TopLevelBitmask
cvars.description: Enables top-level bitmask to accelerate grid traversal (Default = 0)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.Velocity
cvars.description: Writes Heterogeneous Volumes velocity to the feature buffer (Default = 0)

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.VolumeResolution.X
cvars.description: Overrides the preshading and lighting volume resolution in X (Default = 0)0: Disabled, uses per-volume attribute >0: Overrides resolution in X

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.VolumeResolution.Y
cvars.description: Overrides the preshading and lighting volume resolution in X (Default = 0)0: Disabled, uses per-volume attribute >0: Overrides resolution in Y

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.VolumeResolution.Z
cvars.description: Overrides the preshading and lighting volume resolution in X (Default = 0)0: Disabled, uses per-volume attribute >0: Overrides resolution in Z

cvars.name: r.HeterogeneousVolumes.VolumetricFog
cvars.description: Applies volumetric fog to Heterogeneous Volumes (Default = 1)

cvars.name: r.LocalExposure
cvars.description: Whether to support local exposure

cvars.name: r.LocalExposure.VisualizeDebugMode
cvars.description: When enabling Show->Visualize->Local Exposure is enabled, this flag controls which mode to use. 0: Local Exposure 1: Base Luminance 2: Detail Luminance 3: Valid Bilateral Grid Lookup

cvars.name: r.LocalFogVolume
cvars.description: LocalFogVolume components are rendered when this is not 0, otherwise ignored.

cvars.name: r.LocalFogVolume.ApplyOnTranslucent
cvars.description: Project settings enabling the sampling of local fog volumes on translucent elements.

cvars.name: r.LocalFogVolume.GlobalStartDistance
cvars.description: The start distance in centimeter from which local fog volumes starts to appear.

cvars.name: r.LocalFogVolume.HalfResolution
cvars.description: Set to one to render local fog volumes at half resoltuion with an upsampling to full resolution later. Only work for the mobile path for now.

cvars.name: r.LocalFogVolume.MaxDensityIntoVolumetricFog
cvars.description: LocalFogVolume height fog mode can become exponentially dense in the bottom part. VolumetricFog temporal reprojection then can leak du to high density. Clamping density is a way to get that visual artefact under control.

cvars.name: r.LocalFogVolume.RenderDuringHeightFogPass
cvars.description: LocalFogVolume are going to be rendered during the height fog pass, skipping the tiled rendering pass specific to them. Only work on the non mobile path as an experiment.

cvars.name: r.LocalFogVolume.RenderIntoVolumetricFog
cvars.description: LocalFogVolume are going to be voxelised into the volumetric fog when this is not 0, otherwise it will remain isolated.

cvars.name: r.LocalFogVolume.TileCullingUseAsync
cvars.description: True if we want to try and use culling on the async pipe.

cvars.name: r.LocalFogVolume.TileDebug
cvars.description: Debug the tiled rendering data complexity. 1: show per tile LFV count as color ; 2: same as one but also show the effect of pixel discard/clipping.

cvars.name: r.LocalFogVolume.TileMaxInstanceCount
cvars.description: Maximum number of local fog volume to account for per view (and per tile or consistency).

cvars.name: r.LocalFogVolume.TilePixelSize
cvars.description: Tile size on screen in pixel at which we cull the local fog volumes.

cvars.name: r.LocalFogVolume.UseHZB
cvars.description: Use the HZB to cull loca lfog volume away.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.AsyncCompute
cvars.description: Whether Lumen should use async compute if supported.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.DiffuseIndirect.Allow
cvars.description: Whether to allow Lumen Global Illumination. Lumen GI is enabled in the project settings, this cvar can only disable it.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.DiffuseIndirect.AsyncCompute
cvars.description: Whether to run Lumen diffuse indirect passes on the compute pipe if possible.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.DiffuseIndirect.CullGridPixelSize
cvars.description: Size of a cell in the card grid, in pixels.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.DiffuseIndirect.MeshSDF.DitheredTransparencyStepThreshold
cvars.description: Per-step stochastic semi-transparency threshold, for tracing users that have dithered transparency enabled, for Mesh SDFs that contain mostly two sided materials (foliage)

cvars.name: r.Lumen.DiffuseIndirect.MeshSDF.NotCoveredExpandSurfaceScale
cvars.description: Scales the surface expand used for Mesh SDFs that contain mostly two sided materials (foliage)

cvars.name: r.Lumen.DiffuseIndirect.MeshSDF.NotCoveredMinStepScale
cvars.description: Scales the min step size to improve performance, for Mesh SDFs that contain mostly two sided materials (foliage)

cvars.name: r.Lumen.DiffuseIndirect.SSAO
cvars.description: Whether to render and apply SSAO to Lumen GI, only when r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ShortRangeAO is disabled. This is useful for providing short range occlusion when Lumen's Screen Bent Normal is disabled due to scalability, however SSAO settings like screen radius come from the user's post process settings.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.HardwareRayTracing
cvars.description: Uses Hardware Ray Tracing for Lumen features, when available. Lumen will fall back to Software Ray Tracing otherwise. Note: Hardware ray tracing has significant scene update costs for scenes with more than 100k instances.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.HardwareRayTracing.FarFieldBias
cvars.description: Determines bias for the far field traces. Default = 200

cvars.name: r.Lumen.HardwareRayTracing.HitLighting.ReflectionCaptures
cvars.description: Whether to apply Reflection Captures to ray hits when using Hit Lighting.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.HardwareRayTracing.Inline
cvars.description: Uses Hardware Inline Ray Tracing for selected Lumen passes, when available.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.HardwareRayTracing.LightingMode
cvars.description: Determines the lighting mode (Default = 0) 0: interpolate final lighting from the surface cache 1: evaluate material, and interpolate irradiance and indirect irradiance from the surface cache 2: evaluate material and direct lighting, and interpolate indirect irradiance from the surface cache 3: evaluate material, direct lighting, and unshadowed skylighting at the hit point

cvars.name: r.Lumen.HardwareRayTracing.MaxIterations
cvars.description: Limit number of ray tracing traversal iterations on supported platfoms. Incomplete misses will be treated as hitting a black surface (can cause overocculsion). Incomplete hits will be treated as a hit (can cause leaking).

cvars.name: r.Lumen.HardwareRayTracing.MinTraceDistanceToSampleSurfaceCache
cvars.description: Ray hit distance from which we can start sampling surface cache in order to fix feedback loop where surface cache texel hits itself and propagates lighting.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.HardwareRayTracing.PullbackBias
cvars.description: Determines the pull-back bias when resuming a screen-trace ray (default = 8.0)

cvars.name: r.Lumen.HardwareRayTracing.SkipBackFaceHitDistance
cvars.description: Distance to trace with backface culling enabled, useful when the Ray Tracing geometry doesn't match the GBuffer (Nanite Proxy geometry).

cvars.name: r.Lumen.HardwareRayTracing.SkipTwoSidedHitDistance
cvars.description: When the SkipBackFaceHitDistance is enabled, the first two-sided material hit within this distance will be skipped. This is useful for avoiding self-intersections with the Nanite fallback mesh on foliage, as SkipBackFaceHitDistance doesn't work on two sided materials.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.IrradianceFieldGather
cvars.description: Whether to use the Irradiance Field Final Gather, an experimental opaque final gather that interpolates from pre-calculated irradiance in probes for cheaper, but lower quality GI.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.IrradianceFieldGather.ClipmapDistributionBase
cvars.description: Base of the Pow() that controls the size of each successive clipmap relative to the first.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.IrradianceFieldGather.ClipmapWorldExtent
cvars.description: World space extent of the first clipmap

cvars.name: r.Lumen.IrradianceFieldGather.GridResolution
cvars.description: Resolution of the probe placement grid within each clipmap

cvars.name: r.Lumen.IrradianceFieldGather.IrradianceProbeResolution
cvars.description: Resolution of the probe's 2d irradiance layout.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.IrradianceFieldGather.NumClipmaps
cvars.description: Number of radiance cache clipmaps.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.IrradianceFieldGather.NumMipmaps
cvars.description: Number of radiance cache mipmaps.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.IrradianceFieldGather.NumProbesToTraceBudget
cvars.description: Number of probes that can be updated in a frame before downsampling.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.IrradianceFieldGather.OcclusionProbeResolution
cvars.description: Resolution of the probe's 2d occlusion layout.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.IrradianceFieldGather.ProbeAtlasResolutionInProbes
