cvars.description: Number of probes along one dimension of the probe atlas cache texture. This controls the memory usage of the cache. Overflow currently results in incorrect rendering.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.IrradianceFieldGather.ProbeOcclusionNormalBias
cvars.description: Bias along the normal to reduce self-occlusion artifacts from Probe Occlusion

cvars.name: r.Lumen.IrradianceFieldGather.ProbeOcclusionViewBias
cvars.description: Bias along the view direction to reduce self-occlusion artifacts from Probe Occlusion

cvars.name: r.Lumen.IrradianceFieldGather.ProbeResolution
cvars.description: Resolution of the probe's 2d radiance layout. The number of rays traced for the probe will be ProbeResolution ^ 2

cvars.name: r.Lumen.IrradianceFieldGather.RadianceCache.Stats
cvars.description: GPU print out Radiance Cache update stats.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Ortho.LumenSceneMinCardResolution
cvars.description: If an orthographic view is present, forc the SurfaceCache MinCard to be set to OrthoMinCardResolution, otherwise use the standard MinCardResolution0 is disabled, higher values will force the resolution in Orthographic views

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Ortho.OverrideMeshDFTraceDistances
cvars.description: Use the full screen view rect size in Ortho views to determing the SDF trace distances instead of setting the value manually.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ProbeHierarchy.SamplePerPixel
cvars.description: Number of sample to do per full res pixel.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.RadianceCache.DownsampleDistanceFromCamera
cvars.description: Probes further than this distance from the camera are always downsampled.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.RadianceCache.ForceUniformTraceTileLevel
cvars.description: When set to >= 0, forces a uniform trace tile level for debugging, and overrides trace tile BRDF importance sampling. Valid range is [0, 2]. 0 = half res, 1 = full res, 2 = supersampled

cvars.name: r.Lumen.RadianceCache.HardwareRayTracing
cvars.description: Enables hardware ray tracing for Lumen radiance cache (Default = 1)

cvars.name: r.Lumen.RadianceCache.HardwareRayTracing.Retrace.FarField
cvars.description: Determines whether a second trace will be fired for far-field contribution (Default = 1)

cvars.name: r.Lumen.RadianceCache.HardwareRayTracing.TemporaryBufferAllocationDownsampleFactor
cvars.description: Downsample factor on the temporary buffer used by Hardware Ray Tracing Radiance Cache. Higher downsample factors save more transient allocator memory, but may cause overflow and artifacts.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.RadianceCache.NumFramesToKeepCachedProbes
cvars.description: Number of frames to keep unused probes in cache. Higher values enable more reuse between frames, but too high values will cause filtering from stale probes.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.RadianceCache.SortTraceTiles
cvars.description: Whether to sort Trace Tiles by direction before tracing to extract coherency

cvars.name: r.Lumen.RadianceCache.SpatialFilterMaxRadianceHitAngle
cvars.description: In Degrees. Larger angles allow filtering of nearby features but more leaking.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.RadianceCache.SpatialFilterProbes
cvars.description: Whether to filter probe radiance between neighbors

cvars.name: r.Lumen.RadianceCache.SupersampleDistanceFromCamera
cvars.description: Only probes closer to the camera than this distance can be supersampled.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.RadianceCache.SupersampleTileBRDFThreshold
cvars.description: Value of the BRDF [0-1] above which to trace more rays to supersample the probe radiance.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.RadianceCache.Update
cvars.description: Whether to update radiance cache every frame

cvars.name: r.Lumen.RadianceCache.VisualizeClipmapIndex
cvars.description: Selects which radiance cache clipmap should be visualized. -1 visualizes all clipmaps at once.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.RadianceCache.VisualizeProbeRadius
cvars.description: Whether to visualize radiance cache probe radius

cvars.name: r.Lumen.RadianceCache.VisualizeRadiusScale
cvars.description: Scales the size of the spheres used to visualize radiance cache samples.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.Allow
cvars.description: Whether to allow Lumen Reflections. Lumen Reflections is enabled in the project settings, this cvar can only disable it.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.AsyncCompute
cvars.description: Whether to run Lumen reflection passes on the compute pipe if possible.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.BilateralFilter
cvars.description: Whether to do a bilateral filter as a last step in denoising Lumen Reflections.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.BilateralFilter.DepthWeightScale
cvars.description: Scales the depth weight of the bilateral filter

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.BilateralFilter.NormalAngleThresholdScale
cvars.description: Scales the Normal angle threshold of the bilateral filter

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.BilateralFilter.NumSamples
cvars.description: Number of bilateral filter samples.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.BilateralFilter.SpatialKernelRadius
cvars.description: Spatial kernel radius, as a fraction of the viewport size

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.BilateralFilter.StrongBlurVarianceThreshold
cvars.description: Pixels whose variance from the spatial resolve filter are higher than this value get a stronger bilateral blur.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.Contrast
cvars.description: Non-physically correct Lumen reflection contrast. Recommended to keep at 1.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.DistantScreenTraces
cvars.description: Whether to do a linear screen trace starting where Lumen Scene ends to handle distant reflections.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.DistantScreenTraces.DepthThreshold
cvars.description: Depth threshold for the linear screen traces done where other traces have missed.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.DistantScreenTraces.MaxTraceDistance
cvars.description: Trace distance of distant screen traces.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.FixedStateFrameIndex
cvars.description: Whether to override View.StateFrameIndex for debugging Lumen Reflections.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.HairStrands.ScreenTrace
cvars.description: Whether to trace against hair depth for hair casting shadow onto opaques.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.HairStrands.VoxelTrace
cvars.description: Whether to trace against hair voxel structure for hair casting shadow onto opaques.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.HardwareRayTracing
cvars.description: Enables hardware ray tracing for Lumen reflections (Default = 1)

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.HardwareRayTracing.BucketMaterials
cvars.description: Determines whether a secondary traces will be bucketed for coherent material access (default = 1

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.HardwareRayTracing.Retrace.FarField
cvars.description: Determines whether a second trace will be fired for far-field contribution (Default = 1)

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.HardwareRayTracing.Retrace.HitLighting
cvars.description: Determines whether a second trace will be fired for hit-lighting for invalid surface-cache hits (Default = 0)

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.HardwareRayTracing.Translucent.MaxRefractionBounces
cvars.description: The maximum count of refraction event to trace.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.HardwareRayTracing.Translucent.Refraction.EnableForProject
cvars.description: Whether to use Lumen refraction tracing from surfaces when using harware ray tracing and hit lighting. This will require shader recompilation to compile of translucent card capture Lumen shaders. Increases GPU cost when enabled.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.HierarchicalScreenTraces.HistoryDepthTestRelativeThickness
cvars.description: Distance between HZB trace hit and previous frame scene depth from which to allow hits, as a relative depth threshold.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.HierarchicalScreenTraces.MaxIterations
cvars.description: Max iterations for HZB tracing.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.HierarchicalScreenTraces.MinimumOccupancy
cvars.description: Minimum number of threads still tracing before aborting the trace. Can be used for scalability to abandon traces that have a disproportionate cost.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.HierarchicalScreenTraces.RelativeDepthThickness
cvars.description: Determines depth thickness of objects hit by HZB tracing, as a relative depth threshold.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.HiResSurface
cvars.description: Whether reflections should sample highest available surface data or use lowest res always resident pages.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.MaxBounces
cvars.description: Sets the maximum number of recursive reflection bounces. Values above 0 override Post Process Volume settings. 1 means a single reflection ray (no secondary reflections in mirrors). Currently only supported by Hardware Ray Tracing with Hit Lighting.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.MaxRayIntensity
cvars.description: Clamps the maximum ray lighting intensity (with PreExposure) to reduce fireflies.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.MaxRoughnessToTrace
cvars.description: Max roughness value for which Lumen still traces dedicated reflection rays. Overrides Post Process Volume settings when set to anything >= 0.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.MaxRoughnessToTraceClamp
cvars.description: Scalability clamp for max roughness value for which Lumen still traces dedicated reflection rays. Project and Post Process Volumes settings are clamped to this value. Useful for scalability.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.MaxRoughnessToTraceForFoliage
cvars.description: Max roughness value for which Lumen still traces dedicated reflection rays from foliage pixels. Where foliage pixel is a pixel with two sided or subsurface shading model.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.RadianceCache
cvars.description: Whether to reuse Lumen's ScreenProbeGather Radiance Cache, when it is available. When enabled, reflection rays from rough surfaces are shortened and distant lighting comes from interpolating from the Radiance Cache, speeding up traces.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.RadianceCache.AngleThresholdScale
cvars.description: Controls when the Radiance Cache is used for distant lighting. A value of 1 means only use the Radiance Cache when appropriate for the reflection cone, lower values are more aggressive.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.RadianceCache.ReprojectionRadiusScale
cvars.description: Scales the radius of the sphere around each Radiance Cache probe that is intersected for parallax correction when interpolating from the Radiance Cache.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.SampleSceneColorAtHit
cvars.description: Whether to sample SceneColor on reflection ray hits (both SWRT and HWRT). Useful for hiding areas where Screen Traces gave up when they went behind a foreground object. 0 - Disable. 1 - Enable only when screen space traces are enabled. 2 - Always enable.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.SampleSceneColorNormalTreshold
cvars.description: Normal threshold in degrees that controls how close ray hit normal and screen normal have to be, before sampling SceneColor is allowed. 0 - only exactly matching normals allowed. 180 - all normals allowed.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.SampleSceneColorRelativeDepthThickness
cvars.description: Depth threshold that controls how close ray hits have to be to the depth buffer, before sampling SceneColor is allowed.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.ScreenSpaceReconstruction
cvars.description: Whether to use the screen space BRDF reweighting reconstruction

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.ScreenSpaceReconstruction.KernelRadius
cvars.description: Screen space reflection filter kernel radius in pixels

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.ScreenSpaceReconstruction.NumSamples
cvars.description: Number of samples to use for the screen space BRDF reweighting reconstruction

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.ScreenSpaceReconstruction.RoughnessScale
cvars.description: Values higher than 1 allow neighbor traces to be blurred together more aggressively, but is not physically correct.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.ScreenSpaceReconstruction.TonemapStrength
cvars.description: Whether to tonemap reflection radiance values when they are averaged together during the spatial resolve. This reduces noise but also removes bright interesting features in reflections.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.ScreenTraces
cvars.description: Whether to trace against the screen for reflections before falling back to other methods.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.SmoothBias
cvars.description: Values larger than 0 apply a global material roughness bias for Lumen Reflections, where 1 is fully mirror.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.SpecularScale
cvars.description: Non-physically correct Lumen specular reflection scale. Recommended to keep at 1.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.SurfaceCacheFeedback
cvars.description: Whether to allow writing into virtual surface cache feedback buffer from reflection rays.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.Temporal
cvars.description: Whether to use a temporal filter

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.Temporal.DistanceThreshold
cvars.description: World space distance threshold needed to discard last frame's lighting results. Lower values reduce ghosting from characters when near a wall but increase flickering artifacts.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.Temporal.MaxFramesAccumulated
cvars.description: Lower values cause the temporal filter to propagate lighting changes faster, but also increase flickering from noise.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.Temporal.MaxRayDirections
cvars.description: Number of possible random directions per pixel. Should be tweaked based on MaxFramesAccumulated.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.Temporal.NeighborhoodClampExpandWithResolveVariance
cvars.description: Fraction of the resolve variance to use to expand the neighborhood variance. This allows some ghosting in noisy areas to avoid flickering when the camera is still. Only works when the bilateral filter is enabled.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.TraceCompaction.GroupSizeInTraceTiles
cvars.description: Size of the trace compaction threadgroup. Larger group = better coherency in the compacted traces. Currently only supported by WaveOps path.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.TraceCompaction.WaveOps
cvars.description: Whether to use Wave Ops path for trace compaction.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.VisualizeTraces
cvars.description: Whether to visualize reflection traces from cursor position, useful for debugging

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.VisualizeTracingCoherency
cvars.description: Set to 1 to capture traces from a random wavefront and draw them on the screen. Set to 1 again to re-capture. Shaders must enable support first, see DEBUG_SUPPORT_VISUALIZE_TRACE_COHERENCY

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ReSTIRGather
cvars.description: Whether to use the prototype ReSTIR Final Gather. Disabled by default, as quality is currently much lower than LumenScreenProbeGather, and fewer features supported.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ReSTIRGather.BilateralFilter
cvars.description: Whether to do a bilateral filter as a last step in denoising Lumen ReSTIRGathers.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ReSTIRGather.BilateralFilter.DepthWeightScale
cvars.description: Scales the depth weight of the bilateral filter

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ReSTIRGather.BilateralFilter.NormalAngleThresholdScale
cvars.description: Scales the Normal angle threshold of the bilateral filter

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ReSTIRGather.BilateralFilter.NumSamples
cvars.description: Number of bilateral filter samples.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ReSTIRGather.BilateralFilter.SpatialKernelRadius
cvars.description: Spatial kernel radius, as a fraction of the viewport size

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ReSTIRGather.BilateralFilter.StrongBlurVarianceThreshold
cvars.description: Pixels whose variance from the spatial resolve filter are higher than this value get a stronger bilateral blur.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ReSTIRGather.DownsampleFactor
cvars.description: Downsample factor from the main viewport to trace rays, create and resample reservoirs at. This is the main performance control for the tracing / resampling part of the algorithm.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ReSTIRGather.FixedJitterIndex
cvars.description: When 0 or larger, overrides the frame index with a constant for debugging

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ReSTIRGather.MaxRayIntensity
cvars.description: Clamps the maximum ray lighting intensity (with PreExposure) to reduce fireflies.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ReSTIRGather.ResamplingAngleThreshold
cvars.description: Largest angle between two reservoirs that will be allowed during reservoir resampling, in degrees

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ReSTIRGather.ResamplingDepthErrorThreshold
cvars.description: Largest depth error between two reservoirs that will be allowed during reservoir resampling

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ReSTIRGather.ShortRangeAO
cvars.description: Whether to compute a short range, full resolution AO to add high frequency occlusion (contact shadows) which ReSTIR GI lacks due to spatial filtering.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ReSTIRGather.ShortRangeAO.MaxScreenTraceFraction
cvars.description: Short range AO tracing distance, as a fraction of the screen size.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ReSTIRGather.SpatialResampling
cvars.description: Whether to use spatial resampling passes on the reservoirs

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ReSTIRGather.SpatialResampling.KernelRadius
cvars.description: Radius of the spatial resampling kernel as a fraction of the screen.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ReSTIRGather.SpatialResampling.NumPasses
cvars.description: The number of spatial resampling passes to do

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ReSTIRGather.SpatialResampling.NumSamples
cvars.description: The number of spatial samples for each resampling pass.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ReSTIRGather.SpatialResampling.OcclusionScreenTraceDistance
cvars.description: Length of occlusion screen traces used to validate the neighbor's reservoir hit position before reuse, to reduce leaking. As a fraction of the screen size.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ReSTIRGather.Temporal
cvars.description: Whether to use a temporal filter

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ReSTIRGather.Temporal.ClearHistoryEveryFrame
cvars.description: Whether to clear the history every frame for debugging

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ReSTIRGather.Temporal.DistanceThreshold
cvars.description: Relative distance threshold needed to discard last frame's lighting results. Lower values reduce ghosting from characters when near a wall but increase flickering artifacts.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ReSTIRGather.Temporal.MaxFramesAccumulated
cvars.description: Lower values cause the temporal filter to propagate lighting changes faster, but also increase flickering from noise.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ReSTIRGather.TemporalResampling
cvars.description: Whether to do a temporal resampling pass on the reservoirs

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ReSTIRGather.TemporalResampling.ValidateEveryNFrames
cvars.description: Validate temporal reservoirs by re-tracing their rays and comparing hit positions and radiance every N frames. Used to reduce lag in lighting changes, but introduces noise.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ReSTIRGather.Upsample.KernelSize
cvars.description: Upsample kernel size, in reservoir texels

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ReSTIRGather.Upsample.Method
cvars.description: Upsample method, when calculating full resolution irradiance from downsampled reservoir radiance 0 - Jittered bilinear sample, when jittered position lies in the same plane, and fallback to unjittered when all samples fail 1 - Spiral sample pattern 2 - Passthrough for debugging. Also effectively disables the bilateral filter as variance is not computed.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ReSTIRGather.Upsample.NumSamples
cvars.description: Number of reservoir samples to take while upsampling. Only used when r.Lumen.ReSTIRGather.Upsample.Method is set to Spiral Pattern.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.SampleFog
cvars.description: Sample the fog contribution in Lumen tracing. Disabled by default.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather
cvars.description: Whether to use the Screen Probe Final Gather

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.AdaptiveProbeAllocationFraction
cvars.description: Fraction of uniform probes to allow for adaptive probe placement.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.AdaptiveProbeMinDownsampleFactor
cvars.description: Screen probes will be placed where needed down to this downsample factor of the GBuffer.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.DiffuseIntegralMethod
cvars.description: Spherical Harmonic = 0, Importance Sample BRDF = 1, Numerical Integral Reference = 2

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.DirectLighting
cvars.description: Whether to render all local lights through Lumen's Final Gather, when enabled. This gives very cheap but low quality direct lighting.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.DownsampleFactor
cvars.description: Pixel size of the screen tile that a screen probe will be placed on.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.Filtering.WaveOps
cvars.description: Whether to use Wave Ops path for screen probe filtering.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.FixedJitterIndex
cvars.description: If zero or greater, overrides the temporal jitter index with a fixed index. Useful for debugging and inspecting sampling patterns.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.FullResolutionJitterWidth
cvars.description: Size of the full resolution jitter applied to Screen Probe upsampling, as a fraction of a screen tile. A width of 1 results in jittering by DownsampleFactor number of pixels.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.GatherNumMips
cvars.description: Number of mip maps to prepare for diffuse integration

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.GatherOctahedronResolutionScale
cvars.description: Resolution that probe filtering and integration will happen at, as a scale of TracingOctahedronResolution

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.HairStrands.ScreenTrace
cvars.description: Whether to trace against hair depth for hair casting shadow onto opaques.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.HairStrands.VoxelTrace
cvars.description: Whether to trace against hair voxel structure for hair casting shadow onto opaques.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.HardwareRayTracing
cvars.description: 0. Software raytracing of diffuse indirect from Lumen cubemap tree.1. Enable hardware ray tracing of diffuse indirect. (Default)

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.HardwareRayTracing.NormalBias
cvars.description: Bias along the shading normal, useful when the Ray Tracing geometry doesn't match the GBuffer (Nanite Proxy geometry)

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.HardwareRayTracing.Retrace.FarField
cvars.description: Determines whether a second trace will be fired for far-field contribution (Default = 1)

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ImportanceSample
cvars.description: Whether to use Importance Sampling to generate probe trace directions.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ImportanceSample.BRDFOctahedronResolution
cvars.description: Resolution of the BRDF PDF octahedron per probe.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ImportanceSample.IncomingLighting
cvars.description: Whether to Importance Sample incoming lighting to generate probe trace directions. When disabled, only the BRDF will be importance sampled.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ImportanceSample.MinPDFToTrace
cvars.description: Minimum normalized BRDF PDF to trace rays for. Larger values cause black corners, but reduce noise as more rays are able to be reassigned to an important direction.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ImportanceSample.NumLevels
cvars.description: Number of refinement levels to use for screen probe importance sampling. Currently only supported by the serial reference path in ScreenProbeGenerateRaysCS.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ImportanceSample.ProbeRadianceHistory
cvars.description: Whether to Importance Sample incoming lighting from last frame's filtered traces to generate probe trace directions. When disabled, the Radiance Cache will be used instead.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.InjectLightsToProbes
cvars.description: Whether to inject local lights into probes. Experimental - fast but causes wrap-around lighting due to lack of directionality and SH ringing.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.IntegrationTileClassification
cvars.description: Whether to use tile classification during diffuse integration. Tile Classification splits compute dispatches by VGPRs for better occupancy, but can introduce errors if implemented incorrectly.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.IrradianceFormat
cvars.description: Prefilter irradiance format 0 - SH3 slower 1 - Octahedral probe. Faster, but reverts to SH3 when ShortRangeAO.ApplyDuringIntegration is enabled

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.LightSampleResolutionXY
cvars.description: Number of light samples per screen probe, in one dimension. When the number of lights overlapping a pixel is larger, noise in the direct lighting will increase.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.MaterialAO
cvars.description: Whether to apply Material Ambient Occlusion or Material Bent Normal to Lumen GI.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.MaxRayIntensity
cvars.description: Clamps the maximum ray lighting intensity (with PreExposure) to reduce fireflies.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.MaxRoughnessToEvaluateRoughSpecular
cvars.description: Maximum roughness value to evaluate rough specular in Screen Probe Gather. Lower values reduce GPU cost of integration, but also lose rough specular.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.RadianceCache
cvars.description: Whether to enable the Persistent world space Radiance Cache

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.RadianceCache.ClipmapDistributionBase
cvars.description: Base of the Pow() that controls the size of each successive clipmap relative to the first.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.RadianceCache.ClipmapWorldExtent
cvars.description: World space extent of the first clipmap

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.RadianceCache.GridResolution
cvars.description: Resolution of the probe placement grid within each clipmap

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.RadianceCache.NumClipmaps
cvars.description: Number of radiance cache clipmaps.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.RadianceCache.NumMipmaps
cvars.description: Number of radiance cache mipmaps.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.RadianceCache.ProbeAtlasResolutionInProbes
cvars.description: Number of probes along one dimension of the probe atlas cache texture. This controls the memory usage of the cache. Overflow currently results in incorrect rendering.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.RadianceCache.ProbeResolution
cvars.description: Resolution of the probe's 2d radiance layout. The number of rays traced for the probe will be ProbeResolution ^ 2

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.RadianceCache.Stats
cvars.description: GPU print out Radiance Cache update stats.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ReferenceMode
cvars.description: When enabled, traces 1024 uniform rays per probe with no filtering, Importance Sampling or Radiance Caching.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.RoughSpecularSamplingMode
cvars.description: Mode 0: use the diffuse SH sample as specular. Mode 1: sample the SH along the main GGX specular reflection vector.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ScreenTraces
cvars.description: Whether to trace against the screen before falling back to other tracing methods.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ScreenTraces.HZBTraversal
cvars.description: Whether to use HZB tracing for SSGI instead of fixed step count intersection. HZB tracing is much more accurate, in particular not missing thin features, but is about ~3x slower.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ScreenTraces.HZBTraversal.FullResDepth
cvars.description: Whether the HZB traversal should go all the way down to the full resolution depth, which is more accurate but adds incoherency to the inner loop.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ScreenTraces.HZBTraversal.HistoryDepthTestRelativeThickness
cvars.description: Distance between HZB trace hit and previous frame scene depth from which to allow hits, as a relative depth threshold.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ScreenTraces.HZBTraversal.MaxIterations
cvars.description: Max iterations for HZB tracing.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ScreenTraces.HZBTraversal.NumThicknessStepsToDetermineCertainty
cvars.description: Number of linear search steps to determine if a hit feature is thin and should be ignored.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ScreenTraces.HZBTraversal.RelativeDepthThickness
cvars.description: Determines depth thickness of objects hit by HZB tracing, as a relative depth threshold.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ScreenTraces.HZBTraversal.SkipFoliageHits
cvars.description: Whether to allow screen traces to hit Subsurface and TwoSided Foliage shading models. Can be used to work around aliasing from high frequency grass geometry.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ScreenTraces.MinimumOccupancy
cvars.description: Minimum number of threads still tracing before aborting the trace. Can be used for scalability to abandon traces that have a disproportionate cost.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ScreenTraces.ThicknessScaleWhenNoFallback
cvars.description: Larger scales effectively treat depth buffer surfaces as thicker for screen traces when there is no Distance Field present to resume the occluded ray.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ShortRangeAO
cvars.description: Whether to compute a short range, full resolution AO to add high frequency occlusion (contact shadows) which Screen Probes lack due to downsampling.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ShortRangeAO.ApplyDuringIntegration
cvars.description: Whether Screen Space Bent Normal should be applied during BRDF integration, which has higher quality but is before the temporal filter so causes streaking on moving objects.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ShortRangeAO.HairScreenTrace
cvars.description: Whether to trace against hair depth for hair casting shadow onto opaques.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ShortRangeAO.HairVoxelTrace
cvars.description: Whether to trace against hair voxel structure for hair casting shadow onto opaques.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ShortRangeAO.HardwareRayTracing
cvars.description: 0. Screen space tracing for the full resolution Bent Normal (directional occlusion).1. Enable hardware ray tracing of the full resolution Bent Normal (directional occlusion). (Default)

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ShortRangeAO.HardwareRayTracing.NormalBias
cvars.description: Bias for HWRT Bent Normal to avoid self intersection

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ShortRangeAO.MaxMultibounceAlbedo
cvars.description: Maximum albedo used for the AO multi-bounce approximation. Useful for forcing near-white albedo to have some occlusion.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ShortRangeAO.ScreenSpace.FoliageOcclusionStrength
cvars.description: Maximum strength of ScreenSpaceBentNormal occlusion on foliage and subsurface pixels. Useful for reducing max occlusion to simulate subsurface scattering.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ShortRangeAO.ScreenSpace.SlopeCompareToleranceScale
cvars.description: Scales the slope threshold that screen space traces use to determine whether there was a hit.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.SpatialFilterHalfKernelSize
cvars.description: Experimental

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.SpatialFilterMaxRadianceHitAngle
cvars.description: In Degrees. Larger angles allow more filtering but lose contact shadows.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.SpatialFilterNumPasses
cvars.description: Number of spatial filter passes

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.SpatialFilterPositionWeightScale
cvars.description: Determines how far probes can be in world space while still filtering lighting

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.SpatialFilterProbes
cvars.description: Whether to spatially filter probe traces to reduce noise.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.StochasticInterpolation
cvars.description: Where to interpolate screen probes stochastically (1 sample) or bilinearly (4 samples)

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.Temporal
cvars.description: Whether to use a temporal filter

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.Temporal.ClearHistoryEveryFrame
cvars.description: Whether to clear the history every frame for debugging

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.Temporal.DistanceThreshold
cvars.description: Relative distance threshold needed to discard last frame's lighting results. Lower values reduce ghosting from characters when near a wall but increase flickering artifacts.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.Temporal.FastUpdateModeUseNeighborhoodClamp
cvars.description: Whether to clamp history values to the current frame's screen space neighborhood, in areas around moving objects.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.Temporal.MaxFastUpdateModeAmount
cvars.description: Maximum amount of fast-responding temporal filter to use when traces hit a moving object. Values closer to 1 cause more noise, but also faster reaction to scene changes.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.Temporal.MaxFramesAccumulated
cvars.description: Lower values cause the temporal filter to propagate lighting changes faster, but also increase flickering from noise.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.Temporal.MaxRayDirections
cvars.description: Number of possible random directions per pixel. Should be tweaked based on MaxFramesAccumulated.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.Temporal.NormalThreshold
cvars.description: Maximum angle that the history texel's normal can be from the current pixel to accept it's history lighting, in degrees.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.Temporal.RejectBasedOnNormal
cvars.description: Whether to reject history lighting based on their normal. Increases cost of the temporal filter but can reduce streaking especially around character feet.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.TemporalFilterProbes
cvars.description: Whether to temporally filter probe traces to reduce noise.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.TileDebugMode
cvars.description: Display Lumen screen probe tile classification.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.TraceMeshSDFs
cvars.description: Whether to trace against Mesh Signed Distance fields for Lumen's Screen Probe Gather.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.TracingOctahedronResolution
cvars.description: Resolution of the tracing octahedron. Determines how many traces are done per probe.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.TwoSidedFoliageBackfaceDiffuse
cvars.description: Whether to gather lighting along the backface for the Two Sided Foliage shading model, which adds some GPU cost. The final lighting is then DiffuseColor x FrontfaceLighting + SubsurfaceColor x BackfaceLighting. When disabled, SubsurfaceColor will simply be added to DiffuseColor instead.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.VisualizeTraces
cvars.description: Whether to visualize traces for the center screen probe, useful for debugging

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.VisualizeTracesFreeze
cvars.description: Whether to freeze updating the visualize trace data. Note that no changes to cvars or shaders will propagate until unfrozen.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.SkylightLeaking.Roughness
cvars.description: Roughness used to sample the skylight leaking cubemap. A value of 0 gives no prefiltering of the skylight leaking, while larger values can be useful to hide sky features in the leaking.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.StereoOptimizations
cvars.description: Whether to to share certain Lumen state between views during the instanced stereo rendering.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Supported
cvars.description: Whether Lumen is supported at all for the project, regardless of platform. This can be used to avoid compiling shaders and other load time overhead.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.SurfaceCache.HeightfieldCaptureMargin
cvars.description: Amount to expand heightfield component bbox for card capture purposes.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.ThreadGroupSize32
cvars.description: Whether to prefer dispatches in groups of 32 threads on HW which supports it (instead of standard 64).

cvars.name: r.Lumen.TraceDistanceScale
cvars.description: Scales the tracing distance for all tracing methods and Lumen features, used by scalability.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.TraceMeshSDFs
cvars.description: Whether Lumen should trace against Mesh Signed Distance fields. When enabled, Lumen's Software Tracing will be more accurate, but scenes with high instance density (overlapping meshes) will have high tracing costs. When disabled, lower resolution Global Signed Distance Field will be used instead.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.TraceMeshSDFs.Allow
cvars.description: Whether Lumen should trace against Mesh Signed Distance fields. When enabled, Lumen's Software Tracing will be more accurate, but scenes with high instance density (overlapping meshes) will have high tracing costs. When disabled, lower resolution Global Signed Distance Field will be used instead.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.TraceMeshSDFs.TraceDistance
cvars.description: Max trace distance against Mesh Distance Fields and Heightfields.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyReflections.ClipmapFadeSize
cvars.description: Size in Radiance Cache probes of the dithered transition region between clipmaps

cvars.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyReflections.FrontLayer.Allow
cvars.description: Whether to render Lumen Reflections on the frontmost layer of Translucent Surfaces. Other layers will use the lower quality Radiance Cache method that can only produce glossy reflections.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyReflections.FrontLayer.DepthThreshold
cvars.description: Depth test threshold used to determine whether the fragments being rendered match the single layer that reflections were calculated for. In float ULP units.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyReflections.FrontLayer.Enable
cvars.description: Whether to render Lumen Reflections on the frontmost layer of Translucent Surfaces. Other layers will use the lower quality Radiance Cache method that can only produce glossy reflections.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyReflections.FrontLayer.EnableForProject
cvars.description: Whether to render Lumen Reflections on the frontmost layer of Translucent Surfaces. Other layers will use the lower quality Radiance Cache method that can only produce glossy reflections.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyReflections.MarkDownsampleFactor
cvars.description: Downsample factor for marking translucent surfaces in the Lumen Radiance Cache. Too low of factors will cause incorrect Radiance Cache coverage. Should be a power of 2.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyReflections.RadianceCache
cvars.description: Whether to use the Radiance Cache to provide Lumen Reflections on Translucent Surfaces.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyReflections.ReprojectionRadiusScale
cvars.description: Larger values treat the Radiance Cache lighting as more distant.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyVolume.GridCenterOffsetFromDepthBuffer
cvars.description: Offset in grid units to move grid center sample out form the depth buffer along the Z direction. -1 means disabled. This reduces sample self intersection with geometry when tracing the global distance field buffer, and thus reduces flickering in those areas, as well as results in less leaking sometimes.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyVolume.GridPixelSize
cvars.description: Size of a cell in the translucency grid, in pixels.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyVolume.HardwareRayTracing
cvars.description: Enables hardware ray tracing for Lumen translucency volume (Default = 1)

cvars.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyVolume.OffsetThresholdToAcceptDepthBufferOffset
cvars.description: Offset in grid units to accept a sample to be moved forward in front of the depth buffer. This is to avoid moving all samples behind the depth buffer forward which would affect the lighting of translucent and volumetric at edges of mesh.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyVolume.RadianceCache
cvars.description: Whether to use the Radiance Cache for Translucency

cvars.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyVolume.RadianceCache.ClipmapDistributionBase
cvars.description: Base of the Pow() that controls the size of each successive clipmap relative to the first.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyVolume.RadianceCache.ClipmapWorldExtent
cvars.description: World space extent of the first clipmap

cvars.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyVolume.RadianceCache.FarField
cvars.description: Whether to trace against the FarField representation

cvars.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyVolume.RadianceCache.GridResolution
cvars.description: Resolution of the probe placement grid within each clipmap

cvars.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyVolume.RadianceCache.NumMipmaps
cvars.description: Number of radiance cache mipmaps.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyVolume.RadianceCache.ProbeAtlasResolutionInProbes
cvars.description: Number of probes along one dimension of the probe atlas cache texture. This controls the memory usage of the cache. Overflow currently results in incorrect rendering.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyVolume.RadianceCache.ProbeResolution
cvars.description: Resolution of the probe's 2d radiance layout. The number of rays traced for the probe will be ProbeResolution ^ 2

cvars.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyVolume.RadianceCache.Stats
cvars.description: GPU print out Radiance Cache update stats.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyVolume.SpatialFilter
cvars.description: Whether to use a spatial filter on the volume traces.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyVolume.SpatialFilter.NumPasses
cvars.description: How many passes of the spatial filter to do

cvars.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyVolume.Temporal.HistoryWeight
cvars.description: How much the history value should be weighted each frame. This is a tradeoff between visible jittering and responsiveness.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyVolume.Temporal.Jitter
cvars.description: Whether to apply jitter to each frame's translucency GI computation, achieving temporal super sampling.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyVolume.TemporalReprojection
cvars.description: Whether to use temporal reprojection.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyVolume.TraceFromVolume
cvars.description: Whether to ray trace from the translucency volume's voxels to gather indirect lighting. Only makes sense to disable if TranslucencyVolume.RadianceCache is enabled.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyVolume.TracingOctahedronResolution
cvars.description: Resolution of the tracing octahedron. Determines how many traces are done per voxel of the translucency lighting volume.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.UsesLightFunctionAtlas
cvars.description: Whether the light function atlas is sampled for lumen scene lighting.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Visualize
cvars.description: Lumen scene visualization mode. 0 - Disable 1 - Overview 2 - Performance Overview 3 - Lumen Scene 4 - Reflection View 5 - Surface Cache Coverage 6 - Geometry normals 7 - Dedicated Reflection Rays 8 - Albedo 9 - Normals 10 - Emissive 11 - Opacity (disable alpha masking) 12 - Card weights 13 - Direct lighting 14 - Indirect lighting 15 - Local Position (hardware ray-tracing only) 16 - Velocity (hardware ray-tracing only) 17 - Direct lighting updates 18 - Indirect lighting updates 19 - Last used pages 20 - Last used high res pages

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.CardPlacementDirection
cvars.description: Visualize only a single card direction.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.CardPlacementIndex
cvars.description: Visualize only a single card per mesh.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.CardPlacementLOD
cvars.description: 0 - all 1 - only primitives 2 - only merged instances 3 - only merged components 4 - only far field

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.CardPlacementPrimitives
cvars.description: Whether to visualize primitive bounding boxes.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.ConeAngle
cvars.description: Visualize cone angle, in degrees.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.ConeStepFactor
cvars.description: Cone step scale on sphere radius step size.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.HardwareRayTracing
cvars.description: Enables visualization of hardware ray tracing (Default = 1)

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.HardwareRayTracing.BucketMaterials
cvars.description: Determines whether a secondary traces will be bucketed for coherent material access (default = 1

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.HardwareRayTracing.Compact
cvars.description: Determines whether a second trace will be compacted before traversal (default = 1

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.HardwareRayTracing.DeferredMaterial
cvars.description: Enables deferred material pipeline (Default = 1)

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.HardwareRayTracing.DeferredMaterial.TileDimension
cvars.description: Determines the tile dimension for material sorting (Default = 64)

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.HardwareRayTracing.GroupCount
cvars.description: Determines the active group count when dispatching raygen shader (default = 4096

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.HardwareRayTracing.Retrace.FarField
cvars.description: Determines whether a second trace will be fired for far-field contribution (default = 1

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.HardwareRayTracing.Retrace.HitLighting
cvars.description: Determines whether a second trace will be fired for hit-lighting for invalid surface-cache hits (default = 1

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.HardwareRayTracing.ThreadCount
cvars.description: Determines the active group count when dispatching raygen shader (default = 64

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.HiResSurface
cvars.description: Whether visualization should sample highest available surface data or use lowest res always resident pages.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.IndirectDiffuse
cvars.description: Visualize Lumen Indirect Diffuse.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.MaxMeshSDFTraceDistance
cvars.description: Max trace distance for Lumen scene visualization rays. Values below 0 will automatically derrive this from cone angle.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.RayTracingGroups
cvars.description: Visualize bounds for ray tracing groups. Control visualization distance using r.Lumen.Visualize.CardPlacementDistance. 0 - disable 1 - all groups 2 - groups with a single instance

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.SurfaceCacheFeedback
cvars.description: Whether visualization should write surface cache feedback requests into the feedback buffer.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.TraceMeshSDFs
cvars.description: Whether to use Mesh SDF tracing for lumen scene visualization.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.TraceRadianceCache
cvars.description: Whether to use radiance cache for Lumen scene visualization.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.UseShaderPrintForTraces
cvars.description: Whether to use ShaderPrint or custom line renderer for trace visualization.

cvars.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.ViewMode
cvars.description: When the viewport view-mode is set to 'Lumen Visualization', this command specifies which of the various channels to display. Values entered other than the allowed values shown below will be ignored. Overview PerformanceOverview LumenScene GeometryNormals ReflectionView SurfaceCache DedicatedReflectionRays

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.DirectLighting
cvars.description: Whether to compute direct ligshting for surface cache.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.DirectLighting.BatchShadows
cvars.description: Whether to enable batching lumen light shadow passes. This cvar mainly exists for debugging.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.DirectLighting.CloudTransmittance
cvars.description: Whether to sample cloud shadows when avaible.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.DirectLighting.GlobalSDF.ShadowRayBias
cvars.description: Bias for tracing global SDF shadow rays.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.DirectLighting.HardwareRayTracing
cvars.description: Enables hardware ray tracing for Lumen direct lighting (Default = 1)

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.DirectLighting.HardwareRayTracing.HeightfieldProjectionBias
cvars.description: Applies a projection bias such that an occlusion ray starts on the ray-tracing heightfield representation.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.DirectLighting.HardwareRayTracing.HeightfieldProjectionBiasSearchRadius
cvars.description: Determines the search radius for heightfield projection bias. Larger search radius corresponds to increased traversal cost (default = 256).

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.DirectLighting.HardwareRayTracing.ShadowRayBias
cvars.description: Bias for hardware ray tracing shadow rays.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.DirectLighting.Heightfield.ShadowRayBias
cvars.description: Bias for tracing heightfield shadow rays.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.DirectLighting.MaxLightsPerTile
cvars.description: Max number of lights to pick per tile based on their intenstiy and attenuation. Valid values are 4/8/16/32. Increasing this value will cause more memory usage and will slow down Lumen surface cache direct lighting pass.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.DirectLighting.MeshSDF.ShadowRayBias
cvars.description: Bias for tracing mesh SDF shadow rays.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.DirectLighting.OffscreenShadowing.TraceMeshSDFs
cvars.description: Whether to trace against Mesh Signed Distance Fields for offscreen shadowing, or to trace against the lower resolution Global SDF.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.DirectLighting.UpdateFactor
cvars.description: Controls for how many texels direct lighting will be updated every frame. Texels = SurfaceCacheTexels / Factor.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.DumpStats
cvars.description: Whether to log Lumen scene stats on the next frame. 2 - dump mesh DF. 3 - dump LumenScene objects.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.FarField
cvars.description: Enable/Disable Lumen far-field ray tracing.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.FarField.FarFieldDitherScale
cvars.description: Dither region between near and far field in world space units.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.FarField.MaxTraceDistance
cvars.description: Maximum hit-distance for Lumen far-field ray tracing (Default = 1.0e6).

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.FarField.ReferencePos.Z
cvars.description: Far-field reference position in Z (default = 100000.0)

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.FastCameraMode
cvars.description: Whether to update the Lumen Scene for fast camera movement - lower quality, faster updates so lighting can keep up with the camera.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.GlobalSDF.ClipmapExtent
cvars.description: Global Distance Field first clipmap extent when Lumen is enabled.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.GlobalSDF.CoveredExpandSurfaceScale
cvars.description: Scales the half voxel SDF expand used by the Global SDF to reconstruct surfaces that are thinner than the distance between two voxels, erring on the side of over-occlusion.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.GlobalSDF.DitheredTransparencyStepThreshold
cvars.description: Per-step stochastic semi-transparency threshold, for tracing users that have dithered transparency enabled, for regions of space that only contain Two Sided Mesh SDFs.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.GlobalSDF.DitheredTransparencyTraceThreshold
cvars.description: Per-trace stochastic semi-transparency threshold, for tracing users that have dithered transparency enabled, for regions of space that only contain Two Sided Mesh SDFs. Anything less than 1 causes leaking.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.GlobalSDF.NotCoveredExpandSurfaceScale
cvars.description: Scales the half voxel SDF expand used by the Global SDF to reconstruct surfaces that are thinner than the distance between two voxels, for regions of space that only contain Two Sided Mesh SDFs.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.GlobalSDF.NotCoveredMinStepScale
cvars.description: Scales the min step size to improve performance, for regions of space that only contain Two Sided Mesh SDFs.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.GlobalSDF.Resolution
cvars.description: Global Distance Field resolution when Lumen is enabled.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.GlobalSDF.SimpleCoverageBasedExpand
cvars.description: Whether to use simple coverage based surface expansion. Less accurate but does not sample the coverage texture.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.GPUDrivenUpdate
cvars.description: Whether to use GPU to update Lumen Scene. Work in progress.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.Heightfield.CullForView
cvars.description: Enables Heightfield culling (default = 1)

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.Heightfield.FroxelCulling
cvars.description: Enables Heightfield froxel view culling (default = 1)

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.Heightfield.MaxTracingSteps
cvars.description: Sets the maximum steps for heightfield (Landscape) software ray tracing (default = 32)

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.Heightfield.ReceiverBias
cvars.description: Extra bias for Landscape surface points. Helps to fix mismatching LOD artifacts between fixed LOD in Surface Cache and Landscape CLOD.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.Heightfield.Tracing
cvars.description: Enables heightfield (Landscape) software ray tracing (default = 1)

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.Lighting.AsyncCompute
cvars.description: Whether to run LumenSceneLighting on the compute pipe if possible.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.Lighting.Feedback
cvars.description: Whether to prioritize surface cache lighting updates based on the feedback.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.Lighting.ForceLightingUpdate
cvars.description: Force full Lumen Scene Lighting update every frame. Useful for debugging

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.Lighting.Stats
cvars.description: GPU print out Lumen lighting update stats.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.MeshCardsPerTask
cvars.description: How many mesh cards to process per single surface cache update task.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.ParallelUpdate
cvars.description: Whether to run the Lumen Scene update in parallel.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.PrimitivesPerTask
cvars.description: How many primitives to process per single surface cache update task.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.PropagateGlobalLightingChange
cvars.description: Whether to detect big scene lighting changes and speedup Lumen update for those frames.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.Radiosity
cvars.description: Whether to enable the Radiosity, which is an indirect lighting gather from the Surface Cache that provides multibounce diffuse.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.Radiosity.HardwareRayTracing
cvars.description: Enables hardware ray tracing for radiosity (default = 1).

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.Radiosity.HemisphereProbeResolution
cvars.description: Number of traces along one dimension of the hemisphere probe layout.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.Radiosity.MaxRayIntensity
cvars.description: Clamps Radiosity trace intensity, relative to current view exposure. Useful for reducing artifacts from small bright emissive sources, but loses energy and adds view dependence.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.Radiosity.ProbeOcclusion
cvars.description: Whether to depth test against the probe hit depths during interpolation and filtering to reduce leaking. Not available with Software Ray Tracing due to imprecision.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.Radiosity.ProbeOcclusionStrength
cvars.description: Strength of probe occlusion. 0 = No probe occlusion, 1 = Attempt to stop all leaking, but has self-occlusion artifacts, .5 (default) = tradeoff between the extremes.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.Radiosity.ProbePlaneWeighting
cvars.description: Whether to weight Radiosity probes by plane distance, useful to prevent leaking.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.Radiosity.ProbeSpacing
cvars.description: Distance between probes, in Surface Cache texels

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.Radiosity.SpatialFilterProbes
cvars.description: Whether to spatially filter Radiosity probes. Filtering reduces noise but increases leaking.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.Radiosity.SpatialFilterProbes.KernelSize
cvars.description: Larger kernels reduce noise but increase leaking.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.Radiosity.SpatialFilterProbes.PlaneWeightingDepthScale
cvars.description: Controls the distance at which probes can be interpolated from. Higher values introduce leaking.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.Radiosity.Temporal
cvars.description: Whether to use temporal super sampling on Radiosity. Increases quality, but also adds latency to the speed that lighting changes propagate, and animated noise in the results.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.Radiosity.Temporal.FixedJitterIndex
cvars.description: If zero or greater, overrides the temporal jitter index with a fixed index. Useful for debugging and inspecting sampling patterns.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.Radiosity.Temporal.MaxFramesAccumulated
cvars.description: Lower values cause the temporal filter to propagate lighting changes faster, but also increase flickering from noise.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.Radiosity.UpdateFactor
cvars.description: Controls for how many texels radiosity will be updated every frame. Texels = SurfaceCacheTexels / Factor.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.Radiosity.VisualizeProbeRadius
cvars.description: Radius of a visualized radiosity probe.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.Radiosity.VisualizeProbes
cvars.description: Whether to visualize radiosity probes.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.Stats
cvars.description: Display various Lumen GPU Scene stats for debugging.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.SurfaceCache.AtlasSize
cvars.description: Surface cache card atlas size.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.SurfaceCache.CardCaptureEnableInvalidation
cvars.description: Whether to enable manual card recapture through InvalidateSurfaceCacheForPrimitive().

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.SurfaceCache.CardCaptureFactor
cvars.description: Controls how many texels can be captured per frame. Texels = SurfaceCacheTexels / Factor.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.SurfaceCache.CardCaptureMargin
cvars.description: How far from Lumen scene range start to capture cards.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.SurfaceCache.CardCaptureRefreshFraction
cvars.description: Fraction of card capture budget allowed to be spent on re-capturing existing pages in order to refresh surface cache materials. 0 disables card refresh.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.SurfaceCache.CardFixedDebugResolution
cvars.description: Lumen card resolution

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.SurfaceCache.CardMaxResolution
cvars.description: Maximum card resolution in Lumen Scene

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.SurfaceCache.CardMaxTexelDensity
cvars.description: Lumen card texels per world space distance

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.SurfaceCache.CardMinResolution
cvars.description: Minimum mesh card size resolution to be visible in Lumen Scene

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.SurfaceCache.CardTexelDensityScale
cvars.description: Lumen card texels per world space distance

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.SurfaceCache.Compress
cvars.description: Whether to use run time compression for surface cache. 0 - Disabled 1 - Compress using UAV aliasing if supported 2 - Compress using CopyTexture (may be very slow on some RHIs)

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.SurfaceCache.FarField.CardDistance
cvars.description: Far Field Lumen card culling distance

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.SurfaceCache.FarField.CardTexelDensity
cvars.description: Far Field Lumen card texels per world space unit

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.SurfaceCache.Feedback
cvars.description: Whether to use surface cache feedback to selectively map higher quality surface cache pages.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.SurfaceCache.Feedback.MinPageHits
cvars.description: Min number of page hits to demand a new page.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.SurfaceCache.Feedback.ResLevelBias
cvars.description: Bias resolution of on demand surface cache pages.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.SurfaceCache.Feedback.TileSize
cvars.description: One surface cache feedback element will be writen out per tile. Aligned to a power of two.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.SurfaceCache.Feedback.UniqueElements
cvars.description: Limit of unique surface cache feedback elements. Used to resize buffers.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.SurfaceCache.ForceEvictHiResPages
cvars.description: Evict all optional hi-res surface cache pages.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.SurfaceCache.Freeze
cvars.description: Freeze surface cache updates for debugging.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.SurfaceCache.FreezeUpdateFrame
cvars.description: Keep updating the same subset of surface cache for debugging and profiling.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.SurfaceCache.LogUpdates
cvars.description: Whether to log Lumen surface cache updates. 2 - will log mesh names.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.SurfaceCache.MeshCardsDebugSingleCard
cvars.description: Spawn only a specified card on mesh. Useful for debugging.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.SurfaceCache.MeshCardsMergeComponents
cvars.description: Whether to merge all components with the same RayTracingGroupId into a single MeshCards.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.SurfaceCache.MeshCardsMergedCardMinSurfaceArea
cvars.description: Minimum area to spawn a merged card.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.SurfaceCache.MeshCardsMergedMaxWorldSize
cvars.description: Only merged bounds less than this size on any axis are considered, since Lumen Scene streaming relies on object granularity.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.SurfaceCache.MeshCardsMergedResolutionScale
cvars.description: Scale on the resolution calculation for a merged MeshCards. This compensates for the merged box getting a higher resolution assigned due to being closer to the viewer.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.SurfaceCache.MeshCardsMergeInstances
cvars.description: Whether to merge all instances of a Instanced Static Mesh Component into a single MeshCards.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.SurfaceCache.MeshCardsMergeInstancesMaxSurfaceAreaRatio
cvars.description: Only merge if the (combined box surface area) / (summed instance box surface area) < MaxSurfaceAreaRatio

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.SurfaceCache.MeshCardsMinSize
cvars.description: Minimum mesh cards world space size to be included in Lumen Scene.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.SurfaceCache.MeshTargetScreenSize
cvars.description: Controls which LOD level will be used to capture static meshes into surface cache.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.SurfaceCache.NaniteLODScaleFactor
cvars.description: Controls which LOD level will be used to capture Nanite meshes into surface cache.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.SurfaceCache.NaniteMultiView
cvars.description: Toggle multi view Lumen Nanite Card capture for debugging.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.SurfaceCache.NumFramesToKeepUnusedPages
cvars.description: Num frames to keep unused pages in surface cache.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.SurfaceCache.RemovesPerFrame
cvars.description: How many mesh cards removes can be done per frame.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.SurfaceCache.ResampleLighting
cvars.description: Whether to resample card lighting when cards are reallocated. This is needed for Radiosity temporal accumulation but can be disabled for debugging.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.SurfaceCache.Reset
cvars.description: Reset all atlases and captured cards.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.SurfaceCache.ResetEveryNthFrame
cvars.description: Continuously reset all atlases and captured cards every N-th frame.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.UpdateViewOrigin
cvars.description: Whether to update view origin for voxel lighting and global distance field. Useful for debugging.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.UploadEveryFrame
cvars.description: Whether to upload the entire Lumen Scene's data every frame. Useful for debugging.

cvars.name: r.LumenScene.VisualizePrimitiveGroups
cvars.description: Visualize Lumen GPU Scene Primitive Groups.

cvars.name: r.ManyLights
cvars.description: Whether to enable Many Lights. Experimental feature leveraging ray tracing to stochastically importance sample lights. 1 - all lights using ray tracing shadows will be stochastically sampled 2 - all lights will be stochastically sampled

cvars.name: r.ManyLights.Debug
cvars.description: Whether to enabled debug mode, which prints various extra debug information from shaders.0 - Disable 1 - Visualize sampling 2 - Visualize tracing

cvars.name: r.ManyLights.Debug.LightId
cvars.description: Which light to show debug info for. When set to -1, uses the currently selected light in editor.

cvars.name: r.ManyLights.FixedStateFrameIndex
cvars.description: Whether to override View.StateFrameIndex for debugging.

cvars.name: r.ManyLights.HairVoxelTraces
cvars.description: Whether to trace hair voxels.

cvars.name: r.ManyLights.HardwareRayTracing
cvars.description: Whether to use hardware ray tracing for shadow rays.

cvars.name: r.ManyLights.HardwareRayTracing.AvoidSelfIntersections
cvars.description: Whether to avoid self-intersections. Currently shares config with Lumen: - r.Lumen.HardwareRayTracing.SkipBackFaceHitDistance - r.Lumen.HardwareRayTracing.SkipTwoSidedHitDistance

cvars.name: r.ManyLights.HardwareRayTracing.Bias
cvars.description: Constant bias for hardware ray traced shadow rays.

cvars.name: r.ManyLights.HardwareRayTracing.Inline
cvars.description: Uses hardware inline ray tracing for ray traced lighting, when available.

cvars.name: r.ManyLights.HardwareRayTracing.MaxIterations
cvars.description: Limit number of ray tracing traversal iterations on supported platfoms. Improves performance, but may add over-occlusion.

cvars.name: r.ManyLights.HardwareRayTracing.NormalBias
cvars.description: Normal bias for hardware ray traced shadow rays.

cvars.name: r.ManyLights.IESProfiles
cvars.description: Whether to support IES profiles on lights.

cvars.name: r.ManyLights.LightFunctions
cvars.description: Whether to support light functions.

cvars.name: r.ManyLights.MaxShadingTilesPerGridCell
cvars.description: Maximum number of shading tiles per grid cell.

cvars.name: r.ManyLights.NumSamplesPerPixel
cvars.description: Number of samples (shadow rays) per half-res pixel. 1 - 0.25 trace per pixel 2 - 0.5 trace per pixel 4 - 1 trace per pixel

cvars.name: r.ManyLights.Reset
cvars.description: Reset history for debugging.

cvars.name: r.ManyLights.ResetEveryNthFrame
cvars.description: Reset history every Nth frame for debugging.

cvars.name: r.ManyLights.Sampling.MinWeight
cvars.description: Determines minimal sample influence on final pixels. Used to skip samples which would have minimal impact to the final image even if light is fully visible.

cvars.name: r.ManyLights.ScreenTraces
cvars.description: Whether to use screen space tracing for shadow rays.

cvars.name: r.ManyLights.ScreenTraces.MaxIterations
cvars.description: Max iterations for HZB tracing.

cvars.name: r.ManyLights.ScreenTraces.MinimumOccupancy
cvars.description: Minimum number of threads still tracing before aborting the trace. Can be used for scalability to abandon traces that have a disproportionate cost.

cvars.name: r.ManyLights.ScreenTraces.RelativeDepthThickness
cvars.description: Determines depth thickness of objects hit by HZB tracing, as a relative depth threshold.

cvars.name: r.ManyLights.Spatial
cvars.description: Whether denoiser should run spatial filter.

cvars.name: r.ManyLights.Spatial.DepthWeightScale
cvars.description: Scales the depth weight of the spatial filter. Smaller values allow for more sample reuse, but also introduce more bluriness between unrelated surfaces.

cvars.name: r.ManyLights.Temporal
cvars.description: Whether to use temporal accumulation for shadow mask.

cvars.name: r.ManyLights.Temporal.MaxFramesAccumulated
cvars.description: Max history length when accumulating frames. Lower values have less ghosting, but more noise.

cvars.name: r.ManyLights.Temporal.NeighborhoodClampScale
cvars.description: Scales how permissive is neighborhood clamp. Higher values cause more ghosting, but allow smoother temporal accumulation.

cvars.name: r.ManyLights.TexturedRectLights
cvars.description: Whether to support textured rect lights.

cvars.name: r.ManyLights.WaveOps
cvars.description: Whether to use wave ops. Useful for debugging.

cvars.name: r.ManyLights.WorldSpaceTraces
cvars.description: Whether to trace world space shadow rays for samples. Useful for debugging.

cvars.name: r.Material.CullIntermediateUniformExpressions
cvars.description: Enables culling of intermediate uniform expressions, reducing preshader count, saving performance

cvars.name: r.Material.EnableTranslationLogFile
cvars.description: Enables material translation log file generation for tracking materials translation time (written to ShaderDebugInfo/MaterialTranslationLog-X.csv")."

cvars.name: r.Material.EnergyConservation
cvars.description: Enable energy conservation for legacy materials (project settings, read only). Please note that when Substrate is enabled, energy conservation is forced to enabled.

cvars.name: r.Material.ExcludeNonPipelinedShaders
cvars.description: if != 0, standalone shaders that are also part of FShaderPipeline will not be compiled (default).

cvars.name: r.Material.ExperimentalMaterialCachedDataAnalysisEnabled
cvars.description: Enables material cached data experimental graph based analysis

cvars.name: r.Material.PedanticErrorChecksEnabled
cvars.description: Enables material compilation pedantic error checking

cvars.name: r.Material.PreshaderGapInterval
cvars.description: Insert an empty element in the preshader buffer every specified number of elements in the buffer. Workaround for a shader compiler register overflow bug.

cvars.name: r.Material.RoughDiffuse
cvars.description: Enable rough diffuse material.

cvars.name: r.Material.ShaderMapDump
cvars.description: Outputs a textual dump of all shader maps found for the given named material (specified by path). Note that this will include any instances of said material created by a MaterialInstance. Files (.txt extension) will be dumped to Saved\MaterialShaderMaps named with the DDC key hash.

cvars.name: r.MaterialEditor.AllowIgnoringCompilationErrors
cvars.description: Allow ignoring compilation errors of platform shaders and derived materials.

cvars.name: r.MaterialEditor.AnalyticDeriv
cvars.description: Enable analytic derivative code generation.

cvars.name: r.MaterialEditor.AnalyticDeriv.DebugEmitInvalidDerivTokens
cvars.description: Debug: Emit '$' tokens to mark expressions with invalid derivatives.

cvars.name: r.MaterialEditor.AnalyticDeriv.DebugGenerateAllFunctions
cvars.description: Debug: Generate all derivative functions.

cvars.name: r.MaterialEditor.AnalyticDeriv.DebugTextureSample
cvars.description: Debug: Instrument texture sampling with modes that can be controlled with r.GeneralPurposeTweak/r.GeneralPurposeTweak2.

cvars.name: r.MaterialEditor.ContextMenu.CategoryWeight
cvars.description: The amount of weight placed on categories that match what the user has typed in

cvars.name: r.MaterialEditor.ContextMenu.DescriptionWeight
cvars.description: The amount of weight placed on description that match what the user has typed in

cvars.name: r.MaterialEditor.ContextMenu.KeywordWeight
cvars.description: The amount of weight placed on search items keyword

cvars.name: r.MaterialEditor.ContextMenu.NodeTitleWeight
cvars.description: The amount of weight placed on the search items title

cvars.name: r.MaterialEditor.ContextMenu.PercentageMatchWeightMultiplier
cvars.description: A multiplier for how much weight to give something based on the percentage match it is

cvars.name: r.MaterialEditor.ContextMenu.ShorterMatchWeight
cvars.description: Increasing this weight will make shorter words preferred

cvars.name: r.MaterialEditor.ContextMenu.StartsWithBonusWeightMultiplier
cvars.description: The multiplier given if the keyword starts with a term the user typed in

cvars.name: r.MaterialEditor.ContextMenu.WholeMatchLocalizedWeightMultiplier
cvars.description: The multiplier given if there is an exact localized match to the search term

cvars.name: r.MaterialEditor.ContextMenu.WholeMatchWeightMultiplier
cvars.description: The multiplier given if there is an exact match to the search term

cvars.name: r.MaterialEditor.LWCEnabled
cvars.description: Enable generation of LWC values in materials. If disabled, materials will perform all operations at float-precision

cvars.name: r.MaterialEditor.LWCTruncateMode
cvars.description: Whether or not the material compiler respects the truncate LWC node or automatic transforms. 0: no truncate (LWC always used even if asked to truncate) 1: respect the truncate LWC node 2: respect the truncate LWC node and automatic transforms

cvars.name: r.MaterialEditor.MaxDerivedMaterialInstances
cvars.description: Limits amount of derived material instance shown in platform stats. Use negative number to disable the limit. Material editor must be re-opened if changed at runtime.

cvars.name: r.MaterialEditor.PreshaderDumpToHLSL
cvars.description: Controls whether to append preshader expressions and parameter reference counts to the HLSL source window (as comments at the end of the code).

cvars.name: r.MaterialEditor.UseDevShaders
cvars.description: Toggles whether the material editor will use shaders that include extra overhead incurred by the editor. Material editor must be re-opened if changed at runtime.

cvars.name: r.MaterialEnableNewHLSLGenerator
cvars.description: Enables the new (WIP) material HLSL generator. 0 - Don't allow 1 - Allow if enabled by material 2 - Force all materials to use new generator

cvars.name: r.MaterialLogErrorOnFailure
cvars.description: When enabled, when a material fails to compile it will issue an Error instead of a Warning. Default: false

cvars.name: r.MaterialParameterLegacyChecks
cvars.description: When enabled, sanity check new material parameter logic against legacy path. Note that this can be slow

cvars.name: r.MaterialQualityLevel
cvars.description: 0 corresponds to low quality materials, as defined by quality switches in materials, 1 corresponds to high, 2 for medium, and 3 for Epic.

cvars.name: r.MaterialsDuplicateVerbatim
cvars.description: When enabled, when a material or material function is duplicated, it will not change StateId (which influences DDC keys) pre-emptively. Default: false

cvars.name: r.MeshCardRepresentation.Debug
cvars.description: Enable mesh cards debugging. Skips DDCs and appends extra debug data.

cvars.name: r.MeshCardRepresentation.Debug.SurfelDirection
cvars.description: Generate cards for only surfels pointing in a specific direction.

cvars.name: r.MeshCardRepresentation.MinDensity
cvars.description: How much of filled area needs to be there to spawn a card, [0;1] range.

cvars.name: r.MeshCardRepresentation.NormalTreshold
cvars.description: Normal treshold when surface elements should be clustered together.

cvars.name: r.MeshCardRepresentation.ParallelBuild
cvars.description: Whether to use task for mesh card building.

cvars.name: r.MeshDeformerMaxLOD
cvars.description: Don't apply MeshDeformers to SkinnedMeshs above this LOD. Default is -1 (disabled).

cvars.name: r.MeshDrawCommands.AllowOnDemandShaderCreation
cvars.description: How to create RHI shaders: 0: Always create them on a Rendering Thread, before executing other MDC tasks. 1: If RHI supports multi-threaded shader creation, create them on demand on tasks threads, at the time of submitting the draws.

cvars.name: r.MeshDrawCommands.BatchSize
cvars.description: Batch size of cache mesh draw commands when multithreading of draw command caching is enabled

cvars.name: r.MeshDrawCommands.CacheMultithreaded
cvars.description: Enable multithreading of draw command caching for static meshes. 0=disabled, 1=enabled (default)

cvars.name: r.MeshDrawCommands.DynamicInstancing
cvars.description: Whether to dynamically combine multiple compatible visible Mesh Draw Commands into one instanced draw on vertex factories that support it.

cvars.name: r.MeshDrawCommands.LogDynamicInstancingStats
cvars.description: Whether to log dynamic instancing stats on the next frame

cvars.name: r.MeshDrawCommands.LogMeshDrawCommandMemoryStats
cvars.description: Whether to log mesh draw command memory stats on the next frame

cvars.name: r.MeshDrawCommands.ParallelPassSetup
cvars.description: Whether to setup mesh draw command pass in parallel.

cvars.name: r.MeshDrawCommands.Stats
cvars.description: Show on screen mesh draw command stats. The stats for visible triangles are post GPU culling. 1 = Show stats per pass. 2...N = Show the collection of stats matching the 'Collection' parameter in the ini file. You can also use 'stat culling' to see global culling stats.

cvars.name: r.MeshDrawCommands.UseCachedCommands
cvars.description: Whether to render from cached mesh draw commands (on vertex factories that support it), or to generate draw commands every frame.

cvars.name: r.MeshMerge.StoreImposterInfoInUVs
cvars.description: Determines whether or not to store imposter info (position.xy in UV2, position.z + scale in UV3) in the merged mesh UV channels 0: Do not store imposters info in UVs (default) 1: Store imposter info in UVs (legacy)

cvars.name: r.MeshParticle.MinDetailModeForMotionBlur
cvars.description: Sets the minimum detail mode before mesh particles emit motion blur (Low = 0, Med = 1, High = 2, Max = 3). Set to -1 to disable mesh particles motion blur entirely. Defaults to -1.

cvars.name: r.MeshReductionModule
cvars.description: Name of what mesh reduction module to choose. If blank it chooses any that exist.

cvars.name: r.MeshStreaming
cvars.description: Experimental - When non zero, enables mesh stremaing.

cvars.name: r.Mobile.AdrenoOcclusionMode
cvars.description: 0: Render occlusion queries after the base pass (default). 1: Render occlusion queries after translucency and a flush, which can help Adreno devices in GL mode.

cvars.name: r.Mobile.AllowDeferredShadingOpenGL
cvars.description: 0: Do not Allow Deferred Shading on OpenGL (default) 1: Allow Deferred Shading on OpenGL

cvars.name: r.Mobile.AllowDistanceFieldShadows
cvars.description: 0: Do not generate shader permutations to render distance field shadows from stationary directional lights. 1: Generate shader permutations to render distance field shadows from stationary directional lights. (default)

cvars.name: r.Mobile.AllowDitheredLODTransition
cvars.description: Whether to support 'Dithered LOD Transition' material option on mobile platforms

cvars.name: r.Mobile.AllowMovableDirectionalLights
cvars.description: 0: Do not generate shader permutations to render movable directional lights. 1: Generate shader permutations to render movable directional lights. (default)

cvars.name: r.Mobile.AllowPerPixelShadingModels
cvars.description: Whether to allow 'Per-Pixel Shader Models (From Material Expression)' in materials for Mobile feature level.

cvars.name: r.Mobile.AllowPixelDepthOffset
cvars.description: Whether to allow 'Pixel Depth Offset' in materials for Mobile feature level. Depth modification in pixel shaders may reduce GPU performance

cvars.name: r.Mobile.AmbientOcclusion
cvars.description: Caution: An extra sampler will be occupied in mobile base pass pixel shader after enable the mobile ambient occlusion. 0: Disable Ambient Occlusion on mobile platform. [default] 1: Enable Ambient Occlusion on mobile platform.

cvars.name: r.Mobile.AmbientOcclusionDepthBoundsTest
cvars.description: Whether to use depth bounds test to cull distant pixels during AO pass. This option is only valid when pixel shader path is used

cvars.name: r.Mobile.AmbientOcclusionQuality
cvars.description: The quality of screen space ambient occlusion on mobile platform. 0: Disabled. 1: Low.(Default) 2: Medium. 3: High.

cvars.name: r.Mobile.AmbientOcclusionShaderType
cvars.description: 0: ComputeShader. 1: Seperate ComputeShader. 2: PixelShader.

cvars.name: r.Mobile.AmbientOcclusionTechnique
cvars.description: 0: GTAO (default). 1: SSAO.

cvars.name: r.Mobile.AntiAliasing
cvars.description: Mobile default AntiAliasingMethod 0: off (no anti-aliasing) 1: FXAA (default, faster than TemporalAA but much more shimmering for non static cases) 2: TemporalAA(it will fallback to FXAA if SupportsGen4TAA is disabled) 3: MSAA

cvars.name: r.Mobile.CustomDepthForTranslucency
cvars.description: Whether to render custom depth/stencil if any tranclucency in the scene uses it. 0 = Off 1 = On [default]

cvars.name: r.Mobile.DBuffer
