cvars.description: Enables DBuffer decal material blend modes when using the mobile forward renderer. DBuffer decals are rendered before the base pass, allowing them to affect static lighting and skylighting correctly. When enabled, a full prepass will be forced which adds CPU / GPU cost. Several texture lookups will be done in the base pass to fetch the decal properties, which adds pixel work. 0: off (default) 1: on

cvars.name: r.Mobile.DesiredResX
cvars.description: Desired mobile X resolution (longest axis) (non-zero == use for X, calculate Y to retain aspect ratio)

cvars.name: r.Mobile.DesiredResY
cvars.description: Desired mobile Y resolution (shortest axis) (non-zero == use for Y, calculate X to retain aspect ratio)

cvars.name: r.Mobile.DisableVertexFog
cvars.description: If true, vertex fog will be omitted from the most of the mobile base pass shaders. Instead, fog will be applied in a separate pass and only when scene has a fog component.

cvars.name: r.Mobile.EarlyZPass
cvars.description: Whether to use a depth only pass to initialize Z culling for the mobile base pass. Changing this setting requires restarting the editor. 0: off 1: all opaque 2: masked primitives only

cvars.name: r.Mobile.EnableCloth
cvars.description: If enabled, compile cloth shader permutations and render simulated cloth on mobile platforms and Mobile mode on PC. Cannot be changed at runtime

cvars.name: r.Mobile.EnableMovableLightCSMShaderCulling
cvars.description: 0: All primitives lit by movable directional light render with CSM. 1: Primitives lit by movable directional light render with the CSM shader when determined to be within CSM range. (default)

cvars.name: r.Mobile.EnableMovableSpotlightsShadow
cvars.description: If 1 then enable movable spotlight shadow support

cvars.name: r.Mobile.EnableNoPrecomputedLightingCSMShader
cvars.description: 0: CSM shaders for scenes without any precomputed lighting are not generated unless r.AllowStaticLighting is 0. (default) 1: CSM shaders for scenes without any precomputed lighting are always generated.

cvars.name: r.Mobile.EnableOcclusionExtraFrame
cvars.description: Whether to allow extra frame for occlusion culling (enabled by default)

cvars.name: r.Mobile.EnableStaticAndCSMShadowReceivers
cvars.description: 0: Primitives can receive only static shadowing from stationary lights. 1: Primitives can receive both CSM and static shadowing from stationary lights. (default)

cvars.name: r.Mobile.EyeAdaptation
cvars.description: EyeAdaptation for mobile platform. 0: Disable 1: Enabled (Default)

cvars.name: r.Mobile.FloatPrecisionMode
cvars.description: 0: Use Half-precision (default) 1: Half precision, except Full precision for material expressions 2: Force use of high precision in pixel shaders.

cvars.name: r.Mobile.ForceDepthResolve
cvars.description: 0: Depth buffer is resolved by switching out render targets. (Default) 1: Depth buffer is resolved by switching out render targets and drawing with the depth texture.

cvars.name: r.Mobile.Forward.EnableClusteredReflections
cvars.description: Whether to enable clustered reflections on mobile forward, it's always supported on mobile deferred.

cvars.name: r.Mobile.Forward.EnableLocalLights
cvars.description: 0: Local Lights Disabled (default) 1: Local Lights Enabled 2: Local Lights Buffer Enabled

cvars.name: r.Mobile.Forward.LocalLightsSinglePermutation
cvars.description: Whether to use the same permutation regardless of local lights state. This may improve RT time at expense of some GPU time

cvars.name: r.Mobile.GTAOPreIntegratedTextureType
cvars.description: 0: No Texture. 1: Texture2D LUT. 2: Volume LUT(Default).

cvars.name: r.Mobile.IgnoreDeferredShadingSkyLightChannels
cvars.description: Whether to ignore primitive lighting channels when applying SkyLighting in a mobile deferred shading. This may improve GPU performance at the cost of incorrect lighting for a primitves with non-default lighting channels

cvars.name: r.Mobile.MaxVisibleMovableSpotLightShadows
cvars.description: The max number of visible spotlighs can cast shadow sorted by screen size, should be as less as possible for performance reason

cvars.name: r.Mobile.MeshSortingMethod
cvars.description: How to sort mesh commands on mobile: 0: Sort by state, roughly front to back (Default). 1: Strict front to back sorting.

cvars.name: r.Mobile.MobileSupportBloomSetupRareCases
cvars.description: 0: Don't generate permutations for BloomSetup rare cases. (default, like Sun+MetalMSAAHDRDecode, Dof+MetalMSAAHDRDecode, EyeAdaptaion+MetalMSAAHDRDecode, and any of their combinations) 1: Generate permutations for BloomSetup rare cases.

cvars.name: r.Mobile.PixelFogDepthTest
cvars.description: Whether to use depth and stencil tests for fog rendering

cvars.name: r.Mobile.PixelFogQuality
cvars.description: Exponentional height fog rendering quality. 0 - basic per-pixel fog1 - all per-pixel fog features (second fog, directional inscattering, aerial perspective)

cvars.name: r.Mobile.PixelProjectedReflectionQuality
cvars.description: The quality of pixel projected reflection on mobile platform. 0: Disabled 1: Best performance but may have some artifacts in some view angles. [default] 2: Better quality and reasonable performance and could fix some artifacts. 3: Best quality but will be much heavier.

cvars.name: r.Mobile.PlanarReflectionMode
cvars.description: The PlanarReflection will work differently on different mode on mobile platform, choose the proper mode as expect. 0: The PlanarReflection actor works as usual on all platforms. [default] 1: The PlanarReflection actor is only used for mobile pixel projection reflection, it will not affect PC/Console. MobileMSAA will be disabled as a side effect. 2: The PlanarReflection actor still works as usual on PC/Console platform and is used for mobile pixel projected reflection on mobile platform. MobileMSAA will be disabled as a side effect.

cvars.name: r.Mobile.PropagateAlpha
cvars.description: 0: Disabled1: Propagate Full Alpha Propagate

cvars.name: r.Mobile.SceneColorFormat
cvars.description: Overrides the memory layout (RGBA) used for the scene color of the mobile renderer. Unsupported overridden formats silently use default 0: (default) Automatically select the appropriate format depending on project settings and device support. 1: PF_FloatRGBA 64Bit 2: PF_FloatR11G11B10 32Bit 3: PF_B8G8R8A8 32Bit

cvars.name: r.Mobile.SceneDepthAux
cvars.description: 1: 16F SceneDepthAux Format2: 32F SceneDepthAux Format

cvars.name: r.Mobile.ShadingModelsMask
cvars.description: The mask that indicates which shading models are enabled on mobile platforms.

cvars.name: r.Mobile.ShadingPath
cvars.description: 0: Forward shading (default) 1: Deferred shading (Mobile HDR is required for Deferred)

cvars.name: r.Mobile.Shadow.CSMShaderCullingMethod
cvars.description: Method to determine which primitives will receive CSM shaders: 0 - disabled (all primitives will receive CSM) 1 - Light frustum, all primitives whose bounding box is within CSM receiving distance. (default) 2 - Combined caster bounds, all primitives whose bounds are within CSM receiving distance and the capsule of the combined bounds of all casters. 3 - Light frustum + caster bounds, all primitives whose bounds are within CSM receiving distance and capsule of at least one caster. (slowest) 4 - Cull all. Prevent primitives from receiving CSM shadows. 5 - Disable culling if mobile distance field shadowing is used for all views. Combine with 16 to change primitive bounding test to spheres instead of box. (i.e. 18 == combined casters + sphere test)

cvars.name: r.Mobile.ShadowmapRoundUpToPowerOfTwo
cvars.description: Round the shadow map up to power of two on mobile platform, in case there is any compatibility issue. 0: Disable (Default) 1: Enabled

cvars.name: r.Mobile.SkyLightPermutation
cvars.description: 0: Generate both sky-light and non-skylight permutations. (default) 1: Generate only non-skylight permutations. 2: Generate only skylight permutations

cvars.name: r.Mobile.SSAOHalfResolution
cvars.description: Whether to calculate SSAO at half resolution. 0: Disabled. 1: Half Resolution with bilinear upsample 2: Half Resolution with 4 tap bilateral upsample 3: Half Resolution with 9 tap bilateral upsample

cvars.name: r.Mobile.SupportGPUScene
cvars.description: Whether to support GPU scene, required for auto-instancing (only Mobile feature level)

cvars.name: r.Mobile.SupportsGen4TAA
cvars.description: Support desktop Gen4 TAA with mobile rendering 0: Fallback to FXAA1: Support Desktop Gen4 TAA (default)

cvars.name: r.Mobile.TonemapSubpass
cvars.description: Whether to enable mobile tonemap subpass 0 = Off [default] 1 = On

cvars.name: r.Mobile.UseClusteredDeferredShading
cvars.description: Toggle use of clustered deferred shading for lights that support it. 0 is off (default), 1 is on. (requires LightGrid: r.Mobile.Forward.EnableLocalLights=1)

cvars.name: r.Mobile.UseCSMShaderBranch
cvars.description: 0: Use two shader permutations for CSM and non-CSM shading. (default) 1: Use a single shader pemutation with a branch in a shader to apply CSM (only with r.AllowStaticLighting=0)

cvars.name: r.Mobile.UseHWsRGBEncoding
cvars.description: 0: Write sRGB encoding in the shader 1: Use GPU HW to convert linear to sRGB automatically (device must support sRGB write control)

cvars.name: r.Mobile.UseLightStencilCulling
cvars.description: Whether to use stencil to cull local lights. 0 is off, 1 is on (default)

cvars.name: r.Mobile.VirtualTextures
cvars.description: Whether virtual texture streaming is enabled on mobile platforms. Requires r.VirtualTextures enabled as well.

cvars.name: r.MobileContentScaleFactor
cvars.description: Content scale multiplier (equates to iOS's contentScaleFactor to support Retina displays

cvars.name: r.MobileHDR
cvars.description: 0: Mobile renders in LDR gamma space. (suggested for unlit games targeting low-end phones) 1: Mobile renders in HDR linear space. (default)

cvars.name: r.MobileMaxLoadedMips
cvars.description: Maximum number of loaded mips for nonstreaming mobile platforms.

cvars.name: r.MobileReduceLoadedMips
cvars.description: Reduce loaded texture mipmaps for nonstreaming mobile platforms.

cvars.name: r.MorphTarget.ForceUpdate
cvars.description: Force morph target deltas to be calculated every frame. 0: Default 1: Force Update

cvars.name: r.MorphTarget.MaxBlendWeight
cvars.description: Maximum value accepted as a morph target blend weight.. Blend target weights will be checked against this value for validation.Values smaller than this number will be clamped.

cvars.name: r.MorphTarget.Mode
cvars.description: Use GPU for computing morph targets. 0: Use original CPU method (loop per morph then by vertex) 1: Enable GPU method (default)

cvars.name: r.MorphTarget.WeightThreshold
cvars.description: Set MorphTarget Weight Threshold (Default : 0.000000).

cvars.name: r.MotionBlur.AllowExternalVelocityFlatten
cvars.description: Whether to allow motion blur's velocity flatten into other pass.

cvars.name: r.MotionBlur.Amount
cvars.description: Allows to override the postprocess setting (scale of motion blur) -1: override (default)

cvars.name: r.MotionBlur.Directions
cvars.description: Number of bluring direction (default = 1).

cvars.name: r.MotionBlur.HalfResGather
cvars.description: Whether to do motion blur filter dynamically at half res under heavy motion.

cvars.name: r.MotionBlur.HalfResInput
cvars.description: Whether motion blur also blur with a half resolution input.

cvars.name: r.MotionBlur.Max
cvars.description: Allows to override the postprocess setting (max length of motion blur, in percent of the screen width) -1: override (default)

cvars.name: r.MotionBlur.Scale
cvars.description: Allows to scale the postprocess intensity/amount setting in the postprocess. 1: don't do any scaling (default)

cvars.name: r.MotionBlur.TargetFPS
cvars.description: Allows to override the postprocess setting (target FPS for motion blur velocity length scaling). -1: override (default) 0: target current frame rate with moving average [1,120]: target FPS for motion blur velocity scaling

cvars.name: r.MotionBlurDebug
cvars.description: Defines if we log debugging output for motion blur rendering. 0: off (default) 1: on

cvars.name: r.MotionBlurFiltering
cvars.description: Useful developer variable 0: off (default, expected by the shader for better quality) 1: on

cvars.name: r.MotionBlurQuality
cvars.description: Defines the motion blur method which allows to adjust for quality or performance. 0:off, 1:low, 2:medium, 3:high (default), 4: very high

cvars.name: r.MotionBlurScatter
cvars.description: Forces scatter based max velocity method (slower).

cvars.name: r.MotionBlurSeparable
cvars.description: Adds a second motion blur pass that smooths noise for a higher quality blur.

cvars.name: r.Nanite
cvars.description: Render static meshes using Nanite.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.AllowComputeMaterials
cvars.description: Whether to enable support for Nanite compute materials

cvars.name: r.Nanite.AllowLegacyMaterials
cvars.description: Whether to enable support for Nanite legacy materials

cvars.name: r.Nanite.AllowMaskedMaterials
cvars.description: Whether to allow meshes using masked materials to render using Nanite.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.AllowSplineMeshes
cvars.description: Whether to enable support for Nanite spline meshes

cvars.name: r.Nanite.AllowTessellation
cvars.description: Whether to enable support for (highly experimental) Nanite runtime tessellation

cvars.name: r.Nanite.AllowWPODistanceDisable
cvars.description: Whether or not to allow disabling World Position Offset for Nanite instances at a distance from the camera.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.AsyncRasterization
cvars.description: If available, run Nanite compute rasterization as asynchronous compute.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.AsyncRasterization.ShadowDepths
cvars.description: If available, run Nanite compute rasterization of shadows as asynchronous compute.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.Builder.FallbackTriangleThreshold
cvars.description: Triangle count <= to this threshold uses the source mesh unchanged as the fallback.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.Bundle.Emulation
cvars.description: Whether to force shader bundle dispatch emulation

cvars.name: r.Nanite.Bundle.Shading
cvars.description: Whether to enable Nanite shader bundle dispatch for shading

cvars.name: r.Nanite.CoarseMeshStreaming
cvars.description: Generates 2 Nanite coarse mesh LODs and dynamically streams in the higher quality LOD depending on TLAS usage of the proxy.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.CoarseMeshStreamingMode
cvars.description: Streaming mode: 0: Use TLAS proxies to drive what to stream within the budget (default) 1: Stream in all registered meshes 2: Don't stream in any coarse LODs

cvars.name: r.Nanite.CoarseStreamingMeshMemoryPoolSizeInMB
cvars.description: Pool size for streaming in the render mesh & blas data for the coarse nanite meshes (default 200MB) This budget will be part of the mesh streaming pool size. On consoles the actual BLAS memory will be part of this, on PC only the vertex data because the BLAS is dependent on the GPU & driver.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.ComputeMaterials
cvars.description: Whether to enable Nanite compute materials

cvars.name: r.Nanite.ComputeRasterization
cvars.description: Whether to allow compute rasterization. When disabled all rasterization will go through the hardware path.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.Culling.DrawDistance
cvars.description: Set to 0 to test disabling Nanite culling due to instance draw distance.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.Culling.Frustum
cvars.description: Set to 0 to test disabling Nanite culling due to being outside of the view frustum.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.Culling.GlobalClipPlane
cvars.description: Set to 0 to test disabling Nanite culling due to being beyond the global clip plane. NOTE: Has no effect if r.AllowGlobalClipPlane=0.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.Culling.HZB
cvars.description: Set to 0 to test disabling Nanite culling due to occlusion by the hierarchical depth buffer.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.Culling.TwoPass
cvars.description: Set to 0 to test disabling two pass occlusion culling.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.Culling.WPODisableDistance
cvars.description: Set to 0 to test disabling 'World Position Offset Disable Distance' for Nanite instances.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.CustomDepth
cvars.description: Whether to allow Nanite to render in the CustomDepth pass

cvars.name: r.Nanite.CustomDepth.ExportMethod
cvars.description: 0 - Export depth/stencil into separate targets via PS 1 - Export depth/stencil direct to target via CS (requires HTILE support)

cvars.name: r.Nanite.DicingRate
cvars.description: Size of the micropolygons that Nanite tessellation will dice to, measured in pixels.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.EmitMaterialPerformanceWarnings
cvars.description: Emit log and on-screen messages to warn when a Nanite material is both programmable and using either masking or pixel depth offset (PDO).

cvars.name: r.Nanite.FastTileClear
cvars.description: Whether to enable Nanite fast tile clearing

cvars.name: r.Nanite.FastTileClear.SubTiles
cvars.description: Whether to enable Nanite fast tile clearing (for 4x4 sub tiles)

cvars.name: r.Nanite.FastTileVis
cvars.description: Allows for just showing a single target in the visualization, or -1 to show all accumulated

cvars.name: r.Nanite.FastVisBufferClear
cvars.description: Whether the fast clear optimization is enabled. Set to 2 for tile clear.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.FilterPrimitives
cvars.description: Whether per-view filtering of primitive is enabled.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.ForceEnableMeshes
cvars.description: Force enables all meshes to also build Nanite data, regardless of the enabled flag on the asset.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.ImposterMaxPixels
cvars.description: The maximum size of imposters measured in pixels.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.IsNaniteStaticMeshSettingsInitiallyCollapsed
cvars.description: If the Nanite Settings are initially collapsed in the details panel in the Static Mesh Editor Tool.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.IsolateInvalidCoarseMesh
cvars.description: Debug mode to render only non-Nanite proxies that incorrectly reference coarse static mesh assets.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.LargePageRectThreshold
cvars.description: Threshold for the size in number of virtual pages overlapped of a candidate cluster to be recorded as large in the stats.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.MaterialBuffers.AsyncUpdates
cvars.description: When non-zero, Nanite material data buffer updates are updated asynchronously.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.MaterialBuffers.Defrag
cvars.description: Whether or not to allow defragmentation of the Nanite material data buffer.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.MaterialBuffers.Defrag.Force
cvars.description: 0: Do not force a full defrag. 1: Force one full defrag on the next update. 2: Force a full defrag every frame.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.MaterialBuffers.Defrag.LowWaterMark
cvars.description: Ratio of used to allocated memory at which to decide to defrag the Nanite material data buffer.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.MaterialBuffers.ForceFullUpload
cvars.description: 0: Do not force a full upload. 1: Force one full upload on the next update. 2: Force a full upload every frame.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.MaterialBuffers.MaterialDataMinSizeBytes
cvars.description: The smallest size (in bytes) of the Nanite material data buffer.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.MaterialBuffers.PrimitiveDataMinSizeBytes
cvars.description: The smallest size (in bytes) of the Nanite per-primitive material data buffer.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.MaterialOverrides
cvars.description: Enable support for Nanite specific material overrides.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.MaterialSortMode
cvars.description: Method of sorting Nanite material draws. 0=disabled, 1=shader, 2=sortkey, 3=refcount

cvars.name: r.Nanite.MaterialVisibility
cvars.description: Whether to enable Nanite material visibility tests

cvars.name: r.Nanite.MaterialVisibility.Async
cvars.description: Whether to enable parallelization of Nanite material visibility tests

cvars.name: r.Nanite.MaxCandidateClusters
cvars.description: Maximum number of Nanite clusters before cluster culling.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.MaxCandidatePatches
cvars.description: Maximum number of Nanite patches considered for splitting.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.MaxNodes
cvars.description: Maximum number of Nanite nodes traversed during a culling pass.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.MaxPatchesPerGroup
cvars.description: Maximum number of patches to process per patch rasterizer group.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.MaxPixelsPerEdge
cvars.description: The triangle edge length that the Nanite runtime targets, measured in pixels.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.MaxVisibleClusters
cvars.description: Maximum number of visible Nanite clusters.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.MaxVisiblePatches
cvars.description: Maximum number of visible Nanite patches.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.MeshDrawCommands.CacheMultithreaded
cvars.description: Enable multithreading of draw command caching for Nanite materials. 0=disabled, 1=enabled (default)

cvars.name: r.Nanite.MeshShaderRasterization
cvars.description: If available, use mesh shaders for hardware rasterization.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.MinPixelsPerEdgeHW
cvars.description: The triangle edge length in pixels at which Nanite starts using the hardware rasterizer.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.MultipleSceneViewsInOnePass
cvars.description: Supports rendering multiple views (FSceneView) whenever possible. Currently only ISR stereo rendering is supported.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.OccludedInstancesBufferSizeMultiplier
cvars.description: DEBUG

cvars.name: r.Nanite.PersistentThreadsCulling
cvars.description: Perform node and cluster culling in one combined kernel using persistent threads.It doesn't scale threads with GPU size and relies on scheduler behavior, so it is not recommended for non-fixed hardware platforms.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.PrimaryRaster.PixelsPerEdgeScaling
cvars.description: Lower limit percentage to scale the Nanite primary raster MaxPixelsPerEdge value when over budget.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.PrimaryRaster.TimeBudgetMs
cvars.description: Frame's time budget for Nanite primary raster in milliseconds.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.PrimShaderRasterization
cvars.description: If available, use primitive shaders for hardware rasterization.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.ProgrammableRaster
cvars.description: Whether to allow programmable raster. When disabled all rasterization will go through the fixed function path.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.ProjectEnabled
cvars.description: This setting allows you to disable Nanite on platforms that support it to reduce the number of shaders. It cannot be used to force Nanite on on unsupported platforms.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.ProxyRenderMode
cvars.description: Render proxy meshes if Nanite is unsupported. 0: Fall back to rendering Nanite proxy meshes if Nanite is unsupported. (default) 1: Disable rendering if Nanite is enabled on a mesh but is unsupported. 2: Disable rendering if Nanite is enabled on a mesh but is unsupported, except for static mesh editor toggle.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.ShadeBinningMode
cvars.description: 0: Auto 1: Force to Pixel Mode 2: Force to Quad Mode

cvars.name: r.Nanite.ShadowRaster.PixelsPerEdgeScaling
cvars.description: Lower limit percentage to scale the Nanite shadow raster MaxPixelsPerEdge value when over budget.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.ShadowRaster.TimeBudgetMs
cvars.description: Frame's time budget for Nanite shadow raster in milliseconds.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.ShowMeshDrawEvents
cvars.description: Emit draw events for Nanite rasterization and materials.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.ShowUnsupportedError
cvars.description: Specify behavior of Nanite unsupported screen error message. 0: disabled 1: show error if Nanite is present in the scene but unsupported, and fallback meshes are not used for rendering; (default) 2: show error if Nanite is present in the scene but unsupported, even if fallback meshes are used for rendering

cvars.name: r.Nanite.SoftwareVRS
cvars.description: Whether to enable Nanite software variable rate shading in compute.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.StatsFilter
cvars.description: Sets the name of a specific Nanite raster pass to capture stats from - enumerate available filters with NaniteStats List cmd.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.Streaming.Async
cvars.description: Perform most of the Nanite streaming on an asynchronous worker thread instead of the rendering thread.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.Streaming.AsyncCompute
cvars.description: Schedule GPU work in async compute queue.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.Streaming.BandwidthLimit
cvars.description: Streaming bandwidth limit in megabytes per second. Negatives values are interpreted as unlimited.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.Streaming.Debug.ExplicitRequests
cvars.description: Process requests coming from explicit calls to RequestNanitePages().

cvars.name: r.Nanite.Streaming.Debug.GPURequests
cvars.description: Process requests coming from GPU rendering feedback

cvars.name: r.Nanite.Streaming.Debug.Prefetch
cvars.description: Process resource prefetch requests from calls to PrefetchResource().

cvars.name: r.Nanite.Streaming.DynamicallyGrowAllocations
cvars.description: Determines if root page and imposter allocations are allowed to grow dynamically from initial allocation set by r.Nanite.Streaming.NumInitialRootPages and r.Nanite.Streaming.NumInitialImposters

cvars.name: r.Nanite.Streaming.DynamicPageUploadBuffer
cvars.description: Set Dynamic flag on the page upload buffer. This can eliminate a buffer copy on some platforms, but potentially also make the transcode shader slower.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.Streaming.Imposters
cvars.description: Load imposters used for faster rendering of distant objects. Requires additional memory and might not be worthwhile for scenes with HLOD or no distant objects.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.Streaming.MaxPageInstallsPerFrame
cvars.description: Maximum number of pages that can be installed per frame. Limiting this can limit the overhead of streaming.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.Streaming.MaxPendingPages
cvars.description: Maximum number of pages that can be pending for installation.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.Streaming.NumInitialImposters
cvars.description: Number of imposters in initial allocation. Allowed to grow on demand if r.Nanite.Streaming.DynamicallyGrowAllocations is enabled.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.Streaming.NumInitialRootPages
cvars.description: Number of root pages in initial allocation. Allowed to grow on demand if r.Nanite.Streaming.DynamicallyGrowAllocations is enabled.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.Streaming.ReservedResources
cvars.description: Allow allocating Nanite GPU resources as reserved resources for better memory utilization and more efficient resizing (EXPERIMENTAL)

cvars.name: r.Nanite.Streaming.StreamingPoolSize
cvars.description: Size of streaming pool in MB. Does not include memory used for root pages.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.Streaming.TranscodeWaveSize
cvars.description: Overrides the wave size to use for transcoding. 0: Automatic (default); 4: Wave size 4; 8: Wave size 8; 16: Wave size 16; 32: Wave size 32; 64: Wave size 64; 128: Wave size 128;

cvars.name: r.Nanite.StreamOut.CacheTraversalData
cvars.description: Cache traversal data during count pass to be able to skip traversal during stream out pass.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.Tessellation
cvars.description: Whether to enable (highly experimental) runtime tessellation.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.TestPrecacheDrawSkipping
cvars.description: Set to 1 to pretend all programmable raster draws are not precached yet.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.UseSceneInstanceHierarchy
cvars.description: Control Nanite use of the scene instance culling hierarchy. Has no effect unless r.SceneCulling is also enabled.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.ViewMeshLODBias.Enable
cvars.description: Whether LOD offset to apply for rasterized Nanite meshes for the main viewport should be based off TSR's ScreenPercentage (Enabled by default).

cvars.name: r.Nanite.ViewMeshLODBias.Min
cvars.description: Minimum LOD offset for rasterizing Nanite meshes for the main viewport (Default = -2).

cvars.name: r.Nanite.ViewMeshLODBias.Offset
cvars.description: LOD offset to apply for rasterized Nanite meshes for the main viewport when using TSR (Default = 0).

cvars.name: r.Nanite.Visualize
cvars.description: When the viewport view-mode is set to 'Nanite Visualization', this command specifies which of the various channels to display. Values entered other than the allowed values shown below will be ignored. Overview Mask Triangles Patches Clusters Primitives Instances Overdraw MaterialID LightmapUV EvaluateWPO PixelProgrammable Picking Groups Pages Hierarchy RasterMode RasterBins ShadingBins SceneZMin SceneZMax SceneZDelta SceneZDecoded MaterialZMin MaterialZMax MaterialZDelta MaterialZDecoded MaterialCount MaterialMode MaterialIndex HitProxyID LightmapUVIndex LightmapDataIndex PositionBits VSMStatic ShadingWriteMask NoDerivativeOps FastClearTiles Tessellation DisplacementScale

cvars.name: r.Nanite.Visualize.PixelProgrammableVisMode
cvars.description: 0: Show masked, pixel depth offset, and dynamic displacement materials. 1: Show masked materials only. 2: Show pixel depth offset only. 3: Show dynamic displacement only.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.VisualizeOverview
cvars.description: Specify the list of modes that can be used in the Nanite visualization overview. Put nothing between the commas to leave a gap. Choose from: Overview, Mask, Triangles, Patches, Clusters, Primitives, Instances, Overdraw, MaterialID, LightmapUV, EvaluateWPO, PixelProgrammable, Picking, Groups, Pages, Hierarchy, RasterMode, RasterBins, ShadingBins, SceneZMin, SceneZMax, SceneZDelta, SceneZDecoded, MaterialZMin, MaterialZMax, MaterialZDelta, MaterialZDecoded, MaterialCount, MaterialMode, MaterialIndex, HitProxyID, LightmapUVIndex, LightmapDataIndex, PositionBits, VSMStatic, ShadingWriteMask, NoDerivativeOps, FastClearTiles, Tessellation, DisplacementScale.

cvars.name: r.Nanite.VSMInvalidateOnLODDelta
cvars.description: Experimental: Clusters that are not streamed in to LOD matching the computed Nanite LOD estimate will trigger VSM invalidation such that they are re-rendered when streaming completes. NOTE: May cause a large increase in invalidations in cases where the streamer has difficulty keeping up (a future version will need to throttle the invalidations and/or add a threshold).

cvars.name: r.PathTracing
cvars.description: Enables the path tracing renderer (to guard the compilation of path tracer specific material permutations)

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.AdaptiveSampling
cvars.description: Determines if adaptive sampling is enabled. When non-zero, the path tracer will try to skip calculation of pixels below the specified error threshold. 0: off (uniform sampling - default) 1: on (adaptive sampling)

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.AdaptiveSampling.ErrorThreshold
cvars.description: This is the target perceptual error threshold. Once a pixel's error falls below this value, it will not be sampled again (default: 0.001)

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.AdaptiveSampling.Visualize
cvars.description: Select a visualization mode to help understand how adaptive sampling is working. 0: off 1: Visualize active pixels with heatmap (converged pixels are displayed as is) 2: Visualize sample count heatmap (against current max samples) 3-7: Visualize variance mip levels

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.AdjustMultiGPUPasses
cvars.description: Run extra passes per frame when multiple GPUs are active, to improve perf scaling as GPUs are added (default = true)

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.ApproximateCaustics
cvars.description: When non-zero, the path tracer will approximate caustic paths to reduce noise. This reduces speckles and noise from low-roughness glass and metals. (default = 1 (enabled))

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.AtmosphereOpticalDepthLUTNumSamples
cvars.description: Number of ray marching samples used when building the transmittance lookup texture used for transmittance calculations by the path tracer in reference atmosphere mode. (default = 16384)

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.AtmosphereOpticalDepthLUTResolution
cvars.description: Size of the square lookup texture used for transmittance calculations by the path tracer in reference atmosphere mode. (default = 512)

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.CameraMediumTracking
cvars.description: Enables automatic camera medium tracking to detect when a camera starts inside water or solid glass automatically (default = 1) 0: off 1: on (default)

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.Compaction
cvars.description: Enables path compaction to improve GPU occupancy for the path tracer (default: 1 (enabled))

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.DecalGrid.Visualize
cvars.description: Enables a visualization mode of the decal grid density where red indicates the maximum decal count has been reached (default = 0) 0: off (default) 1: decal count heatmap (red - close to overflow, increase r.RayTracing.DecalGrid.MaxCount) 2: unique decal lists (colors are a function of which decals occupy each cell)

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.DecalRoughnessCutoff
cvars.description: Do not evaluate decals beyond this roughness level to improve performance (default=0.15)

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.Denoiser
cvars.description: Enable denoising of the path traced output (if a denoiser plugin is active) (default = -1 (driven by postprocesing volume)) -1: inherit from PostProcessVolume 0: disable denoiser 1: enable denoiser (if a denoiser plugin is active)

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.Denoiser.NormalSpace
cvars.description: The space normal is in 0: World space (default) 1: Camera space. Some denoisers require camera space normal

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.Denoiser.Prepass.OutputVarianceTexture
cvars.description: 0: Variance is used only in the denoiser1: Output to the postprocess material, usually used by MRQ

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.Denoiser.Prepass.VarianceType
cvars.description: Select the per-pixel variance type:0: Multiple channel (RGB) variance for radiance1: Combined single channel variance for radiance, albedo and normal

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.DispatchSize
cvars.description: Controls the tile size used when rendering the image. Reducing this value may prevent GPU timeouts for heavy renders. (default = 2048)

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.EnableCameraBackfaceCulling
cvars.description: When non-zero, the path tracer will skip over backfacing triangles when tracing primary rays from the camera. (default = 1 (enabled))

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.EnableEmissive
cvars.description: Indicates if emissive materials should contribute to scene lighting (default = -1 (driven by postprocesing volume)

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.Experimental
cvars.description: Enables some experimental features of the path tracing renderer that require compiling additional permutations of the path tracer.

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.FilterWidth
cvars.description: Sets the anti-aliasing filter width (default = 3.0 which corresponds to a gaussian with standard deviation of a 1/2 pixel)

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.FlushDispatch
cvars.description: Enables flushing of the command list after dispatch to reduce the likelyhood of TDRs on Windows (default: 2) 0: off 1: flush after each dispatch 2: flush after each tile

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.FrameIndependentTemporalSeed
cvars.description: Indicates to use different temporal seed for each sample across frames rather than resetting the sequence at the start of each frame 0: off 1: on (default)

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.HeterogeneousVolumes.RebuildEveryFrame
cvars.description: Rebuilds volumetric acceleration structures every frame (default = 1)

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.IndirectDispatch
cvars.description: Enables indirect dispatch (if supported by the hardware) for compacted path tracing (default: 0 (disabled))

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.LightFunctionColor
cvars.description: Enables light functions to be colored instead of greyscale (default = 0) 0: off (default) 1: on (light function material output is used directly instead of converting to greyscale)

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.LightGridMaxCount
cvars.description: Controls the maximum number of lights per cell in the 2D light grid. The minimum of this value and the number of lights in the scene is used. (default = 128)

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.LightGridResolution
cvars.description: Controls the resolution of the 2D light grid used to cull irrelevant lights from lighting calculations (default = 256)

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.LightGridVisualize
cvars.description: Enables a visualization mode of the light grid density where red indicates the maximum light count has been reached (default = 0) 0: off (default) 1: light count heatmap (red - close to overflow, increase r.PathTracing.LightGridMaxCount) 2: unique light lists (colors are a function of which lights occupy each cell) 3: area light visualization (green: point light sources only, blue: some area light sources)

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.MaxBounces
cvars.description: Sets the maximum number of path tracing bounces (default = -1 (driven by postprocesing volume))

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.MaxPathIntensity
cvars.description: When positive, light paths greater that this amount are clamped to prevent fireflies (default = -1 (driven by postprocesing volume))

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.MaxRaymarchSteps
cvars.description: Upper limit on the number of ray marching steps in volumes. This limit should not be hit in most cases, but raising it can reduce bias in case it is. (default = 256).

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.MaxSSSBounces
cvars.description: Sets the maximum number of bounces inside subsurface materials. Lowering this value can make subsurface scattering render too dim, while setting it too high can cause long render times. (default = 256)

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.MeshDecalBias
cvars.description: Bias applied to mesh decal rays to avoid intersection with geometry (default = 1.0f)

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.MeshDecalRoughnessCutoff
cvars.description: Do not evaluate mesh decals beyond this roughness level to improve performance (default=0.15)

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.MISCompensation
cvars.description: Activates MIS compensation for skylight importance sampling. (default = 1 (enabled)) This option only takes effect when r.PathTracing.MISMode = 2

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.MISMode
cvars.description: Selects the sampling technique for light integration (default = 2 (MIS enabled)) 0: Material sampling 1: Light sampling 2: MIS betwen material and light sampling (default)

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.MultiGPU
cvars.description: Run the path tracer using all available GPUs when enabled (default = 0) Using this functionality in the editor requires -MaxGPUCount=N setting on the command line

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.OutputPostProcessResources
cvars.description: Output the pathtracing resources to the postprocess passes 0: off 1: on (Buffers including, raw/denoised radiance, albedo, normal, and variance)

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.Override.Depth
cvars.description: Override the scene depth z by the path tracing depth z0: off 1: On (Default, translucent materials have better DOF with the post-process DOF.)

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.ProgressDisplay
cvars.description: Enables an in-frame display of progress towards the defined sample per pixel limit. The indicator dissapears when the maximum is reached and sample accumulation has stopped (default = 1) 0: off 1: on (default)

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.SamplerType
cvars.description: Controls the way the path tracer generates its random numbers 0: use a different high quality random sequence per pixel (default) 1: optimize the random sequence across pixels to reduce visible error at the target sample count

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.SamplesPerPixel
cvars.description: Sets the maximum number of samples per pixel (default = -1 (driven by postprocesing volume))

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.SkylightCaching
cvars.description: Attempts to re-use skylight data between frames. (default = 1 (enabled)) When set to 0, the skylight texture and importance samping data will be regenerated every frame. This is mainly intended as a benchmarking and debugging aid

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.SpatialDenoiser
cvars.description: Enable spatial denoising of the path traced output -1: inherit from PostProcessVolume 0: disable denoiser 1: enable denoiser (if a denoiser plugin is active)

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.SpatialDenoiser.Type
cvars.description: The type of spatial denoiser 0: Use spatial denoiser only plugin 1: Use spatial denoiser plugin that also provides temporal denoising

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.SSSGuidingRatio
cvars.description: Sets the ratio between classical random walks and walks guided towards the surface. A value of 0.0 corresponds to a purely classical random walk, while a value of 1.0 is fully guided towards the surface (at the expense of fireflies in non-flat regions of the model. (default = 0.5)

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.Substrate.CompileSimplifiedMaterials
cvars.description: Compile a simplified representation of Substrate materials which merges all slabs into one. This is mainly intended for debugging purposes. Enabling this double the number of path tracing shader permutations. 0: off (default) 1: on

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.Substrate.UseSimplifiedMaterials
cvars.description: Instead of evaluating all layers, use an optimized material in which all slabs have been merged. This is mainly intended for debugging and requires r.PathTracing.Substrate.CompileSimplifiedMaterials to be true. 0: off (default) 1: on

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.TemporalDenoiser
cvars.description: Enable temporal denoising of the path traced output -1: inherit from PostProcessVolume (TODO when out of experimental phase) 0: disable denoiser 1: enable denoiser (if a denoiser plugin is active)

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.TemporalDenoiser.alpha
cvars.description: The weight of history in the exponential mean average

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.TemporalDenoiser.DeltaE
cvars.description: Cut off the history weight to zero at CIE DeltaE for low frequency. 1.0 :the just noticeable difference (JND), 2.0 :perceptible for close look 10.0:Perceptible at a glance This works as an alternative control instead of kappa. 2 as default.

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.TemporalDenoiser.DeltaE.HighFrequency
cvars.description: Cut off the history weight to zero when using high frequency per pixel difference. It should only be enabled when the source image is smooth or denoised.

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.TemporalDenoiser.DenoiseSourceImageFirst
cvars.description: Denoise the source image with IntelImageDenoisier

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.TemporalDenoiser.DistanceMetrics
cvars.description: 0: Luminance based metrics for distance estimation. Color with same luminance will create error in motion and history weights estimation.1: Direct color difference2: Visual color difference based on CIELAB2000 color difference.

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.TemporalDenoiser.EnableSubPixelOffset
cvars.description: Enable subpixel offset when merging -1: inherit from PostProcessVolume 0: disable denoiser 1: enable denoiser (if a denoiser plugin is active)

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.TemporalDenoiser.eta
cvars.description: Eta param. Error distance below this will have max history weight. Use DeltaE to derive Eta if -1

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.TemporalDenoiser.kappa
cvars.description: Scaling parameter to determine how fast the history weight falls and the cutting point to zero. Use DeltaE to derive kappa if -1

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.TemporalDenoiser.mode
cvars.description: 0: disabled 1: offline rendering only 2: online rendering (for debug)

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.TemporalDenoiser.MotionOperation
cvars.description: 0: use the motion vector directly estimated1: subtract between the motion

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.TemporalDenoiser.MotionVector.Type
cvars.description: The type of motion vecotr estimation algorithm 0: Built-in motion vector estimator 1: Motion vector estimator from the plugin

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.TemporalDenoiser.PatchCount
cvars.description: The number of similar patches found by Non-Local Mean to use for temporal denoising 1: default. Accumulae the one with the minimal distance exponentially.>1 && < 16: Use bilaterial filtering to accumulate multiple patches.

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.TemporalDenoiser.source
cvars.description: 0: Denoised Radance when possible (Default) 1: Normal 2: Albedo 3: Raw RadianceOtherwise: Feature Fusion (TODO)

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.TemporalDenoiser.SubPixelOffset.StartMip
cvars.description: From 0 to this mip, we will perform subpixel offset

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.TemporalDenoiser.TotalVariation
cvars.description: !=0: Use less history if the total variation is large in a local patch

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.TemporalDenoiser.Type
cvars.description: The type of temporal denoiser 0: Use the built-in temporal denoiser 1: Use the temporal denoiser from plugin

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.TemporalDenoiser.VisualizeMotionVector
cvars.description: 1: visualize the motion vector compared to the raster motion vector

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.TemporalDenoiser.VisWarp
cvars.description: 0: disable1: visualize warped source by the motion vector2: weights, warped source, and combined

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.UseAnalyticTransmittance
cvars.description: Determines use of analytical or null-tracking estimation when evaluating transmittance -1: uses null-tracking estimation if heterogeneous volumes are present, or analytical estimation otherwise (default) 0: off (uses null-tracking estimation, instead) 1: on (uses analytical estimation)

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.UseDBuffer
cvars.description: Whether to support DBuffer functionality (default=1)

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.VisibleLights
cvars.description: Should light sources be visible to camera rays? (default = 0 (off)) 0: Hide lights from camera rays (default) 1: Make all lights visible to camera 2: Make skydome only visible to camera

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.VolumeMISMode
cvars.description: Selects the sampling technique for volumetric integration of local lighting (default = 1) 0: Density sampling 1: Light sampling (default)

cvars.name: r.PathTracing.WiperMode
cvars.description: Enables wiper mode to render using the path tracer only in a region of the screen for debugging purposes (default = 0, wiper mode disabled)

cvars.name: r.PhysicsField.BuildClipmap
cvars.description: Build the Physics field clipmap

cvars.name: r.PhysicsField.ClipmapCount
cvars.description: Number of clipmaps used for the physics field

cvars.name: r.PhysicsField.ClipmapDistance
cvars.description: Max distance from the clipmap center

cvars.name: r.PhysicsField.ClipmapExponent
cvars.description: Exponent used to derive each clipmap's size, together with r.PhysicsField.ClipmapDistance

cvars.name: r.PhysicsField.ClipmapResolution
cvars.description: Resolution of the physics field. Higher values increase fidelity but also increase memory and composition cost.

cvars.name: r.PhysicsField.EnableCulling
cvars.description: Enable the spatial culling based on the field nodes bounds

cvars.name: r.PhysicsField.EnableField
cvars.description: Enable/Disable the Physics field clipmap

cvars.name: r.PhysicsField.Rendering.EvalType
cvars.description: Physics field boolean to check if we are evaluating exactly(0) or sampling(1) the field for visualisation.

cvars.name: r.PhysicsField.Rendering.SystemType
cvars.description: Physics field boolean to check if we want to display the CPU(0) or GPU(1) field.

cvars.name: r.PhysicsField.Rendering.TargetType
cvars.description: Physics field target to be used in the viewport show options.

cvars.name: r.PhysicsField.Rendering.TransientLifetime
cvars.description: Physics field transient commands lifetime for rendering.

cvars.name: r.PhysicsField.SingleTarget
cvars.description: Limnit the physics field build to only one target, the linear force

cvars.name: r.PostProcessAllowBlendModes
cvars.description: Enables blend modes in post process materials. 0: disable blend modes. Uses replace 1: allow blend modes

cvars.name: r.PostProcessAllowStencilTest
cvars.description: Enables stencil testing in post process materials. 0: disable stencil testing 1: allow stencil testing

cvars.name: r.PostProcessing.DisableMaterials
cvars.description: Allows to disable post process materials.

cvars.name: r.PostProcessing.DownsampleChainQuality
cvars.description: Defines the quality used for downsampling to the scene color in scene color chains. 0: low quality 1: high quality (default)

cvars.name: r.PostProcessing.DownsampleQuality
cvars.description: Defines the quality used for downsampling to half or quarter res the scene color in post processing chain. 0: low quality (default) 1: high quality

cvars.name: r.PostProcessing.ForceAsyncDispatch
cvars.description: Will force asynchronous dispatch for post processing compute shaders where implementations available. Only available for testing in non-shipping builds.

cvars.name: r.PostProcessing.GBufferPicking
cvars.description: Evaluate GBuffer value for debugging purpose.

cvars.name: r.PostProcessing.PreferCompute
cvars.description: Will use compute shaders for post processing where implementations available.

cvars.name: r.PostProcessing.PropagateAlpha
cvars.description: 0 to disable scene alpha channel support in the post processing. 0: disabled (default); 1: enabled in linear color space; 2: same as 1, but also enable it through the tonemapper. Compositing after the tonemapper is incorrect, as their is no meaning to tonemap the alpha channel. This is only meant to be use exclusively for broadcasting hardware that does not support linear color space compositing and tonemapping.

cvars.name: r.PostProcessing.QuarterResolutionDownsample
cvars.description: Uses quarter resolution downsample instead of half resolution to feed into exposure / bloom.

cvars.name: r.PostProcessingColorFormat
cvars.description: Defines the memory layout (RGBA) used for most of the post processing chain buffers. 0: Default 1: Force PF_A32B32G32R32F 128Bit (unreasonable but good for testing)

cvars.name: r.ProfileGPU.AssetSummaryCallOuts
cvars.description: Comma separated list of substrings that deserve special mention in the final summary (e.g., LOD | HeroName" r.ProfileGPU.PrintAssetSummary must be true to enable this feature"

cvars.name: r.ProfileGPU.Pattern
cvars.description: Allows to filter the entries when using ProfileGPU, the pattern match is case sensitive. * can be used in the end to get all entries starting with the string. * without any leading characters disables the pattern matching and uses a time threshold instead (default). '?' allows to ignore one character. e.g. AmbientOcclusionSetup, AmbientOcclusion*, Ambient???lusion*, *

cvars.name: r.ProfileGPU.PrintAssetSummary
cvars.description: Should we print a summary split by asset (r.ShowMaterialDrawEvents is strongly recommended as well).

cvars.name: r.ProfileGPU.Root
cvars.description: Allows to filter the tree when using ProfileGPU, the pattern match is case sensitive.

cvars.name: r.ProfileGPU.Screenshot
cvars.description: Whether a screenshot should be taken when profiling the GPU. 0:off, 1:on (default)

cvars.name: r.ProfileGPU.ShowEventHistogram
cvars.description: Whether the event histogram should be shown.

cvars.name: r.ProfileGPU.ShowLeafEvents
cvars.description: Allows profileGPU to display event-only leaf nodes with no draws associated.

cvars.name: r.ProfileGPU.ShowTransitions
cvars.description: Allows profileGPU to display resource transition events.

cvars.name: r.ProfileGPU.ShowUI
cvars.description: Whether the user interface profiler should be displayed after profiling the GPU. The results will always go to the log/console 0:off, 1:on (default)

cvars.name: r.ProfileGPU.Sort
cvars.description: Sorts the TTY Dump independently at each level of the tree in various modes. 0 : Chronological 1 : By time elapsed 2 : By number of prims 3 : By number of verts

cvars.name: r.ProfileGPU.ThresholdPercent
cvars.description: Percent of the total execution duration the event needs to be larger than to be printed.

cvars.name: r.ProxyLODChartColorVerts
cvars.description: Color verts by uv chart. Default off. 0: Disabled 1: Enabled.

cvars.name: r.ProxyLODCorrectCollapsedWalls
cvars.description: Shall the ProxyLOD system attemp to correct walls with interpenetrating faces0: disabled (default) 1: endable, may cause cracks.

cvars.name: r.ProxyLODMaterialInParallel
cvars.description: 0: disable doing material work in parallel with mesh simplification 1: enable - default

cvars.name: r.ProxyLODMaxDilationSteps
cvars.description: Limit the numer of dilation steps used in gap filling for performance reasons This may affect gap filling quality as bigger dilations steps will be used with a smaller max 0: will disable gap filling 7: default

cvars.name: r.ProxyLODMeshReductionModule
cvars.description: Name of the Proxy LOD reduction module to choose. If blank it chooses any that exist.

cvars.name: r.ProxyLODRemeshOnly
cvars.description: Only remesh. No simplification or materials. Default off. 0: Disabled - will simplify and generate materials 1: Enabled - will not simplfy or generate materials.

cvars.name: r.ProxyLODSingleThreadSimplify
cvars.description: Use single threaded code path. Default off. 0: Multithreaded 1: Single threaded.

cvars.name: r.ProxyLODTransfer
cvars.description: 0: shoot both ways 1: preference for forward (default)

cvars.name: r.ProxyLODUseTangentSpace
cvars.description: Shall the ProxyLOD system generate a true tangent space at each vertex0: world space at each vertex 1: tangent space at each vertex (default)

cvars.name: r.pso.CreateOnRHIThread
cvars.description: 0: Run PSO creation on task threads 1: Run PSO creation on RHI thread.

cvars.name: r.pso.evictiontime
cvars.description: Time between checks to remove stale objects from the cache. 0 = no eviction (which may eventually OOM...)

cvars.name: r.pso.PrecompileThreadPoolPercentOfHardwareThreads
cvars.description: If > 0, use this percentage of cores (rounded up) for the PSO precompile thread pool Use this as an alternative to r.pso.PrecompileThreadPoolSize 0 to disable threadpool usage when precompiling PSOs. (default 75%)

cvars.name: r.pso.PrecompileThreadPoolSize
cvars.description: The number of threads available for concurrent PSO Precompiling. 0 to disable threadpool usage when precompiling PSOs. (default)

cvars.name: r.pso.PrecompileThreadPoolSizeMax
cvars.description: The maximum number of threads available for concurrent PSO Precompiling. Ignored unless r.pso.PrecompileThreadPoolPercentOfHardwareThreads is specified Default is no maximum (INT_MAX)

cvars.name: r.pso.PrecompileThreadPoolSizeMin
cvars.description: The minimum number of threads available for concurrent PSO Precompiling. Ignored unless r.pso.PrecompileThreadPoolPercentOfHardwareThreads is specified 0 = no minimum (default 2)

cvars.name: r.pso.PrecompileThreadPoolThreadPriority
cvars.description: Thread priority for the PSO precompile pool

cvars.name: r.PSO.RuntimeCreationHitchThreshold
cvars.description: Threshold for runtime PSO creation to count as a hitch (in msec) (default 20)

cvars.name: r.PSOPrecache.Components
cvars.description: Precache all possible used PSOs by components during Postload (default 1 if PSOPrecaching is enabled).

cvars.name: r.PSOPrecache.CustomDepth
cvars.description: Also Precache PSOs with for custom depth pass. 0: No PSOs are compiled for this pass. 1: PSOs are compiled for all primitives which explicitly request custom depth rendering (default). 2: PSOs are compiled for all primitives which also request regular depth rendering.

cvars.name: r.PSOPrecache.DitheredLODFadingOutMaskPass
cvars.description: Precache PSOs for DitheredLODFadingOutMaskPass. 0: No PSOs are compiled for this pass (default). 1: PSOs are compiled for all primitives which render to depth pass.

cvars.name: r.PSOPrecache.GlobalComputeShaders
cvars.description: Precache all global compute shaders during startup (default 0).

cvars.name: r.PSOPrecache.LightMapPolicyMode
cvars.description: Defines which light map policies should be checked during PSO precaching of the base pass. 0: All possible LMP will be checked. 1: Only LMP_NO_LIGHTMAP will be precached (default).

cvars.name: r.PSOPrecache.PrecacheAlphaColorChannel
cvars.description: Also Precache PSOs with scene color alpha channel enabled. Planar reflections and scene captures use this for compositing into a different scene later.

cvars.name: r.PSOPrecache.ProjectedShadows
cvars.description: Also Precache PSOs with for projected shadows. 0: No PSOs are compiled for this pass. 1: PSOs are compiled for all primitives which render to depth pass (default).

cvars.name: r.PSOPrecache.ProxyCreationDelayStrategy
cvars.description: Control the component proxy creation strategy when the requested PSOs for precaching are still compiling. Ignored if r.PSOPrecache.ProxyCreationWhenPSOReady = 0. 0: delay creation until PSOs are ready (default) 1: create a proxy using the default material until PSOs are ready. Currently implemented for static and skinned meshes - Niagara components will delay creation instead

cvars.name: r.PSOPrecache.ProxyCreationWhenPSOReady
cvars.description: Delay the component proxy creation when the requested PSOs for precaching are still compiling. 0: always create regardless of PSOs status (default) 1: delay the creation of the render proxy depending on the specific strategy controlled by r.PSOPrecache.ProxyCreationDelayStrategy

cvars.name: r.PSOPrecache.Resources
cvars.description: Precache all possible used PSOs by resources during Postload (default 0 if PSOPrecaching is enabled).

cvars.name: r.PSOPrecache.TranslucencyAllPass
cvars.description: Precache PSOs for TranslucencyAll pass. 0: No PSOs are compiled for this pass (default). 1: PSOs are compiled for all primitives which render to a translucency pass.

cvars.name: r.PSOPrecache.UseBackgroundThreadForCollection
cvars.description: Use background threads for PSO precache data collection on the mesh pass processors.

cvars.name: r.PSOPrecaching
cvars.description: 0 to Disable PSOs precaching 1 to Enable PSO precaching

cvars.name: r.PSOPrecaching.WaitForHighPriorityRequestsOnly
cvars.description: 0 to wait for all pending PSO precache requests during loading (default)g 1 to only wait for the high priority PSO precache requests during loading

cvars.name: r.RayTracing
cvars.description: 0 to disable ray tracing. 0: off 1: on

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.AllowInline
cvars.description: Allow use of Inline Ray Tracing if supported (default=1).

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.AllowPipeline
cvars.description: Allow use of Ray Tracing pipelines if supported (default=1).

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.AmbientOcclusion
cvars.description: -1: Value driven by postprocess volume (default) 0: ray tracing ambient occlusion off 1: ray tracing ambient occlusion enabled

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.AmbientOcclusion.EnableMaterials
cvars.description: Enables

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.AmbientOcclusion.EnableTwoSidedGeometry
cvars.description: Enables two-sided geometry when tracing shadow rays (default = 0)

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.AmbientOcclusion.SamplesPerPixel
cvars.description: Sets the samples-per-pixel for ambient occlusion (default = -1 (driven by postprocesing volume))

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.AsyncBuild
cvars.description: Whether to build ray tracing acceleration structures on async compute queue.

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.AutoInstance
cvars.description: Whether to auto instance static meshes

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.CompileMaterialAHS
cvars.description: 0: skip compilation of any-hit shaders for materials (useful if alpha masked or translucent materials are not needed) 1: compile any hit shaders for all ray tracing materials (default)

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.CompileMaterialCHS
cvars.description: 0: skip compilation of closest-hit shaders for materials (useful if only shadows or ambient occlusion effects are needed) 1: compile closest hit shaders for all ray tracing materials (default)

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Culling
cvars.description: Enable culling in ray tracing for objects that are behind the camera 0: Culling disabled (default) 1: Culling by distance and solid angle enabled. Only cull objects behind camera. 2: Culling by distance and solid angle enabled. Cull objects in front and behind camera. 3: Culling by distance OR solid angle enabled. Cull objects in front and behind camera.

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Culling.Angle
cvars.description: Do camera culling for objects behind the camera with a projected angle smaller than this threshold in ray tracing effects (default = 1 degrees)

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Culling.Radius
cvars.description: Do camera culling for objects behind the camera outside of this radius in ray tracing effects (default = 30000 (300m))

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Culling.UseGroupIds
cvars.description: Cull using aggregate ray tracing group id bounds when defined instead of primitive or instance bounds.

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Culling.UseMinDrawDistance
cvars.description: Use min draw distance for culling

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Debug.InstanceOverlap.BoundingBoxScale
cvars.description: Scaling factor for instance bounding box extent for avoiding z-fighting. (default = 1.001)

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Debug.InstanceOverlap.Scale
cvars.description: Scaling factor for instance traversal heat map visualization. (default = 16)

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Debug.InstanceOverlap.ShowWireframe
cvars.description: Show instance bounding boxes in wireframe in Instances Overlap mode. (default = 1)

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Debug.PickerDomain
cvars.description: Changes the picker domain to highlight: 0 - Triangles (default) 1 - Instances

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.DebugDisableTriangleCull
cvars.description: Forces all ray tracing geometry instances to be double-sided by disabling back-face culling. This is useful for debugging and profiling. (default = 0)

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.DebugForceOpaque
cvars.description: Forces all ray tracing geometry instances to be opaque, effectively disabling any-hit shaders. This is useful for debugging and profiling. (default = 0)

cvars.name: r.Raytracing.DebugForceRuntimeBLAS
cvars.description: Force building BLAS at runtime.

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.DebugTimingScale
cvars.description: Scaling factor for ray timing heat map visualization. (default = 1)

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.DebugTraversalScale.Box
cvars.description: Scaling factor for box traversal heat map visualization. (default = 150)

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.DebugTraversalScale.Cluster
cvars.description: Scaling factor for cluster traversal heat map visualization. (default = 2500)

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.DebugTraversalScale.Triangle
cvars.description: Scaling factor for triangle traversal heat map visualization. (default = 30)

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.DebugTriangleHitCount.MaxThreshold
cvars.description: Maximum hit count threshold for debug ray tracing triangle hit count heat map visualization. (default = 6)

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.DebugTriangleHitCount.TopKMostHits
cvars.description: Highlight top k most hit instances in the view. (default = 10)

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.DebugTriangleHitCountPerInstance.MaxThreshold
cvars.description: Maximum hit count threshold for debug ray tracing hit count per instance heat map visualization. (default = 100000)

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.DebugVisualizationMode
cvars.description: Sets the ray tracing debug visualization mode (default = None - Driven by viewport menu) .

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.DebugVisualizationMode.OpaqueOnly
cvars.description: Sets whether the view mode rendes opaque objects only (default = 1, render only opaque objects, 0 = render all objects)

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.DebugVisualizationMode.ProceduralPrimitives
cvars.description: Whether to include procedural primitives in visualization modes. Currently only supports Nanite primitives in inline barycentrics mode.

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.DecalGrid.MaxCount
cvars.description: Controls the maximum number of decals per cell in the 2D decal grid. The minimum of this value and the number of decal in the scene is used. (default = 128)

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.DecalGrid.Resolution
cvars.description: Controls the resolution of the 2D decal grid used to cull irrelevant decal from calculations (default = 256)

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.DynamicGeometry.SharedVertexBufferGarbageCollectLatency
cvars.description: Amount of update cycles before a heap is deleted when not used (default 30).

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.DynamicGeometry.SharedVertexBufferSizeInMB
cvars.description: Size of the a single shared vertex buffer used during the BLAS update of dynamic geometries (default 4MB)

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.DynamicGeometryLastRenderTimeUpdateDistance
cvars.description: Dynamic geometries within this distance will have their LastRenderTime updated, so that visibility based ticking (like skeletal mesh) can work when the component is not directly visible in the view (but reflected).

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Enable
cvars.description: Runtime toggle for switching raytracing on/off (experimental).

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.EnableInEditor
cvars.description: Controls whether ray tracing effects are available by default when running the editor. This can be useful to improve editor performance when only some people require ray tracing features. (default = 1)

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.EnableInGame
cvars.description: Controls the default state of ray tracing effects when running the game. This setting is overridden by its counterpart in GameUserSettings.ini (if it exists) to allow control through in-game UI. (default = 1)

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.EnableMaterials
cvars.description: 0: bind default material shader that outputs placeholder data 1: bind real material shaders (default)

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.EnableOnDemand
cvars.description: Controls whether ray tracing features can be toggled on demand at runtime without restarting the game (experimental). Requires r.RayTracing=1 and will override GameUserSettings in game. Requires r.RayTracing.EnableInEditor=1 in editor. Has a small performance and memory overhead. 0: off (default) 1: on

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.ExcludeDecals
cvars.description: A toggle that modifies the inclusion of decals in the ray tracing BVH. 0: Decals included in the ray tracing BVH (default) 1: Decals excluded from the ray tracing BVH

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.ExcludeSky
cvars.description: A toggle that controls inclusion of sky geometry in the ray tracing scene (excluding sky can make ray tracing faster). This setting is ignored for the Path Tracer. 0: Sky objects included in the ray tracing scene 1: Sky objects excluded from the ray tracing scene (default)

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.ExcludeTranslucent
cvars.description: A toggle that modifies the inclusion of translucent objects in the ray tracing scene. 0: Translucent objects included in the ray tracing scene (default) 1: Translucent objects excluded from the ray tracing scene

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.ForceAllRayTracingEffects
cvars.description: Force all ray tracing effects ON/OFF. -1: Do not force (default) 0: All ray tracing effects disabled 1: All ray tracing effects enabled

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Geometry.Cable
cvars.description: Include Cable meshes in ray tracing effects (default = 1 (cable meshes enabled in ray tracing))

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Geometry.Cable.WPO
cvars.description: World position offset evaluation for cable meshes with EvaluateWPO enabled in ray tracing effects. 0: Cable meshes with world position offset visible in ray tracing, WPO evaluation disabled. 1: Cable meshes with world position offset visible in ray tracing, WPO evaluation enabled (default).

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Geometry.Cable.WPO.Culling
cvars.description: Enable culling for WPO evaluation for cable meshes in ray tracing (default = 1 (Culling enabled))

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Geometry.Cable.WPO.CullingRadius
cvars.description: Do not evaluate world position offset for cable meshes outside of this radius in ray tracing effects (default = 12000 (120m))

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Geometry.GeometryCache
cvars.description: Include geometry cache primitives in ray tracing effects (default = 1 (geometry cache enabled in ray tracing))

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Geometry.GeometryCollection
cvars.description: Include geometry collection proxy meshes in ray tracing effects (default = 0 (Geometry collection meshes disabled in ray tracing))

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Geometry.HierarchicalInstancedStaticMesh
cvars.description: Include HISM in ray tracing effects (default = 1)

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Geometry.InstancedStaticMeshes
cvars.description: Include static mesh instances in ray tracing effects (default = 1 (Instances enabled in ray tracing))

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Geometry.InstancedStaticMeshes.CullAngle
cvars.description: Solid angle to test instance bounds against for culling (default 2 degrees) -1 => use distance based culling

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Geometry.InstancedStaticMeshes.CullClusterMaxRadiusMultiplier
cvars.description: Multiplier for the maximum instance size (default = 20)

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Geometry.InstancedStaticMeshes.CullClusterRadius
cvars.description: Ignore instances outside of this radius in ray tracing effects (default = 10000 (100m))

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Geometry.InstancedStaticMeshes.Culling
cvars.description: Enable culling for instances in ray tracing (default = 1 (Culling enabled))

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Geometry.InstancedStaticMeshes.EvaluateWPO
cvars.description: Whether to evaluate WPO on instanced static meshes 0 - off (default) 1 - on for all with WPO -1 - on only for meshes with evaluate WPO enabled

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Geometry.InstancedStaticMeshes.LowScaleCullRadius
cvars.description: Cull radius for small instances (default = 1000 (10m))

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Geometry.InstancedStaticMeshes.LowScaleRadiusThreshold
cvars.description: Threshold that classifies instances as small (default = 50cm))

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Geometry.InstancedStaticMeshes.MinLOD
cvars.description: Clamps minimum LOD to this value (default = 0, highest resolution LOD may be used)

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Geometry.InstancedStaticMeshes.SimulationClusterRadius
cvars.description: Bucket instances based on distance to camera for simulating WPO (default = 500 (5m), disable if <= 0)

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Geometry.InstancedStaticMeshes.SimulationCount
cvars.description: Maximum number of instances to simulate per instanced static mesh, presently capped to 256

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Geometry.Landscape
cvars.description: Include landscapes in ray tracing effects (default = 1 (landscape enabled in ray tracing))

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Geometry.Landscape.DetectTextureStreaming
cvars.description: If on, update ray tracing geometry when texture streaming state changes. Useful when WorldPositionOffset is used in the landscape material

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Geometry.Landscape.FractionalLODUpdateThreshold
cvars.description: Minimal difference in fractional LOD between latest built/cached ray tracing geometry and latest value used for rendering (default 0) 0.1 implies a 10% change in the fraction LOD, for instance a change from LOD level 1.1 to 1.2 Larger values will reduce the number of landscape tile updates, but introduce more error between the ray tracing and raster representations

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Geometry.Landscape.LODsUpdateEveryFrame
cvars.description: If on, LODs that are lower than the specified level will be updated every frame, which can be used to workaround some artifacts caused by texture streaming if you're using WorldPositionOffset on the landscape

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Geometry.LandscapeGrass
cvars.description: Include landscapes grass in ray tracing effects (default = 1)

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Geometry.MaxBuiltPrimitivesPerFrame
cvars.description: Sets the ray tracing acceleration structure build budget in terms of maximum number of triangles per frame (<= 0 then disabled and all acceleration structures are build immediatly - default)

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Geometry.NaniteProxies
cvars.description: Include Nanite proxy meshes in ray tracing effects (default = 1 (Nanite proxy meshes enabled in ray tracing))

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Geometry.NiagaraMeshes
cvars.description: Include Niagara meshes in ray tracing effects (default = 1 (Niagara meshes enabled in ray tracing))

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Geometry.NiagaraRibbons
cvars.description: Include Niagara ribbons in ray tracing effects (default = 1 (Niagara ribbons enabled in ray tracing))

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Geometry.NiagaraSprites
cvars.description: Include Niagara sprites in ray tracing effects (default = 1 (Niagara sprites enabled in ray tracing))

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Geometry.PendingBuildPriorityBoostPerFrame
cvars.description: Increment the priority for all pending build requests which are not scheduled that frame (0.001 - default)

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Geometry.ProceduralMeshes
cvars.description: Include procedural meshes in ray tracing effects (default = 1 (procedural meshes enabled in ray tracing))

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Geometry.SkeletalMeshes
cvars.description: Include skeletal meshes in ray tracing effects (default = 1 (skeletal meshes enabled in ray tracing))

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Geometry.SkeletalMeshes.LODBias
cvars.description: Global LOD bias for skeletal meshes in ray tracing. When non-zero, a different LOD level other than the predicted LOD level will be used for ray tracing. Advanced features like morph targets and cloth simulation may not work properly. Final LOD level to use in ray tracing is the sum of this global bias and the bias set on each skeletal mesh asset.

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Geometry.SplineMeshes
cvars.description: Include splines meshes in ray tracing effects (default = 1 (spline meshes enabled in ray tracing))

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Geometry.StaticMeshes
cvars.description: Include static meshes in ray tracing effects (default = 1 (static meshes enabled in ray tracing))

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Geometry.StaticMeshes.WPO
cvars.description: World position offset evaluation for static meshes with EvaluateWPO enabled in ray tracing effects. 0: static meshes with world position offset hidden in ray tracing. 1: static meshes with world position offset visible in ray tracing, WPO evaluation enabled (default). 2: static meshes with world position offset visible in ray tracing, WPO evaluation disabled.

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Geometry.StaticMeshes.WPO.Culling
cvars.description: Enable culling for WPO evaluation for static meshes in ray tracing (default = 1 (Culling enabled))

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Geometry.StaticMeshes.WPO.CullingRadius
cvars.description: Do not evaluate world position offset for static meshes outside of this radius in ray tracing effects (default = 12000 (120m))

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Geometry.SupportSkeletalMeshes
cvars.description: Whether the project supports skeletal meshes in ray tracing effects. Turning this off disables creation of all skeletal mesh ray tracing GPU resources, saving GPU memory and time. This setting is read-only at runtime. (default: 1)

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Geometry.Text
cvars.description: Include text meshes in ray tracing effects (default = 1 (text meshes enabled in ray tracing))

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.LightFunction
cvars.description: Whether to support light material functions in ray tracing effects. (default = 1)

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.LightGridMaxCount
cvars.description: Controls the maximum number of lights per cell in the 2D light grid. The minimum of this value and the number of lights in the scene is used. (default = 128)

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.LightGridResolution
cvars.description: Controls the resolution of the 2D light grid used to cull irrelevant lights from lighting calculations (default = 256)

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.MeshDrawCommands.CacheMultithreaded
cvars.description: Enable multithreading of raytracing primitive mesh command caching. 0=disabled, 1=enabled (default)

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.MultiGpuMaskTLAS
cvars.description: For Multi-GPU, controls which GPUs TLAS and material pipeline updates run on. (default = 1) 0: Run TLAS and material pipeline updates on all GPUs. Original behavior, which may be useful for debugging. 1: Run TLAS and material pipeline updates masked to the active view's GPUs to improve performance. BLAS updates still run on all GPUs.

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Nanite.BLASScratchSizeMultipleMB
cvars.description: Round the size of the BLAS build scratch buffer to be a multiple of this value. This helps maintain consistent memory usage and prevent memory usage spikes. Default = 64 MB.

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Nanite.CutError
cvars.description: Global target cut error to control quality when using procedural raytracing geometry for Nanite meshes.

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Nanite.ForceUpdateVisible
cvars.description: Force BLAS of visible primitives to be updated next frame.

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Nanite.MaxBuiltPrimitivesPerFrame
cvars.description: Limit number of BLAS built per frame based on a budget defined in terms of maximum number of triangles.

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Nanite.MaxStagingBufferSizeMB
cvars.description: Limit the size of the staging buffer used during stream out (lower values can cause updates to be throttled) Default = 1024 MB. Max value = 2048 MB.

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Nanite.Mode
cvars.description: 0 - fallback mesh (default); 1 - streamed out mesh;

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Nanite.ProfileStreamOut
cvars.description: [Development only] Stream out pending requests every frame in order to measure performance.

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Nanite.StreamOut.MaxNumIndices
cvars.description: Max number of indices to stream out per frame.

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Nanite.StreamOut.MaxNumVertices
cvars.description: Max number of vertices to stream out per frame.

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Nanite.Update
cvars.description: Whether to process Nanite RayTracing update requests.

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.NonBlockingPipelineCreation
cvars.description: Enable background ray tracing pipeline creation, without blocking RHI or Render thread. Fallback opaque black material will be used for missing shaders meanwhile. 0: off (rendering will always use correct requested material) 1: on (default, non-blocking mode may sometimes use the fallback opaque black material outside of offline rendering scenarios)

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.NormalBias
cvars.description: Sets the max. normal bias used for offseting the ray start position along the normal (default = 0.1, i.e., 1mm)

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.ParallelMeshBatchSetup
cvars.description: Whether to setup ray tracing materials via parallel jobs.

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.ParallelMeshBatchSize
cvars.description: Batch size for ray tracing materials parallel jobs.

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.PSOCacheSize
cvars.description: Number of ray tracing pipelines to keep in the cache (default = 50). Set to 0 to disable eviction.

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.RequireSM6
cvars.description: Whether ray tracing shaders and features should only be available when targetting and running SM6. If disabled, ray tracing shaders will also be available when running in SM5 mode. (default = 1, allow only SM6)

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.SceneCaptures
cvars.description: Enable ray tracing in scene captures. -1: Use scene capture settings (default) 0: off 1: on

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.SceneUpdateOnce
cvars.description: Experimental: Improves GPU perf by updating ray tracing scene once, but may cause artifacts (mainly for nDisplay)

cvars.name: r.RayTracing.Shadows
cvars.description: 0: use traditional rasterized shadow map (default) 1: use ray tracing shadows
