This often can not render accurately a motion vector of this fake interior geometry and therefore make the heuristic believe it is in fact flickering. This variable define the parallax velocity in 1080p pixel at frame rate defined by r.TSR.ShadingRejection.Flickering.FrameRateCap at which point the heuristic should be disabled to not ghost. (Default to 10 pixels 1080p).

cvars.name: r.TSR.ShadingRejection.Flickering.Period
cvars.description: Periode in frames in which luma oscilations at equal or greater frequency is considered flickering and should ghost to stabilize the image Please read r.TSR.ShadingRejection.Flickering's help for further details. (Default to 3 frames).

cvars.name: r.TSR.ShadingRejection.SampleCount
cvars.description: Maximum number of sample in each output pixel of the history after total shading rejection. Lower values means higher clarity of the image after shading rejection of the history, but at the trade of higher instability of the pixel on following frames accumulating new details which can be distracting to the human eye (Defaults to 2.0).

cvars.name: r.TSR.ShadingRejection.TileOverscan
cvars.description: The shading rejection run a network of convolutions on the GPU all in single 32x32 without roundtrip to main video memory. However chaining many convlutions in this tiles means that some convolutions on the edge arround are becoming corrupted and therefor need to overlap the tile by couple of padding to hide it. Higher means less prones to tiling artifacts, but performance loss.

cvars.name: r.TSR.Velocity.WeightClampingPixelSpeed
cvars.description: Defines the output pixel velocity at which the the high frequencies of the history get's their contributing weight clamped. It's basically to lerp the effect of r.TSR.Velocity.WeightClampingSampleCount when the pixel velocity get smaller than r.TSR.Velocity.WeightClampingPixelSpeed. (Default = 1.0f).

cvars.name: r.TSR.Velocity.WeightClampingSampleCount
cvars.description: Number of sample to count to in history pixel to clamp history to when output pixel velocity reach r.TSR.Velocity.WeightClampingPixelSpeed. Higher value means higher stability on movement, but at the expense of additional blur due to successive convolution of each history reprojection. Use r.TSR.Visualize 0 command to see how many samples where accumulated in TSR history on areas of the screen. Please note this clamp the sample count in history pixel, not output pixel, and therefore lower values are by designed less noticeable with higher r.TSR.History.ScreenPercentage. This is done so such that increasing r.TSR.History.ScreenPercentage uniterally and automatically give more temporal stability and maintaining sharpness of the details reprojection at the expense of that extra runtime cost regardless of this setting. A story telling game might prefer to keep this 4.0 for a 'cinematic look' whereas a competitive game like Fortnite would preferer to lower that to 2.0. (Default = 4.0f)."

cvars.name: r.TSR.Visualize
cvars.description: Selects the TSR internal visualization mode. -2: Display an overview grid based regardless of VisualizeTSR show flag; -1: Display an overview grid based on the VisualizeTSR show flag (default, opened with the show VisualizeTSR command at runtime or Show > Visualize > TSR in editor viewports); 0: Number of accumulated samples in the history, particularily interesting to tune r.TSR.ShadingRejection.SampleCount and r.TSR.Velocity.WeightClampingSampleCount; 1: Parallax disocclusion based of depth and velocity buffers; 2: Mask where the history is rejected; 3: Mask where the history is clamped; 4: Mask where the history is resurrected (with r.TSR.Resurrection=1); 5: Mask where the history is resurrected in the resurrected frame (with r.TSR.Resurrection=1), particularily interesting to tune r.TSR.Resurrection.PersistentFrameInterval; 6: Mask where spatial anti-aliasing is being computed; 7: Mask where the flickering temporal analysis heuristic is taking effects (with r.TSR.ShadingRejection.Flickering=1);

cvars.name: r.TSR.WaveOps
cvars.description: Whether to use wave ops in the shading rejection heuristics to speeds up convolutions. The shading rejection heuristic optimisation can be particularily hard for shader compiler and hit bug in them causing corruption/quality loss. Note this optimisation is currently disabled on SPIRV platforms (mainly Vulkan and Metal) due to 5min+ compilation times in SPIRV backend of DXC which is not great for editor startup.

cvars.name: r.TSR.WaveSize
cvars.description: Overrides the WaveSize to use. 0: Automatic (default); 16: WaveSizeOps 16; 32: WaveSizeOps 32; 64: WaveSizeOps 64;

cvars.name: r.ViewDistanceScale
cvars.description: Controls the view distance scale. A primitive's MaxDrawDistance is scaled by this value. Higher values will increase view distance but at a performance cost. Default = 1.

cvars.name: r.ViewDistanceScale.ApplySecondaryScale
cvars.description: If true applies the secondary view distance scale to primitive draw distances. Default = 0.

cvars.name: r.ViewDistanceScale.FieldOfViewAffectsHLOD
cvars.description: If enabled, applies the field of view scaling to HLOD draw distances as well as non-HLODs.

cvars.name: r.ViewDistanceScale.FieldOfViewMaxAngle
cvars.description: Scales the scene view distance scale with camera field of view. Maximum angle of the blend range. Applies the maximum scale when the camera is at or above this angle.

cvars.name: r.ViewDistanceScale.FieldOfViewMaxAngleScale
cvars.description: Scales the scene view distance scale with camera field of view. This value is applied when the camera is at or above the maximum angle.

cvars.name: r.ViewDistanceScale.FieldOfViewMinAngle
cvars.description: Scales the scene view distance scale with camera field of view. Minimum angle of the blend range. Applies the minimum scale when the camera is at or below this angle.

cvars.name: r.ViewDistanceScale.FieldOfViewMinAngleScale
cvars.description: Scales the scene view distance scale with camera field of view. This value is applied when the camera is at or below the minimum angle.

cvars.name: r.ViewDistanceScale.SecondaryScale
cvars.description: Controls the secondary view distance scale, Default = 1.0. This is an optional scale intended to allow some features or gamemodes to opt-in.

cvars.name: r.ViewDistanceScale.SkeletalMeshOverlay
cvars.description: Controls the distance scale for skeletal mesh overlay, Default = 1.0. Higher values will increase skeletal mesh overlay draw distance. This value is applied together with r.ViewDistanceScale

cvars.name: r.VirtualTexture
cvars.description: If set to 1, textures will use virtual memory so they can be partially resident.

cvars.name: r.VirtualTexturedLightmaps
cvars.description: Controls wether to stream the lightmaps using virtual texturing. 0: Disabled. 1: Enabled.

cvars.name: r.VirtualTextureReducedMemory
cvars.description: If set to 1, the cost of virtual textures will be reduced by using a more packed layout.

cvars.name: r.VirtualTextures
cvars.description: Is virtual texture streaming enabled?

cvars.name: r.Visibility.DynamicMeshElements.NumMainViewTasks
cvars.description: Controls the number of gather dynamic mesh elements tasks to run asynchronously during view visibility.

cvars.name: r.Visibility.DynamicMeshElements.NumShadowViewTasks
cvars.description: Controls the number of gather dynamic mesh elements tasks to run asynchronously during shadow visibility.

cvars.name: r.Visibility.DynamicMeshElements.Parallel
cvars.description: Enables parallel processing of the gather dynamic mesh elements visibility phase.

cvars.name: r.Visibility.FrustumCull.Enabled
cvars.description: Enables frustum culling.

cvars.name: r.Visibility.FrustumCull.NumPrimitivesPerTask
cvars.description: Assigns a fixed number of primitives for each frustum cull task. 0: Automatic;>0: Fixed number of primitives per task (clamped to fixed limits);

cvars.name: r.Visibility.FrustumCull.UseFastIntersect
cvars.description: Use optimized 8 plane fast intersection code if we have 8 permuted planes.

cvars.name: r.Visibility.FrustumCull.UseOctree
cvars.description: Use the octree for visibility calculations.

cvars.name: r.Visibility.FrustumCull.UseSphereTestFirst
cvars.description: Performance tweak. Uses a sphere cull before and in addition to a box for frustum culling.

cvars.name: r.Visibility.OcclusionCull.MaxQueriesPerTask
cvars.description: Assigns a fixed number of occlusion queries for each occlusion cull task. 0: Automatic;>0: Fixed number of occlusion queries per task;

cvars.name: r.Visibility.Relevance.NumPrimitivesPerPacket
cvars.description: Assigns a fixed number of primitives for each relevance packet. 0: Automatic;>0: Fixed number of primitives per packet (clamped to fixed limits);

cvars.name: r.Visibility.SkipAlwaysVisible
cvars.description: Whether visibility passes should skip primitives marked always visible0: All primitives are processed by visibility passes1: Only primitives not marked with bAlwaysVisible will be processed by visibility passes

cvars.name: r.Visibility.TaskSchedule
cvars.description: Controls how the visibility task graph is scheduled.0: Work is primarily done on the render thread with the potential for parallel help;1: Work is done on an async task graph (if supported by platform);

cvars.name: r.VolumetricCloud
cvars.description: VolumetricCloud components are rendered when this is not 0, otherwise ignored.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricCloud.DisableCompute
cvars.description: Do not use compute shader for cloud tracing.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricCloud.DistanceToSampleMaxCount
cvars.description: Distance in kilometers over which the total number of ray samples will be evenly distributed. Before that, the number of ray samples will span 1 to SampleCountMax, for for tracing distance ranging from 0 to DistanceToSampleCountMax (kilometers).

cvars.name: r.VolumetricCloud.EmptySpaceSkipping
cvars.description: Enable/disable empty space skipping to accelerate cloud tracing through emty areas. EXPERIMENTAL

cvars.name: r.VolumetricCloud.EmptySpaceSkipping.SampleCorners
cvars.description: 0 means center samples only, >0 means corner are also sampled.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricCloud.EmptySpaceSkipping.StartTracingSliceBias
cvars.description: The number of slices to bias the start depth with. A valuie of -1 means a bias of one slice towards the view point.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricCloud.EmptySpaceSkipping.VolumeDepth
cvars.description: Set the distance in kilometer over which empty space can be evalauted.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricCloud.EnableAerialPerspectiveSampling
cvars.description: Enable/disable the aerial perspective contribution on clouds.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricCloud.EnableAtmosphericLightsSampling
cvars.description: Enable/disable atmospheric lights contribution on clouds.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricCloud.EnableDistantSkyLightSampling
cvars.description: Enable/disable the distant sky light contribution on clouds.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricCloud.EnableLocalLightsSampling
cvars.description: [EXPERIMENTAL] Enable/disable local lights contribution on clouds. Expenssive! Use for cinematics if needed.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricCloud.HighQualityAerialPerspective
cvars.description: Enable/disable a second pass to trace the aerial perspective per pixel on clouds instead of using the aerial persepctive texture. Only usable when r.VolumetricCloud.EnableAerialPerspectiveSampling=1 and only needed for extra quality when r.VolumetricRenderTarget=1.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricCloud.LocalLights.ShadowSampleCount
cvars.description: [EXPERIMENTAL] Set the volumetric shadow sample count when evaluating local lights. Expenssive! Use for cinematics if needed.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricCloud.ReflectionRaySampleMaxCount
cvars.description: The maximum number of samples taken while ray marching primary rays in reflections.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricCloud.SampleMinCount
cvars.description: The minimum number of samples to take along a ray. This can help with quality for volume close to the camera, e.g. if cloud layer is also used as low altitude fog. SampleMinCount should remain relatively small because it is applied to all tracing process.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricCloud.Shadow.ReflectionRaySampleMaxCount
cvars.description: The maximum number of samples taken while ray marching shadow rays in reflections.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricCloud.Shadow.SampleAtmosphericLightShadowmap
cvars.description: Enable the sampling of atmospheric lights shadow map in order to produce volumetric shadows.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricCloud.Shadow.ViewRaySampleMaxCount
cvars.description: The maximum number of samples taken while ray marching shadow rays.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricCloud.ShadowMap
cvars.description: Enable/disable the shadow map, only if the scene contains a DirectionalLight component with Cast Cloud Shadows enabled on it.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricCloud.ShadowMap.Debug
cvars.description: Print information to debug the cloud shadow map.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricCloud.ShadowMap.MaxResolution
cvars.description: The maximum resolution of the cloud shadow map. The active resolution is controlled by the CloudShadowMapResolutionScale property on the Directional Light component.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricCloud.ShadowMap.RaySampleHorizonMultiplier
cvars.description: The multipler on the sample count applied when the atmospheric light reach the horizon. Less pixels in the shadow map need to be traced, but rays need to travel a lot longer.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricCloud.ShadowMap.RaySampleMaxCount
cvars.description: The maximum number of samples taken while ray marching shadow rays to evaluate the cloud shadow map.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricCloud.ShadowMap.SnapLength
cvars.description: Snapping size in kilometers of the cloud shadowmap position to avoid flickering.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricCloud.ShadowMap.SpatialFiltering
cvars.description: Enable/disable the shadow map dilation/smoothing spatial filter. Enabled when greater than 0 and it represents the number of blur iterations (constrained to a maximum of 4).

cvars.name: r.VolumetricCloud.ShadowMap.TemporalFiltering.LightRotationCutHistory
cvars.description: When the atmospheric light rotation in degree is larger than that, the temporal accumulation is restarted.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricCloud.ShadowMap.TemporalFiltering.NewFrameWeight
cvars.description: Experimental and needs more work so disabled by default. Value between [0.0, 1.0] representing the weight of current frame's contribution. Low values can cause precision issues resulting in depth not converging over time. Disabled when set to 1.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricCloud.SkyAO
cvars.description: Enable/disable cloud sky ambient occlusion, the scene must contain a Skylight component with Cloud Ambient Occlusion enabled on it.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricCloud.SkyAO.Debug
cvars.description: Print information to debug the cloud sky AO map.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricCloud.SkyAO.Filtering
cvars.description: Enable/disable the sky AO dilation/smoothing filter.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricCloud.SkyAO.MaxResolution
cvars.description: The maximum resolution of the texture storing ambient occlusion information for the environment lighting coming from sky light. The active resolution is controlled by the CloudAmbientOcclusionMapResolutionScale property on the Skylight component.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricCloud.SkyAO.SnapLength
cvars.description: Snapping size in kilometers of the cloud sky AO texture position to avoid flickering.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricCloud.SkyAO.TraceSampleCount
cvars.description: The number of samples taken to evaluate ground lighting occlusion.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricCloud.SoftBlendingDistanceOnTranslucent
cvars.description: The soft blending in distance in kilometer used to soft blend in cloud over translucent from the evaluated start depth.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricCloud.StepSizeOnZeroConservativeDensity
cvars.description: Raymarch step size when a sample giving zero conservative density is encountered. If > 1, performance will likely improve but banding artifacts can show up if too large.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricCloud.ViewRaySampleMaxCount
cvars.description: The maximum number of samples taken while ray marching view primary rays.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricFog
cvars.description: Whether to allow the volumetric fog feature.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricFog.ConservativeDepth
cvars.description: [Experimental] Whether to allow the volumetric to use conservative depth to accelerate computations.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricFog.DepthDistributionScale
cvars.description: Scales the slice depth distribution.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricFog.Emissive
cvars.description: Whether to allow the volumetric fog emissive component.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricFog.GridPixelSize
cvars.description: XY Size of a cell in the voxel grid, in pixels.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricFog.GridSizeZ
cvars.description: How many Volumetric Fog cells to use in z.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricFog.HistoryMissSupersampleCount
cvars.description: Number of lighting samples to compute for voxels whose history value is not available. This reduces noise when panning or on camera cuts, but introduces a variable cost to volumetric fog computation. Valid range [1, 16].

cvars.name: r.VolumetricFog.HistoryWeight
cvars.description: How much the history value should be weighted each frame. This is a tradeoff between visible jittering and responsiveness.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricFog.InjectRaytracedLights
cvars.description: Whether lights with ray traced shadows are injected into volumetric fog

cvars.name: r.VolumetricFog.InjectShadowedLightsSeparately
cvars.description: Whether to allow the volumetric fog feature.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricFog.InverseSquaredLightDistanceBiasScale
cvars.description: Scales the amount added to the inverse squared falloff denominator. This effectively removes the spike from inverse squared falloff that causes extreme aliasing.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricFog.Jitter
cvars.description: Whether to apply jitter to each frame's volumetric fog computation, achieving temporal super sampling.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricFog.LightFunction
cvars.description: This is an alias, please use r.VolumetricFog.UsesLightFunctionAtlas.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricFog.LightFunction.DirectionalLightSupersampleScale
cvars.description: Scales the slice depth distribution.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricFog.LightScatteringSampleJitterMultiplier
cvars.description: Multiplier for random offset value used to jitter each world sample position when generating the 3D fog volume. Enable/disable with r.VolumetricFog.Jitter

cvars.name: r.VolumetricFog.RectLightTexture
cvars.description: Whether to allow the volumetric fog to use rect light source texture.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricFog.TemporalReprojection
cvars.description: Whether to use temporal reprojection on volumetric fog.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricFog.UpsampleJitterMultiplier
cvars.description: Multiplier for random offset value used to jitter the sample position of the 3D fog volume to hide fog pixelization due to sampling from a lower resolution texture.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricFog.UsesLightFunctionAtlas
cvars.description: Whether the light function atlas is sampled when rendering local lights.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricFog.VoxelizationShowOnlyPassIndex
cvars.description: When >= 0, indicates a single voxelization pass to render for debugging.

cvars.name: r.VolumetricFog.VoxelizationSlicesPerGSPass
cvars.description: How many depth slices to render in a single voxelization pass (max geometry shader expansion). Must recompile voxelization shaders to propagate changes.

cvars.name: r.VRS.BasePass
cvars.description: Enables Variable Rate Shading for the base pass 0: Disabled1: Full2: Conservative (default)

cvars.name: r.VRS.ContrastAdaptiveShading
cvars.description: Enables using Variable Rate Shading based on the luminance from the previous frame's post process output

cvars.name: r.VRS.ContrastAdaptiveShading.HDR10CorrectionMultiplier
cvars.description: Approximation multiplier to account for how perceptual values are spread out in SDR vs HDR10

cvars.name: r.VRS.ContrastAdaptiveShading.Preview
cvars.description: Whether to include CAS in VRS preview overlay.0 - off, 1 - on (default)

cvars.name: r.VRS.DebugForceRate
cvars.description: -1: None, 0: Force 1x1, 1: Force 1x2, 2: Force 2x1, 3: Force 2x2, 4: Force 2x4, 5: Force 4x2, 6: Force 4x4

cvars.name: r.VRS.Decals
cvars.description: Enables Variable Rate Shading for decals 0: Disabled1: Full2: Conservative (default)

cvars.name: r.VRS.Enable
cvars.description: Toggle to enable Variable Rate Shading.

cvars.name: r.VRS.EnableImage
cvars.description: Toggle to enable image-based Variable Rate Shading.

cvars.name: r.VRS.EnableSoftware
cvars.description: Generate 2x2 tile size software shading rate images when possible for use with nanite CS. Works even when r.VRS.Enable = 0 or Tier 2 VRS is unsupported by the hardware.0: Off, 1: On

cvars.name: r.VRS.LightFunctions
cvars.description: Enables Variable Rate Shading for light functions 0: Disabled1: Full (default)2: Conservative

cvars.name: r.VRS.NaniteEmitGBuffer
cvars.description: Enable VRS with Nanite EmitGBuffer rendering. 0: Disabled1: Full2: Conservative (default)

cvars.name: r.VRS.Preview
cvars.description: Show a debug visualization of the VRS shading rate image texture. Conservative and software images are only available via Contrast Adaptive Shading.0 - off, 1 - full (hardware), 2 - conservative (hardware), 3 - full (software), 4 - conservative (software)

cvars.name: r.VRS.ReflectionEnvironmentSky
cvars.description: Enable VRS with ReflectionEnvironmentAndSky (PS) rendering. 0: Disabled1: Full2: Conservative (default)

cvars.name: r.VRS.SSAO
cvars.description: Enable VRS with SSAO rendering. 0: Disabled1: Full2: Conservative (default)

cvars.name: r.VRS.SSR
cvars.description: Enable VRS with SSR (PS) rendering. 0: Disabled1: Full2: Conservative (default)

cvars.name: r.VRS.Translucency
cvars.description: Enable VRS with translucency rendering. 0: Disabled1: Full (default)2: Conservative

cvars.name: r.VT.AnisotropicFiltering
cvars.description: Is anisotropic filtering for VTs enabled?

cvars.name: r.VT.AsyncPageRequestTask
cvars.description: Performs VT page requests on an async task.

cvars.name: r.VT.AVT.AgeToFree
cvars.description: Number of frames for an allocation to be unused before it is considered for free

cvars.name: r.VT.AVT.LevelIncrement
cvars.description: Number of levels to increment each time we grow an allocated virtual texture

cvars.name: r.VT.AVT.MaxAllocPerFrame
cvars.description: Max number of allocated VT for adaptive VT to alloc per frame

cvars.name: r.VT.AVT.MaxFreePerFrame
cvars.description: Max number of allocated VT for adaptive VT to free per frame

cvars.name: r.VT.AVT.MaxPageResidency
cvars.description: Percentage of page table to allocate before we start freeing to make space

cvars.name: r.VT.Borders
cvars.description: If > 0, debug borders will enabled

cvars.name: r.VT.CodecAgeThreshold
cvars.description: Mininum number of frames VT codec must be unused before possibly being retired

cvars.name: r.VT.CodecNumThreshold
cvars.description: Once number of VT codecs exceeds this number, attempt to retire codecs that haven't been recently used

cvars.name: r.VT.CsvStats
cvars.description: Send virtual texturing stats to CSV profiler 0=off, 1=on, 2=verbose

cvars.name: r.VT.EnableAutoImport
cvars.description: Enable virtual texture on texture import

cvars.name: r.VT.EnableFeedback
cvars.description: Enable processing of the GPU generated feedback buffer.

cvars.name: r.VT.EnableLossyCompressLightmaps
cvars.description: Enables lossy compression on virtual texture lightmaps. Lossy compression tends to have lower quality on lightmap textures, vs regular color textures.

cvars.name: r.VT.EnablePlayback
cvars.description: Enable playback of recorded feedback requests.

cvars.name: r.vt.FeedbackFactor
cvars.description: The size of the VT feedback buffer is calculated by dividing the render resolution by this factor.The value set here is rounded up to the nearest power of two before use.

cvars.name: r.VT.ForceContinuousUpdate
cvars.description: Force continuous update on all virtual textures.

cvars.name: r.VT.IOPriority_HighPagePri
cvars.description: Priority of high priority VT I/O requests

cvars.name: r.VT.IOPriority_NormalPagePri
cvars.description: Priority of default priority VT I/O requests

cvars.name: r.VT.MaskedPageTableUpdates
cvars.description: Masks the page table update quads to reduce pixel fill costs

cvars.name: r.VT.MaxAnisotropy
cvars.description: MaxAnisotropy setting for Virtual Texture sampling.

cvars.name: r.VT.MaxContinuousUpdatesPerFrame
cvars.description: Max number of page uploads for pages that are already mapped.

cvars.name: r.VT.MaxContinuousUpdatesPerFrameInEditor
cvars.description: Max number of page uploads for pages that are already mapped when in editor.

cvars.name: r.VT.MaxReleasedPerFrame
cvars.description: Max number of allocated virtual textures to release per frame

cvars.name: r.VT.MaxTilesProducedPerFrame
cvars.description: Max number of pages that can be produced per frame

cvars.name: r.VT.MaxUploadMemory
cvars.description: Maximum amount of upload memory to allocate in MB before throttling virtual texture streaming requests. We never throttle high priority requests so allocation can peak above this value.

cvars.name: r.VT.MaxUploadRequests
cvars.description: Maximum number of virtual texture tile upload requests that can be in flight.

cvars.name: r.VT.MaxUploadsPerFrame
cvars.description: Max number of page uploads per frame in game

cvars.name: r.VT.MaxUploadsPerFrame.Streaming
cvars.description: If positive, max number of page uploads per frame in game for streaming VT. Negative means no limit. If zero, SVTs won't be budgeted separately. They will be limited by r.VT.MaxUploadsPerFrame along with other types of VTs. This is the old behavior. This limit should be high if streaming pages is slow so that I/O requests are not throttled which can cause long delays to acquire page data.

cvars.name: r.VT.MaxUploadsPerFrameInEditor
cvars.description: Max number of page uploads per frame when in editor

cvars.name: r.VT.MenuRestricted
cvars.description: Restrict virtual texture menu options

cvars.name: r.VT.Mobile.ManualTrilinearFiltering
cvars.description: Whether to use a manual trilinear filtering for VTs on mobile platforms. This more expensive filtering is used on mobile platforms that do not support Temporal Anti-Aliasing.

cvars.name: r.VT.NumFeedbackTasks
cvars.description: Number of tasks to create to read virtual texture feedback.

cvars.name: r.VT.NumGatherTasks
cvars.description: Number of tasks to create to combine virtual texture feedback.

cvars.name: r.VT.PageFreeThreshold
cvars.description: Number of frames since the last time a VT page was used, before it's considered free. VT pages are not necesarily marked as used on the CPU every time they're accessed by the GPU. Increasing this threshold reduces the chances that an in-use frame is considered free.

cvars.name: r.VT.PageUpdateFlushCount
cvars.description: Number of page updates to buffer before attempting to flush by taking a lock.

cvars.name: r.VT.ParallelFeedbackTasks
cvars.description: Use worker threads for virtual texture feedback tasks.

cvars.name: r.VT.ParallelTileCompression
cvars.description: Enables parallel compression of macro tiles

cvars.name: r.VT.PlaybackMipBias
cvars.description: Mip bias to apply during playback of recorded feedback requests.

cvars.name: r.VT.PoolAutoGrow
cvars.description: Enable physical pool growing on oversubscription.

cvars.name: r.VT.PoolSizeScale
cvars.description: Scale factor for virtual texture physical pool size.

cvars.name: r.VT.ProduceLockedTilesOnFlush
cvars.description: Should locked tiles be (re)produced when flushing the cache

cvars.name: r.VT.RefreshEntirePageTable
cvars.description: Refreshes the entire page table texture every frame

cvars.name: r.VT.RenderCaptureNextPagesDraws
cvars.description: Trigger a render capture during the next RVT RenderPages draw calls.

cvars.name: r.VT.Residency.AdjustmentRate
cvars.description: Rate at which we adjust mip bias due to Virtual Texture pool residency. Default 0.2

cvars.name: r.VT.Residency.LockedUpperBound
cvars.description: Virtual Texture pool locked page residency above which we kill any mip bias. That's because locked pages are never affected by the mip bias setting. So it is unlikely that we can get the pool within budget. Default 0.65

cvars.name: r.VT.Residency.LowerBound
cvars.description: Virtual Texture pool residency below which we decrease mip bias. Default 0.95

cvars.name: r.VT.Residency.MaxMipMapBias
cvars.description: Maximum mip bias to apply to prevent Virtual Texture pool residency over-subscription. Default 4

cvars.name: r.VT.Residency.Notify
cvars.description: Show on screen notifications for virtual texture physical pool residency

cvars.name: r.VT.Residency.Show
cvars.description: Show on screen HUD for virtual texture physical pool residency

cvars.name: r.VT.Residency.UpperBound
cvars.description: Virtual Texture pool residency above which we increase mip bias. Default 0.95

cvars.name: r.VT.RVT.DirectCompress
cvars.description: Compress texture data direct to the physical texture on platforms that support it.

cvars.name: r.VT.RVT.DirtyPagesKeptMappedFrames
cvars.description: When invalidating RVT pages, we keep them mapped if they gave feedback in the last N frames.

cvars.name: r.VT.RVT.HighQualityPerPixelHeight
cvars.description: Use higher quality sampling of per pixel heightmaps when rendering to Runtime Virtual Texture.

cvars.name: r.VT.RVT.MipColors
cvars.description: Render mip colors to RVT BaseColor.

cvars.name: r.VT.RVT.StreamingMips
cvars.description: Enable streaming mips for RVT

cvars.name: r.VT.RVT.TileCountBias
cvars.description: Bias to apply to Runtime Virtual Texture size. Group 0

cvars.name: r.VT.RVT.TileCountBias.Group0
cvars.description: Bias to apply to Runtime Virtual Texture size. Group 0

cvars.name: r.VT.RVT.TileCountBias.Group1
cvars.description: Bias to apply to Runtime Virtual Texture size. Group 1

cvars.name: r.VT.RVT.TileCountBias.Group2
cvars.description: Bias to apply to Runtime Virtual Texture size. Group 2

cvars.name: r.VT.SplitPhysicalPoolSize
cvars.description: Create multiple physical pools per format to keep pools at this maximum size in tiles. A value of 64 tiles will force 16bit page tables. This can be a page table memory optimization for large physical pools. Defaults to 0 (off).

cvars.name: r.VT.Support16BitPageTable
cvars.description: Enable support for 16 bit page table entries. This can reduce page table memory when only 16bit addressing is needed. But this can increase the number of page table spaces required when a mixture of 16bit and 32bit addressing is needed. Defaults on.

cvars.name: r.VT.SyncProduceLockedTiles
cvars.description: Should we sync loading when producing locked tiles

cvars.name: r.VT.TileBorderSize
cvars.description: Size in pixels to use for virtual texture tiles borders (rounded to next power-of-2)

cvars.name: r.VT.TileSize
cvars.description: Size in pixels to use for virtual texture tiles (rounded to next power-of-2)

cvars.name: r.VT.TranscodeRetireAge
cvars.description: If a VT transcode request is not picked up after this number of frames, drop it and put request in cache as free. default 60

cvars.name: r.VT.UploadMemoryPageSize
cvars.description: Size in MB for a single page of virtual texture upload memory.

cvars.name: r.VT.ValidateCompressionOnLoad
cvars.description: Validates that VT data contains no compression errors when loading from DDCThis is slow, but allows debugging corrupt VT data (and allows recovering from bad DDC)

cvars.name: r.VT.ValidateCompressionOnSave
cvars.description: Validates that VT data contains no compression errors before saving to DDCThis is slow, but allows debugging corrupt VT data

cvars.name: r.VT.Verbose
cvars.description: Be pedantic about certain things that shouln't occur unless something is wrong. This may cause a lot of logspam 100's of lines per frame.

cvars.name: r.Water.SingleLayer
cvars.description: Enable the single water rendering system.

cvars.name: r.Water.SingleLayer.DepthPrepass
cvars.description: Enable a depth prepass for single layer water. Necessary for proper Virtual Shadow Maps support.

cvars.name: r.Water.SingleLayer.DistanceFieldShadow
cvars.description: When using deferred, distance field shadow tracing is supported on single layer water. This cvar can be used to toggle it on/off at runtime.

cvars.name: r.Water.SingleLayer.OptimizedClear
cvars.description: Toggles optimized depth clear

cvars.name: r.Water.SingleLayer.Reflection
cvars.description: Reflection technique to use on single layer water. 0: Disabled, 1: Enabled (same as rest of scene), 2: Force Reflection Captures and Sky, 3: Force SSR

cvars.name: r.Water.SingleLayer.RefractionDownsampleFactor
cvars.description: Resolution divider for the water refraction buffer.

cvars.name: r.Water.SingleLayer.ShadersSupportDistanceFieldShadow
cvars.description: Whether or not the single layer water material shaders are compiled with support for distance field shadow, i.e. output main directional light luminance in a separate render target. This is preconditioned on using deferred shading and having distance field support enabled in the project.

cvars.name: r.Water.SingleLayer.ShadersSupportVSMFiltering
cvars.description: Whether or not the single layer water material shaders are compiled with support for virtual shadow map filter, i.e. output main directional light luminance in a separate render target. This is preconditioned on using deferred shading and having VSM support enabled in the project.

cvars.name: r.Water.SingleLayer.SSRTAA
cvars.description: Enable SSR denoising using TAA for the single layer water rendering system.

cvars.name: r.Water.SingleLayer.TiledComposite
cvars.description: Enable tiled optimization of the single layer water reflection rendering system.

cvars.name: r.Water.SingleLayer.UnderwaterFogWhenCameraIsAboveWater
cvars.description: Renders height fog behind the water surface even when the camera is above water. This avoids artifacts when entering and exiting the water with strong height fog in the scene but causes artifacts when looking at the water surface from a distance.

cvars.name: r.Water.SingleLayer.VSMFiltering
cvars.description: When using deferred, virtual shadow map filtering is supported on single layer water. This cvar can be used to toggle it on/off at runtime.

cvars.name: r.Water.SingleLayerWater.SupportCloudShadow
cvars.description: Enables cloud shadows on SingleLayerWater materials.

cvars.name: r.Water.WaterInfo.DilationOverwriteMinimumDistance
cvars.description: The minimum distance below the ground when we allow dilation to write on top of water

cvars.name: r.Water.WaterInfo.RenderCaptureNextWaterInfoDraws
cvars.description: Enable capturing of the water info texture for the next N draws

cvars.name: r.Water.WaterInfo.UndergroundDilationDepthOffset
cvars.description: The minimum distance below the ground when we allow dilation to write on top of water

cvars.name: renderdoc.AutoAttach
cvars.description: RenderDoc will attach on startup.

cvars.name: renderdoc.BinaryPath
cvars.description: Path to the main RenderDoc executable to use.

cvars.name: renderdoc.CaptureAllActivity
cvars.description: 0 - RenderDoc will only capture data from the current viewport. 1 - RenderDoc will capture all activity, in all viewports and editor windows for the entire frame.

cvars.name: renderdoc.CaptureCallstacks
cvars.description: 0 - Callstacks will not be captured by RenderDoc. 1 - Capture callstacks for each API call.

cvars.name: renderdoc.CaptureDelay
cvars.description: If > 0, RenderDoc will trigger the capture only after this amount of time (or frames, if CaptureDelayInSeconds is false) has passed.

cvars.name: renderdoc.CaptureDelayInSeconds
cvars.description: 0 - Capture delay's unit is in frames.1 - Capture delay's unit is in seconds.

cvars.name: renderdoc.CaptureFrameCount
cvars.description: If > 0, the RenderDoc capture will encompass more than a single frame. Note: this implies that all activity in all viewports and editor windows will be captured (i.e. same as CaptureAllActivity)

cvars.name: renderdoc.EnableCrashHandler
cvars.description: 0 - Crash handling is completely delegated to the engine. 1 - The RenderDoc crash handler will be used (Only use this if you know the problem is with RenderDoc and you want to notify the RenderDoc developers!).

cvars.name: renderdoc.ReferenceAllResources
cvars.description: 0 - Only include resources that are actually used. 1 - Include all rendering resources in the capture, even those that have not been used during the frame. Please note that doing this will significantly increase capture size.

cvars.name: renderdoc.SaveAllInitials
cvars.description: 0 - Disregard initial states of resources. 1 - Always capture the initial state of all rendering resources. Please note that doing this will significantly increase capture size.

cvars.name: renderdoc.ShowHelpOnStartup
cvars.description: 0 - Greeting has been shown and will not appear on startup. 1 - Greeting will be shown during next startup.

cvars.name: rhi.Bindless.Resources
cvars.description: Set to Enabled to enable for all shader types. Set to RayTracingOnly to restrict to Raytracing shaders.

cvars.name: rhi.Bindless.Samplers
cvars.description: Set to Enabled to enable for all shader types. Set to RayTracingOnly to restrict to Raytracing shaders.

cvars.name: rhi.EnableConsole120Fps
cvars.description: Enable Console 120fps if Monitor supports it and Console is properly setup

cvars.name: RHI.GPUHitchThreshold
cvars.description: Threshold for detecting hitches on the GPU (in milliseconds).

cvars.name: rhi.PresentThreshold.Bottom
cvars.description: Specifies the percentage of the screen from the bottom where tearing is allowed. Only effective on supported platforms. Range: 0.0 - 1.0

cvars.name: rhi.PresentThreshold.Top
cvars.description: Specifies the percentage of the screen from the top where tearing is allowed. Only effective on supported platforms. Range: 0.0 - 1.0

cvars.name: rhi.ResourceTableCaching
cvars.description: If 1, the RHI will cache resource table contents within a frame. Otherwise resource tables are rebuilt for every draw call.

cvars.name: rhi.SyncAllowEarlyKick
cvars.description: When 1, allows the RHI vsync thread to kick off the next frame early if we've missed the vsync.

cvars.name: rhi.SyncAllowVariable
cvars.description: When 1, allows the RHI to use variable refresh rate, if supported by the output hardware.

cvars.name: rhi.SyncInterval
cvars.description: Determines the frequency of VSyncs in supported RHIs. This is in multiples of 16.66 on a 60hz display, but some platforms support higher refresh rates. Assuming 60fps, the values correspond to: 0 - Unlocked (present immediately) 1 - Present every vblank interval 2 - Present every 2 vblank intervals 3 - etc...

cvars.name: rhi.SyncSlackMS
cvars.description: Increases input latency by this many milliseconds, to help performance (trade-off tunable). Gamethread will be kicked off this many milliseconds before the vsync

cvars.name: RHI.TransientAllocator.BufferCacheSize
cvars.description: The maximum number of RHI buffers to cache on each heap before garbage collecting.

cvars.name: RHI.TransientAllocator.GarbageCollectLatency
cvars.description: Amount of update cycles before memory is reclaimed.

cvars.name: RHI.TransientAllocator.MinimumHeapSize
cvars.description: Minimum size of an RHI transient heap in MB. Heaps will default to this size and grow to the maximum based on the first allocation (Default 128).

cvars.name: RHI.TransientAllocator.TextureCacheSize
cvars.description: The maximum number of RHI textures to cache on each heap before garbage collecting.

cvars.name: rhi.UseSubmissionThread
cvars.description: Whether to enable the RHI submission thread. 0: No 1: Yes, but not when running with multi-gpu. 2: Yes, always

cvars.name: RHIPoolAllocator.DefragMaxPoolsToClear
cvars.description: Maximum amount of pools to try and clear during a single alloctor defrag call (default: 1 - negative then all pools will be tried and no timeslicing)

cvars.name: RHIPoolAllocator.DefragSizeFraction
cvars.description: Skip defrag of pool if usage is more than given fraction (default: 0.9f).

cvars.name: RHIPoolAllocator.ValidateLinkedList
cvars.description: Validate all the internal linked list data of all the RHIPoolAllocators during every operation.

cvars.name: RigVM.DisableExecutionAll
cvars.description: if nonzero we disable all execution of rigvms.

cvars.name: RigVM.DisableNativizedVMs
cvars.description: if nonzero we disable swapping to nativized VMs.

cvars.name: RigVM.EnableDrawInterfaceInShipping
cvars.description: Set to 1 to enable control rig draw interface in shipping

cvars.name: RigVM.EnablePostLoadHashing
cvars.description: When true refreshing the RigVMGraphs will be skipped if the hash matches the serialized hash.

cvars.name: RigVM.EnablePreLoadFiltering
cvars.description: When true the RigVMGraphs will be skipped during preload to speed up load times.

cvars.name: RigVM.Graph.DisableCompactNodes
cvars.description: When true all nodes are going to be drawn as full nodes.

cvars.name: RigVM.NameCacheMaxSize
cvars.description: Change to control how many names are cached per VM instance.

cvars.name: RigVM.StackDetailedLabels
cvars.description: Set to true to turn on detailed labels for the execution stack widget

cvars.name: RigVM.UInterfaceSupport
cvars.description: When true the RigVMCompiler will allow UInterfaces.

cvars.name: RigVM.UObjectSupport
cvars.description: When true the RigVMCompiler will allow UObjects.

cvars.name: RunAsyncTraceOnWorkerThread
cvars.description: Whether to use worker thread for async trace functionality. This works if FApp::ShouldUseThreadingForPerformance is true. Otherwise it will always use game thread. 0: Use game thread, 1: User worker thread

cvars.name: s.AdaptiveAddToWorld.AddToWorldTimeSliceMax
cvars.description: Maximum adaptive AddToWorld timeslice

cvars.name: s.AdaptiveAddToWorld.AddToWorldTimeSliceMin
cvars.description: Minimum adaptive AddToWorld timeslice

cvars.name: s.AdaptiveAddToWorld.Enabled
cvars.description: Enables the adaptive AddToWorld timeslice (replaces s.LevelStreamingActorsUpdateTimeLimit) (default: off)

cvars.name: s.AdaptiveAddToWorld.Method
cvars.description: Heuristic to use for the adaptive timeslice 0 - compute the target timeslice based on remaining work time 1 - compute the target timeslice based on total work time for levels in flight (this avoids slowing before a level completes)

cvars.name: s.AdaptiveAddToWorld.TargetMaxTimeRemaining
cvars.description: Target max time remaining in seconds. If our estimated completion time is longer than this, the timeslice will increase. Lower values are more aggressive

cvars.name: s.AdaptiveAddToWorld.TimeSliceMaxIncreasePerSecond
cvars.description: Max rate at which the adptive AddToWorld timeslice will increase. Set to 0 to increase instantly

cvars.name: s.AdaptiveAddToWorld.TimeSliceMaxReducePerSecond
cvars.description: Max rate at which the adptive AddToWorld timeslice will reduce. Set to 0 to reduce instantly

cvars.name: s.AllowLevelRequestsWhileAsyncLoadingInMatch
cvars.description: Enables level streaming requests while async loading (of anything) while the match is already in progress and no loading screen is up.

cvars.name: s.AllowParseObjectLoading
cvars.description: If true, allows ParseObject to load fully qualified objects if needed and requested.

cvars.name: s.AllowUnversionedContentInEditor
cvars.description: If true, allows unversioned content to be loaded by the editor.

cvars.name: s.AsyncLoadingAlwaysProcessPackages
cvars.description: When flushing, will process all packages instead of only what's needed. (Used to avoid a hard to repro potential deadlock)

cvars.name: s.AsyncLoadingPrecachePriority
cvars.description: Priority of asyncloading precache requests

cvars.name: s.AsyncLoadingThreadEnabled
cvars.description: Placeholder console variable, currently not used in runtime.

cvars.name: s.AsyncLoadingTimeLimit
cvars.description: Maximum amount of time to spend doing asynchronous loading (ms per frame).

cvars.name: s.AsyncLoadingUseFullTimeLimit
cvars.description: Whether to use the entire time limit even if blocked on I/O.

cvars.name: s.CheckRootComponentReplicationOnAttachedChildren
cvars.description: Scene Component OnRep_AttachedChildren: false: fix up any children that are missing the parent, true: fixes up all children except non-replicated root components (default)

cvars.name: s.ContinuouslyIncrementalGCWhileLevelsPendingPurge
cvars.description: Whether to repeatedly kick off incremental GC when there are levels still waiting to be purged.

cvars.name: s.DebugPackageNames
cvars.description: Add debug breaks for all listed package names, also automatically added to s.VerbosePackageNames.

cvars.name: s.EditorLoadPrecacheSizeKB
cvars.description: Size, in KB, to precache when loading packages in the editor.

cvars.name: s.EnforcePackageCompatibleVersionCheck
cvars.description: If true, package loading will fail if the version stored in the package header is newer than the current engine version

cvars.name: s.EventDrivenLoaderEnabled
cvars.description: Placeholder console variable, currently not used in runtime.

cvars.name: s.FlushStreamingOnExit
cvars.description: Placeholder console variable, currently not used in runtime.

cvars.name: s.ForceGCAfterLevelStreamedOut
cvars.description: Whether to force a GC after levels are streamed out to instantly reclaim the memory at the expensive of a hitch.

cvars.name: s.ForceRouteActorInitializeNextFrame
cvars.description: Whether to force routing actor initialize phase in its own frame.

cvars.name: s.ForceVerifyLevelsGotRemovedByGC
cvars.description: Whether to force a verification of objects residing in a GC'ed level package (ignored in shipping builds).

cvars.name: s.IoDispatcherBufferAlignment
cvars.description: IoDispatcher read buffer alignment.

cvars.name: s.IoDispatcherBufferMemoryMB
cvars.description: IoDispatcher buffer memory size (in megabytes).

cvars.name: s.IoDispatcherBufferSizeKB
cvars.description: IoDispatcher read buffer size (in kilobytes).

cvars.name: s.IoDispatcherCacheSizeMB
cvars.description: IoDispatcher cache memory size (in megabytes).

cvars.name: s.IoDispatcherDecompressionWorkerCount
cvars.description: IoDispatcher decompression worker count.

cvars.name: s.IoDispatcherForceSynchronousScatter
cvars.description: Force scatter jobs to be synchronous on the IODispatcher thread. This can avoid deadlocks in cases where background tasks end up waiting on I/O and we don't have enough background task threads to fulfill decompression requests.

cvars.name: s.IoDispatcherMaintainSortingOnPriorityChange
cvars.description: If s.IoDispatcherSortRequestsByOffset > 0 and this > 0, io dispatcher remembers the last file handle/offset read from even when switching priority levels.

cvars.name: s.IoDispatcherMaxForwardSeekKB
cvars.description: If s.IoDispatcherSortRequestsByOffset is enabled and this is > 0, if the next sequential read is further than this offset from the last one, read the oldest request instead

cvars.name: s.IoDispatcherRequestLatencyCircuitBreakerMS
cvars.description: If s.IoDispatcherSortRequestsByOffset is enabled and this is >0, if the oldest request has been in the queue for this long, read it instead of the most optimal read

cvars.name: s.IoDispatcherSortRequestsByOffset
cvars.description: If > 0, io dispatcher sorts the outstanding request queue by offset rather than sequence.

cvars.name: s.IoDispatcherTocsEnablePerfectHashing
cvars.description: Enable perfect hashmap lookups for iostore tocs

cvars.name: s.LargeMemoryDataMaxPoolLength
cvars.description: Limit LargeMemoryData pool size to the given number of elements.

cvars.name: s.LevelStreamingActorsUpdateTimeLimit
cvars.description: Maximum allowed time to spend for actor registration steps during level streaming (ms per frame).

cvars.name: s.LevelStreamingAddPrimitiveGranularity
cvars.description: Batching granularity used to add primitives to scene in parallel when registering actor components during level streaming.

cvars.name: s.LevelStreamingComponentsRegistrationGranularity
cvars.description: Batching granularity used to register actor components during level streaming.

cvars.name: s.LevelStreamingComponentsUnregistrationGranularity
cvars.description: Batching granularity used to unregister actor components during level unstreaming.

cvars.name: s.LevelStreamingLowMemoryPendingPurgeCount
cvars.description: When system is in low memory state, if the number of streaming levels to purge meets or exceeds this value, perform a 'soft' GC.

cvars.name: s.LevelStreamingRouteActorInitializationGranularity
cvars.description: Batching granularity used to initialize actors during level streaming. If this is zero, we process all actors and stages in one pass.

cvars.name: s.MaxIncomingRequestsToStall
cvars.description: Controls the maximum number of unhandled IO requests before we stall the pak precacher to let the CPU catch up.

cvars.name: s.MaxLevelRequestsAtOnceWhileInMatch
cvars.description: When we're already loading this many levels and actively in match, don't allow any more requests until one of those completes. Set to zero to disable.

cvars.name: s.MaxPrecacheRequestsInFlight
cvars.description: Controls the maximum amount of precache requests to have in flight.

cvars.name: s.MaxReadyRequestsToStallMB
cvars.description: Controls the maximum amount memory for unhandled IO requests before we stall the pak precacher to let the CPU catch up (in megabytes).

cvars.name: s.MinBulkDataSizeForAsyncLoading
cvars.description: Minimum time the time limit exceeded warning will be triggered by.

cvars.name: s.OnlyProcessRequiredPackagesWhenSyncLoading
cvars.description: When sync loading a package process only that package and its imports

cvars.name: s.OptimizeActorRegistration
cvars.description: Enables optimizations to actor component registration functions like PostRegisterAllComponents 0: Disable optimizations for legacy code that depends on redundant calls to registration functions 1: Enables optimizations and assumes the code is working properly 2: Enables optimization logic, but ensures it is working properly in non shipping builds

cvars.name: s.PriorityAsyncLoadingExtraTime
cvars.description: Additional time to spend asynchronous loading during a high priority load.

cvars.name: s.PriorityLevelStreamingActorsUpdateExtraTime
cvars.description: Additional time to spend on actor registration steps during a high priority load.

cvars.name: s.ProcessPrestreamingRequests
cvars.description: If non-zero, then we process prestreaming requests in cooked builds.

cvars.name: s.RandomizeLoadOrder
cvars.description: If > 0, will randomize the load order of pending packages using this seed instead of using the most efficient order. This can be used to find bugs.

cvars.name: s.RemoveUnreachableObjectsOnGT
cvars.description: Remove unreachable objects from GlobalImportStore on the GT from the GC callback NotifyUnreachableObjects (slow).

cvars.name: s.RouteActorInitializationWorkUnitWeighting
cvars.description: Weighting to apply to RouteActorInitialization when computing work units (relative to component init)

cvars.name: s.SkipChangelistCompatibilityVersionCheck
cvars.description: If true, engine version compatibility checks will not use changelist numbers to determine compatibility. NOTE: Changelist compatibility checks are automatically skipped in licensee builds.

cvars.name: s.StorageServerIoDispatcherBatchSize
cvars.description: StorageServer IoDispatcher batch size.

cvars.name: s.StorageServerIoDispatcherMaxActiveBatchCount
cvars.description: StorageServer IoDispatcher max submitted batches count.

cvars.name: s.StreamableDelegateDelayFrames
cvars.description: Number of frames to delay StreamableManager delegates

cvars.name: s.StreamableFlushAllAsyncLoadRequestsOnWait
cvars.description: Flush async loading without a specific request ID when waiting on streamable handles.

cvars.name: s.TimeLimitExceededMinTime
cvars.description: Minimum time the time limit exceeded warning will be triggered by.

cvars.name: s.TimeLimitExceededMultiplier
cvars.description: Multiplier for time limit exceeded warning time threshold.

cvars.name: s.UnregisterComponentsTimeLimit
cvars.description: Maximum allowed time to spend for actor unregistration steps during level streaming (ms per frame). If this is zero then we don't timeslice

cvars.name: s.UseBackgroundLevelStreaming
cvars.description: Whether to allow background level streaming.

cvars.name: s.VerbosePackageNames
cvars.description: Restrict verbose logging to listed package names.

cvars.name: s.VerifyObjectLoadFlags
cvars.description: Run AsyncFlags verifications for all objects when finished loading from the GC callback NotifyUnreachableObjects (slow).

cvars.name: s.VerifyUnreachableObjects
cvars.description: Run GlobalImportStore verifications for unreachable objects from the GC callback NotifyUnreachableObjects (slow).

cvars.name: s.WarnIfTimeLimitExceeded
cvars.description: Enables log warning if time limit for time-sliced package streaming has been exceeded.

cvars.name: s.World.SkipPerfTrackerForUninitializedWorlds
cvars.description: When set, disables allocation of InGamePerformanceTrackers for Worlds that aren't initialized.

cvars.name: SafeZone.EnableScale
cvars.description: IS the safe zone scale enabled?

cvars.name: SafeZone.Scale
cvars.description: The safezone scale.

cvars.name: save.FixupStandaloneFlags
cvars.description: If non-zero, when the UAsset of a package is missing RF_Standalone, the flag is added. If zero, the flags are not changed and the save fails.

cvars.name: SceneGraph.EnablePropertyBagPlaceholderObjectSupport
cvars.description: If true, allows placeholder types to be created in place of missing types on load in order to redirect serialization into a property bag.

cvars.name: SceneOutliner.AutoRepresentingWorldNetMode
cvars.description: The preferred NetMode of the world shown in the scene outliner when the 'Auto' option is chosen: 0=Standalone, 1=DedicatedServer, 2=ListenServer, 3=Client

cvars.name: SceneOutliner.AutoRepresentingWorldNetModeForObjectMixer
cvars.description: The preferred NetMode of the world shown in the scene outliner when the 'Auto' option is chosen: 0=Standalone, 1=DedicatedServer, 2=ListenServer, 3=Client

cvars.name: SceneOutliner.ProcessingBudgetPerFrame
cvars.description: Maximum time in milliseconds to spend processing operations per frame

cvars.name: Sequencer.AddKeepStateDeterminismFences
cvars.description: Whether the Sequencer compiler should auto-add determinism fences for the last frame of KeepState sections. This ensures that the last possible value of the section is consistently evaluated regardless of framerate, at the cost of an extra evaluation on frames that cross over KeepState sections' end time.

cvars.name: Sequencer.Audio.IgnoreAudioSyncDuringWorldTimeDilation
cvars.description: Ignore correcting audio if there is world time dilation.

cvars.name: Sequencer.Audio.MaxDesyncTolerance
cvars.description: Controls how many seconds an audio track can be out of sync in a Sequence before we attempt a time correction.

cvars.name: Sequencer.Audio.PlayAudioWhenPlaybackJumps
cvars.description: Play audio when playback jumps.

cvars.name: Sequencer.Audio.UseAudioClockForAudioDesync
cvars.description: When set to 1, we will use the audio render thread directly to query whether audio has went out of sync with the sequence.

cvars.name: Sequencer.AutoScrub
cvars.description: Enable/disable auto-scrubbing

cvars.name: Sequencer.AutoScrubCurveExponent
cvars.description: How much to ramp in and out the scrub speed when auto-scrubbing

cvars.name: Sequencer.AutoScrubSpeed
cvars.description: How fast to scrub forward/backward when auto-scrubbing

cvars.name: Sequencer.AutoTangentNew
cvars.description: If 2 Sequencer will flatten tangents with no overshoot, if 1 Auto Tangent will use new algorithm to gradually flatten maximum/minimum keys, if 0 Auto Tangent will average all keys (pre 4.23 behavior).

cvars.name: Sequencer.CachedChannelEvaluationParityThreshold
cvars.description: Threshold for testing Evaluate parity with cached/uncached routines.

cvars.name: Sequencer.CompilerVersion
cvars.description: Defines a global identifer for moviescene compiler logic.

cvars.name: Sequencer.CustomTaskScheduling
cvars.description: (Default: true. Enables more efficient custom task scheduling of asynchronous Sequencer evaluation.

cvars.name: Sequencer.DeferMovementUpdates
cvars.description: (Default: false) Enables deferring all Scene Component movement updates to the end of a sequencer evaluation to avoid excessive calls to UpdateOverlaps or cascading transform updates for attached components.

cvars.name: Sequencer.DrawMeshTrails
cvars.description: Toggle to show or hide Level Sequence VR Editor trails

cvars.name: Sequencer.DuplicateLinkedAnimSequence
cvars.description: When true when we duplicate a level sequence that has a linked anim sequence it will duplicate and link the anim sequencel, if false we leave any link alone.

cvars.name: Sequencer.EnableCachedChannelEvaluation
cvars.description: Toggles whether channel evaluation will use cached or non-cached evaluation.

cvars.name: Sequencer.IgnoreDependenciesWhenNotThreading
cvars.description: (Default: true) Whether to ignore task dependencies when there is no threading.

cvars.name: Sequencer.LinearCubicInterpolation
cvars.description: If 1 Linear Keys Act As Cubic Interpolation with Linear Tangents, if 0 Linear Key Forces Linear Interpolation to Next Key.

cvars.name: Sequencer.MaterialParameterBlending
cvars.description: (Default: true) Defines whether material parameter blending should be enabled or not.

cvars.name: Sequencer.MaterialParameterEntityLifetimeTracking
cvars.description: (Default: false) Ensure on destruction that all entities have been cleaned up. This can report false positives (when the linker and material system are both cleaned up together) so is not enabled by default.

cvars.name: Sequencer.MaxLatentActionLoops
cvars.description: Defines the maximum number of latent action loops that can be run in one frame.

cvars.name: Sequencer.NetSyncThreshold
cvars.description: (Default: 200ms. Defines the threshold at which clients and servers must be forcibly re-synced during playback.

cvars.name: Sequencer.Outliner.CompactHeight
cvars.description: (Default: 22.f. Defines the height of outliner items when in compact mode.

cvars.name: Sequencer.Outliner.RelaxedHeight
cvars.description: (Default: 28.f. Defines the height of outliner items when in relaxed mode.

cvars.name: Sequencer.OutputDeferredMovementMode
cvars.description: Integer value specifying how to output Scene Components with deferred movement updates from Sequencer: (0 - Default) No output, (1 - Dump Once) Request a single output on the next evaluation, (2 - Dump every frame) Dump all movement updates every frame

cvars.name: Sequencer.RelativeTimecodeSmoothing
cvars.description: If nonzero, accumulate with platform time since when the timecodes were equal.

cvars.name: Sequencer.SecondsPerFrame
cvars.description: Seconds per frame to wait when in play every frame mode.

cvars.name: Sequencer.SmartAutoBlendLocationPercentage
cvars.description: Percentage near the next value that the tangent will blend to the adjacent tangent, if over 1.0 we won't blend. Default to 0.8

cvars.name: Sequencer.SmoothedMaxNetSyncSampleAge
cvars.description: (Default: 5000. Defines the range of samples (in milliseconds) required to perform smoothed net sync. Use 0 to disable smoothing.

cvars.name: Sequencer.SmoothedMaxNetSyncSampleCount
cvars.description: (Default: 50. The maximum number of samples to keep in memory.

cvars.name: Sequencer.SmoothedNetSyncDeviationThreshold
cvars.description: (Default: 200ms. Defines the acceptable deviation for smoothed net sync samples. Samples outside this deviation will be discarded.

cvars.name: Sequencer.StartTransformOffsetInBoneSpace
cvars.description: When true we offset the start offsets for skeletal animation matching in bone space, if false we do it in root space, by default true

cvars.name: Sequencer.TagSaturation
cvars.description: Specifies how saturated object binding tags should appear in the Sequencer UI.

cvars.name: Sequencer.ThreadedEvaluation.AllocationThreshold
cvars.description: (Default: 32) Defines the entity allocation fragmentation threshold above which threaded evaluation will be used.

cvars.name: Sequencer.ThreadedEvaluation.EntityThreshold
cvars.description: (Default: 256) Defines the number of entities that need to exist to justify threaded evaluation.

cvars.name: Sequencer.TickIntervalGroupingResolutionMs
cvars.description: Defines the maximum resolution for actor tick interval groupings. Bigger numbers will group more actors together when they have custom tick intervals, but will lead to less accurate intervals.

cvars.name: Sequencer.TimeUndo
cvars.description: Enable/disable ability to undo time when making changes

cvars.name: Sequencer.UseOldSequencerTrails
cvars.description: If true show old motion trails, if false use new editable motion trails.

cvars.name: Sequencer.UseSoftObjectPtrsForPreAnimatedMaterial
cvars.description: Defines whether to use soft-object-ptrs for referencing pre-animated state (default), or strong TObjectPtrs.

cvars.name: Sequencer.VolatileSequencesInEditor
cvars.description: (Default: 1) When non-zero, all assets will be treated as volatile in editor. Can be disabled to bypass volatility checks in-editor for more representative runtime performance metrics.

cvars.name: Serialization.AllowSidecarSyncing
cvars.description: When true FEditorBulkData will attempt to sync it's .upayload file via sourcecontrol if the first attempt to load from it fails

cvars.name: Serialization.ApplyBulkDataOffsetFix
cvars.description: When true, we will try to fix potentially bad bulkdata offsets

cvars.name: Serialization.LoadFromSidecar
cvars.description: When true FEditorBulkData will load from the sidecar file

cvars.name: Serialization.LoadFromTrailer
cvars.description: When true FEditorBulkData will load payloads via the package trailer rather than the package itself

cvars.name: Serialization.RehydrateOnSave
cvars.description: When true FVirtualizedUntypedBulkData virtualized payloads will by hydrated and stored locally when saved to a package

cvars.name: SettingsEditor.HideSetAsDefaultButton
cvars.description: Hide the Settings Editor button to save to default config.

cvars.name: sg.AntiAliasingQuality
cvars.description: Scalability quality state (internally used by scalability system, ini load/save or using SCALABILITY console command) 0:low, 1:med, 2:high, 3:epic, 4:cinematic, default: 3

cvars.name: sg.AntiAliasingQuality.NumLevels
cvars.description: Number of settings quality levels in sg.AntiAliasingQuality default: 5 (0..4)

cvars.name: sg.EffectsQuality
cvars.description: Scalability quality state (internally used by scalability system, ini load/save or using SCALABILITY console command) 0:low, 1:med, 2:high, 3:epic, 4:cinematic, default: 3

cvars.name: sg.EffectsQuality.NumLevels
cvars.description: Number of settings quality levels in sg.EffectsQuality default: 5 (0..4)

cvars.description: Scalability quality state (internally used by scalability system, ini load/save or using SCALABILITY console command) 0:low, 1:med, 2:high, 3:epic, 4:cinematic, default: 3

cvars.name: sg.FoliageQuality.NumLevels
cvars.description: Number of settings quality levels in sg.FoliageQuality default: 5 (0..4)

cvars.name: sg.GlobalIlluminationQuality
cvars.description: Scalability quality state (internally used by scalability system, ini load/save or using SCALABILITY console command) 0:low, 1:med, 2:high, 3:epic, 4:cinematic, default: 3

cvars.name: sg.GlobalIlluminationQuality.NumLevels
cvars.description: Number of settings quality levels in sg.GlobalIlluminationQuality default: 5 (0..4)

cvars.name: sg.LandscapeQuality
cvars.description: Scalability quality state (internally used by scalability system, ini load/save or using SCALABILITY console command) 0:low, 1:med, 2:high, 3:epic, 4:cinematic, default: 3

cvars.name: sg.LandscapeQuality.NumLevels
cvars.description: Number of settings quality levels in sg.LandscapeQuality default: 5 (0..4)

cvars.name: sg.PostProcessQuality
cvars.description: Scalability quality state (internally used by scalability system, ini load/save or using SCALABILITY console command) 0:low, 1:med, 2:high, 3:epic, 4:cinematic, default: 3

cvars.name: sg.PostProcessQuality.NumLevels
cvars.description: Number of settings quality levels in sg.PostProcessQuality default: 5 (0..4)

cvars.name: sg.ReflectionQuality
cvars.description: Scalability quality state (internally used by scalability system, ini load/save or using SCALABILITY console command) 0:low, 1:med, 2:high, 3:epic, 4:cinematic, default: 3

cvars.name: sg.ReflectionQuality.NumLevels
cvars.description: Number of settings quality levels in sg.ReflectionQuality default: 5 (0..4)

cvars.name: sg.ResolutionQuality
cvars.description: Scalability quality state (internally used by scalability system, ini load/save or using SCALABILITY console command) 10..100, default: 100

cvars.name: sg.ShadingQuality
cvars.description: Scalability quality state (internally used by scalability system, ini load/save or using SCALABILITY console command) 0:low, 1:med, 2:high, 3:epic, 4:cinematic, default: 3

cvars.name: sg.ShadingQuality.NumLevels
cvars.description: Number of settings quality levels in sg.ShadingQuality default: 5 (0..4)

cvars.name: sg.ShadowQuality
cvars.description: Scalability quality state (internally used by scalability system, ini load/save or using SCALABILITY console command) 0:low, 1:med, 2:high, 3:epic, 4:cinematic, default: 3

cvars.name: sg.ShadowQuality.NumLevels
cvars.description: Number of settings quality levels in sg.ShadowQuality default: 5 (0..4)

cvars.name: sg.Test.CPUPerfIndexOverride
cvars.description: Custom override for the CPU perf index returned by the GPU benchmark.

cvars.name: sg.Test.GPUPerfIndexOverride
cvars.description: Custom override for the GPU perf index returned by the GPU benchmark.

cvars.name: sg.TextureQuality
cvars.description: Scalability quality state (internally used by scalability system, ini load/save or using SCALABILITY console command) 0:low, 1:med, 2:high, 3:epic, 4:cinematic, default: 3

cvars.name: sg.TextureQuality.NumLevels
cvars.description: Number of settings quality levels in sg.TextureQuality default: 5 (0..4)

cvars.name: sg.ViewDistanceQuality
cvars.description: Scalability quality state (internally used by scalability system, ini load/save or using SCALABILITY console command) 0:low, 1:med, 2:high, 3:epic, 4:cinematic, default: 3

cvars.name: sg.ViewDistanceQuality.NumLevels
cvars.description: Number of settings quality levels in sg.ViewDistanceQuality default: 5 (0..4)

cvars.name: shaderpipeline.MinPrecompileTasksInFlight
cvars.description: Note: Only used when threadpool PSO precompiling is active. The number of active PSO precompile jobs in flight before we will submit another batch of jobs. i.e. when the number of inflight precompile tasks drops below this threshold we can add the next batch of precompile tasks. This is to prevent bubbles between precompile batches but also to avoid saturating dispatch.

cvars.name: ShowFlag.ActorColoration
cvars.description: Allows to override a specific showflag (works in editor and game, show" only works in game and UI only in editor) Useful to run a build many time with the same showflags (when put in consolevariables.ini like "showflag.abc=0") 0: force the showflag to be OFF 1: force the showflag to be ON 2: do not override this showflag (default)"
